Chutichuan, an thisen chu Joaba lû chungah leh a thlahte lu chungah kumkhuain a lêt ang a; Davida chungah te, a thlahte chungah te, a chhûngte chungah te, a lalṭhutthlêng chungah te erawh chuan Lalpa hnên aṭanga thlamuanna kumkhuain a awm reng ang,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu a han chho va, a han bei a, a that ta a; tin, thlalêra ama inah chuan an phûm ta a.
Tin, lalin Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu sipaihote chungah a ai a awhtîr a; tin, puithiam Zadoka chu lalin Abiathara ai a awhtîr a.
Tin, lalin Simeia chu a kohtîr a, a hnênah, “Jerusalem-ah hian in sa la, chutah chuan awm la, chuta ta chu khawi dangah mah chhuak suh.
I chhuah ni, Kidron lui i kân ni la la chuan i thi ngei ngei ang tih hre rawh khai; i thisen chu nangma lû chungah ngei a awm ang,” a ti a.
Tin, Simeia chuan lal hnênah, “A dik alâwm; lalpa ka puin a sawi ang chuan i chhiahhlawhin a ti zêl ang,” a ti a. Tin, Simeia chu Jerusalem-ah chuan rei fe chu a awm a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum thum a lo vei hnu chuan Simeia chhiahhlawhte zînga pahnih chu Gath khaw lal Maaka fapa Akisa hnênah an tlân a. Tin, “Ngai teh, i chhiahhlawhte chu Gath khuaah an awm e,” tiin Simeia chu an hrilh a.
Tin, Simeia chu a tho va, a sabengtung a thuam a, a chhiahhlawhte zawng tûrin Gath khuaah Akisa hnênah chuan a kal ta a; tin, Simeia chuan Gath khua ata a chhiahhlawhte chu a va hruai ta a.
Tin, Simeia chu Jerusalem khua ata a chhuak a, Gath khuaah a va kal a, a lo haw leh tih Solomona chu an hrilh a.

Tin, lal chuan Simeia chu a kohtîr a, a hnênah, “ ‘I chhuah ni, ram danga i chhuah ni la la chuan i thi ngei ngei ang,’ ti khân Lalpa hming chhâlin chhia ka chhamtîr chein, ka hriattîr che a ni lâwm ni? Tin, nang pawhin ka hnênah khân, ‘I thusawi ka hriat hi a ṭha e,’ i tih kha.
Eng vânga Lalpa chhechham leh thu ka pêk che kha hlen lo nge i nih?” a ti a.
Tin, lal vêk chuan Simeia hnênah, “I thinlung chhûngril suahsualzia, ka pa Davida chunga i tih zia te kha i hre vek a; chutichuan, Lalpan i suahsualna hi nangma lû chungah ngei a rawn lêttîr ang.
Lal Solomona erawh chu malsâwmin a awm ang a, Davida lalṭhutthlêng chu Lalpa hmaa kumkhuaa tihngheh a ni ang,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, lal chuan Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu thu a pe a; ani chu a chhuak a, Simeia chu a va bei a, a that ta a. Tichuan, ram chu Solomona kutah tihnghehin a awm ta a.
Tin, Solomonan Aigupta lal Pharaoa nêna inkûngkaihna a siam a, Pharaoa fanu a nei a; ama in leh Lalpa in a sak hma leh, Jerusalem khua kulha a hung vêl hma loh chuan Davida khawpuiah a awmtîr a.
Mipuihote chu hmun sângahte an inthawi mai ṭhîn a, chumi hma chuan Lalpa hming atân in sak a la awm rih loh avângin.
Solomona chuan Lalpa chu a hmangaih a, a pa Davida thuruatte chu a zâwm ṭhîn a; hmun sângahte a inthawi a, rimtuite a hâl mai ṭhîn pawh a.
Tin, lal chu inthawi tûrin Gibeon khuaah a kal a, chu chu hmun sâng pawimawh taka chu a ni si a; Solomona chuan chumi maichâm chungah chuan hâlral thilhlan sângkhat zet a hlân a.
Tin, Gibeon khuaah chuan Lalpa chu Solomona hnênah zânah a mumangah a rawn inlâr a; tin, Pathianin, “Dîl teh, eng nge ka pêk ang che?” a ti a.

Tin, Solomona chuan, “I chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida kha i mit hmuha thutakah leh, felnaah leh, thinlung dik tak pua a awm ang zêl khân nang chuan a hnênah khawngaihna nasa tak i lantîr a; nangin he khawngaihna nasa tak hi a tân i vohsak a, nangin a lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr fapa i pe a, vawiina a lo awm ta ngei ang hian.
Tichuan, aw Lalpa ka Pathian, nangin i chhiahhlawh hi ka pa Davida aiah chuan lalah i lo siam ta a; kei zawng naupangchhia mai ka ni a, thu haw lam leh kal lam pawh hi ka la hre lo va.
I chhiahhlawh hi i mite i thlanho, mi tam tak, an tam avânga chhiar sên rual loh leh, a zât hriat sên rual lohte zîngah hian a awm a ni a.
Chutichuan, i mite rorêlsakna tûrin i chhiahhlawh hi hriatna thinlung pe ang che, a chhia leh a ṭha ka thliar theih nân. I mi heti zozai hi tuin nge rorêlsak thei ang le?” a ti a.
Tin, Solomonan chu thil chu a dîl avângin, chu thusawi chuan Lalpa a tilâwm hle mai a.
Tin, Pathianin a hnênah, “Nangin i tân dam reina dîl lova, hetiang hi i dîl zâwk avâng leh, i tân hausaknate pawh dîl lova, i hmêlmate thihna pawh dîl lova, i tân rorêl thiamna i dîl zâwk avângin;

ngai teh, i dîl ang chuan ka ti ta a; ngai teh, finna leh hriatna thinlung ka pe a che; tichuan, i hmaah nangmah ang rêng rêng tu mah an awm lo va, i hnuah pawh nangmah ang rêng rêng tu mah an awm tawh hek lo vang.
Tin, i dîl loh, hausakna leh ropuina pawh ka pe bawk a che; tichuan, i dam chhûngin lal zîngah chuan nangmah ang rêng rêng an awm lo vang.
I pa Davidan a zawh anga ka thuruatte leh ka thupêkte pawm tûra ka kawngte i zawh chuan ka dam reitîr bawk ang che,” a ti a.

Tin, Solomona chu a han harh a; ngai teh, mumang a lo ni a. Tin, Jerusalem-ah a kal a, Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm hmaah a ding a, hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlante a hlân a, a puipa zawng zawngte tân ruai a ṭheh a.
Hmeichhe pahnih, nawhchizuar hi lal hnênah chuan an kal a, a hmaah an han ding a.
Tin, hmeichhe pakhat chuan, “Aw ka pu, he hmeichhia nên hian in khata chêng dûn kan ni a; chumi ina a awm ve lai chuan nau ka hring a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, ka nau hrin achin ni thum hnuah chuan he hmeichhia pawh hian a hring ve a. Awm dûn kan ni a; chu ina awm keimahni pahnih ngawt lo chu, chu inah chuan tu mah mikhual awm an awm lo va.
Tin, he hmeichhe fa hi zânah a lo thi a; a delh hlum a ni.
Tichuan, zanlaiah a tho va, i bâwihnu hi a muthilh hlânin, ka fapa, ka bula mi chu a la a, a pawm a, a fa thia chu mi pawmtîr a.
A tûk zînga ka fa hnute pe tûra ka han thawh chuan, ngai teh, a thi a lo ni reng mai a; nimahsela, zînga ka han en chian chuan, ngai teh, ka fapa, ka hrina kha a lo ni hauh lo mai a,” a ti a.

Tin, hmeichhe dang chuan, “Ni lo, a dam zâwka hi ka fapa a ni a, a thia hi i fapa a ni,” a ti ve a. Pakhat chuan, “Ni lo, a thia hi i fapa a ni a, a dama hi ka fapa a ni zâwk,” a la ti tlat bawk a. Chutiang chuan lal hmaah chuan an sawi ve ve a.
Tichuan, lal chuan, “Pakhatin, ‘A dam zâwka hi ka fapa a ni a, a thia hi i fapa a ni,’ a ti a; tin, pakhatin, ‘Ni lo, a thia hi i fapa a ni a, a dama hi ka fapa a ni zâwk,’ a ti bawk si a,” a ti a.
Tin, lal chuan, “Khandaih mi han lâk teh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, khandaih chu lal hmaah chuan an rawn la a.
Tin, lal chuan, “Naute dama kha bung hnihah chhuah ula, a chanve chu pakhat kha pe ula, a chanve chu pakhat kha pe rawh u,” a ti a.

Tichuan, naute dama nu chuan a fa chu a lainat êm êm mai si a, lal hnênah chuan, “Aw ka pu, naute dama hi amah pe mai rawh, a thah zawng that lul suh ang che,” a ti a. Pakhat zâwk erawh chuan, “Ka ta ni bîk hek suh, i ta ni bîk hek suh; bung mai rawh,” a ti a.
Tichuan, lal chuan a chhâng a, “Naute dama kha pe rawh u, that hlek suh u; amah ngei kha a nu a nih kha,” a ti a.
Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan chu thûa lal rêl dân chu an lo hria a, lal chu an ṭih ta hle mai a; rorêlna tûrin Pathian finna chu amahah chuan a awm tih an hre ta si a.
Tin, Lal Solomona chu Israel-ho zawng zawng lalah a awm ta a.
Hêngte hi a mi lianho neihte chu an ni: Zadoka fapa Azaria chu puithiam a ni a;
Sisa fapa, Elihorepha leh Ahija-te chu lehkhaziaktu an ni a; Ahiluda fapa Jehosaphata chu chanchin ziaktu a ni a;
Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu sipai hotu a ni a; Zadoka leh Abiathara chu puithiam an ni a;
Nathana fapa Azaria chu hotute chunga mi a ni a; Nathana fapa Zabuda chu puithiam leh lal ṭhian a ni fâwm a;
Ahisara chu in chhûng lam hotu a ni a; Abda fapa Adonirama chu hnathawka rawih luihte hotu a ni.

Tin, Solomona chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng chungah chuan hotu sâwm leh pahnih a nei a, chûngho chuan lal tân leh a chhûngkuate tân chuan ei tûr an ngaihtuah ṭhîn a; mi pakhatin kum khatah thla khat zêl ei tûr a ngaihtuah tûr a ni.
Hêngte hi an hmingte chu a ni: Ephraim tlâng ramah Ben-hura;
Makaz khuaah te, Saalbim khuaah te, Beth-semes khuaah te, Elon-beth-hanan khuaah te Ben-dekera;
Aruboth ramah Ben-heseda; ani chuan Soko leh Hepher ram zawng zawng a chang tel a;
Dor khaw zosang ram zawng zawngah Ben-abinadaba; ani chuan Solomona fanu Taphathi nupuiah a nei a;
Taanak khua leh Meggido khuaah te, Jezreel khaw hnuai, Zarethan khaw bula awm Beth-san bial zawng zawngah te, Beth-san aṭanga Abel-mehola-ah te, Jokneam ram dep thlengin Ahiluda fapa Baana;

Ramoth-gilead khuaah Ben-gebera; ani chuan Manasea fapa Jaira khua, Gilead rama awmte chu a chang tel a; Basan rama Argob bial, khaw ropui tak tak khaw sawmruk, kulh leh a kalhna dâr tlâwn neite pawh a chang tel a;
Mahanaim khuaah Idova fapa Ahinadaba;
Naphtali ramah Ahimaaza; ani pawh chuan Solomona fanu Basemathi nupuiah a nei a;
Aser leh Bealoth khuaahte Husaia fapa Baana;
Isakar ramah Parua fapa Jehosaphata;
Benjamin raman Ela fapa Simeia;
Amor-ho lal Sihona leh Basan lal Oga ram, Gilead ramah Uria fapa Gebera; chu ramah chuan hotu pakhat a awm.
Juda-te leh Israel-te chu tuifinriat kama ṭiau vaivut zât zetin an tam a, an eiin an in a, hlim takin an awm ṭhîn a.

Tichuan, Solomona chuan Lui aṭangin Philistia-ho ram leh Aigupta ramri thlengin ram zawng zawng chungah chuan ro a rêl a. Lâwmmante an rawn keng ṭhîn a, Solomona dam chhûng zawng chuan a rawng an bâwl ṭhîn a.
Solomona ni khat ei tâwk chu chhangphut dip tak tehkhâwng sawmthum leh, chhangphut tehkhâwng sawmruk a ni a;
bâwngpa thau tak sâwm te, bâwngpa tla mi sawmhnih te, berâm za te nên; chûng lo pawh chu sakhi te, sangai te, sakhipa te, âr châwm thaute pawh.
Lui râl piah lam ram zawng zawng - Tipsa aṭanga Gaza thlengin, Lui ral piah lama lalho zawng zawng chungah chuan a lal a; a chheh vêla mi zawng zawngte nên chuan râlmuangin an awm hlawm a.
Tin, Solomona dam chhûng zawng chuan Juda-ho leh Israel-ho chu, Dan aṭanga Beer-seba khaw thlengin, mi tin mahni grêp hrui bulah leh mahni theipui bulah chuan thlamuang takin an awm ṭheuh va.
Tin, Solomona chuan a tawlailîr hnûktu sakawr in sîngli leh sakawr chung chuang mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih a nei a.
Chûng hotute chuan mahni chan thla zêlah, Lal Solomona leh Lal Solomona dawhkâna rawn kîl vetu zawng zawngte ei tûr chu an ngaihtuah ṭhîn a; pêk kim loh an nei ngai lo.
Mi tinin an tih tûra ruat ang zêlin a awmna tûr hmunah chuan, sakawrte leh ran tlân chak takte tân barli leh buhpâwlte an rawn dah bawk ṭhîn a.
Tin, Pathianin Solomona chu finna leh hriatna nasa tak leh, rilru zauna, tuifinriat kama ṭiau vaivut ang mai a pe a.
Solomona finna chuan khawchhak fate zawng zawng finna leh Aigupta mite finna zawng zawng chu a khûm vek a.
Mi zawng zawng aiin a fing a ni: Mahola fate - Ezra mi Ethana te, Hemana te, Kalkola te, Darda te ai pawhin; tichuan, a vêl hnam zawng zawngte zîngah chuan a hming a thang ta a.
Thufing sângthum a sawi a; tin, a hlate chu sângkhat leh panga a ni.
Thing chanchin te pawh Lebanon tlânga sidar thing aṭanga kulha lo chawr chhuak husop chenin a sawi ṭhîn a; sa chanchin te, bawkvâka kal chi chanchin te, sangha chanchin te pawh a sawi ṭhîn a.
Tichuan, Solomona finna chanchin hre tawh phawt chu, khawvêl lalho zawng zawng aṭangin, chi tina mi a finna ngaithla tûr an lo kal ṭhîn a.
Tin, Tura lal Hiraman Solomona hnênah a mite a tîr a, a pa aiah lal atân hriak an thih tih a lo hre ta si a; Hirama chu Davida ngaina ṭhîntu a ni fo rêng a.
Tin, Solomona chuan Hirama hnênah,
“Ka pa Davida khân Lalpan a kephah hnuaia a dah hma loh kha chuan a vêl kil tin kil tanga indonate avâng khân, Lalpa a Pathian hming atân in a sa thei lo tih i hria a.
Tûnah erawh chuan Lalpa ka Pathianin kil tin kil tangah muanna min lo neihtîr ta a; hmêlmate an awm ta lo va, vânduaina pawh a awm ta hek lo.

Tin, ngai teh, Lalpan ka pa Davida hnêna, ‘I fapa, i aia i lalṭhutthlêng ka la luahtîr tûra chuan ka hming atân in chu a la sa ang,’ tia a lo sawi tawh ang khân, Lalpa ka Pathian hming atân in sak ka tum a.

Chutichuan, Lebanon tlânga mi sidar thingte mi kihsak tûrin thu pe langin, ka chhiahhlawhte pawh i chhiahhlawhte zîngah an tel ve ang a; tin, i chhiahhlawhte hlawh chu i sawi ang apiang ka pe zêl ang che; Zidon mite anga thing kih thiam kan zîngah tu mah an awm lo tih i hre si,” tiin mi a tîr a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Hiraman Solomona thu a lo hriat chuan a lâwm ta êm êm mai a, “Hêng mi tam tak chunga rorêl tûra fapa fing tak Davida petu Lalpa chu vawiinah hian fakin awm rawh se,” a ti a.
Tin, Hiraman Solomona hnênah, “I thu mi han chah chu ka lo hria a; sidar thing thu leh fâr thing thu chu i mamawh apiang ka lo ti ang e.

Ka chhiahhlawhten Lebanon tlâng aṭangin tuifinriat thlengin an rawn la thla ang a; i hmun mi ruatsak tûra tuifinriata tawlh tûrin ka têltîr ang a, chumi hmunah chuan ka phelhtîr ang a, nangin i lo la dâwn nia; tin, nang pawhin ka chhûngkuate ei tûr tumin ka mamawh i lo phuhru ve thung a ni ang chu,” tiin mi a tîr a.
Chutichuan, Hirama chuan sidar thing leh fâr thing chu Solomona hnênah a mamawh apiang a pe a.
Tin, Solomonan Hirama chu a chhûngkuate ei atân buh tehkhâwng sînghnih leh hriak sâwr tehkhâwng sawmhnih a pe a. Chu chu Solomonan kum tina Hirama a pêk ṭhin dân chu a ni.
Tin, Lalpan a tiam ang ngeiin Solomona chu finna a pe a; tin, Hirama leh Solomona kârah chuan inremna a awm a, an pahnih chuan thu an thlung dûn ta a.
Tin, Lal Solomona chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng zînga mi hnathawka rawih luih pâwl a siam a; rawih luih pâwl chu mi sîngthum an ni.
Lebanon-ah chuan thla khata inthlâk zêlin sîngkhat a tîr ṭhîn a: thla khat Lebanon-ah an han awm a, thla hnih anmahni in lamah; Adonirama chu hnathawka rawih luihte hotu a ni.
Tin, Solomona chuan thil phur mi sîngsarih leh, lung chhêr mi sîngriat tlângahte a nei a;
chûngte chu tiam lovin Solomona chuan a hna chunga hotu bîk, hnathawk vêngtu sângthum leh zathum a nei bawk a.
Tin, lal thupêkin in lungphûm chu lung chher saa rem tûrin lung lian pui pui, lung man tam tak takte an rawn la a.
Tin, in satuho, Solomona mite leh Hirama mite leh Gebal mite chuan lungte chu an chher a, in sakna tûr chuan thing leh lungte chu an buatsaih a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata an chhuah achin kum zali leh sawmriatna kum, Israel-hote chunga Solomona a lal kum lina, Ziv thla, thla hnihnaah chuan Lalpa in sak chu a ṭan a.
Tin, Solomonan Lalpa tâna in a sak chu a dung lam tawng sawmruk a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a sân lam chu tawng sawmthum a ni.
Tin, chumi ina hmun thianghlim hma lama hulhliap chu a in vâng lam chen, tawng sawmhniha sei a ni a, a hma lama mi vâng lam chu tawng sâwm a ni.
Tin, in atân chuan tukverh zîm tê thil kawkalh awmin a siam a.
Tin, a in bang vêlin, biak in bang vêlah pawh, biakna hmun bang vêlah pawh chumi in bang si chuan in chhâwng nei a sa a; tin, a vêl chuan pindan a siam a.

A chhâwng hnuaihnung ber chu a vâng lam tawng nga a ni a, a laita chu a vâng lam tawng ruk a ni a, a pathumna chu a vâng lam tawng sarih a ni; kalkhangte chu in banga inrawlh ngai lovin pâwn lamah chuan a vêlin in bangah chuan a nghahna a siam vâng a ni.
Tin, in chu, an sak lai chuan lung a laihna hmuna chher sa veka sak a ni; tichuan, an sak chhûng zawng chu tuboh ri te, hreipui ri te, thîr hriamhrei ri rêng rêngte chumi inah chuan hriat a ni lo.
Pindan laita berte kawngka chu chumi in ding lampangah chuan a awm a. A laitaah chuan rahka vialah an lâwn chho va; tin, a laita aṭang chuan a pathumnaah.
Chutichuan, in chu a han sa a, a zo ta a; in chu sidar khanchhuk leh a phêkin a khuh a.
Tin, in chhâwng neite chu a in si vekin tawng nga ṭheuhva sângin a sa a; chûngte chu in nên chuan sidar thinga zawm a ni.
Tin, Lalpa thu chu Solomona hnênah a lo thleng a,

“He in i sak lai mêk chungchâng thu hi - ka thuruatte i pawma, ka rorêlte i zawma, ka thupêk zawng zawngte zâwm tûra i pawm phawt zawngin, i pa Davida hnêna ka lo sawi tawh, ka thu kha i chungah hian ka tinghet ang.
Tin, Israela thlahte zîngah hian ka chêng ang a, ka mi Israel-hote hi ka thlahthlam lo vang,” tiin.
Tichuan, Solomona chuan in chu a sa a, a zo ta a.
In chhûng lam bangah chuan sidar thing phel a hmang a; a chhuat aṭanga chung lam thlengin a chhûng lamah chuan thing a bel vek a; a chhuatah chuan fâr thing phel a phah belh a.
Tin, kawmchâr lam tawng sawmhnih chu a chhuat aṭanga a bangte chenin sidar thing phel vekin a siam a; biakna hmun, hmun thianghlim ber atân pawh a chhûng lamah chuan a hmang a.
Tin, in, biakna hmun bula biak in chu a dung lam tawng sawmli a ni.
Tin, in chhûng lamah chuan a kuhmûm leh a pâr parh lema ker mawi sidar thing a awm a. A vai chuan sidar thing vek a ni a; lung rêng rêng a lang lo.
Tin, Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm dahna tûrin chumi inah a chhûnga biakna lamah chuan hmun a buatsaih a.

Tin, chumi biakna hmun chhûng chu a dung lam tawng sawmhnih, a vâng lam tawng sawmhnih, a sân lam tawng sawmhnih a ni a. Chu chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin a luan a; tin, sidar maichâm chu a luan bawk a.
Chutichuan, Solomona chuan chumi in chhûng chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin a luan a. Pindan chhûngril ber luhna kawngkaah chuan rangkachak khaidiat a thlung a, rangkachakin a luan a.
Tin, in chu a zaa a peih thlengin a pumin rangkachak tîin a luan zêl a; biakna hmuna maichâm pum pui pawh chu rangkachak tîin a luan a.
Tin, biakna hmunah chuan tawng sâwm ve vea sâng, cherub pahnih olive thingin a siam a.
Tin, cherub thla pakhat chu tawng nga a ni a, cherub thla lehlam chu tawng nga bawk a ni: thla pakhat hmâwr aṭanga a thla lehlam hmâwr inkâr chu tawng sâwm a ni.
Cherub pakhat pawh chu tawng sâwm a ni a; cherub-te chu intiat chiah leh pian dân inang ve ve chiah an ni.
Cherub pakhat sân zâwng chu tawng sâwm a ni a, cherub pakhat pawh chu chumi chen bawk chu a ni.

Tin, cherub-te chu in chhûngril zâwkan chuan a dah a; tin, cherub-te thla chu a inzâr a, pakhat thla chuan bang lehlam a va dek a, cherub pakhat thla pawhin bang lehlam chu a dek bawk a. Chumi in lai takah chuan an thla leh an thla chu a insi a.
Tin, cherub-te chu rangkachak tîin a luan a.
Tin, in bang zawng zawngte chu a vêlin cherub te, tûm thing leh pangpâr parh lem ker mawite in chhûng lam leh pâwn lamah chuan a siam a.
Tin, a in chhuat chu chhûng lam leh pâwn lamah rangkachak tîin a luan a.
Tin, biakna hmun luhna atân olive thing kawngkhâr a siam a; kawngka lû chung leh kawngka biangte chu a bang hmun ngaa ṭhena hmun khat tiat a ni.

Tichuan, olive thingin kawngkhâr pahnih a siam a; chumiah chuan cherub-te, tûm thing leh pangpâr parh lemte ker mawiin a siam a, chûng chu rangkachak tîin a luan a; tin, cherub-te leh tûm thingte chu rangkachak a hnawih a.
Tin, biak in luhna atân a bang hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat tiatin olive thing kawngka ban a siam a.
Fâr thingin kawngkhâr pahnih a siam bawk a; kawngkhâr pakhata phêk hnih chu thlep thei a ni a, kawngkhâr pakhata phêk hnih pawh chu thlep thei a ni.
Chûngahte chuan cherub-te, tûm thing leh pangpâr parh lemte a ker a; chûng ker mawi chu mâm takin rangkachak tîin a luan a.
Biak in hung chhûng kawtlai chhûngril zâwk chu lung chher chhâwng thum leh sidar thing phel thuah khatin a siam a.
A kum lina, Ziv thlaah chuan Lalpa in lungphûm chu rem a ni a.
Tin, kum sâwm leh kum khatna, Bul thla, thla riatnaah chuan in chu ruahman ang chiahin a engkim chu peih vek a ni a. Chutichuan, kum sarih a sa a ni.
Tin, Solomona chuan ama in chu kum sâwm leh kum thum a sa a, a in chu a peih vek a.
Lebanon Ngawpui In sidar ban tlar li, ban chunga sidar thing phel chungah chuan a sa bawk a; a dung lam chu tawng za a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a sân lam chu tawng sawmthum a ni.
Tin, chu chu bana innghat pindan sawmli leh panga chung lamah chuan sidar thing phela khuh a ni a; tlar khatah chuan sâwm leh panga zêl.
Tin, tlar thumin tukverh a awm a, êng leh êngte chu tlar thumin a inep vek a.
Tin, kawngkhâr leh ban zawng zawngte chu thing phelin kil lia siam a ni a; êng leh êngte chu tlar thumin a inep vek a.
Tin, hulhliap chu ban neiin a siam a: a dung lam chu tawng sawmnga a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmthum a ni a; tin, chûng hmaahte chuan hulhliap a siam a, bante leh a hmaa luhna kailâwnte nên.
Tin, a rorêlna tûr lalṭhutthlêng hulhliap, rorêlna hulhliap chu a siam bawk a; chu chu chhuat lehlam aṭanga a lehlam thlenga sidar thinga khuh a ni.
Tin, a awmna tûr in, hulhliap chhûng, hung chhûng kawtlai danga awm chu chutiang bawka siam a ni. Pharaoa fanu (Solomonan nupuia a neih) chu hulhliap ang bawk chuan a in a saksak bawk a.

Chûng zawng zawng chu lung man tam tak tak, lung a tâwk chiah zêla chher, zainaa zaia sak a ni a, chhûng lam pawh, pâwn lam pawh a lungphûm aṭanga a lêr thlengin; tin, chutiang bawkin pâwn lamah hung chhûng kawtlai zau tak thlengin.
Tin, lungphûm chu lung man tam tak tak, lung lian pui pui, lung tawng sâwm te, lung tawng riat tea rem a ni a.
Chumi chung lam chu lung man tam tak tak, lung a tâwk chiah zêla chher, leh sidar thing a ni a.
Tin, a vêlin hung chhûng kawtlai zau tak chu lung chher chhâwng thum leh sidar thing phel thuah khata hung a ni a; Lalpa in hung chhûng kawtlai chhûngril zâwk leh, in hulhliap ang bawk khân.
Tin, Lal Solomona chuan mi a tîr a, Tura khua ata Hirama a ko va.

Chu mi chu Naphtali hnam hmeithai fa a ni a, a pa chu Tura khuaa mi, dâr chher mi a ni; ani chu dâr chher kawngah rêng rêng chuan a fingin a hre thiamin a themthiam hle mai a. Lal Solomona hnênah chuan a kal a, hna zawng zawng chu a thawhsak vek a.
Tin, dâr ban pahnih a siam a, tawng sâwm leh tawng riata sâng ve ve, teh kuala tawng sâwm leh tawng hnih ve ve a ni a.
Ban chhîpa dah tûr dâr chhûn bâwk pahnih a siam a: bâwk pakhat sân lam chu tawng nga a ni a, bâwk pakhat sân lam pawh chu tawng nga a ni.
Ban chhîpa bâwk atân te chuan ṭial chik chek leh herh chîn chiante hi a awm a; bâwk pakhat atân chuan pasarih, bâwk dang pakhat atân pawh chuan pasarih bawk.
Tichuan, bante chu a siam a; chûng ban chhîpa bâwkte tuamna tûr chuan ṭial chik chek pakhat chungah a vêlin tlar hnih a awm a; tin, chutiang bawk chuan bâwk pakhat chungah pawh a awmtîr bawk a.
Hulhliap chhîpa bâwkah chuan lili lem hi a chuang a, tawng li a ni.
Ban pahnih chhîpa bâwkahte chuan a tlângah, ṭial chik chek bul lawkah chuan pawmgranet te a awm bawk a; tin, pawmgranet chu chumi bâwkahte chuan zahnih ve ve a tlarin a awm a.
Biak in hulhliapah chuan bante chu a dintîr a; ding lam ban chu a dintîr a, a hmingah Jakin a vuah a; tin, vei lam ban chu a dintîr a, a hmingah Boaz a vuah a.
A ban chhîpah chuan lili lem a chuang a; tichuan, ban lam hna chu peih a ni ta a.
Tin, dâr tuizêm lian pui, tawng sâwm tla, a sân lam tawng nga a chhûng a, a tlâng chu tawng sawmthum bial vêl a ni.
A tlâng hnuaiah chuan kuhmûm lem hian a vêl chhuak a, tawng sâwm a ni a, zêm vêl chuan a awm a. Chûng kuhmûmte chu tlar hnihin a awm a, chhûn tel nghâl a ni.

Chu chu bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih chungah a innghat a, pathumin hmâr lam an hawi a, pathumin thlang lam an hawi a, pathumin chhim lam an hawi a, pathumin chhak lam an hawi a. Tin, tuizêm chu a chungah chuan a inhûng a, an mei lam chuan chhûng lam a hawi a.
Kutphah bawka chhah a ni a; a tlâng chu lili pangpâr ang, no tlang anga siam a ni a. Bath sânghnih dawng a ni.
Hûnchhan sâwm dârin a siam bawk a; hûnchhan pakhat sei lam chu tawng li a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng li bawk a ni a, a sân lam chu tawng thum a ni.
Tin, hûnchhan siam dân chu hetiang hi a ni: chûng chuan khuar a nei a, a khuarte chu a tlângte inkârah a awm a;

a tlângte inkâr khuarahte chuan sakeibaknei te, sebâwngpa te, cherub-te a chuang a; a tlâng chungahte chuan hûnchhan a awm a. Sakeibakneite leh sebâwngpate hnuai lamah chuan cheimawina tê tête pawh a awm thliah a.

Hûnchhanahte chuan dâr tawlailîr pali leh dâr tlâwn a awm ṭheuh va, a kil liahte chuan innghahna a awm ṭheuh va. Insilna bêl hnuai lamah chuan a innghahna chhûn a awm a, a sîrah chuan cheimawina a awm ṭheuh va.

Belvâlkual chhûng kotlâng chu tawng khat tla a ni a; a rawng kotlâng chu belvâl anga bial a ni a, tawng khat leh a chanve a ni; tin, a rawng tlâng vêl chu ṭial mawi a ni a, a khuarte chu kil li a ni a, a bial lo.
Tawlailîr palite chu a khuar hnuai lamahte chuan a awm a; tin, tawlailîr tlângte chu hûnchhanah chuan a awm a. Tawlailîr sân lam chu tawng khat leh a chanve a ni.
Chûng tawlailîrte siam dân chu sakawr tawlailîr ke siam dân ang hi a ni a; a tlûng te, a belvâlkual te, a chhunkalhna te, a lai bâwkte chu chhûn vek a ni.
Tin, hûnchhan kil li ṭheuhvah chuan innghahna pali a awm a; chumi innghahnate chu hûnchhan nên pumkhat vek a ni.
A hûnchhan chungah chuan belvâlkual, tawng chanvea sâng hi a awm a. Hûnchhan chunga a hûnna kete leh a khuarte chu pumkhat vek a ni.
A hûnna ke phêkahte leh a khuarahte chuan a zau angzia ziain cherub te, sakeibaknei te, tûm thingte a chuantîr a, a vêl chuan cheimawina hi a awm thliah a.
Chutiang vek chuan hûnchhan sâwmte chu a siam a. A vai chuan pumkhata chhûn a ni ṭheuh va, intiat ṭhiau, siam dân inang chiah vek a ni.
Tin, insilna bêl sâwm dârin a siam a; insilna bêl pakhat chuan bath sawmli a dawng a, insilna bêl chu tawng li ṭheuh a ni. Hûnchhan sâwm chungah chuan insilna bêl pakhat a inhûng ṭheuh va.
Tin, hûnchhante chu in ding lampangah panga a hûng a, in vei lampangah panga. Tuizêm chu in ding lampangah chhak lamah chhim chhawngin a hûng a.
Hirama chuan insilna bêl te, vut lawhna te, maihûnte a siam a. Chutichuan, Hirama chuan Lalpa in atâna Solomona a siamsak zawng zawng chu a peih ta vek a:
ban pahnih te, ban chhîpa bêl anga bâwk pahnih tuamna ṭial chik chek pahnih te,
chumi tuamna ṭial chik chek pahnih atâna pawmgranet zali te, ban chhîpa bêl anga bâwk pahnih tuamna tûr ṭial chik chek ve ve atâna pawmgranet tlar hnihte kha;
hûnchhan sâwm leh hûnchhan chunga insilna bêl sâwm te,
tuizêm leh a hnuaia sebâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih te,
bêlte leh, vut lawhte leh, maihûnte nên. Chûng bungbêl zawng zawng Lalpa in atâna Hiraman Lal Solomona a siamsak chu dâr nawh tlêta siam vek a ni.
Jordan phaizâwlah Sukkoth leh Zarethan inkâr bellei hmunah a ni, lal chuan a chhûn ni.
Tin, Solomona chuan chûng bungbêl zawng zawng chu a tam êm êm avângin bûk chhuah lohvin a dah mai a; dâr bûk zât chu hriat chhuah rual a ni lo.
Tin, Solomona chuan Lalpa ina bungbêl awm zawng zawng chu a siam a; rangkachak maichâm leh chhangdah awmna dawhkân chu rangkachakin;
biakna hmun hmazâwn khâwnvâr dahna ding lama panga leh vei lama panga chu rangkachak hlîr hlakin; pangpâr te, khâwnvâr te leh chaichehte chu rangkachakin;

no te, khâwnvâr puan chehna te, maihûn te, fian te, mei lâknate chu rangkachak hlîr hlakin; in chhûngril zâwk, hmun thianghlim ber kawngkhâra mite leh in (biak in chu) kawngkhâr vuahnate chu rangkachakin.

Chutichuan, Lal Solomonan Lalpa in atâna a siam zawng zawng chu a lo peih ta vek a; tichuan, Solomona chuan a pa Davida lo hlan sa tawh - tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbêl te chu a la lût a, Lalpa ina rote zîngah a dah ta a.

Chutichuan, Solomona chuan Israel upaho te, an hnam puipa zawng zawng te, Israela thlahho chhûngkaw puipate chu, Jerusalem khuaa Lal Solomona hnênah chuan Davida khawpui Zion ata Lalpa thuthlung bâwm zâwn chho tûrin a khâwm chiam a.
Tin, Israel mi zawng zawng chu Ethanim thla (thla sarihnaah chuan) kûtnaah Lal Solomona hnênah an inkhâwm chiam a.
Tin, Israel upaho zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, puithiamte chuan bâwm chu an zâwn a.
Tin, Lalpa bâwm leh, inbiakna puan in leh, chuta bungbêl thianghlim zawng zawng chu an zâwn chho va; chûngte chu puithiamte leh Levi chite chuan an zâwn chho va.

Tin, Lal Solomona leh Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng, a hnêna rawn inkhâwmte chu bâwm hmaah an awm ho va, berâm leh bâwngpa, a tam avânga chhiar sên rual loh leh a zât hriat sên rual lohvin an inthawi a.
Tichuan, puithiamte chuan Lalpa thuthlung bâwm chu a awmna tûrah an la lût a, in chhûnga biakna hmun, hmun thianghlim berah, cherub-te thla hnuaiah chuan.
Cherub-te chuan bâwm awmna chung zâwnah chuan an thla an zâr reng si a, cherub-te chuan bâwm leh a zâwnfungte chu an huap vek a.

Tin, a zâwnfungte chu a sei khawp a, a zâwnfung hmâwrte chu biakna hmunhma, hmun thianghlim aṭang chuan a hmuh theih a; amaherawhchu, pâwn lamah zawng a lang lo. Tûn thleng hian chutah chuan a la awm reng a ni.
Aigupta ram ata an chhuaha Lalpan Israela thlahte hnêna thu a thlun laia, Mosian Horeb tlânga lungphêk pahnih a dahte chauh lo kha chu, chumi bâwm chhûngah chuan eng mah dang a awm lo.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, puithiamhote chu hmun thianghlim ata an lo chhuah veleh chuan Lalpa in chu chhûm chuan a khat ta mup mai a;
tichuan, chhûm avâng chuan puithiamte chu rawngbâwlin an awm thei ta lo hial a; Lalpa ropuinain Lalpa in chu a tikhat ta vek si a.
Chutichuan, Solomona chuan thu a sawi ta a: “ Lalpan, ‘Thim chhah mupah chuan ka awm ang,’ a ti rêng a.
I chênna tûr in, kumkhuaa i awmna tûr chu ka lo saksak ta ngei che a nih hi,” a ti a.
Tin, lal chu a lehhawi a, Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng chu mal a sâwm a; tichuan, Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng chu an ding ṭhup a.

Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, ka pa Davida hnêna ama kâ ngeia, ‘Aigupta ram ata ka mi Israel-te ka hruai chhuah ni aṭangin Israel-ho hnam zînga khawii khua mah hi ka hming awmna tûr in sak nân ka la thlang ngai lo va; amaherawhchu, ka mi Israel-te hotu atân hian Davida hi ka thlang a ni,’ tia lo sawitu, ama kut ngeia rawn puitlintu hi fakin awm rawh se.
Ka pa Davida khân Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hming atân in sak a rilruin a tum ṭhîn a.
Nimahsela, Lalpan ka pa Davida hnênah, ‘I rilruah chuan ka hming atân in sak i tum ṭhîn a, hetiang rilru i lo pu hi i tiṭha e.
Nimahsela, nang zawngin in chu i sa lo vang; i fapa, i ṭhâlbea la chhuak tûra chuan ka hming atân in chu a la sa zâwk ang,’ a lo ti tawh a.

Tin, Lalpan a thusawi chu a rawn tinghet ta a; Lalpa lo tiam tawh ang ngeiin ka pa Davida hmun chu ka lo luah tain, Israel lalṭhutthlêngah chuan ka lo ṭhu ta a; Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hming atân in chu ka lo sa ta ngei si a.
Chutah chuan bâwm awmna tûr hmun chu ka lo ruat ta a, chumiah chuan Aigupta ram ata a hruai chhuah laia kan pute hnêna a lo thlun, Lalpa thuthlung chu a awm a,” a ti a.
Tin, Solomona chu Lalpa maichâm hmaa Israel pung khâwmho zawng zawng hmuhah a ding a, vân lam banin a kut a phar a,

“Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, i chhiahhlawh, an thinlung zawng zawnga i mit hmuha awm ṭhate hnêna thuthlung hlena khawngaihna tilang ṭhîn, i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnêna thutiam hlentu, chung lam vânah leh hnuai lam leiah hian nangmah ang hi Pathian dang rêng rêng an awm lo ve; a ni, nangin i kâin thu i sawi a, i kutin i rawn hlawhtlintîr ta a, vawiina a lo awm ta ngei ang hian.

Chutichuan, aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnêna, ‘I thlahte chu ka mit hmuha i awm anga ka mit hmuha awm ve tûra an awm dâna an fîmkhur phawt chuan, ka mit hmuhah Israel-te lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr i hmai lo vang,’ tia i lo tiam tâk kha hlen ang che.
Chutichuan, aw Israel-te Pathian, nangin i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnêna thu i lo sawi tawh kha khawngaih takin thlentîr ngei ang che.
Nimahsela, Pathian chu leiah hian a awm tak meuh ang emaw chu? Ngai teh, vân leh vânte vânah pawh i leng lo a ni a; he ka in sakah hian i va leng lo nasa lehzual âwm êm!
Nimahsela, aw Lalpa ka Pathian, vawiina i chhiahhlawhin a auhna che leh ṭawngṭaina a chham hi ngaihthlâksakin, i chhiahhlawh ṭawngṭaina leh dîlna hi rawn ngaihsak ang che:

hemi hmun lam hawia i chhiahhlawh hian ṭawngṭaina a chham tûr chu ngaithlaa nangin, ‘Chutah chuan ka hming chu a awm ang,’ i tihna hmun ngei in lamah hian chhûn leh zâna i mit i lên reng ṭhin theihna tûrin.

Tin, i chhiahhlawh leh i mi Israel-te hian hemi hmun lam hawia an ṭawngṭai hunin an dîlnate lo ngaihthlâksak ṭhîn ang che. A ni, i chênna hmun vânan lo ngaithla langin; tin, lo ngaithlain ngaidam ang che.
Mi tu pawhin a vêngte chungah thil tisualin, chhechhamtîr hial lo ṭûl sela, hemi ina i maichâm hmaah hian rawn chham sela,

nangin vân aṭangin lo ngaithla langin, che la, mi sual chu ama lû chungah ngei a awm dân nghata thiam loh chantîrin, mi fel chu a felna ang ang hlawhtîra thiam chantîrin i chhiahhlawhte ro rêlsak ang che.
I mi Israel-te hian i chungah thil an tihsual avânga hmêlmate laka an lo tlâwma i lam an lo hawi leha, i hming an faka, hemi ina ṭawngṭaia thil an rawn dîl chuan,
nangin vân aṭangin lo ngaihthlâksak la, i mi Israel-te sualna chu ngaidam la, an pute ram i pêkah hruai leh ang che.
I chunga thil an tihsual avânga vân a pina, ruahte a lo sûr loh hunah chuan, hemi hmun lam hawia an ṭawngṭaia, i hming an faka, anmahni i tihretheih avânga an sualte an sim chuan,

nangin vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, i chhiahhlawhte leh i mi Israel-te sualna hi ngaidam langin, an kalna tûr kawng ṭha i kawhhmuh dâwn si a; tin, i mite an rochan atâna i pêk i ramah hian ruah han sûrtîr ang che.

Kan ramah hian ṭâm te a lo tlâka, hri te a lo lêna, rona emaw, ṭawihna emaw, khaukhuap emaw, pangang emaw a lo awma, an hmêlmaten an kawngka vêlahte an rawn huala, hri eng pawh, natna eng pawh a lo thlen chuan,
i mi Israel zawng zawng zînga mahni thinlunga hri awma hriaa, hemi in lam hawia kut rawn phar apiangin ṭawngṭaina leh dîlna an rawn hlan rêng rêng chu,

i awmna vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, ngaidam la, che la, nang an thinlung hretu, mi tin an awm dân ang zêlin hlawhtîr ang che (nang zawng, nangmah chauh hi mihring fa zawng zawng thinlung hretu i ni si a);
kan pute i pêk rama an awm chhûng zawng hian an ṭih theihna tûr chein.
I mi Israel-te ni lo hnam dang mi, i hming avânga ram hla tak ata lo kalte chungchâng thu pawh hi
(i hming ropui tak te, i kut chak tak te, i bân i phar thûte hi an la hre hlawm dâwn si a): chûngte chuan hemi in lam hawia an rawn ṭawngṭai hunin,

nangin i awmna vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, hnam dang mi chuan a dîl ang ang che chu lo tihsak ang che; i mi Israel-te ang bawka khawvêla hnam tinin i hming an hriata, an ṭih chia, hemi ka in sak hian i hming a pu a ni tih an lo hriat theih nân.
I miten an hmêlmate chu i tirhna lam apiangah lo bei sela, i khawpui thlan lam hawi leh, i hming atân in ka lo sak lam hawia Lalpa hnêna an ṭawngṭai chuan,
an ṭawngṭaina leh an dîlna chu nangin vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, an thûah che ang che.
I chunga thil an tihsuala (tu mah thil tisual lo an awm âwm si lo va), an chunga i thinura, hmêlma kuta i pêka, hmêlma ram hla takah emaw, hnai teah emaw pawh sala an hruaia,
sala an hruaina rama an inngaihtuah chhuaha, an inchhîra, ‘Thil kan lo tisual a, dik lo tak leh sual takin kan ti ta,’ tia sala hruaitute rama an rawn ngen chea,
an hmêlma sala hruaitute rama an thinlung tak leh an rilru taka i lam an lo hawia, an pute i pêk ram lam leh, i khawpui thlan lam leh i hming tâna ka in sak lam hawia i hnêna an ṭawngṭai chuan,
an ṭawngṭaina leh an dîlna chu nangin i awmna vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, an thûah che ang che;
tin, i mi i chunga thil tisualtute leh i laka an lo bawhchhiat kawnga an bawhchhiatna zawng zawng chu ngaidam la; sala hruaitute chuan anmahni an khawngaih theih nân khawngaihna neihtîr ang che,
i mi, i rochan, Aigupta ram ata, thîr rawh tuina chhûng ata i hruai chhuahte an ni si a;
an auh apiang chea i lo ngaihthlâk tûra i chhiahhlawh dîlna leh, i mi Israel dîlna lama i mit i len theih nân.
Aw Lalpa Pathian, kan pute Aigupta ram ata i hruai chhuah laia i chhiahhlawh Mosia hmanga i sawi angin, i rochan atân khawvêl hnam tin zîng ata i tihrang a ni si a,” a ti a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan Lalpa hnêna a ṭawngṭaina leh dîlna zawng zawng a chham zawh chuan, Lalpa maichâm lama ṭhingṭhia, vân lam bana kut phara a awm chu a tho va.

Tin, a ding a, aw ring takin, “A thutiam zawng zawng ang zêla a mi Israel-te chawlhna petu Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se. A chhiahhlawh Mosia hmanga a thutiam ṭha zawng zawng kha thu pakhat mah a thlâwn lo va.
Lalpa kan Pathian chu kan pute hnêna a awm ang khân kan hnênah awm sela; min kalsanin, min thlahthlam suh se;
tichuan, a kawng zawng zawng zawh tûr leh, kan pute thu a pêk tawh anga a thupêkte, a thuruatte, a rorêlte pawm tûra kan thinlungte a lama a hawitîr theihna tûrin.

Tin, Lalpa hi Pathian a ni a, tu mah dang an awm lo tih khawvêla hnam tinin an lo hriat theihna tûra a chhiahhlawh thûah leh, a mi Israel-te thûah hian a ni zir ang zêla a chêt theihna tûrin hêng ka thusawi, Lalpa hmaa dîlna ka thlente hi chhûn leh zân Lalpa kan Pathian hmaah chuan châm reng rawh se.
Chutichuan, a thuruat anga awm tûr leh a thupêkte zâwm tûrin Lalpa kan Pathian lamah chuan in thinlungte ṭha famkim rawh se, vawiin ang hian,” tiin Israel pung khâwmho zawng zawng chu mal a sâwm a.
Tin, lal leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan Lalpa hmaah inthawina an hlân za a.

Tin, Solomonan Lalpa tâna a hlan remna thilhlan inthawi nân sebâwngpa sînghnih leh sânghnih leh, berâm nuai khat leh sînghnih a hlân a. Chutiang chuan lal leh Israela thlahte zawng zawng chuan Lalpa in chu an hlân a ni.

Chumi ni vêkah chuan lalin Lalpa in hma zâwna hung chhûng kawtlai tak chu a tithianghlim a, chutah chuan hâlral thilhlan te, chhangphut thilhlan te, remna thilhlan sa thau te chu a hlân a, Lalpa hmaa dâr maichâm chu chûng thilhlante dawng tûra a têt luattuk avângin.

Chutichuan, chumi ṭum chuan Solomona leh Israel-ho zawng zawng, mipui pung khâwmho tam tak, Hamath khaw luhna achin Aigupta ram lui thlenga mite chu, Lalpa kan Pathian hmaah chuan ni sarih leh ni sarih - ni sâwm leh ni li chhûng zet an kût za a.

A ni riat ni chuan mipuihote chu a ṭîntîr a; tin, lal chu mal an sâwm a, Lalpan a chhiahhlawh Davida leh a mi Israel-te chunga a ṭhatna chuti zozaia a lantîr avâng chuan rilru hlim leh lâwm takin an in lamah an haw ta a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan Lalpa in leh lal in a saka, Solomonan châk taka a tum zawng zawng a tih zawh vek hnuah chuan,
Gibeon khuaa a hnêna a inlâr ang khân Lalpa chu Solomona hnênah a rawn inlâr leh a.

Tin, Lalpa chuan a hnênah, “I ṭawngṭaina leh i dîlna ka hmaa i rawn thlente kha ka lo ngaithla a; hemi in i sak hi kumkhuaa ka hming awmtîr nân ka tithianghlim tawh e, ka mit leh ka thinlung chu chutah chuan a awm kumkhua tawh ang.
Tin, nang pawh hi thu ka pêk apiang che anga ti tûra i pa Davida awm anga thinlung ṭha tak pu leh rilru dik tak pua ka mit hmuha i awma, ka thuruatte leh ka rorêlte i pawm reng zawngin,
Israel-te chungah hian i ram lalṭhutthlêng chu kumkhua atân ka tinghet ang, i pa Davida hnêna, ‘Israel-te lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr i hmai lo vang,’ tia ka lo tiam tawh ang khân.
Amaherawhchu, nangin emaw, in thlahten emaw min zui chu min kîrsana, ka thupêkte leh ka thuruatte ka hriattîr che u hi in pawm lohva, pathian dangte rawng in va bâwla, in va biak chuan,

Israel-hote hi ram ka pêk ata ka tiboral ang a; tin, hemi in, ka hming atâna ka tihthianghlim tawh sa hi ka mit hmuh phâk lohvah ka sawn bo daih ang. Tichuan, Israel-te hi hnam tinrêngte zîngah tihelna leh a chhe lam tehkhinnaah hman an la ni ang.
Tin, he in hi sâng teh mah sela, a kal pêl apiangte chu mak tiin an la faifûk ang a, ‘Engati nge Lalpan he ram leh he in hi heti taka a tih le?’ an ti ang.

Tin, miten, ‘ Lalpa an Pathian, an pute Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu kha an kalsana, pathian dangte an vawna, an biaka, an rawng te an bâwl tâk vâng a ni; chuvângin, Lalpan hêng chhiatna zawng zawng hi an chungah a rawn thlentîr ta a nih hi,’ tiin an la chhâng ang,” a ti a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan in pahnih, Lalpa in leh lal in a sak chhûng, kum sawmhnih a vei hnuin
(Tura lal Hiraman Solomona chu sidar thing te, fâr thing te, rangkachak te a mamawh apiang a tum vek a ni a), Lal Solomona chuan Hirama chu Galili rama khaw sawmhnih a pe a.
Tin, Hirama chu Tura khua aṭangin Solomonan khua a pêkte chu en tûrin a chhuak a; a duh zâwng a ni lo hle a.
Tin, ani chuan, “Ka unaupa, hêng i khaw mi pêkte hi khaw eng nge maw ni ngai le?” a ti a. Tichuan, tûn thleng hian Kabul ram an ti ta a ni.
Tin, Hirama chuan lal chu rangkachak talent 120 a thawn a.

Lal Solomonan hnathawka rawih luih pâwl a siam chhan chu hei vâng hi a ni: Lalpa in leh ama in satu atân leh, Milo te, Jerusalem kulh te, Hazor khua te, Megido khua te, Gezer khua te siamtu atân a ni.
Aigupta lal Pharaoa chu a han chho va, Gezer khua a han la a, a hâl a, chu khuaa awm Kanaan-hote chu a that a, a fanu Solomona nupui hnênah inthlahna thilpêk atân a lo pe tawh a ni.
Tin, Solomonan Gezer khua te, Beth-horon thlangta zâwk khua te,
Baalath khua te, Israel rama thlalêra Tamar khua te,

Solomonan thil dah khâwmna khua a neih zawng zawng te, a tawlailîr dahna khua te leh, a sakawr chung chuang mi dahna khua te, Jerusalem khua te, Lebanon-ah te leh a rorêlna ram chhûng zawng zawnga Solomonan châk taka siam a tum zawng zawngte chu a siam a ni.
Tin, Israela thlahte ni ve lo, Amor-hote, Hit-hote, Periz-hote, Hiv-hote, Jebus-ho la awm zawng zawngte kha chu,
an thlah, chûng rama la awm Israela thlahten an tihboral zawh vek theih lohvate zîngah chuan Solomonan chhiahhlawh, hnathawka rawih luih pâwl a siam a, tûn thleng hian.
Israela thlahte erawh chu Solomonan chhiahhlawhah a siam ve lo va; indo mi te, a puipa te, a mi lian te, a sipai hotu te, a tawlailîr leh a sakawr chung chuang mi hotute an ni zâwk a ni.
Chûngte chu Solomona hna chunga hotu bîk zanga leh sawmnga, hnathawk vêngtute chu an ni.
Pharaoa fanu erawh chu Davida khawpui ata chu ama in, Solomonan a saksakah chuan a chho ta a; tichuan, Milo chu a siam ta a.

Tin, Solomona chuan Lalpa tâna maichâm a siamah chuan kum tin vawi thum hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan a hlân ṭhîn a, Lalpa hmaa maichâmah chuan rimtuite a hâl tel bawk ṭhîn a. Chutichuan, in chu a peih ta a.
Tin, Lal Solomona chuan Edom rama Tuifinriat Sen kam Eloth bula awm Ezion-geber hmunah lawng rual a siam a.
Tin, Hiraman a chhiahhlawh lawng mite tuifinriata che ṭhang, lawnga Solomona chhiahhlawhte kalpuiah a tîr a,
Chung mite chu Ophir-ah an va kal a, chuta mi chu rangkachak talent zali leh sawmhnih an rawn hâwn a, Lal Solomona hnênah an rawn thlen a.
Tin, Lalpa hming tâna a thiltih chungchâng thûa Solomona hmingthanzia Seba lalnuin a lo hriat chuan, thu khirh tak taka fiah tumin a hnênah a kal a.

Tin, Jerusalem khuaah hnungzuitu tam tak hruaiin, englo rimtuite leh rangkachak tam tak leh lunghlute phur sanghâwngseite kengin a kal a; tin, Solomona hnên a thlen chuan a thinlunga a thu pai zawng zawng chu phawrh fai vekin a bia a.
Tin, Solomona chuan a thu zawh zawng zawng chu a chhâng vek a; lal hriat loh, a hrilhfiah theih loh rêng rêng a awm hauh lo mai.
Tin, Seba lalnuin Solomona finzia zawng zawng te, a in sak te,
a dawhkâna ei tûr te, a puipateho ṭhut dân te, a rawngbâwltuho bâwl dân te, an inchei dân te, a no hlântu te, Lalpa ina a hlan hâlral thilhlante a han hmuh chuan rilru ahleih a nei ta lo va.
Tichuan, lal hnênah, “I thiltihte leh i finziate keima rama ka lo hriat kha thuthang dik tak a lo nih ngei hi le.

Nimahsela, keimahin ka mit ngeia ka rawn hmuh hma loh chuan an sawi chu ka lo âwih lo va; tichuan, ngai teh, a zâtve pawh mi lo hrilh hlei nêm, an sawi ka lo hriat aiin i finzia leh i ṭhatzia a lo nasat hi.
I mite, hêng i chhiahhlawh, i bula awm fova, i finna thu ngaithla fovate hi an nihlawh e!

Lalpa i Pathian, i chunga lâwm êm êm, Israel-te lalṭhutthlênga ṭhuttîrtu che hi fakin awm rawh se! Lalpan Israel-te hi kumkhuain a hmangaih a; chuvângin, fel taka rorêl tûrin lalah a siam che a nih hi,” a ti a.
Tin, lal chu rangkachak talent za leh sawmhnih leh englo rimtui tam zet mai leh lunghlute a pe a. Seba lalnuin Lal Solomona englo rimtui a pêk ang zozaia tam hi a lût ngai ta lo.
Tin, Hirama lawng rual, Ophir aṭanga rangkachak va phurte pawh chuan Ophir aṭangin almug thing tam tak leh lunghlute an rawn phur a.

Tin, lalin almug thingte chu Lalpa in leh lal in hung nân leh, hla satute tân ṭingṭang leh perhkhuangte siam nân lam pawh a hmang a. Tûn thlengin chutiang almug thing rêng rêng chu a lûtin, hmuh pawh hmuh a ni ngai ta lo.
Tin, Lal Solomonan a duhsak vânga a pêkte bâkah pawh Lal Solomona chuan Seba lalnu chu a duh zawng zawng, a dîl apiang chu a pe a. Chutichuan, a awmna ram lamah a hâwng leh ta a, a hote nên.

Solomona hnêna kum khat chhûnga rangkachak lût rih lam chu, sumdâwngtute laka lût leh thil zuartute, mi inawmpawlhho lal zawng zawngte leh ram awptute laka lûtte chhiar lovin, rangkachak talent zaruk leh sawmruk leh paruk bûk a ni.
Tin, Lal Solomona chuan rangkachak den phêkin phaw lian zahnih a siam a; phaw pakhatah rangkachak sekel zaruk a duh a.
Tin, rangkachak den phêkin phaw zathum a siam a; phaw pakhatah rangkachak maneh thum a duh a. Chûng chu lal chuan Lebanon ngawpui inah a dah a.
Tin, lal chuan saingho lalṭhutthlêng ropui tak a siam bawk a, chu chu rangkachak ṭha ber tîin a luan a.

Lalṭhutthlêng kai chhohnaah chuan rahka paruk a awm a, chumi lalṭhutthlêng hnung lam chu a rawn kum phei kulh a; a ṭhutna sîr tuakah chuan dona a awm ve ve a, dona bulahte chuan sakeibaknei pahnih hi a ding a.
Tin, rahka parukah chuan a sîr tuakah sakeibaknei sâwm leh pahnih a ding a; chutiang chu khawii ramah mah an siam ngai lo.

Lal Solomona no zawng zawng chu rangkachak vek a ni a; tin, Lebanon ngawpui ina bungbêl zawng zawngte pawh chu rangkachak hlîr hlak vek a ni a. Tangkarua rêng rêng a awm lo; Solomona dam lai chuan chu chu eng hûah mah an ngai lo.

Lal chuan tuifinriatah chuan Hirama lawng rual kawppuitu Tarsis lawng rual a nei a. Tarsis lawng rual chuan kum thum dan zêlah rangkachak te, tangkarua te, saingho te, zâwng te, ârâwnte a rawn phur si ṭhîn a.
Chutichuan, Lal Solomona chuan khawvêla lal zawng zawng chu hausakah leh finah a khûm vek a.
Pathianin a thinlunga finna thu a dahsak chu ngaithla tûrin khawvêla mi zawng zawng chuan Solomona chu an pan huai huai ṭhîn a.
Tin, mi tinin lâwmman kum tin pêk bi neiin tangkaraw bungbêl te, rangkachak bungbêl te, puan te, râlthuam te, englo rimtui te, sakawr te, sabengtungte an rawn pe ṭhîn a.

Tin, Solomona chuan tawlailîrte leh sakawr chung chuang mite a khâwm chiam a; tawlailîr sângkhat leh zali leh sakawr chung chuang mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih a nei a, chûng chu tawlailîr dahna khuaah te, Jerusalem khuaa lal awmnaahte chuan a awmtîr a.
Tin, lal chuan, Jerusalem khuaah chuan, a tam êm avângin tangkaruate chu lung ang maia ngaih khawpin a awmtîr a, sidar thingte chu phaia theipui thing ang leka ngaih khawpin a awmtîr a.
Tin, Solomona neih sakawrte chu Aigupta ram ata rawn tawlh chhuah a ni a; tin, lal sumdâwngtute chuan chûng chu a rual rualin an lo khâr ṭhîn a, a ruala lei zêl a ni.

Aigupta rama mi tawlailîr chu tangkarua sekel zaruk zêlin an tithleng ṭhîn a, sakawr chu tangkarua sekel za leh sawmnga zêlin; chutiang bawk chuan Hit-ho lal zawng zawng leh Suria lalte pawh an tihthlensak ṭhîn a ni.
Solomona chuan Pharaoa fanu chang lo pawh hnam dang hmeichhe tam tak - Moab te, Amon te, Edom te, Sidon te, Hit-ho hmeichhiate a hmangaih a;

chûng hnamho chungchâng thu chu Lalpan Israela thlahte hnênah, “Anmahni pâwl suh ula, anni pawhin pâwl che u suh se, an pathiante lamah in thinlung an hruai kawi ngei dâwn si a,” tiin a lo sawi tawh rêng a. Chûngho chu Solomona chuan hmangaihnain a vuan tlat a.
Tichuan, nupui zasarih, lal fanu a nei a, hmei zathum nên; tin, a nupuite chuan a thinlung an hruai kawisak ta a.

Tin, heti hi a lo ni ta a, Solomona chu a lo upat hnu chuan, a nupuite chuan pathian dangte lamah a thinlung an hruai kawisak a; tichuan, a pa Davida thinlung angin Lalpa a Pathian lamah chuan a thinlung chu a lo ṭha famkim ta lo va.
Solomona chuan Zidon-ho pathiannu Astarothi leh Amon-ho pathian tenawm tak Milkoma chu a lo zui ve ta mai a.
Tin, Solomona chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual a lo ti ta a, a pa Davida angin Lalpa chu a zui tlat ve ta lo va.
Chutichuan, Solomona chuan Jerusalem bula tlângah Moab-ho pathian tenawm tak Kemosa tân leh, Amona thlahte pathian tenawm tak Moleka tân hmun sâng a lo siam ta a.
Chutiang bawkin hnam dang a nupui zawng zawng, an pathiante hnêna inthawia rimtui hâl ṭhînte tân pawh a siamsak a.

Chutichuan, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, a hnêna vawi hnih lai inlâra, he thu, pathian dangte a zui tûr a ni lo tih thu lo petu chu, a thinlungin a hawisan tâk avângin Solomona chungah chuan Lalpa thin a lo ur ta a; Lalpan thu a pêk chu pawm si hek lo.

Chuvângin, Lalpan Solomona hnênah chuan, “Hetiang hian i lo awm ta a, ka thuthlungte leh ka thuruatte pawm tûra thu ka pêk che hi i lo pawm ta si lo va, ram hi ka chhuhsak ngei ang chia, i chhiahhlawh ka pe ang.
Amaherawhchu, i pa Davida avângin i dam chhûng êm chuan ka ti rih lo vang a; nimahsela, i fapa zawng ka chhuhsak dâwn a ni.
Ram zawng zawng erawh chu ka chhuhsak vek lo vang a; nimahsela, ka chhiahhlawh Davida avâng leh ka thlan Jerusalem avâng hian hnam khat chu i fapa ka pe ang,” a ti a.
Tin, Lalpan Edom mi, Hadada chu Solomona hmêlmaah a rawn din chhuak ta a; amah chu Edom rama lal thlah a ni.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Davida chu Edom rama a awm laia, an mi thahte phûm tûra sipai hotu Joaba a han kala, Edom mi mipa fa tawh phawt chu a han thah vek hnu khân
(Joaba leh Israel mi zawng zawng chu thla ruk zet, Edom rama mipa zawng zawng a tihhlum vek hma loh chuan an awm a ni a),
Hadada chu a pa chhiahhlawhte zînga Edom mi ṭhenkhat nên Aigupta rama kal tûrin an tlân a. Hadada chu naupang tê a la ni a.

Midian ram ata an chhuak a, Paran-ah an kal a; tin, Paran aṭangin mite an hruai a, Aigupta ram, Aigupta ram lal Pharaoa hnên an zuk thleng a; ani chuan in te a lo pe a, ei tûr te a lo ngaihtuahsak a, ram te a lo pe bawk a.
Hadada chuan Pharaoa mit a tlung hle mai a; tichuan, a nupui ngei laizâwn, Lalnu Tahpenesi laizâwn chu nupuiah a neihtîr a.
Tin, Tahpenesi laizâwn chuan fapa Genubatha a hrinsak a, Tahpenesi chuan Pharaoa inah a hnute hnêk bânna a siamsak a. Tin, Genubatha chu Pharaoa inah Pharaoa fate zîngah chuan a awm ta a.

Tin, Hadadan Aigupta ram aṭanga Davida chu a puteho hnênah a muhîl ta tih leh, sipai hotu Joaba pawh a thi tawh tih a lo hriatin, Hadada chuan Pharaoa hnênah, “Kan rama ka haw theih nân mi chhuahtîr ta che,” a ti a.

Chutichuan, Pharaoan a hnênah, “Ka hnêna i awm hian tlâkchham eng nge i neih ni le, ngai teh, chutia in ram lama haw leh i tum tâk mai?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Eng mah phei chu nei lo ve; nimahsela, mi kaltîr rêng rêng rawh khai,” a ti a.
Tin, Pathianin a hmêlmaah Eliada fapa Rezona, a pu Hadadezera, Zoba lal hnên ata tlân bo tawh kha a rawn din chhuak leh a.
Davidan Zoba khuaa mite a thah khân ani chuan a hnênah mite a kai khâwm a, sipai hotuah a ṭang ta a. Tin, Damaska khuaah an kal a, chutah chuan an awm a, Damaska khuaah chuan lalah a ṭhu ta a.
Hadada tihhrehawmna belhchhahin Solomona dam chhûng zawng, Israel-te hmêlma a ni ṭhîn rêng a; Israel-te a haw hle mai a, Suria ram chungah ro a rêl a.
Tin, Nebata fapa Jeroboama, Zereda khuaa Ephraim mi, Solomona chhiahhlawh pawh chuan (a nu hming chu Zeru-i a ni a, hmeithai a ni a), chu mi pawh chuan lal chungah a kut a lek ve a.
Lal chunga a kut a lek chhan chu hetiang hi a ni: Solomonan Milo a siam a, a pa Davida khua chu a chhe laite a siam ṭha a.
Chu Jeroboama chu mi chak huaisen a ni a; tichuan, Solomonan chu tlangvâl chu mi taima tak nia a hriat avângin, Josefa chhûngte hnathawh zawng zawng chunga hotuah a siam a.

Tin, chûng lai chuan heti hi a ni a, Jerusalem khua ata Jeroboama a kal chhuak chu Silo mi zâwlnei Ahijan kawng lakah a lo hmu a; Ahija chuan puan thar a sin a, an pahnih chauh chuan phûlah an awm dûn a.
Tin, Ahija chuan a puan thar sin chu a la a, phel sâwm leh phel hnihah a pawt thlêr a.
Jeroboama hnênah chuan, “Phel sâwm hi la rawh khai, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti a ni: ‘Ngai teh, ram hi Solomona ka chhuhsak ang a, hnam sâwm chu ka pe dâwn che a ni
(amaherawhchu, ka chhiahhlawh Davida avâng leh Israel hnam zawng zawng zînga ka thlan khawpui, Jerusalem avâng hian hnam khat zawng a nei ang chu);

anni chuan mi kalsan a, Zidon-ho pathiannu Astarothi te, Moab-ho pathian Kemosa te, Amon-ho thlahte pathian Milkoma-te an biak avâng leh, ka mit hmuha thil ṭha ti tûr leh, ka thuruatte leh ka rorêlte hi pawm tûra a pa Davida anga ka kawngte an zawh loh avângin.
Ram pum pui zawng ka chhuhsak lo vang; amaherawhchu, ka thupêkte leh ka thuruatte pawmtu, ka thlan, ka chhiahhlawh Davida avângin a dam chhûng chuan lalah ka la awmtîr ang.
Nimahsela, ram hi a fapa ka chhuhsak ang a, nangmah hi ka pe dâwn che a ni, hnam sâwmte chu.
Tin, ka chhiahhlawh Davidan ka hming awmtîr nâna ka thlan khawpui Jerusalem-ah hian, ka hmaa khâwnvâr a neih reng theihna tûrin hnam khat chu a fapa ka pe ang.
Nang hi ka ruat ang chia, i duh ang angin ro i rêl ang a, Israel-te lalah i awm ang.

Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, thu ka pêk apiang che i pawma, ka kawngte i zawha, ka chhiahhlawh Davida anga ka thuruatte leh ka thupêkte zâwm tûra ka mit hmuha thil ṭha i tih chuan i hnênah ka awm zêl ang a, Davida ka din nghehsak ang khân chhûngkaw nghet ka dinsak ang chia, Israel-te hi ka pe ang che.
Chuvâng chuan Davida thlah chu ka tihrehawm dâwn a ni; amaherawhchu, kumkhua zawngin a ni lo vang,’ a ti e,” tiin.
Chutichuan, Solomona chuan Jeroboama chu thah a tum ta a. Nimahsela, Jeroboama chu a tho va, Aigupta ram lal Sisaka hnênah a tlân a, Solomona thih hma loh chuan Aigupta ramah a awm ta a.
Solomona chanchin dangte leh, a thiltih zawng zawng leh a finnate chu Solomona thiltih ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?
Solomonan Israel-ho zawng zawng chunga Jerusalem khuaa ro a rêl chhûng chu kum sawmli a ni.
Tichuan, Solomona chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, a pa Davida khawpuiah chuan an phûm ta a. Tin, a fapa Rehoboama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a.
Tin, Rehoboama chu Sekem khuaah a kal a; Israel-ho zawng zawng chu Sekem khuaah chuan lala siam tûrin an kal tawh si a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, Nebata fapa Jeroboaman chumi thu chu a lo hriat chuan (Lal Solomona hnên aṭanga a tlân bona Aigupta rama la awm a ni a; tichuan, Aigupta rama Jeroboama a la awm reng chu an zuk kohtîr a),
Jeroboama leh Israel pung khâwmho zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, Rehoboama hnênah,

“I pa khân kan nghâwngkawl a tirit êm êm ṭhîn a; chuvângin, i pa min chhawr rimna leh, a nghâwngkawl rit tak kan chunga a nghah hi min tihzânsak la; tichuan, i rawng kan bâwl ang e,” tiin an rawn sawi a.
Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Ni thum chhûng chu lo va kal kiang ta rih ula; tin, ka hnênah lo kal leh ang che u,” a ti a. Tin, mipuite chu an kal kiang ta a.
Tin, Lal Rehoboama chuan a pa Solomona dam laia a bula awm ṭhîn upahote chu, “Hêng mipuihote hi ka chhân dân tûr rem eng nge mi ruatpui le?” tiin a râwn a.
Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Tûnah hian hêngho chhiahhlawha i awma, an rawng i bâwla, anmahni chu i chhâna, an hnêna thu ṭha tak sawi i tum chuan, kumkhuain i chhiahhlawhah an awm ang,” tiin an sawi a.
Nimahsela, upaho remruatpui chu a pawm lo va, ama rualpui tlangvâlho, a bula awm ṭhînte chu a râwn ta zâwk a.
An hnênah chuan, “Hêng mipuiho, ka hnêna, ‘I pan kan chunga nghâwngkawl a nghah hi min tihzânsak rawh,’ tia sawitute hi ka chhân dân tûr rem eng nge mi ruatpui le?” a ti a.

Tin, a rualpui tlangvâlhote chuan a hnênah, “Hêng mipuiho, ‘I pa khân kan nghâwngkawl a tirit êm ṭhîn a, nang chuan min tihzânsak rawh khai,’ i hnêna titute hnênah chuan hetiang hian ti la, hetiang hian an hnênah sawi ang che: ‘Ka pa kâwng ai chuan ka zungtê hi a lian zâwk.

Ka pa khân nghâwngkawl rit tak a lo bahtîr che u a, kei chuan in nghâwngkawl chu ka belhchhah dâwn asin; ka pan vuaknain a lo hrîng ṭhîn che u a, kei erawh chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hrîng dâwn che u a ni!’ tiin,” an ti a.
Chutichuan, Jeroboama leh mipuiho zawng zawng chu lalin, “Ni thum chinah ka hnênah lo kal leh ang che u,” tia a hrilh ang khân, a ni thum ni chuan Rehoboama hnênah an va kal a.
Tin, lal chuan mipuite chu chang takin a lo chhâng a, upahote remruatpui kha a pawm lo va;

tlangvâlhote remruatpui ang khân, “Ka pan in nghâwngkawl a lo tirit a, kei chuan in nghâwngkawl chu ka belhchhah dâwn asin; ka pan vuaknain a lo hrîng ṭhîn che u a, kei erawh chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hrîng dâwn che u a ni!” a ti a.
Chutichuan, lal chuan mipuite thusawi kha a pawm ta lo va; chu chu Lalpa vâng a ni, Lalpan Silo mi Ahija hmanga, Nebata fapa Jeroboama hnêna a thu lo sawi tawh kha a tihngheh theih nân.

Tin, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan lalin an thusawi a pawm lo tih an hriatin, mipuite chuan, “Davidaah hian chanvo eng nge kan neih le? Jesaia fapaah chuan roluah tûr kan nei hek lo. Aw Israel-te u, in puan in lamah haw rawh u. Aw David, i chhûngkua ngaihtuah mai tawh,” tiin lal chu an chhâng a. Chutichuan, Israel-ho chu an puan in lamah an kal ta a.
Israela thlah, Judai ram khuaa awmte erawh chu, an chungah Rehoboaman ro a rêl a.

Tichuan, Lal Rehoboama chuan hnathawka rawih luihte hotu Adorama a tîr a; ani chu Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan lungin an dêng a, a thi ta a. Tin, Lal Rehoboama chu Jerusalem khuaa tlân tumin a tawlailîrah a chuang ta thuai a.
Chutichuan, Israel-hote chu Davida chhûngte chungah an lo hel ta a ni, tûn thleng hian.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, Israel-ho zawng zawngin Jeroboama chu a lo kîr leh tih an hriatin punkhâwmnaa lo kal tûrin an kohtîr a, Israel-ho zawng zawng chunga lalah an siam ta a. Juda hnam chauh lo chuan tu mahin Davida chhûngte an zui lo.

Tin, Rehoboama chuan Jerusalem khua a han thlen chuan, Israela chhûngte chu dova, Solomona fapa Rehoboama rama la leh tûrin Juda chhûngte zawng zawng leh, Benjamin hnam, mi huaisen ṭhiau thlan chhuah nuai khat leh sîngriat zet a khâwm a.
Nimahsela, Pathian mi Semaia hnênah Pathian thu a lo thleng a,
Judai ram lal Solomona fapa Rehoboama hnênah leh Juda leh Benjamina chhûngte zawng zawng hnênah leh mipui dangte hnênah chuan,

“ Lalpan heti hian a ti, ‘Han kal suh u, Israela thlah, in unauteho chu han do hek suh u. Mahni in lamah haw leh vek tawh u; hei hi keima tih a ni e, tiin,’ sawi rawh,” tiin. Chutichuan, Lalpa thu chu an âwih a, Lalpa thu ang chuan an kîr a, an haw leh ta vek a.
Chutichuan, Jeroboama chuan Ephraim tlâng ramah Sekem khua a siam a, chutah chuan a awm a; tin, chuta ṭang chuan a chhuak a, Penuel khua a siam a.
Tin, Jeroboama chuan a rilruin, “Ram hi Davida chhûngte ta a lo ni leh nghe nghe ang â:

he miteho hi Jerusalem khuaa Lalpa ina inthawinate hlân tûra an kal chuan, he miteho thinlung hi an lalpa Rehoboama, Judai ram lal lamah hian a thle leh mai ang a; tichuan, kei hi min that ang a, Judai ram lal Rehoboama lamah an pakai leh mai ang â,” a ti a.

Chutichuan, lal chuan mi a râwn a, rangkachak bâwngno lem pahnih a siam a, an hnênah chuan, “In tân Jerusalem khuaa han kal chu a harsa lutuk êm a, aw Israel-te u, en teh u, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u in pathiante hi!” a ti a.
Tin, pakhat chu Bethel-ah a dah a, pakhat chu Dan-ah a dah a.
Chu thil chu sual a lo ni ta a ni; mipuite chu a pahniha be tûrin Dan thleng thlengin an kal si a.
Tin, hmun sâng inte a sa a, Levia fate ni lo, vântlang zînga mi puithiamahte a siam a.

Jeroboama chuan Judai rama kût an neih ang bawkin thla riatna, chumi thla ni sâwm leh ni nga ni chu kût nîah a ruat ve a, maichâmah chuan a han kal a. Bethel-ah chuan a bâwngno lem siam hnêna inthawiin chutiang chuan a ti a ni. Tin, a siam hmun sâng puithiamte chu Bethel-ah a dah a.

Tin, amahin a duh anga a ruat thla ngei, thla riatna, ni sâwm leh ni nga nîah chuan Bethel-a a maichâm siamah a han kal a. Tin, Israela thlahte tân kût a ruat a, maichâma rimtui hâl tûrin a han kal a.
Tin, ngai teh, Judai ram aṭangin Pathian mi, Lalpa thuin Bethel-ah a lo kal a; tin, Jeroboama chu maichâm bulah rimtui hâl tûrin a lo ding a.

Tin, Lalpa thuin maichâm chu a au khum a, “Aw maichâm, maichâm, Lalpan heti hian a ti, ‘Ngai teh, Davida chhûngte zîngah fapa a hming Josia a lo piang ang a, i chunga rimtui hâl ṭhîntu, hmun sâng puithiamte hi i chungah hian inthawi nân a la rawn hlân ang a, i chungah hian mihring ruhte an la rawn hâl ang,’ tiin,” a ti a.
Tin, chumi ni vêk chuan chhinchhiahna a pe a, “Hei hi Lalpan chhinchhiahna tûr a tih chu a ni: ‘Ngai teh u, maichâm hi a la khi phawk ang a, a chunga meivâpte hi a la baw vek ang,’ tih hi,” tiin.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, Pathian miin Bethel-a maichâm a han au khum thu lalin a hriat chuan, Jeroboama chuan, “Man rawh u,” tiin maichâm aṭang chuan a kutin a han ban a. Tin, man tuma a banna kut chu a lo zeng ta a; tichuan, a kut chu a la leh thei ta lo va.
Pathian miin Lalpa thûa chhinchhiahna tûra a sawi ang khân maichâm pawh chu a khi bawk a, maichâma meivâpte chu a baw ta vek a.

Tin, lal chuan a chhâng a, Pathian mi hnênah chuan, “Ka kut hi a lo dam leh theihna tûrin Lalpa i Pathian khawngaihna ngên la, mi ṭawngṭaisak teh khai,” a ti a. Tin, Pathian mi chuan Lalpa hnênah a ngên a; tin, lal kut chu a lo dam leh a, a hma ang bawkin a lo awm leh ta a.
Tichuan, lal chuan Pathian mi hnênah, “Ka in lamah ka hnênah lo kal la, va châwl hahdam rih rawh khai; tin, lâwmman ka pe dâwn che nia,” a ti a.
Tin, Pathian mi chuan lal hnênah, “I in lo zâtve pawh mi pe dâwn mah la, i hnênah zawng ka lo kal chuang lo vang; hemi hmunah hian chhang ka eiin tui rêng rêng pawh ka in hek lo vang.
‘Chhang va eiin tui rêng rêng pawh va in suh la, i va kalna kawngah pawh haw leh tawh suh,’ tia Lalpa thûa tirh ka ni asin,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, kawng dangah a kal a, Bethel-a a lo kalna kawngah chuan a haw leh ta lo va.
Bethel khuaah chuan zâwlnei putar pakhat hi a awm a, a fapate chuan chumi nia Bethel-a Pathian mi thiltih zawng zawng chu an hrilh vek a; lal hnêna a thusawite pawh chu an pa an hrilh bawk a.
Tin, an pa chuan an hnênah “Khawii lam kawngah nge a kal tâk?” a ti a. A fapate chuan Judai ram aṭanga lo kal Pathian mi haw lehna kawng chu an kawhhmuh a.
Tichuan, a fapate hnênah, “Sabengtung mi han siam teh u,” a ti a. Chutichuan, sabengtung chu an siamsak a; tichuan, a chuang ta a.
Tin, Pathian mi chu a ûm ta a, sasaw thing hnuaia a ṭhu hi a va hmu a; a hnênah, “Nangmah hi em ni Judai ram aṭanga lo kal Pathian mi chu?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Ni e,” a ti a.
Tichuan, ani chuan a hnênah, “Ka in lamah ka hnênah lo kal la, chhang va ei rawh khai,” a ti a.
Tin, ani chuan, “I ruala kîr leh thei ka ni lo va, i hnêna lo kal thei pawh ka ni hek lo; hemi hmunah hian i hnênah chhang ka eiin tui rêng rêng pawh ka in hek lo vang.
‘Chhang va eiin, tui rêng rêng pawh va in suh la, i va kalna kawngah pawh kîr leh tawh suh,’ tia Lalpa thûa hrilh ka ni si a,” a ti a.

Tin, ani chuan a hnênah, “Kei pawh nangmah ang bawka zâwlnei ka ni alâwm; vântirhkohvin Lalpa thuin, ‘Chhang te eia tui te in tûrin i in lamah hruai kîr leh rawh khai,’ tiin mi bia sin,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a hnênah dâwt a sawi a ni.
Chutichuan, a hnênah chuan a kîr leh ve a, a inah chuan chhang te a eiin tui te a in ta a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, dawhkân an kîl lai chuan a hruai kîrtu zâwlnei hnênah chuan Lalpa thu chu a lo thleng a;
Judai ram aṭanga lo kal Pathian mi hnênah chuan, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti, Lalpa thusawi i âwih lohva, Lalpa i Pathianin thu a pêk che i pawm loh avâng leh,
i lo kîr leha, ‘Chhang va eiin tui rêng rêng pawh va in suh ang che,’ a tihna hmun ngeiah chhang i eia, tui te i in avângin i ruang hi i pute thlâna dah a ni ve lo vang,” tiin a sawi chhuak ta a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, chhang te a eia, tui te a in zawh chuan, zâwlnei a hruai kîr leha chu sabengtung a siamsak a.

Tin, a kal ta chu kawng lakah sakeibaknei nên an intâwk a, a lo seh ta a. Tin, a ruang chu kawngah chuan theh thal dêrin a awm a, sabengtung chu a bulah chuan a ding a. Sakeibaknei pawh chu ruang bulah chuan a ding ve reng a.
Tin, ngai teh, mi an va kal a, kawnga ruang theh thal dêra awm leh ruang bula sakeibaknei ding reng chu an va hmu a. Zâwlnei putar pui awmna khuaah chuan an va sawi a.

Tin, kawnglak ata va hruai kîr lehtu zâwlnei chuan chumi thu a lo hriat veleh chuan, “Pathian mi, Lalpa thusawi âwih duh lo pa kha a nih chu. Chutichuan, Lalpan a hnêna a sawi, a thu ang ngeiin Lalpan sakeibaknei hnênah a pe a, a lo ham a, a seh hlum ta a nih chu,” a ti a.
Tin, a fapate hnênah chuan, “Sabengtung mi siamsak teh u,” tiin a sawi a. Tichuan, an siamsak ta a.

Tin, a kal ta a, a ruang kawnga theh thal dêra lo awm leh sabengtung leh sakeibaknei, ruang bula lo ding reng chu a va hmu a. Sakeibaknei chuan ruang chu a lo la ei lo va, sabengtung pawh chu a lo la tipem lo va.
Tin, zâwlnei chuan chu Pathian mi ruang chu a hlâwm a, sabengtung chungah chuan a hlâng a, a kîrpui ta a. Tichuan, zâwlnei putar awmna khuaah chuan sûn tûr leh vui tûrin a lût ta a.
Tin, a ruang chu ama thlânah a zalh a; tichuan, “A va pawi tehlul êm, ka unaupa!” tiin an ṭah a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, a vui hnu chuan a fapate hnênah, “Ka thih hunah Pathian mi phûmna thlânah hian mi rawn phûm ve ang che u; a ruh bulah ka ruhte hi rawn dah ang che u.
Pathian thûa Bethel-a maichâm leh, Samari ram khawpuitea hmun sâng in zawng zawng a au khumna thu kha lo thleng ngei ngei tûr a ni si a,” tiin a sawi a.

Chûng thil hnuah pawh Jeroboama chuan a awm dân dik lo chu a la bân chuang lo va, vântlang zînga mi hmun sâng puithiam atân a la siam ta cheu va; hmun sâng puithiamte an awm theihna tûrin a duh apiang a tihrang ṭhîn a.
Chu thil chu Jeroboama chhûngkaw sualna, anmahni tichimittu leh khawvêl ata tiboral hlauhtu a lo ni ta.
Chûng lai chuan Jeroboama fapa Abija a damlo va.

Tin, Jeroboama chuan a nupui hnênah, “Tho la, Jeroboama nupui i ni tih an hriat loh nân che intidanglam la, Silo-ah va kal teh khai; ngai teh, chutah chuan zâwlnei Ahija, he miteho chunga lala ka la awm tûr ka chungchâng thu sawitu kha a awm e.
Tin, chhangpêr sâwm leh chhang hlâwm tê tê leh khawizu ûm khat keng langin, a hnênah va kal teh; naupang awm dân tûr chu a lo hrilh ang che,” a ti a.
Tin, Jeroboama nupui chuan chutiang chuan a ti a, a tho va, Silo-ah chuan a kal a, Ahija inah chuan a va kal ta a. Ahija chuan khua a hmu thei tawh lo va, a upat avângin a mit a thim tawh si a.

Tin, Lalpan Ahija hnênah, “Ngai teh, Jeroboama nupui, a fapa chungchânga râwn tûr chein a lo kal e, a damlo a ni a. Hetiang hian lo hrilh ang che; heti hi a ni ang a, a lo luh hunah chuan hmeichhe dang ni âwm takin a rawn insiam dâwn a ni,” a ti a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ahijan chutia kawngkaa a lo luh laia a ke rah ri a han hriat veleh chuan, “Nang, Jeroboama nupui, lo lût rawh khai. Engtiziaa mi danga insiam nge i nih? Chanchin ṭha lo tak hrilh tûr chea tirh ka ni asin.
Kal leh ta la, Jeroboama hnênah, ‘ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin heti hian a ti: “Mipuite zîng ata ka chawisâng chia, ka mi Israel-te chungah hian hotuah ka siam chia,

Davida chhûngte ram ka chhuhsak a, chu chu ka pe chia; nimahsela, nang zawng ka chhiahhlawh Davida angin i awm ve lo va, ani zawngin ka thupêkte a pawm a, ka mit hmuha thil ṭha chauh tih tumin a thinlung zawng zawngin mi zui ṭhîn a;
nang erawh chuan i hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin thil i tisual nasa bîk a, mi tihthinrim nân pathian dangte leh milem chhûnte i siam a, mi hnuchhawnsan ta a;

chuvângin, ngai teh, Jeroboama chhûngkaw chungah hian thil ṭha lo ka rawn thlentîr ang a, Jeroboama aṭang hian mipa fa tawh phawt chu Israel rama mi, khuahkhirh leh khirh loh pawh ka tiboral ang a, miin êk a phiat fai hliau ang mai hian Jeroboama chhûngkua hi a mang vek hma loh chuan ka phiat bo hlauh dâwn a ni.
Jeroboama chhûngkaw zînga mi, khawpuia thi apiangte chu uiin an ei ang a, rama thi apiangte chu chunglêng savaten an ei ang; chu chu Lalpan a sawi tawh a ni,” ti ang che.’
Chutichuan, tho la, i in lamah haw leh mai tawh. Khawpui chhûng i rah veleh naupang chu a thi dâwn a ni.

Tichuan, Israel-ho zawng zawngin an sûn ang a, an vui ang, Jeroboama chhûngkaw zîngah chuan amah chauh chu thlâna dah tûr a ni dâwn si a; Jeroboama chhûngkaw zîngah hian amah chauhvah hian Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chunga ṭhatna eng emaw a lan avângin.
Tin, Lalpan tûn la laa Jeroboama chhûngkua rawn tiboraltu tûr Israel-te chunga lal a insiam ang; tûnah pawh hian engtin nge ni ta ang le?

Lalpa chuan tuia rairuang nghîng nghîng ang maiin Israel-te chu a rawn vaw nghîng ang a; tichuan, Lalpa thin tirima an Aseri-te chu an siam avângin an pute a lo pêk tawh, he ram ṭha tak ata hi Israel-hote chu a la pawt chhuak fai vek ang a, Lui piah lamah chuan a la tidarh vek ang.
Tin, Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih, Jeroboama sualnate avângin Israel-hote chu a hawisan ang,” a ti a.
Tin, Jeroboama nupui chu a tho va, a chhuak ta a, Tirza khua a va thleng a; tin, in kawngka bul a va thlen chuan naupang chu a thi ta a.
Tin, Lalpan a chhiahhlawh zâwlnei Ahija hmanga thu a lo sawi tawh ang ngei khân Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan an vui a, an sûn ta a.
Jeroboama chanchin dang - a râl beih thûte, a rorêl thûte chu - ngai teh, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a.
Tichuan, Jeroboama rorêl chhûng chu kum 22 a ni; tin, a pute hnênah a muhîl a, a fapa Nadaba chu a aiawhin a lal ta a.

Tin, Solomona fapa Rehoboama chu Judai ramah a lal a. A lal ṭan tirh lai chuan Rehoboama chu kum sawmli leh kum khat mi a ni a, Lalpan a hming awmtîr nâna Israel hnam zawng zawngte zînga a thlan khawpui Jerusalem-ah chuan kum 17 a lal a. A nu hming chu Naami, Amon mi a ni.
Juda-ho chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil sual an ti a; an pute thiltih zawng zawng khûma an sualnate chuan a thikthu a chawh thawhsak a.
Tlâng sâng tinah leh thing hring tin hnuaiah hian lungphunte phunin hmun sângte leh Aseri-te lam hi an siam bawk si a.
Tin, chu ramah chuan mipa inzuarte pawh an awm a. Israel thlahte hmaa Lalpan a hnawh chhuah tâk hnamte thiltih tenawm tinrêng ang chu an ti ve a.
Tin, Lal Rehoboama lal kum nga kum chuan heti hi a ni a, Aigupta lal Sisakan Jerusalem khua chu a han bei a;
Lalpa ina rote leh lal ina rote chu a la a, a vai chuan a la ta vek a. Solomona rangkachak phaw siam zawng zawng chu a la tel vek bawk a.
Tin, Lal Rehoboama chuan chûng aiah chuan dâr phawte a siam a, lal in kawngka vêngtu hotute a kawltîr a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal chu Lalpa ina a luh apiangin vêngtute chuan an keng a; tin, vêngtute pindanah an dah leh zêl ṭhîn a.
Rehoboama chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawng chu, Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni lâwm ni?
Rehoboama leh Jeroboama chu indo rêng rêngin an awm ṭhîn a.
Tin, Rehoboama chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, Davida khawpuiah a pute zîngah chuan an phûm ta a. A nu hming chu Naami, Amon mi a ni. Tin, a fapa Abijama chu a aiawhin a lal ta a.
Nebata fapa Lal Jeroboama kum sâwm leh kum riat a lal kum chuan Juda-hote chungah Abijama chu a lal ṭan a.
Jerusalem khuaah kum thum a lal a. A nu hming chu Maaki, Abisaloma fanu a ni.
A hmaa a pain thil sual a tih zawng zawng kha a ti ve a; a pu Davida thinlung angin a thinlung chu Lalpa a Pathian lamah a ṭha famkim ve lo va.
Nimahsela, Davida avângin Lalpa a Pathianin a hnua a fapa la tundinna tûr leh, Jerusalem khua din nghet tûrin Jerusalem khuaah chuan khâwnvâr a neihtîr a;
Hit mi Uria chungchâng tih lohvah chuan, Davidan Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha a tih ṭhin avâng leh a dam chhûng zawnga ti tûra thu a pêk tawh phawt chu a hnial ngai hauh loh avângin.
Rehoboama chu a dam chhûng zawng Jeroboama nên an indo reng ṭhîn a.
Abijama chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawng chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni lâwm ni? Tin, Abijama leh Jeroboama chu an indo ṭhîn a.
Tin, Abijama chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a; tichuan, Davida khawpuiah an phûm ta a. Tin, a aiawhin a fapa Asa chu a lal ta a.
Israel lal Jeroboama kum sawmhnih a lal kum chuan Asa chu Juda-hote chungah a lal ṭan a.
Tin, kum sawmli leh kum khat Jerusalem-ah a lal a. A nu hming chu Maaki, Abisaloma fanu a ni.
Tin, Asa chuan a pu Davida ang bawkin Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn a.
Tin, mipa inzuarhote chu a ram ata a hnawt chhuak a, a putena milem an lo siam zawng zawng chu a thehthang bo vek a.
Tin, a nu Maaki pawh chu, milem tenawm tak tak Aseri a siam avângin a lal nu nih a bân a. Tin, Asa chuan a milem siam chu a sât thlu a, Kidron luiah a hâl a.
Hmun sângte erawh chu a thehthang bo lo va. Nimahsela, Asa thinlung chu a dam chhûng zawng Lalpa lamah a ṭha famkim a ni.
Tin, a pain thil a lo hlan sa tawhte leh, amah ngeiin a lo hlan tawh - tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbêlte chu Lalpa inah a la lût a.
Tin, Asa leh Israel lal Baasa chu an lal chhûng zawng an indo reng ṭhin a.
Tin, Israel lal Baasa chuan Juda-ho a han bei a, Juda lal Asa hnênah lût tûr leh chhuak tûr dan nân Rama khua a siam a.

Chutichuan, Asan Lalpa in leh lal ina ro la awm, tangkarua leh rangkachak zawng zawng chu a la a, a chhiahhlawhte a pe a; tin, Lal Asa chuan Damaska khuaa awm Suria lal Heziona fa Tabrimona fapa Ben-hadada hnênah chuan,

“Kei leh nanga kârah leh ka pa leh i pa kârah thuthlung a awm a. Ngai teh, lâwmman atân tangkarua leh rangkachak ka han thawn a che. Ti teh, Israel lal Baasa hian mi ṭînsanna tûrin a hnêna i thuthlun kha ṭhiat teh mai,” tiin a thawn a.

Tin, Ben-hadada chuan Lal Asa thu chu a lo pawm a; tichuan, Israel khuate chu bei tûrin a sipai hotute a tîr a, Ijon khua te, Dan khua te, Abel-beth-maaka khua te, Kineroth bial zawng zawng, Naphtali ram zawng zawngte nên a bei a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Baasan chumi thu chu a lo hriat veleh Rama khaw siam chu a bâng a, Tirza khuaah a awm ta a.

Chutichuan, Lal Asa chuan Judai ram zawng zawngah thu a than vêl ta a; tu mah âwl rêng rêng an awm lo. Tichuan, Baasan Rama khaw siam nâna lung leh thing a hmante chu an thiar a; tin, chûng hmang chuan Lal Asan Mizpe khua leh Benjamin rama Geba khua a siam a.

Asa chanchin dang zawng zawng te, a thiltihtheihzia zawng zawng te, a thiltih zawng zawng te, a khaw siamte chu Juda lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah chuan a chuang a ni lâwm ni? Amaherawhchu, a tar lamah a keah hri eng emaw a lo vei ta a.
Tin, Asa chu a pute hnênah a muhîl a, a pu Davida khawpuiah a pute zîngah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Jehosaphata chu a aiawhin a lal ta a.
Tin, Jeroboama fapa Nadaba chu Juda lal Asa lal kum hnihnaah chuan Israel-hote chungah a lal ṭan a, Israel-hote chungah kum hnih a lal a.
Lalpa mit hmuhin thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a, a pa kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih sualna kha a ti ve a.

Tin, Isakara chhûngte zînga mi Ahija fapa Baasan amah a phiar ru a, Philistia-ho chan, Gibethon khuaah Baasa chuan a that ta a; Nadaba leh Israel-ho zawng zawngte chuan Gibethon khua chu an hual lai a ni.
Juda lal Asa lal kum thumnaah a ni, Baasa chuan a thaha, a aiawha a lal ni.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal a nih veleh chuan a tihchimih hma loh chuan Jeroboama chhûngte zawng zawng chu a that a, nung tawh phawt chu pakhat mah Jeroboama chu a zuahsak lo, Lalpan Silo khuaa mi a chhiahhlawh Ahija hmanga a lo sawi tawh ang khân;
chu chu Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih, Jeroboama sualnate avâng leh Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu a tihthinrim vâng a ni.
Nadaba chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?
Tin, Asa leh Israel lal Baasa chu an lal chhûng zawng an indo reng ṭhîn a.
Juda lal Asa lal kum thumnaah chuan Ahija fapa Baasa chu Tirza khuaah Israel-ho zawng zawng chungah a lal ṭan a, kum sawmhnih leh kum li a lal a.
Lalpa mit hmuhin thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a, Jeroboama kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a, Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a tih sualna kha a ti ve a.
Tin, Baasa chungchâng thûah Hanania fapa Jehua hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a:
“Vaivut ata ka chawisâng chia, ka mi Israel-te chungah hian hotuah ka siam chia; tin, nangin Jeroboama kawng zawh chu i zawh ve a, an sualnatea mi tihthinrim nân ka mi Israel-te thil i tihsualtîr a;
ngai teh, Baasa leh a chhûngte hi ka tibo hlauh dâwn a ni; tichuan, Nebata fapa Jeroboama chhûngte ang maiin i chhûngte hi ka siam ang.
Baasa chhûngkaw zînga mi khawpuia thi apiang chu uiin an ei ang a; tin, a chhûngkaw zînga mi rama thi apiangte chu chunglêng savaten an ei ang,” tiin.
Baasa chanchin dang te, a thiltih te, a thiltihtheihziate chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?
Tin, Baasa chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, Tirza khuaah an phûm ta a. Tin, a fapa Ela chu a aiawhin a lal ta a.

Tin, Baasa leh a chhûngte chungchâng thûah chuan, a kutchhuaka Lalpa tihthinrim nâna Jeroboama chhûngte anna neia, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a tih avâng leh amah chu a thah avângin, Hanania fapa zâwlnei Jehua hmanga a sawi Lalpa thu chu a lo thleng a.
Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmhnih leh kum ruknaah chuan Baasa fapa Ela chu Tirza khuaan Israel-ho chungah a lal ṭan a, kum hnih a lal a.
Tin, a puipa Zimria, a tawlailîr zâtve chunga hotuin a phiarru a; chutih lai chuan Tirza khuaah, Tirza khuaa a in chhûng lam hotu Arza inah a lo inin rui a.
Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmhnih leh kum sarih kumah chuan Zimria chu a va lût a, a bei a, a that a, a aiawhin a lal ta a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, a han lal ṭana, a lalṭhutthlênga a han ṭhut veleh chuan, Baasa chhûngte zawng zawng chu a that vek a; a laichînte leh a ṭhiante zînga mi mipa fa tawh phawt chu pakhat mah a zuah lo.

Chutiang chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu an lawilohnaa tihthinrim nâna Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra an tih, Baasa sualna zawng zawng leh a fapa Ela sualnate avânga Lalpan zâwlnei Jehua hmanga Baasa chungchâng thûa a lo sawi tawh ang khân, Zimria chuan Baasa chhûngte zawng zawng chu a tiboral vek a ni.
Ela chanchin dangte leh a thiltih zawng zawngte chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?
Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmhnih leh kum sarihnaah chuan Zimria chu Tirza khuaah ni sarih a lal a. Philistia-ho chan Gibbethon khua chu, mite chuan an hual a ni.

Tin, a hualtute chuan Zimrian a phiarru a, lal a that ta tih an sawi an lo hria a; chutichuan, Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan sipai hotu Omria chu, chumi ni chuan an riahhmunah Israel-te chunga lalah an siam ta a.
Tin, Omria chu Israel-ho zawng zawng nên Gibbethon khua aṭang chuan an han chho va, Tirza khua chu an han hual ta a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Zimrian khua chu an la tih a hriat chuan lal ina kulhah a tlân lût a, lal inah chuan a inhâl khum a, a thi ta a,
Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak tia a sualnate avâng leh, Jeroboama kawng zawh chu zawh vea Israel-hote thil tihsualtîra a sualna avangin.
Zimria chanchin dangte leh, a phiarrûkna thute chu Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lawm ni?
Chutichuan, Israel mipuite chu pâwl hnihah an lo inṭhen ta a: mipui zâtve chuan Ginatha fapa Tibnia chu lala siam tumin an zui a, a zâtvein Omria an zui a.
Nimahsela, Omria zuitute chuan Ginatha fapa Tibnia zuitute chu an hneh ta a. Tichuan, Tibnia chu a thi a, Omria chu a lal ta a.
Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmthum leh kum khatnaah Omria chu Israel-te chungah a lal ṭan a, kum sâwm leh kum hnih a lal a. Tirza khuaah kum ruk a lal a.
Tin, Semera ta Samari tlâng chu tangkaraw talent hnihin a lei a; tin, tlângah chuan khua a siam a, a khaw siam hmingah chuan chumi tlâng neitu Semera hming chawiin Samari a puttîr a.
Omria chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a, a hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin thil a tisual nasa bîk a.
Nebata fapa Jeroboama dân zawng zawng kha a la a, an lawilohna avânga Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian tihthinrim nâna Israel-hote thil a tihsualtîrna ang khân a sual ve si a.
Omria thiltih chanchin dangte leh a thiltihtheihzia a tihlan thute chu, Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?
Chutichuan, Omria chu a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, Samari khuaah an phûm ta a. Tichuan, a fapa Ahaba chu a aiawhin a lal ta a.
Juda lal Asa lal kum sawmthum leh kum riatnaah Omria fapa Ahaba chu Israel-te chungah a lal ṭan a; tin, Omria fapa Ahaba chu Samari khuaan kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih Israel-te chungah a lal a.
Tin, Omria fapa Ahaba chuan a hmaa mite zawng zawng aiin Lalpa mit hmuhin thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Nebata fapa Jeroboama sualna ang tih ve te chu eng mah lova ngai ni âwm takin, Zidon-ho lal Ethbaala fanu Jezebeli nupuiah a nei a, Baala rawng te bâwlsanin a be ve ta mai a.
Tin, Samari khuaa Baala in a sakah chuan Baala tân maichâm a siam a.
Tin, Ahaba chuan Aseri a siam a, a hmaa Israel lalte zawng zawng aiin Ahaba chuan Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian tihthinrimna thil a ti nasa bîk a ni.

A lal lai chuan Bethel mi Hielan Jeriko khua a siam a. A fa tîr Abirama chânin a lungphûm chu a phûm a; tin, a fa tlum Seguba chânin a kulh kawngkhârte chu a din a, Lalpan Nuna fapa Josua hmanga a lo sawi tawh ang khân.

Tisbe khua, Gilead rama Tisbe khuaa mi Elijan Ahaba hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa, a bula ka awm ṭhinna Israel-te Pathian nunna chhâlin ka sawi e: kum eng emaw ti chhûng chu ka thu lo chuan dai leh ruah rêng rêng a tla lo vang,” a ti a.
Tin, Lalpa thu chu a hnênah a lo thleng a,
“Heta ta hi chhuak la, khawchhak lam panin kal la, Jordan bula awm Kerith luiah han biru rawh.
Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, chumi lui tui chu i tlân ang a; chuta a châwm tûr chein choâkte thu ka pe tawh e,” tiin.
Chutichuan, a kal a, Lalpa thu ang chuan a ti ta a; Jordan bula awm Kerith luiah chuan a han awm ta a.
