Eliphaza fapate chu Temana te, Omara te, Zephia te, Gatama te, Kenaza te, Timna te, Amaleka te an ni.
Reuela fapate chu Nahatha te, Zera te, Sama te, Miza te an ni.
Tin, Seira fapate chu Lotana te, Sobala te, Zibeona te, Ana te, Disona te, Ezera te, Disana te an ni.
Tin, Lotana fapate chu Horia leh Homama an ni a; tin, Lotana chuan farnu Timni a nei a.
Sobala fapate chu Aliana te, Manatha te, Ebala te, Sephia te, Onama te an ni. Zibeona fapate chu Aia leh Ana an ni.
Ana fapa chu Disona a ni. Disona fapate chu Hamrana te, Esbana te, Ithrana te, Kerana te an ni.
Ezera fapate chu Bilhana te, Zaavana te, Jaakana te an ni. Disana fapate chu Uza leh Arana an ni.
Israela thlahte chunga lal an la awm hmaa Edom ram lalte chu hêngte hi an ni: Beora fapa Bela a ni a, a khawpui hming chu Dinhaba a ni.
Tin, Bela chu a thi a, Bozra khuaa mi Zera fapa Jobaba chu a aiah a lal ta a.
Tin, Jobaba chu a thi a, Teman-ho rama mi Husama a aiah a lal ta a.
Tin, Husama chu a thi a, Bedada fapa Hadada, Moab phûla Midian-ho thattu kha a aiah a lal ta a. A khawpui hming chu Avith a ni.
Tin, Hadada chu a thi a, Masreka mi Samla a aiah a lal ta a.
Tin, Samla chu a thi a, Luipui kama Rehoboth khuaa mi Saula a aiah a lal ta a.
Tin, Saula chu a thi a, Akbora fapa Baal-hanana a aiah a lal ta a.
Tin, Baal-hanana chu a thi a, Hadada a aiah a lal ta a; a khawpui hming chu Pai a ni. A nupui hming chu Mezahaba fanu Matredi fanu Mehetabeli a ni.
Hadada pawh chu a thi a. Tin, Edom-ho hotute chu hotu Timna te, hotu Alia te, hotu Jethetha te,
hotu Oholibama te, hotu Ela te, hotu Pinona te,
hotu Kenaza te, hotu Temana te, hotu Mibzara te,
hotu Magdiela te, hotu Irama te an ni. Chûng chu Edom-ho hotute an ni.
Hêngte hi Israela fapate chu an ni: Reubena, Simeona, Levia, Juda, Isakara, Zebuluna,
Dana, Josefa, Benjamina, Naphtalia, Gada, Asera.
Juda fapate chu Era, Onana, Sela-te an ni. Chûng mite pathum chu Kanaan mi Bathsuii laka piang an ni. Tin, Juda fa tîr Era chu Lalpa mit hmuhin mi sual a ni a; tichuan, a tihlum ta a.
Tin, a monu Tamari chuan Pereza leh Zera a hrinsak a. Juda fapate zawng zawng chu panga an ni.
Pereza fapate chu Hezrona leh Hamula an ni.
Tin, Zera fapate chu Zimria te, Ethana te, Hemana te, Kalkola te, Dara te an ni a, an vaiin panga an ni.
Tin, Karmia fapa chu Akara, Israel-te tibuaitu, thilhlan bawhchhetupa kha a ni.
Tin, Ethana fapa chu Azaria a ni.
Hezrona fapate, a laka piangte chu Jerameela te, Rama te, Kelubaia te an ni.
Raman Aminadaba a hring a; tin, Aminadaban Juda thlah mi lian Nasona a hring a;
Nasonan Salma a hring a, Salman Boaza a hring a;
Boazan Obeda a hring a, Obedan Jesaia a hring a;
Jesaian a fa tîrah Eliaba a hring a, a pahnihna chu Abinadaba, a pathumna chu Simea,
a palina chu Nethanela, a pangana chu Radaia,
a parukna chu Ozema, a pasarihna chu Davida a ni.
Tin, an farnute chu Zeruii leh Abigaili an ni. Tin, Zeruii fapate chu Abisaia te, Joaba te, Asahela te an ni a, pathum an ni.
Abigailin Amasa a hring a; tin, Amasa pa chu Ismael mi Jethera a ni.
Hezrona fapa Kaleban a nupui Azubi, Jeriothi fanu lakah chuan fate a hring a. Tin, hêngte hi a fapate chu an ni: Jesera, Sobaba, Ardona.
Tin, Azubi chu a thi a, Kaleba chuan Ephrathi a nei a, ani chuan Hura a hrinsak a.
Tin, Hura chuan Uria a hring a, Urian Bezalela a hring a.
Tin, chumi hnuah chuan Hezrona chuan Gileada pa Makira fanu a pâwl a, kum sawmruk a nihin chu mi chu a nei a; ani chuan Seguba a hrinsak a.
Seguba chuan Jaira a hring a, ani chuan Gilead ramah khawpui sawmhnih leh pathum a nei a.
Gesura leh Arama chuan Jaira khawpuite, Kenath khua leh a khawperte nên, khaw sawmruk an lâksak a. Chûng zawng zawng chu Gileada pa Makira fapate chu an ni.
Tin Kaleb-ephratha khuaa Hezrona a thih hnu chuan Hezrona nupui Abiji chuan Tekoa pa Asura a hrinsak a.
Tin, Hezrona fa tîr Jerameela fapa upa ber chu Rama a ni a; tin, Buna te, Orena te, Ozema te, Ahija te an ni.
Jerameela chuan nupui dang a nei a, a hming chu Atari a ni a, Onama nu a ni.
Jerameela fapa upa ber Rama fapate chu Maaza te, Jamina te, Ekera te an ni.
Tin, Onama fapate chu Samaia leh Jada an ni a. Samaia fapate chu Nadaba leh Abisura an ni.
Tin, Abisura nupuia hming chu Abihaili a ni a; tin, ani chuan Abana leh Molida a hrinsak a.
Nadaba fapate chu Seleda leh Apaima an ni; Seleda erawh chu fa nei lovin a thi a.
Apaima fapa chu Isia a ni a, Isia fapa chu Sesana a ni a, Sesana fapa chu Alaia a ni.
Tin, Samaia unaupa Jada fapate chu Jethera leh Jonathana an ni a; Jethera chu fa nei lovin a thi a.
Tin, Jonathana fapate chu Peletha leh Zaza an ni. Chûngte chu Jerameela thlahte an ni.
Sesana chuan fanute tih loh chu fa a nei lo va. Tin, Sesana chuan Aigupta mi chhiahhlawh a nei a, a hming chu Jara a ni.
Sesana chuan a fanu chu a chhiahhlawh Jara nupuiah a neihtîr a; tin, Ataia a hrinsak a.
Ataia chuan Nathana a hring a, Nathana chuan Zabada a hring a;
Zabada chuan Ephlala a hring a, Ephlala chuan Obeda a hring a;
Obeda chuan Jehua a hring a, Jehua chuan Azaria a hring a;
Azaria chuan Heleza a hring a, Heleza chuan Eleasa a hring a;
Eleasa chuan Sismaia a hring a, Sismaia chuan Saluma a hring a;
Saluma chuan Jekamia a hring a, Jekamia chuan Elisama a hring a.
Jerameela unaupa Kaleba fa tîr chu Ziph-ho thlahtu Mesa a ni a, a fapa Maresa chu Hebrona pa a ni.
Hebrona fapate chu Kora te, Tapua te, Rekema te, Sema te an ni.
Seman Jorkeama pa Rahama a hring a; tin, Rekeman Samaia a hring a.
Samaia fapa chu Maona a ni a; tin, Maona chu Beth-zura pa a ni.
Kaleba hmei Ephi chuan Harana te, Moza te, Gazeza te a hring a; Harana chuan Gazeza a hring a.
Jadaia fapate chu Regema te, Jothama te, Gesana te, Peletha te, Epha te, Saapha te an ni.
Kaleba hmei Maaki chuan Sebera leh Tirhana a hring a.
Madmana pa Saapha leh Makbena leh Gibea pa Seva a hring bawk a; tin, Kaleba fanu chu Aksi a ni.
Hêngte hi Kaleba thlahte an ni: Hura fa, Kiriath-jearim-ho thlahtu, Ephrathi fa tîr Sobala;
Bethlehem-ho thlahtu Salma; Beth-gader-ho thlahtu Harepha te hi.
Tin, Kiriath-jearim-ho thlahtu Sobala chuan Haroe-ho leh Menuhoth-ho zâtve a thlah a.
Tin, Kiriath-jearim hnamte chu Ithra-ho te, Puth-ho te, Sumath-ho te, Misra-ho te an ni; chûngho aṭang chuan Zorath-ho te leh Estaol-ho te an lo chhuak a.
Salma thlahte chu Bethlehem-ho te, Netophath-ho te, Atroth-beth-joab-ho te, Manahath-ho zâtve te, Zor-ho te an ni.
Tin, Jabez-a awm lehkhaziaktu hnamte chu Tirath-ho te, Simeath-ho te, Sukath-ho te an ni. Chûngte chu Rekaba thlahte zînga mi Hamatha thlah Ken-hote chu an ni.
Tichuan, hêngte hi Davida fapa, Hebron khuaa a hrinte chu an ni: a fa tîr chu Jezreel khuaa Ahinoami laka mi Amnona a ni a; a dawttu chu Karmel khua Abigaili laka mi Daniela a ni a;
a pathumna chu Gesur lal Talmaia fanu Maaki fapa Absaloma a ni a; a palina chu Hagithi fapa Adonija a ni a;
a pangana chu Abitali laka mi Sephatia a ni a; a parukna chu a nupui Egli laka mi Ithreama a ni.
Hebron khuaah chuan paruk a hring a. Chutah chuan kum sarih leh thla ruk a lal a; tin, Jerusalem khuaah kum sawmthum leh kum thum a lal a.
Tin, Jerusalem khuaa a hrinte chu: Simea te, Sobaba te, Nathana te, Solomona te an ni a; an pali chuan Amiela fanu Bathsuii laka mi an ni.
Tin, Ibhara te, Elisama te, Elipheleta te,
Noga te, Nephega te, Japhia te,
Elisama te, Eliada te, Elipheleta te - pakua an ni.
Chûng zawng zawngte chu Davida fapate an ni, hmei fate tiam lovin; tin, Tamari chu an farnu a ni.
Solomona fapa chu Rehoboama a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Abija a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Asa a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Jehosaphata a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Jorama a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Ahazia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Joasa a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Amazia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Azaria a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Jothama a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Ahaza a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Hezekia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Manasea a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Amona a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Josia a ni.
Tin, Josia fapate chu a fa tîr chu Johanana a ni a, a dawttu chu Jehoiakima a ni a, a pathumna chu Zedekia a ni a, a palina chu Saluma a ni.
Jehoiakima fapate chu Jekonia leh Zedekia an ni.
Tin, sal tâng Jekonia fapate chu Sealtiela te,
Malkirama te, Pedaia te, Senazara te, Jekamia te, Hosama te, Nedabia te an ni.
Pedaia fapate chu Zerubabela leh Simeia an ni. Zerubabela fapate chu Mesulama leh Hanania an ni a, Selomithi chu an farnu a ni;
tin, Hasuba te, Ohela te, Berekia te, Hasadia te, Jusab-heseda te - panga an ni.
Hanania fapa chu Pelatia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Jesaia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Rephaia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Arnana a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Obadia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Sekania a ni.
Sekania fapa chu Semaia a ni. Semaia fapate chu Hatusa te, Igala te, Baria te, Nearia te, Saphata te an ni a - paruk an ni.
Nearia fapate chu Elioenaia te, Hizkia te, Azrikama te an ni a - pathum an ni.
Tin, Elioenaia fapate chu Hodavia te, Eliasiba te, Pelaia te, Akuba te, Johanana te, Delaia te, Anania te an ni a - pasarih an ni.
Juda fapate chu Pereza te, Hezrona te, Karmia te, Hura te, Sobala te an ni.
Tin, Sobala fapa Reaian Jahatha a hring a; tin, Jahathan Ahumaia leh Lahada a hring a, chûng chu Zorath-ho hnamte an ni.
Etama pa fapate chu Jezreela te, Isma te, Idbasa te an ni a, an farnu hming chu Hazelelponi a ni;
tin, Gedora pa Penuela leh Husa pa Ezera an ni. Chûngte chu Bethlehema pa, Ephrathi fa tîr, Hura thlahte an ni.
Tin, Tekoa pa Asura chuan nupui pahnih Heli leh Naari a nei a.
Tin, Naari chuan Ahuzama te, Hephera te, Temenia te, Haahastaria te a hrinsak a. Chûngte chu Naari fapate an ni.
Tin, Heli fapate chu Zeretha te, Izara te, Ethnana te an ni.
Tin, Hakozan Anuba te, Zobeba te, Haruma fapa Aharlel-ho thlahte a hring a.
Tin, Jabeza chu a unaute aia mi zahawm a ni a, a nu chuan, “Lungngai chunga ka hrin a ni a,” tiin a hmingah Jabeza a ti a ni.

Tin, Jabeza chuan, “Aw, mal mi sâwm ngei ngei la, ka ramri hi mi zauh la, i kut chuan mi awmpuiin lungngaihna ka chungah a thlen loh nân sual lak ata mi thiarfihlîm ang che,” tiin Israel-te Pathian chu a au va. Tichuan, Pathianin a thil dîl chu a hlawhtlintîr a.
Suha unaupa Keluban Mehira a hring a, chu mi chu Estona pa a ni.
Tin, Estona chuan Beth-rapha te, Pasea te, Ir-nahasa pa Tehina te a hring a. Chûngte chu Reka-hote an ni.
Kenaza fapate chu Othniela leh Seraia an ni. Othniela fapa chu Hathatha a ni.
Tin, Meonothaian Ophra a hring a; tin, Seraian Ge-harasim-ho thlahtu Joaba a hring a, chu mite chu kut themthiam mi an ni.
Tin, Jephunea fapa Kaleba fapate chu Irua te, Ela te, Naama te an ni a. Ela fapa chu Kenaza a ni.
Jehalelela fapate chu Zipa te, Zipha te, Tiria te, Asarela te an ni.
Ezra fapate chu Jethera te, Mereda te, Ephera te, Jalona te an ni. Pharaoa fanu Bithiaii, Mereda nupui fapate chu Miriama te, Samaia te, Estemoa pa Isba te an ni.
Tin, a nupui Juda hmeichhiain Gedora pa Jereda te, Sokoa pa Hebera te, Zanoa pa Jekuthiela te a hring a.
Tin, Nahama farnu Hodia nupuia fapate chu Garm-ho thlahtu Keila pa leh Maakath-ho thlahtu Estemoa an ni.
Tin, Simona fapate chu Amnona te, Rina te, Ben-hanana te, Tilona te an ni. Tin, Isia fapate chu Zohetha leh Ben-zohetha an ni.
Juda fapa Sela fapate chu Leka pa Era te, Maresa pa Laada te, Asbea-ho puan zai sîn siamtuhote an ni a;
tin, Jokima te, Kozeba-ho te, Joasa te, Sarapha, Moab rama rorêla awma, chumi hnua Jasubi-lehem-a awm taa te kha an ni.
Chûng thuziak chu hmasânga mi a ni. Chûngho chu bêl vawtu, Netaim leh Gedera khuaa awm an ni a, lal hnênah a hna thawkin an awm a ni.
Simeona fapate chu Nemuela te, Jamina te, Jariba te, Zera te, Saula te an ni;
Saula fapa chu Saluma a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Mibsama a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Misma a ni.
Tin, Misma fapa chu Hamuela a ni a; chu mi fapa chu Zakura a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Simeia a ni.
Simeia chuan fapa sâwm leh paruk leh fanu paruk a nei a; a unaute erawh chuan fa an ngah ve lo va, Juda thlahte angin an thlahte pawh an pung ve lo.
Beer-seba-ah te, Molada-ah te, Hazar-sual-ah te an awm a,
Bilha-ah te, Ezem-ah te, Tolad-ah te,
Bethuel-ah te, Horma-ah te, Ziglag-ah te,
Beth-markaboth-ah te, Hazar-susim-ah te, Beth-biri-ah te, Saraim-ah te pawh. Chûngte chu Davida lal thlenga an khawpuite chu a ni.
Tin, an khua chu khaw nga - Etam te, Ain te, Rimon te, Token te, Asan te a ni;
tin, chumi vêla khaw tê zawng zawng Baal thlengin a ni. Chûngte chu an chênna a ni a, an thlahtute thu ziakna an kawl bawk.
Tin, Mesobaba te, Jamleka te, Amazia fapa Josa te,
Joela te, Josibia fapa Jehua te (chu mite pa chu Asiela fapa Seraia a ni a),
Elioenaia te, Jaakoba te, Jesohaia te, Asaia te, Adiela te, Jesi-miela te, Benaia te,
Siphia fapa Ziza te, chu mite pa chu Allona a ni a, chu mi chu Jedaia fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Simria fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Semaia fapa a ni a.
Chûng an hming an lamte chu an chhûngkaw puipate an ni a, an chhûngkua chu nasa takin an lo pung ta a.
Tin, Gedor luhnaah, ruam chhak lampang thlengin an ran rualte tlatna tûr zawngin an kal a.
Tin, ran tlatna hnim tui tak tak leh ṭha tak tak an hmu a, a ram chu a zauvin a reh a, râlmuanawm tak a ni; a hmaa lo awmte chu Hama thlahte an ni a.

Tichuan, chûng an hming an ziakate chu Judai ram lal Hezekia lal lai khân an lût a, an puan inte leh chutih laia Meunim-ho lo awmte chu an tiboral vek a, tûn thlengin an hmun chu an luahsak a; an ran rual tân tlatna a awm avângin.
Tin, ṭhenkhat Simeona fapateho, mi zanga lai Seir tlângah an kal a, an hotu atân Isia fapate - Pelatia te, Nearia te, Rephaia te, Uziela te an hmang a.
Tichuan, Amalek-ho hnam tlân bo la awmte kha an hneh a, tûn thlengin chutah chuan an awm ta a.

Israela fa tîr Reubena fapate chu (ani chu fa tîr zawng a ni a; amaherawhchu, a pa khum a tihbawlhhlawh avângin a fa tîr nihna chu Israela fapa Josefa fapate pêk a ni a; tichuan, thlahtute chhuina chu fa tîr nihnaa chhui tûr a ni ta lo;
Juda chuan a unaute a khûm ta si a, amahah chuan mi lian chu a lo chhuak a, fa tîr nihna erawh chu Josefa chan a ni).
Israela fa tîr Reubena fapate chu Hanoka te, Palua te, Hezrona te, Karmia te an ni.
Joela fapa chu Semaia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Goga a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Simeia a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Mika a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Reaia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Baala a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Beera, Assuria lal Tiglath-pileseran sala a hruai chu a ni; ani chu Reuben-ho mi lian a ni.

An thlahtute hnam chhui dâna a unaute hnam hotute chu Aroer aṭanga Nebo leh Baal-meon thlenga awm Jeiela te, Zekaria te, Bela te an ni; chu mi pa chu Azaza a ni a, chu mi pa chu Sema a ni a, chu mi pa chu Joela a ni.
Anni chuan chhak laman Euphrates lui aṭanga thlalêr luhna thlengin an luah a, Gilead ramah chuan an ran a lo pun tâk avângin.
Tin, Saula dam lai chuan Hagar-ho an rûn a, chûngho chu an kutah an lo tlâwm ta a; tichuan, Gilead chhak lam ram tluanin an puan inte an zâr a.
Tin, Gada fapate chu an ep Basan raman Saleka thlengin an awm a:
hotu Joela te, a dawttu Saphama te, Janaia te, Basan-a mi Saphata te,
an chhûngte, an unau Mikaela te, Mesulama te, Seba te, Joraia te, Jakana te, Ziaa te, Ebera te nên pasarih an ni.

Hêngte hi Huria fapa Abihaila fapate an ni, chu mi chu Jaroa fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Gileada fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Mikaela fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Jesisaia fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Jadoa fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Buza fapa a ni a;
Ahia chu Abdiela fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Gunia fapa a ni a, an chhûngkaw hotu a ni.
Tichuan, Gilead rama Basan-ah leh a khawpuiahte leh Saron dai vêl zawng zawng an ram chin thlengin an luah a.
Chûng zawng zawng chu Judai ram lal Jothama lal lai leh Israel ram lal Jeroboama lal laia thlahtute chhuinaah ziak an ni.
Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Manase hnam zâtvete zînga huaisen ṭha ṭhiau, phaw leh kâwlhnâm keng thei, thal kah thiam, indo thiamte chu sîngli leh sângli leh zasarih leh sawmruk an ni.
Hagar-hote, Jetur-hote, Naphis-hote, Nodab-hote chu an do va.
Tin, ṭanpuiin an awm a; tichuan, Hagar-ho leh an hnêna awm zawng zawng chu an kutah pêk an ni ta a; indo lai chuan Pathian an au va, anni chu a lo chhâng a, amahah chuan rinna an nghah avângin.
Tin, an rante an mansak a; an sanghâwngsei sîngnga leh berâm nuai hnih leh sîngnga leh sabengtung sânghnih leh mihring nuai khat nên.
Chu indo chu Pathian remtihpui a nih avângin mi tam tak an that a ni. Sal tân thlengin an awmna ram chu an luahsak ta reng a.
Tin, Manasea thlah hnam zâtvete chu chumi ramah chuan an awm a; Basan aṭanga Baal-hermon te, Senir te, Hermon tlâng thlengin an sâwn zau zêl a.
Tin, hêngte hi an chhûngkaw puipate chu an ni: Ephera te, Isia te, Eliela te, Azriela te, Jeremia te, Hodavia te, Jadiela te, mi chak huaisen, mi hmingthang, an pute chhûngkaw puipate chu.
Tin, an pi leh pute Pathian chungah thil an tisual a, an hmaa Pathianin a lo tihboral tâk, chu rama mi pathiante lakah chuan an uire ta a.

Tin, Israel-te Pathian chuan Assuria lal Pula (chu chu Assuria lal Tilgath-pilnesera) rilru chu a chawk tho va, ani chuan Reuben-ho te, Gad-ho te, Manase hnam zâtvete chu a man a, Hala-ah te, Habor-ah te, Hara-ah te, Gozan luiah te a hruai a, tûn thleng hian an la awm.
Levia fapate chu Gersona te, Kohatha te, Meraria te an ni.
Tin, Kohatha fapate chu Amrama te, Izara te, Hebrona te, Uziela te an ni.
Tin, Amrama thlahte chu Arona te, Mosia te, Miriami te an ni a. Tin, Arona fapate chu Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te an ni.
Eleazara chuan Phinehasa a hring a, Phinehasan Abisua a hring a;
Abisuan Bukia a hring a, Bukian Uzia a hring a;
Uzian Zerahia a hring a, Zerahian Meraiotha a hring a;
Meraiothan Amaria a hring a, Amarian Ahituba a hring a;
Ahituban Zadoka a hring a, Zadokan Ahimaaza a hring a;
Ahimaazan Azaria a hring a, Azarian Johanana a hring a;
Johananan Azaria a hring a (chu mi chuan a ni, Jerusalem-a Solomona sak biak ina puithiam hna thawk ni);
Azarian Amaria a hring a, Amarian Ahituba a hring a;
Ahituban Zadoka a hring a, Zadokan Saluma a hring a;
Saluman Hilkia a hring a, Hilkian Azaria a hring a;
Azarian Seraia a hring a, Seraian Jehozadaka a hring a;
Lalpan Judai ram leh Jerusalem khua Nebukadnezzara kuta a pêk lai khân Jehozadaka chu salah a tâng ve a.
Levia fapate chu Gersoma te, Kohatha te, Meraria te an ni.
Hêng hi Gersoma fapate hming chu a ni: Libnia leh Simeia.
Kohatha fapate chu Amrama te, Izara te, Hebrona te, Uziela te an ni.
Meraria fapate chu Mahlia leh Musia an ni. Chûngte chu an chhûngkaw kal dân ang zêla Levi-ho hnamte chu an ni.
Gersoma fapa chu Libnia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Jahatha a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Zima a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Joa a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Idova a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Zera a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Jeatheraia a ni.
Kohatha thlahte chu: Aminadaba a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Kora a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Asira a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Elkana a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Ebiasapha a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Asira a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Tahatha a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Uriela a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Uzia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Saula a ni.
Elkana fapate chu: Amasaia leh Ahimotha an ni.
Elkana thlahte chu: Elkana fapa chu Zophaia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Nahatha a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Eliaba a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Jerohama a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Elkana a ni.
Samuela fapate chu a upa zâwk chu Joela a ni a, a dawttu chu Abija a ni.
Meraria fapa chu Mahlia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Libnia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Simeia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Uza a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Simea a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Hagia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Asaia a ni.
Chûngte chu a ni, bâwm dah hnua Lalpa ina hla hruaitu atâna Davidan a ruatte chu.
Tichuan, Solomonan Jerusalem-a Lalpa in a sak hma loh chu, inbiakna puan inah chuan hlain rawng an bâwl ṭhîn a, an inchhâwk kual ṭhîn a ni.
Tin, hêngte hi chûng hna thawktute chu an ni, an fapate nên, Kohath-ho thlahte chu: hla satu Hemana a ni a, chu mi pa chu Joela a ni a, chu mi pa chu Samuela a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Elkana a ni a, chu mi pa chu Jerohama a ni a, chu mi pa chu Eliela a ni a, chu mi pa chu Tova a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Zupha a ni a, chu mi pa chu Elkana a ni a, chu mi pa chu Mahatha a ni a, chu mi pa chu Amasaia a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Elkana a ni a, chu mi pa chu Joela a ni a, chu mi pa chu Azaria a ni a, chu mi pa chu Zephania a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Tahatha a ni a, chu mi pa chu Asira a ni a, chu mi pa chu Ebiasapha a ni a, chu mi pa chu Kora a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Izara a ni a, chu mi pa chu Kohatha a ni a, chu mi pa chu Levia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Israela a ni a.
Tin, a unaupa chu Asapha, a ding lama che ṭhîn a ni a, Asapha pa chu Berekia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Simea a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Mikaela a ni a, chu mi pa chu Baaseia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Malkija a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Ethnia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Zera a ni a, chu mi pa chu Adaia a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Ethana a ni a, chu mi pa chu Zima a ni a, chu mi pa chu Simeia a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Jahatha a ni a, chu mi pa chu Gersoma a ni a, chu mi pa chu Levia a ni a.
Tin, vei lama che ṭhîn an unau, Meraria fapa chu Ethana a ni a, chu mi pa chu Kisia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Abdia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Maluka a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Hasabia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Amazia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Hilkia a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Amzia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Bania a ni a, chu mi pa chu Semera a ni a,
chu mi pa chu Mahlia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Musia a ni a, chu mi pa chu Meraria a ni a, chu mi pa chu Levia a ni a.
Tin, an unau Levi-hote chu Pathian biak bûka rawngbâwl hna zawng zawng thawk tûra ruat an ni.

Arona leh a thlahte erawh chuan Pathian chhiahhlawh Mosian thu a lo pêk tawh zawng zawng ang khân, hmun thianghlim ber hna zawng zawng chu changin, Israel-te tâna remna siam nân hâlral thilhlanna maichâmah leh rimtui hlanna maichâmah an hlân ṭhîn a.
Tin, hêngte hi Arona thlahte chu an ni: Eleazara chu a fapa a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Phinehasa a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Abisua a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Bukia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Uzia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Zerahia a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Meraiotha a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Amaria a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Ahituba a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Zadoka a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Ahimaaza a ni.
Tin, hêngte hi an ram chhûnga an awm hmun khuar dân ang zêla an awm hmunte chu a ni: Arona fa, Kohath mi hnamte chu (ṭhum vâwr chu an chunga tlu hmasa ber a ni rêng a)
Judai rama Hebron leh a dai vêlte chu an pe a.
Khawpui dai vêlte leh a khawperte erawh chu Jephunea fapa Kaleba an pe a.
Tin, Arona fapate chu inhumhimna khawpui Hebron te, Libna khua a dai vêlte nên, Jatir leh Estemoa khua a dai vêlte nên,
Hilen khua a dai vêlte nên, Debir khua a dai vêlte nên,
Asan khua a dai vêlte nên, Beth-semes khua a dai vêlte nên;
Benjamin hnamte zîng ata Geba khua a dai vêlte nên, Alemeth khua a dai vêlte nên, Anathoth khua a dai vêlte nên an pe a. An hnam zînga khawpui pêk zawng zawng chu khaw sâwm leh khaw thum a ni.
Tin, Kohatha fapa dangte chu hnam zâtve, Manasea thlahte hnam zâtve chanpuala mite khawpui sâwm, ṭhum vâwrin an pe a.

Tin, Gersoma fapate chu an hnam kal dân ang zêlin, Isakar hnam chanpuala mi te, Aser hnam chanpuala mi te, Naphtali hnam chanpuala mi te, Basan rama Manase hnam chanpuala mi te, khawpui sâwm leh pathum an pe a.
Meraria fapate chu an hnam kal dân ang zêlin Reuben hnam chanpuala mi te, Gad hnam chanpuala mi te, Zebulun hnam chanpuala mi te, ṭhum vâwrin khaw sâwm leh pahnih an pe a.
Tin, Israela thlahte chuan Levi-ho chite chu khawpuite leh a dai vêlte an pe a.
Tichuan, Juda hnam chanpuala mi te, Simeon hnam chanpuala mi te, Benjamin hnam chanpuala mi te khawpui hming sawi tâkte chu ṭhum vâwrin an pe a ni.
Tin, Kohatha thlahte hnam ṭhenkhat chuan Ephraim-hote chanpuala mi khawpuite an chang a.
Tin, Ephraim tlâng rama inhumhimna khawpui Sekem chu a dai vêlte nên an pe a, Gezer a dai vêlte nên;
Jokmeam a dai vêlte nên, Beth-horon a dai vêlte nên,
Aijalon a dai vêlte nên, Gath-rimon a dai vêlte nên.
Tin, Manase hnam zâtvete chanpuala mi chu - Kohatha thlahte hnam la awmte tân chuan - Aner a dai vêlte nên, Bileam a dai vêlte nên an pe a.
Manase hnam zâtvete chanpuala mi Gersoma fapate an pêk chu Basan rama Golan a dai vêlte nên, Astaroth a dai vêlte nên a ni.
Isakar hnam chanpuala mi Kedes a dai vêlte nên, Daberath a dai vêlte nên,
Ramoth a dai vêlte nên, Anem a dai vêlte nên;
Aser hnam chanpuala mi Masal a dai vêlte nên, Abdon a dai vêlte nên,
Hukok a dai vêlte nên, Rehob a dai vêlte nên;
Naphtali hnam chanpuala mi Galili rama Kedes a dai vêlte nên, Hamon a dai vêlte nên, Kiriathaim a dai vêlte nên a ni.
Tin, Meraria thlah Levi-ho dangte an pêk chu Zebulun hnam chanpuala mi Rimono khua a dai vêlte nên, Tabor khua a dai vêlte nên;
Jeriko zâwn Jordan râl, Jordan chhak lampangah Reuben hnam chanpuala mi thlalêra Bezer khua a dai vêlte nên, Jahzah khua a dai vêlte nên,
Kedemoth khua a dai vêlte nên, Mephaath khua a dai vêlte nên;
Gad hnam chanpuala mi Gilead rama Ramoth khua a dai vêlte nên, Mahanaim khua a dai vêlte nên,
Hesbon khua a dai vêlte nên, Jazer khua a dai vêlte nên a ni.
Isakara fapate chu Tola te, Pua te, Jasuba te, Simrona te an ni a, pali an ni.

Tola fapate chu Uzia te, Rephaia te, Jeriela te, Jamaia te, Ibsama te, Samuela te an ni a, Tola thlahtea chhûngkaw puipa an ni. Anmahni chhuana mi chak huaisen an ni a; Davida dam lai chuan sînghnih leh sânghnih leh zaruk an ni.
Uzia fapa chu Izrahia a ni a; Izrahia fapate chu Mikaela te, Obadia te, Joela te, Isia te an ni. Panga an ni a, an vaiin puipa an ni.
Tin, an chhûngkaw chhiarnaa chhiar tel sipai sîngthum leh sângruk an awm bawk a; nupui leh fapa tam tak nei an ni.
Tin, Isakar hnam zawng zawng chhiarnaa chhiar tel an unaute chu mi chak huaisen sîngriat leh sângsarih an ni.
Benjamina fapate chu Bela te, Bekera te, Jediaela te an ni a, pathum an ni.

Bela fapate chu Ezbona te, Uzia te, Uziela te, Jerimotha te, Iria te an ni a, panga an ni. Chhûngkaw puipa, mi chak huaisen an ni a, thlahte chhiarnaa chhiarte chu sînghnih leh sânghnih leh sawmthum leh pali an ni.
Bekera fapate chu Zemira te, Joasa te, Eliezera te, Elioenaia te, Omria te, Jeremotha te, Abija te, Anathotha te, Alemetha te an ni. Chûng zawng zawng chu Bekera fapate an ni.
Tin, anni chu thlahte chhiarnaa ziak dân chuan chhûngkaw puipa, mi chak huaisen sînghnih leh zahnih an ni.
Jediaela fapa chu Bilhana a ni a; Bilhana fapate chu Jeusa te, Benjamina te, Ehuda te, Kenaana te, Zethana te, Tarsisa te, Ahisahara te an ni.
Jediaela thlah zawng zawngte chu chhûngkaw puipa mi chak huaisen, sîngkhat leh sângsarih leh zahnih an ni.
Ira fapa Supima leh Hupima te, Ahera fapa Husima te nên.
Naphtalia fapate chu Jaziela te, Gunia te, Jezera te, Saluma te an ni a, Bilhaii fate an ni.
Manasea fapate chu, a nupuiin Asriela a hring a (A hmeinu Aram miin Gileada pa Makira a hring a;
Makira chuan Hupim leh Supim mi nupuiah a nei a; tin, a farnu hming chu Maaki a ni), a dawttu hming chu Zelophehada a ni; tin, Zelophehada chuan fanute a nei a.
Makira nupui Maaki chuan fapa a hring a, a hmingah Peresa a sa a. A unaupa hming chu Seresa a ni a; a fapate chu Ulama leh Rakema an ni.
Ulama fapa chu Bedana a ni. Chûngte chu Manasea thlah Makira fapa Gileada fapate chu an ni.
Tin, a farnu Hamoleketin Isoda te, Abiezera te, Malaa te a hring a.
Tin, Semida fapate chu Ahiana te, Sekema te, Likhia te, Aniama te an ni.
Ephraima fapa chu Suthela a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Bereda a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Tahatha a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Eleada a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Tahatha a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Zabada a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Suthela a ni a, Ezera leh Eleada, chumi rama chêng Gath khuaa mite ran rual zuk lâk an tum avânga an lo thah tâkte nên.
An pa Ephraima chuan ni rei tak a sûn a; tin, a unaute chu amah hnêm tûrin an va kal a.
Tin, a nupui chu a pâwl a, a rai a, fapa a hring a, vânduainain an in chhûng a tlâkbuak avângin a hmingah chuan Beria a sa a.
Tin, a fanu chu Seerai a ni a, chu mi chuan Beth-horon thlangta zâwk leh chhakta zâwk leh Uzen-seera a siam a.
A fapa chu Repha a ni a, Resepha nên, chu mi fapa chu Tela a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Tahana a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Ladana a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Amihuda a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Elisama a ni a,
chu mi fapa chu Nuna a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Josua a ni.
Tin, an chanpual leh an chênnate chu Bethel leh a khawperte, chhak lamah Naaran, thlang lamah Gezer a khawperte nên, Sekem pawh a khawperte nên, Aza a khawperte thlengin;

tin, Manasea thlahte ramri lamah chuan Beth-san leh a khawper te, Taanak leh a khawper te, Megido leh a khawper te, Dor leh a khawperte nên a ni. Chûngah chuan Israela fa Josefa thlahte chu an awm a ni.
Asera fate chu Imna te, Isva te, Isvia te, Beria te, an farnu Seri te an ni.
Tin, Beria fapate chu Hebera leh Birzaitha pa Malkiela an ni.
Tin, Hebera chuan Japhleta te, Somera te, Hothama te, an farnu Suai te a hring a.
Japhleta fapate chu Pasaka te, Bimhala te, Asvatha te an ni. Chûngte chu Japhleta thlahte an ni.
Semera fapate chu Ahia te, Roga te, Jehuba te, Arama te an ni.
Tin, a unaupa Helema fapate chu Zopha te, Imna te, Selesa te, Amala te an ni.
Zopha fapate chu Suaha te, Harnephera te, Shuala te, Beria te, Imra te,
Bezera te, Hoda te, Samma te, Silsa te, Ithrana te, Beera te an ni.
Jethera fapate chu Jephunea te, Pispa te, Ara te an ni.
Tin, Ula fapate chu Ara te, Haniela te, Rizia te an ni.
Chûng zawng zawngte chu Asera thlah, chhûngkaw puipa, mi chak huaisen, hotu berte chu an ni. Tichuan, thlahte chhiarnaah râlkaia chhiarte chu sînghnih leh sângruk an ni.
Tin, Benjaminan a fa tîrah Bela a hring a, a dawtah Asbela, a dawt lehah Ahara,
a dawt lehah Noha, a dawt leh pekah Rapha.
Bela fapate chu Adara te, Gera te, Abihuda te,
Abisua te, Naamana te, Ahova te,
Gera te, Sephuphana te, Hurama te an ni.
Ehuda fapate chu hêngte hi an ni; hêngte hi Geba-a chêngho chhûngkaw puipate an ni a, Manahath-ah salah an hruai a:
chûngte chu Naamana te, Ahija te, Gera te an ni a, salah a hruai a, ani chuan Uza leh Ahihuda a hring a.
Tin, Saharaima chuan a nupuite a kaltîr hnuin Moab ramah fate a hring a; a nupuite chu Husimi leh Baari an ni.
Tin, ani chuan a nupui Hodesi lakah Jobaba te, Zibia te, Mesa te, Malkama te,
Jeuza te, Sakia te, Mirma te a nei a. Chûngte chu a fapa, chhûngkaw puipate chu an ni.
Tin, Husimi lakah Abituba leh Elpaala a hring a.
Tin, Elpaala fapate chu Ebera te, Misama te, Semeda te (chu mi chuan Ono leh Lod khua leh a khawperte a siam a);
Gath-a awmho hnawt chhuaktu, Aijalon-a awmho chhûngkaw puipa, Beria leh Sema te nên;
Ahiova te, Sasaka te, Jeremotha te,
Zebadia te, Arada te, Edera te,
Beria fapa - Mikaela te, Ispa te, Joha te.
Elpaala fapate: Zebadia, Mesullama, Hizkia, Hebera,
Ismeraia te, Izlia leh Jobaba te,
Simeia fapate: Jakima, Zikria, Zabdia,
Elienaia, Zillethaia, Eliela,
Adaia, Beraia leh Simratha te.
Sasaka fapate: Ispana, Ebera, Eliela,
Abdona, Zikria, Hanana,
Hanania, Elama, Anthothija,
Iphdeia leh Penuela te.
Jerohama fapate: Samseraia, Seharia, Athalia,
Jaaresia, Elija leh Zikria te an ni.
Chûngte chu anmahni chhuanah chuan chhûngkaw puipa, hotute an ni. Chûngte chu Jerusalem-ah an awm.
Gibeon-ah chuan Gibeona pa Jeiela a awm a, a nupuia hming chu Maaki a ni;
tin, a fapa upa ber chu Abdona a ni a, a fa dangte chu Zura te, Kisa te, Baala te, Nadaba te,
Gedora te, Ahiova te, Zekera te an ni.
Tin, Miklothan Simea a hring a. Tin, anni pawh chu Jerusalem-ah an unaute zîngah, an unaute depah an awm a.
Neran Kisa a hring a, Kisan Saula a hring a, Saulan Jonathana te, Malkisua te, Abinadaba te, Esbaala te a hring a.
Jonathana fapa chu Merib-baala a ni a; tin, Merib-baalan Mika a hring a.
Mika fapate chu Pithona te, Meleka te, Tarea te, Ahaza te an ni.
Tin, Ahazan Jehoada a hring a, Jehoadan Alemetha leh Azmavetha leh Zimria a hring a; tin, Zimrian Moza a hring a.
Mozan Binea a hring a, chu mi fapa chu Rapha a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Eleasa a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Azela a ni.
Azela chuan fapa paruk a nei a, an hming chu hêngte hi a ni: Azrikama te, Bokerua te, Ismaela te, Searia te, Obadia te, Hanana te. Chûng zawng zawngte chu Azela fapate an ni.
Tin, a unaupa Eseka fapate chu a fa tîr Ulama a ni a, a dawttu chu Jeusa a ni a, a dawt lehtu chu Elipheleta a ni.
Ulama fapate chu mi chak huaisen, thal kâp mi an ni a, fapa te, tupa te tam tak an nei a, za leh sawmnga an ni. Chûng zawng zawng chu Benjamina thlahte an ni.

Chutichuan, Israel zawng zawng chu thlahte chhiarnaa chhiar an ni a; tichuan, ngai teh, Israel lalte lehkhabuah a chuang a ni. Juda-te erawh chu an bawhchhiatna avângin Babulon-ah sala hruaiin an awm a.
Tin, an chanpual khua luah ṭantute chu Israel-ho te, puithiamho te, Levi-ho te, Nethin-ho te an ni.
Tin, Jerusalem-ah chuan Juda thlahte, Benjamina thlahte, Ephraima leh Manasea thlahte an awm a:
Uthaia chu Amihuda fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Omria fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Imria fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Bania fapa a ni a, chûngte chu Juda fapa Pereza thlahte an ni.
Silon-ho thlahte chu: Asaia chu an zînga upa ber a ni a, a fate nên.
Zera thlahte chu: Jeuela, a unaute nên, zaruk leh sawmkua an ni.
Benjamina thlahte chu: Salua chu Mesulama fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Hodavia fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Hasenua fapa a ni a;
Ibneia chu Jerohama fapa a ni a; Ela chu Uzia fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Mikria fapa a ni a; Mesulama chu Sephatia fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Reuela fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Ibnija fapa a ni;
tin, anmahniho chhuanah chuan unau zakua leh sawmnga leh paruk an ni. Chûng zawng zawngte chu an hnam zînga an chhûngkaw puipate an ni.
Puithiamte chu: Jedaia te, Jehoiariba te, Jakina te,
Hilkia fapa Azaria te an ni a; chu mi chu Mesulama fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Zadoka fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Meraiotha fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Pathian ina hotu Ahituba fapa a ni a;

Jerohama fapa Adaia te nên, chu mi chu Pasura fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Malkija fapa a ni a, Adiela fapa Maasaia te nên, chu mi chu Jazera fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Mesulama fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Mesilemitha fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Imera fapa a ni a;
an unaute chu chhûngkaw puipa, sângkhat leh zasarih leh sawmruk an ni a. Pathian ina rawngbâwl hna thawk mi tak an ni.
Levi-hote chu: Hasuba fapa Semaia a ni a, chu mi chu Azrikama fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Hasabia fapa a ni a, chûngte chu Meraria fapate an ni;
Bakbakara te, Heresa te, Galala te, Matania te an ni a, chu mi chu Mika fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Zikria fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Asapha fapa a ni.
Semaia fapa Obadia, chu mi chu Galala fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Jeduthuna fapa a ni; tin, Asa fapa Berekia, chu mi chu Netophath-ho khuaa mi Elkana fapa a ni a.
Tin, kawngkhâr vêngtute chu Saluma te, Akuba te, Talmona te, Ahimana te, an unaute nên an ni. Saluma chu hotu ber a ni.
Ani chu tûn hmain lal kulh kawngka chhakta vêngtu a ni ṭhîn a; anni chu Levia thlahte riahhmun kawngkhâr vêngtu an ni.

Korea fapa chu Saluma a ni a, chu mi chu Ebiasapha fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Kora fapa a ni a, chûngte chu an unau an chhûngte Kora-hote nên rawngbâwltu, biak bûk kawngkhârte vêngtu an ni a. An pute chu Lalpa biak bûk rawngbâwltu, a luhnate vêngtu an ni ṭhîn.
Tûn hma chuan Eleazara fapa Phinehasa chu an hotu a ni a; Lalpa chu a hnênah a awm a.
Meselemia fapa Zekaria chu inbiakna puan in kawngkhâr vêngtu a ni a.
Chûng kawngkhâr vêngtu atâna thlan zawng zawngte chu zahnih leh sâwm leh pahnih an ni. Davida leh zâwlnei Samuelan an thawh tûr an lo ruatte chu mahni khua ṭheuhva thlahte chhiarnaa ziak an ni.
Chutichuan, anmahni leh an fate chuan Lalpa in kawngkhâr, biak bûk in kawngkhârte chu enkawlin, vêngtu chan an chang ṭhîn a ni.
A kil pali - chhak lampangah te, thlang lampangah te, hmâr lampangah te, chhim lampangah te chuan - kawngkhâr vêngtute an awm ṭhîn a.
Tin, khuaa mi an unaute chu, ni sarih apiangin hunbi nei têin an hnêna awm tûrin an kal ve ṭhîn tûr a ni.
Kawngkhâr vêngtu hotu palite chu Levi hnamte an ni a, Pathian ina sum dahna leh pindan enkawltu an ni si a.
Tichuan, enkawlna chu an hna a nih avâng leh, tûk tina kawng hawn chu an hna a nih avângin Pathian in vêlahte chuan an riak ṭhîn a ni.
Ṭhenkhat chuan rawngbâwlna bungbêl an enkawl a, an dah luh dâwn leh an lâk chhuah dâwnin an chhiar zêl ṭhîn a ni.
Ṭhenkhat chu bungrua te, hmun thianghlima bungbêl zawng zawng te, chhangphut dip tak te, uain te, hriak te, beraw leh rimtui te enkawl tûra ruat an ni a.
Tin, puithiam fapa ṭhenkhat chuan rimtui an siam ṭhîn a.
Kora hnam, Saluma fapa upa ber, Levi mi Matithia chu bêla thil kan lam ngaihtuahtu a ni.
Tin, Kohath-ho thlahte zînga mi an unau ṭhenkhat chu chhangdah, Chawlhni apianga buatsaiha chhang dahtute an ni.
Chûngte chu hla satuho, Levi-ho chhûngkaw puipa, biak in pindan nghâktu, rawngbâwlna danga âwlte an ni a; chhûn leh zâna thawk reng an ni.
Chûngte chu anmahni chhuan zawng zawnga hotu, Levi-ho chhûngkaw puipate an ni a, Jerusalem-a awm an ni.
Gibeon-ah chuan Gibeon-ho thlahtu Jeiela a awm a (a nupuia hming chu Maaki a ni),
a fa tîr chu Abdona a ni a, a dangte chu Zura te, Kisa te, Baala te, Nera te, Nadaba te,
Gedora te, Ahiova te, Zekaria te, Miklotha te an ni leh a.
Tin, Miklothan Simeama a hring a. Anniho pawh chu Jerusalem-ah an unau zain an unaute depah an awm a.
Neran Kisa a hring a, Kisan Saula a hring a, Saulan Jonathana te, Malkisua te, Abinadaba te, Esbaala te a hring a.
Jonathana fapa chu Merib-baala a ni a, Merib-baala chuan Mika a hring a.
Mika fapate chu Pithona te, Meleka te, Tahrea te, Ahaza te an ni.
Tin, Ahazan Jara a hring a; Jaran Alemetha te, Azmavetha te, Zimria te a hring a; tin, Zimrian Moza a hring a;
Mozan Binea a hring a, chu mi fapa chu Rephaia a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Eleasa a ni a, chu mi fapa chu Azela a ni.
Azela chuan fapa paruk a nei a, an hmingte chu Azrikama te, Bokerua te, Ismaela te, Searia te, Obadia te, Hanana te an ni; chûngte chu Azela fapate an ni.
Chutichuan, Philistia mite chuan Israel-hote chu an bei a; tin, Israel mite chu Philistia mite hmaah chuan an tlânchhia a, Gilboa tlângah chuan thahin an awm ta zul mai a.
Tin, Philistia mite chuan Saula leh a fapate chu an ûm ta ngat ngat a; tin, Philistia mite chuan Saula fapa Jonathana te, Abinadaba te, Malkisua te chu an that a.
Saula chu a chau ta êm êm mai a, thal kâp mite chuan an ûm pha a, an hliam ta a.

Chutichuan, Saula chuan a râlthuam kengtu hnênah chuan, “I khandaih kha phawi la, mi han chhun tlang rawh; hêng serh tan lohte hian mi uankhum dah ang e,” a ti a. Nimahsela, a râlthuam kengtu chuan a ti duh lo va; a hlau êm êm si a. Chutichuan, Saula chuan a khandaih chu a la a, a bawh ta a.
Tin, a râlthuam kengtu chuan Saula a thi tih a hriat chuan, ani pawh chuan a khandaih chu a bawh ve a, a thi ve ta a.
Chutichuan, Saula leh a fapate pathum chu an thi ta a, an pafa za chuan an thi ta a ni.

Tichuan, ruama awm Israel mi zawng zawngte chuan an tlânchhia tih leh, Saula leh a fapate chu an thi ta tih an hriat chuan, an khuate chu an chhuahsan a, an tlân bo ta a; tin, Philistia mite chuan an va luah ta a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, a tûkah chuan Philistia-hoten an râl thahte thuam hlihsak tûra an va kal chuan Gilboa tlânga Saula leh a fapate lo thi chu an va hmu a.
Tin, a thuam an hlîp a, a lû leh a râlthuam chu an la a, an pathian lemte leh mite hnêna chanchin puan tûrin Philistia ramah chuan an thawn vêl a.
Tin, a râlthuam chu an pathiante inah an dah a, a lû chu Dagona inah an târ a.
Tin, Jabes-gilead mi zawng zawngten Philistia mitena Saula an tih dân zawng zawng thu an lo hriat chuan,
mi huaisenho zawng zawngte chu an thawk chhuak a, Saula ruang leh a fapate ruang chu an la a, Jabes khuaah an kalpui a, a ruhte chu Jabes khuaa sasaw hnuaiah an phûm a, ni sarih chaw an nghei a.

Chutichuan, Saula chu Lalpa thu pawm duh lova, Lalpa chunga a bawhchhiat avâng leh, Lalpa chu râwn lova ramhuaizâwl aienthiam aientîra a râwn avângin a thi a ni. Chuvâng chuan a ni, a tihhluma, ram pawh chu Jesaia fapa Davida chu a pêk tâk ni.
Chutichuan, Israel-ho zawng zawng chu Hebron-a Davida hnênah an kal khâwm a, “Ngai teh, i thisen zawmpui kan ni a.

Tûn hmaa Saula a lal lai khân Israel-te hruai chhuak leh hruai lûttu i ni ṭhîn a; tin, Lalpa i Pathianin i hnênah, ‘Ka mi Israel-te chu i châwm ang a, ka mi Israel-te chungah hotuah i awm ang,’ a ti chia,” an ti a.

Chutichuan, Israel-ho upa zawng zawng chu Hebron-ah lal hnênah chuan an kal a; tin, Davidan Hebron-ah chuan Lalpa hmaah an hnênah thu a thlung a. Tin, Lalpan Samuela hmanga a sawi ang khân Davida chu Israel-te lal atân hriak an thih ta a.
Tin, Davida leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chu Jerusalem-ah an kal a (chu chu Jebus a ni); tin, chutah chuan chumi rama mi, Jebus-hote chu an awm a.
Tin, Jebus-a awmhote chuan Davida hnênah, “Hetah hian i lo lût tawp lo vang,” an ti a. Nimahsela, Davida chuan Zion kulh chu a la ta rêng rêng a; chu chu Davida khua tih a ni ta a.
Tin, Davidan, “Tu pawh Jebus-ho han bei hmasa apiang chu sipai hotu berah a awm ang,” a ti a. Tichuan, Zeruii fapa Joaba chu a han chho hmasa a, hotu berah an siam ta a.
Tin, Davida chu kulhah chuan a awm ta a; chuvângin, Davida khawpui an ti a ni.
Tin, Milo aṭangin khawpui vêl kulh chu a siam ṭha a; tin, Joaban khawpui chhûng a siam ṭha a.
Tichuan, Davida chu a lo ropui ta deuh deuh va; Sipaihote Lalpa chu a hnênah a awm avângin.
Hêngte hi Davida sipai hmingthang, Israel zawng zawngte nêna ṭanga, Israel-te chungchâng thûa Lalpan a sawi anga lala siam tûra a ram dinpuitu huaisen tak takte chu an ni.
Hêngte hi sipai huaisen, Davida hnêna awmte an ni: Hakmon mi fapa Jasobeama, sawmthum pâwl hotu, zathum chungah a fei leka ṭum khata thattu chu.
Tin, a dawttu chu Aho mi Dodova fapa Eleazara, sipai huaisen pathumte zinga pakhat kha.
Ani chu barli awm chûkna, Philistia mite indo tûra an infâwk khâwmna hmun Pas-dammim-ah khân Davida hnênah a awm a; tin, mipuite chu Philistia mite hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ta a.
Tin, anni chu chumi hmunah chuan an ding a, an lo ṭang tlat a, Philistia mite chu an that a; tichuan, Lalpan ropui taka ngamsakin a chhandam a.
Tin, sipai sawmthum zînga huaisen pathumte chu lungpuiah Adulam pûkah Davida hnênah an chhuk a; Philistia sipaiho chuan Rephaim ruamah ṭanhmun an khuar a.
Chutih lai chuan Davida chu kulhbîngah a awm a; tin, Philistia sipaiho chu Bethlehem-ah an awm a.
Tin, Davida chuan, “Bethlehem-a tuichhunchhuah tui, kulh kawngkhâr kianga mi kha in tûra mi pe han awm teh sela aw!” a ti a, a tui a hâl êm êm a.

Tin, pathumte chuan Philistia sipaiho chu an tâwn tlang a, kulh kawngkhâr kianga mi Bethlehem-a tuichhunchhuah tui chu an va chawi a, Davida hnênah an rawn la a; nimahsela, Davida chuan a lo in duh lo va, Lalpa tân a bun chhuak a.

“Hei hi ka in loh tûrzia mai chu! Hêng thih huama inpehote thisen chu ka in dâwn em ni? Thih huama inpein an rawn la a ni si a,” a ti a. Chutichuan, a in duh ta lo va. Mi huaisen pathumte chuan chutiang chuan an ti a.
Tin, Joaba unau Abisaia chu pathumte zînga hotu ber a ni a; mi zathumte chungah a fei a lek a, anmahni chu a thah avângin pathumte zîngah chuan hmingṭhat a hlawh a.
Pathumte zîngah chuan pahnihte ai chuan amah chu chawimawi tlâk a ni a, an hotuah an siam a, pathum hmasate zîngah erawh chuan a tel lo.
Tin, Kabzeel mi huai, thil nasa tak titu Jehoiada fapa Benaia chuan Moab mi Ariela fapate pahnih chu a that a; tin a zuk chhuk a, vûr tlâk hun laiin khuarkhurumah sakeibaknei a zuk that bawk a.

Tin, Aigupta mi, mi âwmkhauh pui, tawng ngaa sâng a that a; chu Aigupta mi chuan fei lian pui, puan tahtu themkawl ang hi a keng a. Tin, ani chuan tiang nên chuan a zuk pan a, Aigupta mi fei chu a pawh thlâksak a, ama feiin a chhun hlum ta a.
Jehoiada fapa Benaia chuan chutiang chuan a ti a, sipai huaisen pathumte zînga hmingṭhat a hlawh a.
Ngai teh u, mi sawmthumte ai chuan chawimawi tlâk a ni a, pathum hmasate zîngah erawh chuan a tel lo; tin, Davida chuan a vêngtu pâwl hotuah a dah a.
Sipaite zînga mi huaisen dangte chu hêngte hi an ni: Joaba unau Asahela te, Bethlehem khuaa mi Dodova fapa Elhanana te,
Haror mi Samotha te, Pelon mi Heleza te,
Teko mi Ikesa fapa Ira te, Anathoth mi Abiezera te,
Husath mi Sibekaia te, Aho mi Ilaia te,
Netophath mi Maharaia te, Netophath mi Baana fapa Heleda te,
Benjamina thlah Gibea khuaa mi Ribaia fapa Ithaia te, Pirathon mi Benaia te,
Gaas luitêa mi Huraia te, Arbath mi Abiela te,
Baharum mi Azmavetha te, Saalbon mi Eliaba te,
Gizon mi Hasema fapate, Harar mi Sagea fapa Jonathana te,
Harar mi Sakara fapa Ahiama te, Ura fapa Eliphala te,
Mekerath mi Hephera te, Pelon mi Ahija te,
Karmel mi Hezroa te, Ezbaia fapa Naaraia te,
Nathana unaupa Joela te, Hagria fapa Mibhara te,
Amon mi Zeleka te, Zeruii fapa Joaba râlthuam kengtu Beeroth mi Naharaia te,
Ithra mi Ira te, Ithra mi Gareba te,
Hit mi Uria te, Ahlaia fapa Zabada te,
Reuben mi Siza fapa Adina, Reuben mite zînga hotu, a hnêna mi sawmthumte nên,
Maaka fapa Hanana te, Mithna mi Josaphata te,
Asterath mi Uzia te, Aroer mi Hothama fapa Sama leh Jeiela te,
Simria fapa Jediaela te, a unaupa Tiz mi Joha te,
Mahav mi Eliela te, Elnaama fapate Jeribaia leh Josavia te, Moab mi Ithma te,
Mezoba mi Eliela te, Obeda te, Jaasiela te pawh.
Tichuan, Kisa fapa Saula avânga Davida chu Ziglag-a a inkhung tlat laia a hnêna lo kalte chu hêngte hi an ni; anni chu indonaa amah puitu mi huaisente zînga mi an ni.
Thal ngul keng mi, ding lam leh vei lama virvawma lung vawm leh thal ngula thal kah thiam an ni a; Benjamin mi Saula chite an ni.
A puipa ber chu Ahiezera a ni a; tin, Gibeath mi Semaa fapa Joasa; tin, Azmavetha fapa Jeziela leh Peletha te; Beraka te, Anathoth mi Jehua te;
sawmthum zînga mi huaisen, sawmthum hotu Gibeon mi Ismaia te; Jeremia te, Jahaziela te, Johanana te, Gederat mi Jozabada te;
Eluzaia te, Jerimotha te, Bealia te, Semaria te, Harup mi Sephatia te;
Kora mi Elkana te, Isia te, Azarela te, Joezera te, Jasobeama te;
Gedor mi Jerohama fapa Joela leh Zebadia te an ni.

Tin, Gad mite zînga mi, mi chak huaisen, indo thiam, phaw leh fei hman thiam ṭhenkhat chu thlalêra kulhah Davida hnênah khân an pakai a; an hmêlte chu sakeibaknei hmêl ang a ni a, tlânga sakhilâ anga zuanzâng an ni:
a pakhatna chu Ezera a ni a, a dawttu chu Obadia, a dawt lehtu chu Eliaba,
a dawt lehtu chu Mismana, a dawt lehtu chu Jeremia,
a dawt lehtu chu Ataia, a dawt lehtu chu Eliela,
a dawt lehtu chu Johanana, a dawt lehtu chu Elzabada,
a dawt lehtu chu Jeremia, a dawt lehtu chu Makbanaia.
Chûng Gad mite chu sipai hotute an ni; an zînga chak lo ber pawh chu za hen a ni a, a chak ber chu sângkhat hen a ni.
Chûngho chu an ni, thla khatnaa Jordan lui a kuang zawng zawng a liam laia va kal kaia, ruama chêngho zawng zawng chhak lam leh thlang lama tlânchhiattîrtute kha.
Tin, Benjamin-ho leh Juda-ho zînga mi ṭhenkhat chu kulhah Davida hnênah an kal a.

Tichuan, Davida chu anmahni hmuak tûrin a kal a, “Ṭha lam thûa mi pui tûra ka hnêna lo kal in nih chuan, ka thinlungin a zawm tlat ang che u a; amaherawhchu, ka kutin pawi a khawih lo tih hre reng chung sia ka hmêlmate mi mantîr tuma lo kal in nih chuan, kan pi leh pute Pathian chuan chhinchhiahin, zilhhau che u rawh se,” a va ti a.

Chutichuan, sawmthum chunga hotu Amasaia chungah chuan thlarau a lo thleng a, “David, i mite kan ni e; Jesaia fapa, i lama ṭang kan ni e! I chungah thlamuanna awm rawh se, nangmah puitute chungah pawh thlamuanna awm rawh se! I Pathian chuan a ṭanpui ṭhîn si chia,” a ti a. Tichuan, Davida chuan anmahni chu a la a, sipai pâwl hotuahte a siam ta a.

Tin, Philistia-hoten Saula do tûra an thawh lai khân Davida pawh a tel ve a, Manase-ho zînga ṭhenkhat pawh Davida lamah an pakai a; amaherawhchu, Philistia hotute a pui ta chuang lo; “A pu Saula lamah a pakai ang a, kan lû kan hloh dah ang e,” tiin an inrâwn a, an hnar kîr leh ta a ni.
Tin, Ziglag khua a thlen chuan Manase-ho zînga sipai sâng hotu - Adna te, Jozabada te, Jediaela te, Mikaela te, Jozabada te, Elihua te, Zilethaia te chu a lamah an pakai a.
Davidan rawlrâl pâwlho a bei chu an beihpui ve a; an vai chuan mi chak huaisen, sipai hotu an ni a.
Ni tin Davida lama ṭang tûrin an kal an kal a, Pathian sipaiho ang maia sipai pâwl ropui tak an lo ni ta a.
Lalpa thu anga Saula ram Davida luahtîr tûra Hebron khuaa Davida hnêna indona râlthuama inthuam kal zât chu hetiang a ni:
Juda thlah, indona râlthuama inthuam, phaw leh fei keng mi chu sângruk leh zariat an ni a;
Simeona thlah, indonaa mi chak huaisen chu sângsarih leh za;
Levia thlah sângli leh zaruk;
Jehoiada chu Arona thlah hruaitu a ni a, a hnênah sângthum leh zasarih an tel ve a;
Zadoka, tlangvâl chak huaisen, a chhûngkaw zînga mi, sipai hotu sawmhnih leh pahnih nên;
Benjamina thlahte zinga mi, Saula chite sângthum, tûn hma chuan a tam zâwkte chu Saula ho lama ṭang an ni ṭhîn a;
Ephraima thlahte zînga mi, mi chak huaisen, an chhûngkaw zînga mi hmingthang sînghnih leh zariat;
Manase hnam zâtvete zînga mi, Davida lala siam tûra thlan chhuah lo kalte sîngkhat leh sângriat;
Isakara thlahte zînga mi, chûng lai hun thil chinchâng hre mi, Israel-tena an thiltih tûr ṭûl hre mi, hotu deuh deuh zahnih, an unaute zawng zawng chu an thu hnuaia awm an ni a;
Zebulun-ho zînga mi, râl bei tlâk ṭhiau, indona hmanraw tinrêng nêna ṭan khawh thiam, Davida tân rilru nghet tak pu mi sîngnga an ni a;
Naphtali-ho zînga mi, sipai hotu sangkhat leh fei keng mi sîngthum leh sângsarih nên;
Dan-ho zinga mi, râlthuama inthuam sa sînghnih leh sângriat leh zaruk;
Aser-ho zînga mi, râl bei tlâk ṭhiau ṭan khawh thiam sîngli;
Jordan râla Reuben-ho zînga mi te, Gad-ho zînga mi te, Manase hnam zâtve zînga mite, indona hmanrua tinrêngte nêna thawk nuai khat leh sînghnih.

Chûng zawng zawng chu indo mi, ṭan khawh thiam mi an ni a, Davida chu Israel-ho zawng zawng chunga lala siam tûrin rilru hmun khat puin Hebron-ah an kal a; tin, Israel dang zawng zawngte pawhin Davida chu lala siam tûrin rilru hmun khat an pu ṭheuh va.
Tin, Davida hnênah chuan ni thum ei leh bârin an awm a; an unauten an buatsaihsak vek a ni.

Chu chang pawh ni lovin, an laichîn unau, Isakar ram aṭang te, Zebulun ram aṭang te, Naphtali ram aṭang te lamin sabengtung te, sanghâwngsei te, sakawr te, sebâwngpatein ei tûr lam - chhang te, theipui hlâwm te, grêp rah pho ro bâwr te, uain te, hriak te an phurhtîr a, bâwngpa te, berâm te tam tak an rawn keng bawk a; Israel ram chu lâwmnain a khat a.
Tin, Davida chuan hotu zawng zawng, sâng hotute leh za hotute chu a râwn hlawm a.

Tin, Davidan Israel pung khâwmho zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Ṭha in tih zâwng a niha, Lalpa kan Pathian remtih zâwng a nih bawk chuan, Israel ram zawng zawnga kan unau la awmte chu, dai vêl nei khuaa awm puithiamte leh Levi-hote nên kan hnêna rawn inkhâwm ve tûr hian i sâwm vêl ang u hmiang;
tin, kan Pathian bâwm hi i la leh teh ang u, Saula lal lai khân kan ngaihven hauh lo mai a,” a ti a.
Tichuan, pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan chutianga tih chu an duh a, mi zawng zawng ngaiha thil dik a ni rêng a.
Chutichuan, Davidan Aigupta lui Sihor aṭanga Hamath khaw luhna thlenga Israel mi zawng zawngte chu Kiriath-jearim khuaa Pathian bâwm chu la tûrin a khâwm vek a.
Chutichuan, Davida leh Israel mi zawng zawng chu Judai rama Baalakhua, Kiriath-jearim an tihah chuan, cherub-ho chunga ṭhu Lalpa hming chuanna thuthlung bâwm chu la tûrin an han chho va.
Tin, Pathian bâwm chu Abinadaba in ata tawlailîr tharin an kalpui a, Uza leh Ahiovan tawlailîr chu an khalh a.
Tin, Davida leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chuan hla sain, ṭingṭang te, perhkhuang te, khuangtê te, dârbenthek te, tawtawrâwt te nên, Pathian hmaah an lâm bûng bûng a.
Tin, Kidona hruih an han thlen chuan, Uza chuan bâwm chu chelh tumin a han ban a, bâwngte chu an pai an pai avângin.
Tin, Lalpa thin chu Uza chungah a thawk ta thut mai a, bâwm a chelh avâng chuan a tihlum ta a; chutah chuan Pathian hmaah a thi ta a.
Tin, Lalpan Uza chunga kut a thlâk avângin Davida chu a thinur a; chumi hmun chu Perez-uza a vuah a; tûn thleng hian a la ni ta reng a.
Tin, Davida chuan chumi ni chuan Pathian chu a hlau va, “Engtin nge Pathian bâwm chu ka hawn theih tâk ang?” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Davida chuan bâwm chu Davida khuaah ama hnênah chuan a suan ta lo va, Git mi Obed-edoma inah a dah ta zâwk a.
Tin, Pathian bâwm chu Git mi Obed-edoma inah, a chhûngte hnênah chuan thla thum a awm a; tichuan, Obed-edoma chhûngte leh a neih zawng zawng chu Lalpan mal a sâwm a.
Tin, Tura lal Hiraman Davida hnênah mi a tîr a, sidar thingte a thawn a, lung chhertute, themthiamte a in sa tûrin a tîr bawk a.
Tin, Davida chuan Lalpan Israel mite chunga lalah amah chu a tinghetin, a mi Israel-te avângin a ram chu a chawimawi a ni tih a hre ta a.
Tin, Davida chuan Jerusalem-ah nupuite a neih belhchhah leh a, fanu leh fapate a nei leh a.
Jerusalem-a a fa neihte chu hêngte hi an ni: Samua te, Sobaba te, Nathana te, Solomona te,
Ibhara te, Elisua te, Elpeleta te,
Noga te, Nephega te, Japhia te,
Elisama te, Beeliada te, Elipheleta te.

Tin, Philistia miten Davida chu Israel mi zawng zawngte lal atân hriak an thih tih an hriatin, Philistia mi zawng zawng chu Davida zawng tûrin an chho ta a; tin, Davida chuan a lo hria a, anmahni bei tûrin a kal ta a.
Tin, Philistia mite chu Rephaim ruamah an inzâr a.

Tin, Davida chuan, “Philistia mite bei tûrin ka han chho dâwn em? Ka kutah hian anniho chu i pe dâwn em?” tiin Lalpa a râwn a. Tin, Lalpa chuan Davida hnênah, “Han chho rawh; anniho chu i kutah ka pe dâwn a ni,” a ti a.

Tichuan, Baal-perazim-ah an chho va, chutah chuan Davidan anniho chu a hneh a, “ Lalpan ka hmêlmate chu ka kut hmangin tuikhuah sah ang maiin min tihdarhsak ta,” a ti a. Chutichuan, chumi hmun hmingah chuan Baal-perazim an vuah a.
Tin, chutah chuan an milemte an kalsan a, Davidan thu a pe a, an hâl ta a.
Tin, Philistia-hote chu ruamah an inzâr leh a.
Tin, Davidan Pathian a râwn leh a; tin, Pathianin a hnênah, “Um lovin kiansan la, thingtheihmu kûng zâwn lamah han bei zâwk rawh.
Tin, heti hi a ni ang a, thingtheihmu lêra kal thâwm ang ri ṭhup ṭhup i hriat chuan che rawh, Philistia sipaite bei tûrin i hmaah Pathian a chhuak ta tihna a ni ang,” a ti a.
Tin, Pathianin thu a pêk angin Davida chuan a ti a; Philistia sipaite chu Gibeon aṭanga Gezer thlengin an bei a.
Tichuan, ram tinah Davida hming chu a lo thang ta a; Lalpan hnam tin amah a ṭihtîr ta a ni.
Tin, Davida chuan Davida khawpuiah chuan inte a sa a; tin, Pathian bâwm awmna hmun a buatsaih a, puan in a zârsak a.
Tichuan, Davidan, “Pathian bâwm hi Levi-hote chauh lo chuan tu mân an zâwn tûr a ni lo ve; Pathian bâwm hi kumkhuaa zâwntu leh a rawngbâwltu atâna Lalpa thlan an ni e,” a ti a.
Tin, Davidan Lalpa bâwm a dahna tûr hmun a buatsaihnaa zâwn chho tûrin Jerusalem-ah Israel-ho zawng zawng chu a khâwm a.
Tin, Davidan Arona fate leh Levi-ho a khâwm a:
Kohatha thlahte zînga mi, puipa ber Uriela, a unaute nên za leh sawmhnih;
Meraria thlahte zînga mi, puipa ber Asaia, a unaute nên zahnih leh sawmhnih;
Gersoma thlahte zînga mi, puipa ber Joela, a unaute nên za leh sawmthum;
Elizaphana thlahte zînga mi, puipa ber Semaia, a unaute nên zahnih;
Hebrona thlahte zînga mi, puipa ber Eliela, a unaute nên sawmriat;
Uziela thlahte zînga mi, puipa ber Aminadaba, a unaute nên za leh sâwm leh pahnih.
Tin, Davidan puithiam Zadoka leh Abiathara leh Levi-ho Uriela te, Asaia te, Joela te, Semaia te, Eliela te, Aminadaba te a ko va,
an hnênah, “Nangni hi Levi-ho puipa berte in ni a; Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa bâwm chu a hmun ka buatsaiha in zâwn chhoh theih nân nangni hi in unaute nên intithianghlim rawh u.
A tîrah pawh khân nangnin in zâwn loh avângin Lalpa kan Pathian chu kan chungah a ṭuan a nih kha, thupêk angin kan lo ti si lo va,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa bâwm chu zâwn chho tûr chuan puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu an intithianghlim a.
Tin, Lalpa thupêk Mosian a sawi ang khân, Levia thlahte chuan bâwm chu a zâwnfung chuan an zâwn ta a.
Tin, Davidan Levi-ho puipate chu an unaute zînga mi hla sa mite, thil tum rîk mi perhkhuang te, ṭingṭang te, dârbenthekte nêna ring tak leh hlim taka hla sa tûrin a ruattîr a.
Chutichuan, Levi-ho chuan Joela fapa Hemana te, a unaute zînga mi Berekia fapa Asapha te, an unau Meraria fapate zînga mi Kusaia fapa Ethana te an ruat a.

Tin, an unaute zînga mi Zekaria te, Bena te, Jaaziela te, Semiramotha te, Jehiela te, Unia te, Eliaba te, Benaia te, Maaseia te, Matithia te, Eliphelehua te, Mikneia te, kawngkhâr vêngtu Obed-edoma leh Jeiela te nên an ruat bawk a.
Chutichuan, hla satuho Hemana te, Asapha te, Ethana te chu dârbenthek ring taka bêng tûra ruat an ni a;
tin, Zekaria te, Aziela te, Semiramotha te, Jehiela te, Unia te, Eliaba te, Maaseia te, Benaia te chu perhkhuangte nêna Alamoth sa tûra ruat an ni a;
tin, Matithia te, Eliphelehua te, Mikneia te, Obed-edoma te, Jeiela te, Azazia te chu ṭingṭangte nêna Sheminith saa hmahruai tûra ruat an ni.
Tin, Levi-ho puipa Kenania chu hla sa hotu a ni a, a thiam avângin hla hruaitu ber a ni.
Tin, Berekia leh Elkana chu bâwm vêng vêltu an ni.

Tin, puithiamho Sebania te, Josaphata te, Nethanela te, Amasaia te, Zekaria te, Benaia te, Eliezera ten Pathian bâwm hmaah chuan tawtawrâwt an tum a; tin, Obed-edoma leh Jehia chu bâwm vêng vêltu an ni bawk a.
Chutichuan, Davida leh Israel upaho leh sipai sâng hotute chu, Obed-edoma ina mi Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm chu zuk la chho tûrin hlim takin an kal ta a;
tin, heti hi a ni a, Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm zâwntu Levi-hote chu Pathianin a ṭanpui a, sebâwngpa pasarih leh berâmpa pasarihin an inthawi a.
Tin, Davida leh bâwm zâwntu Levi-ho zawng zawng leh, hla satute leh hla sa hotu Kenania te chu puan zai sînin an inthuam a, Davida chuan puan zai sîn, puithiam kawr a ha bawk a.

Chutichuan, Israel mi zawng zawng chuan au dur dur chung leh, tawtawrâwt bi nei leh tawtawrâwt hâm ruai ruai leh, dârbenthek te, perhkhuang te, ṭingṭangte nêna ri bûng bûngin Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm chu an la chho ta a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm Davida khuaa a luh lai chuan, Saula fanu Mikali chuan tukverh aṭangin a lo thlîr a, Lal Davida lâma zuang chu a hmu a, a hmusit rilru ta a.
Tin, Pathian bâwm chu an la lût a, a dahna tûra Davidan a zâr, puan in chhûngah chuan an dah ta a; tin, Pathian hmaah chuan hâlral thilhlante leh remna thilhlante an hlân a.
Tin, Davidan hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlante a hlan zawh chuan, Lalpa hmingin mipuite chu mal a sâwm a.
Tin, Israel mi zawng zawngte chu a hmei a pain chhang hlâwm khat leh sa hrang khat leh grêp rah pho ro bâwr khat a pe ṭheuh va.
Tin, Lalpa bâwm hmaa rawngbâwl tûr leh Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chu hre renga amah fak tûr leh a hnêna lâwmthu sawi tûr Levi-ho ṭhenkhat a ruat a:

a hotu berah chuan Asapha, a dawtah perhkhuang leh ṭingṭang tum mi Zekaria te, Jeiela te, Semiramotha te, Jehiela te, Matithia te, Eliaba te, Benaia te, Obed-edoma te: Jeielan ṭingṭang a tum a, Asapha chuan dârbenthek a bêng a;
tin, puithiam Benaia leh Jahaziela chuan Pathian thuthlunna bâwm hmaah tawtawrâwt an hâm reng a.
Tichuan, chumi ni chuan Davidan Lalpa hnêna lâwmthu hril tûrin Asapha leh a unaute chu a hmang ṭan ta a.
Aw, Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu hril ula, Hnamte zîngah chuan a thiltihte chu hriattîr rawh u.
Amah chawimawiin hla sa ula, amah fakin zai rawh u; A thilmak tih zawng zawng thu chu hril rawh u.
A hming thianghlim chu chhuang rawh u; Lalpa zawngtute thinlung chu hlim rawh se.
Lalpa leh a chakna chu zawng ula; A hmêl chu zawng fo rawh u.
A thil ropui tak tihte hre reng ula, A thiltihte leh a kâa a rorêlte chu,
Aw, a chhiahhlawh Israela thlahho, Jakoba thlah, a thlante u!
Ani chu Lalpa kan Pathian chu a ni a; A thupêkte chu khawvêl pum huap a ni.
A thuthlun chu kumkhuain hre reng ula, Chhuan sâng thlenga a thu lo pêk,
Abrahama hnêna a thuthlun leh, Isaaka hnêna a chhechham chu;
Chu vêk chu Jakoba hnêna thuruatah, Israela hnêna kumkhaw thuthlung atân a tinghet a,
“Kanaan ram hi ka pe ang che, I ro chanpual tûr ram chu,” tiin.
Mi tlêm tê chauh in niha, A ni, tlêm tê, khualzin ang mai in nih lai khân;
Hnam hrang hrang hnênah an kal lâwr a, Ram hrang hrang aṭangin mi hrang hrang hnênah.
Tu ma hnehchhiah a phal lo va; A ni, anmahni avângin lalte pawh a zilhhau va,
“Ka hriak thihate chu tawk suh ula, Ka zâwlneite pawi rêng rêng khawih suh u,” tiin.
Leilung luah zawng zawngte u, Lalpa chawimawiin hla sa ula; Ni tin a chhandamna thu chu hriattîr rawh u.
Hnam tin zîngah a ropuizia hril ula, Mi tinrêngte zîngah a thilmak tihte chu hril rawh u.
Lalpa chu a ropui a, nasa taka fak tûr a ni si a; Pathian zawng zawng aia ṭih tûr a ni.
Hnamte pathian chu milem an ni si a; Lalpa erawh chuan vânte khi a siam a ni.
Chawimawina leh ropuina a hmaah a awm a; Chakna leh hlimna a hmun thianghlimah a awm.
Mi tina chi tinrêngte u, Lalpa chu bel ula, Lalpa chu ropuina leh chakna bel rawh u.
Lalpa chu a hming ropuina bel ula; Thilhlan tûr keng ula, a hmaah lo kal rawh u; Thianghlim mawina inbelin Lalpa chu chibai bûk rawh u.
Leilung zawng zawngte u, a hmaah khûr rawh u! Khawvêl hi a nghîn theih lohna tûrin tihnghehin a awm.
Vânte khi lâwm takin awm sela, Lei pawh hi hlim takin awm rawh se; Hnam tin zîngah chuan, “ Lalpa chuan ro a rêl,” ti rawh se.
Tuifinriat leh a chhûnga thil awm zawng zawng hi ri hum hum sela; Lo leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawng hi lâwm takin awm rawh se!
Chutih hunah chuan ramhnuaia thing zawng zawng hi, Lalpa hmaah chuan hlimin an zai ang, Lei ro rêl tûrin a lo kal dâwn si a.
Aw, Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu hril rawh u, ani chu a ṭha si a; A ngilneihna pawh kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a.
“Aw, kan chhandamna Pathian, min chhandam la, I hming thianghlim fak tûr leh, I fakawmna chhuang tûrin, Hnam tin zîng ata min hruai khâwm la, min chhan him ang che,” ti rawh u.
Israel-te Pathian Lalpa chu fakin awm rawh se, Chatuan ata chatuan thleng pawhin. Tin, mipui zawng zawng chuan, “Amen,” an ti a, Lalpa chu an fak a.
Chutichuan, chuta Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm hmaa ni tin a ṭûl dân ang anga rawngbâwl tûrin, Davida chuan Asapha leh a unaute a dah ta a;
Obed-edoma leh Hosa, an unau sawmruk leh pariatten an pui tûr a ni a, Jeduthuna fapa Obed-edoma leh Hosa-te chu kawngkhâr vêngtu tûr an ni;

Lalpan Israel-hote thu a pêk, Lalpa dâna ziak zawng zawng anga hâlral thilhlan maichâm chunga tûk leh zâna, Gibeon hmun sânga Lalpa biak bûk hmaa hâlral thilhlante hlân reng tûr atân erawh chuan, puithiam Zadoka leh, a unau puithiamhote ruat an ni a;
an zînga tela, a khawngaihna chu kumkhua atân a nih avânga Lalpa hnêna lâwmthu sawi tûrin Hemana leh Jeduthuna leh mi dang, an hming lama thlan chhuahte chu ruat an ni a.
Hemana leh Jeduthuna-te chu tawtawrâwt te, dârbenthek te leh thil tum chi dangte ruala tum tûr kawltu an ni a. Jeduthuna leh a fate chu kawngkhâr vêngtu tûr an ni.
Tichuan, mipui zawng zawng chu mahni in lam ṭheuhvah an haw ta a; tin, Davida pawh chu a chhûngte malsâwm tûrin a haw ve ta a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, Davida chu a ina a awm laiin zâwlnei Nathana hnênah Davida chuan, “Hei, kei chu sidar thing inah ka awm a; nimahsela, Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm chu puan zâr hnuai maiah a awm a,” a ti a.
Tin, Nathana chuan Davida hnênah, “I rilrua i vei ang tak chuan ti ta che; Pathian i hnênah a awm si a,” a ti a.
Tin, chumi zân vêk chuan heti hi a ni a, Nathana hnênah Pathian thu a lo thleng a,
“Ka chhiahhlawh Davida chu va hrilh rawh, ‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Ka awmna tûrin nangin in mi saksak tûr a ni lo.
Israela thlahte Aigupta ram ata ka hruai chhuah aṭangin tûn thlengin inah ka awm lo va; puan in leh biak bûkah ka awm zêl zâwk ṭhîn a.
Israel-ho zawng zawngte nêna kan kalna rêng rêngah pawh, ka mite châwm tûra thu ka pêk Israel-ho rorêltute hnênah, “Engati nge sidar thingin in mi sak loh?” ka ti ngai em ni?
“Chuvângin, ka chhiahhlawh Davida hnênah heti hian sawi rawh, ‘Sipaihote Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti a ni, Berâm tlatna hmun ata i berâm vêng lai chu ka mi Israel-te chunga lal tûrin ka la chia;
i kalna apiangah i hnênah ka awm zêl a, i hmêlmate ka tihbosak zêl chia, leia mi ropui takte angin hming ropui tak ka siamsak dâwn che a ni.

Tin, ka mi Israel-te tân hmun ka ruat ang a, insuan tawh lova anmahni pual hmuna an awm reng theih nân anni chu ka phun ang a; tûn hmaa ka mi Israel-te chunga rorêltute ka ruat laia suahsualna faten an ti ṭhîn ang khân, an tirethei tawh hek lo vang a; i hmêlma zawng zawngte pawh ka titlâwm bawk ang. Tin, chu lo pawh chu Lalpa chuan chhûngkua a dinsak ang che tih ka hrilh che a ni.
Tin, i ni a kina, i pi leh pute hnêna i kal hunah chuan, heti hi a ni ang a, i hnua i thlah, i fate zînga mi chu ka tungding ang a; tin, a ram chu ka tinghet ang.
Ani chuan in mi saksak ang a; tin, a lalṭhutthlêng chu kumkhuain ka tinghet ang.
Tichuan, a pa ka ni ang a, ani chu ka fapa a ni ang a; ka zahngaihna i hmaa mi ka lâk bosak ang khân, ani zawng ka lâk bosak lo vang;
ka inah leh ka ramah ani chu kumkhuain ka din nghet ang a; tin, a lalṭhutthlêng chu kumkhuaa tihngheh a ni ang, tiin.
Chûng thu zawng zawng leh chu inlârna ang chiah chuan Nathana chuan Davida hnênah a sawi a.
Chutichuan, Lal Davida chu a lût a, Lalpa hmaah chuan a ṭhu a, “Aw, Lalpa Pathian, tu nge maw ka niha, ka chhûngte pawh tu nge maw an niha, heti chen chen mi hruai?

Aw Pathian, chûng pawh chu nanga mit hmuhah chuan thil tê tham zawng a ni a; nimahsela, aw Lalpa Pathian, i chhiahhlawh chhûngkaw lo awm dân tûr thu chu kum tam tak chhûng atân i lo sawi tawh a, mi lian angah mi ngai bawk a, aw Lalpa Pathian.
I chhiahhlawh chawimawia a awm chungchâng thûah hian Davidan i hnênah eng nge a sawi leh cheu vang? I chhiahhlawh hi i hre chiang hle si a.
Aw Lalpa, i chhiahhlawh avângin nangma rilrua chhuak ang zêlin hêng thil ropui tak hi hriattîr tûrin thil ropui tak takte i ti ta a.
Aw Lalpa, kan hriatah chuan nangmah ang rêng rêng an awm lo va, nangmah lo chu Pathian rêng rêng an awm hek lo.

Aigupta ram ata i tlan chhuah i mite hmaa hnam dangte titlâwma, thil ropui tak leh hlauhawm takte tia hming ropui tak siamsak tûr chea Pathianin ama mite atâna a tlan chhuah, i mi Israel-te ang rêng rêng hi khawvêlah hnam dang tu nge awm?
I mi Israel-te chu kumkhuaa i mite atân i lo siam ta si a; nang Lalpa chu an Pathian i lo ni ta a.
Tichuan, aw Lalpa, i chhiahhlawh chungchâng thu leh a chhûngte chungchâng thu i sawi chu kumkhua atân tinghet la, i sawi tawh ang khân ti ang che.

Tin, ‘Sipaihote Pathian chu Israel-te Pathian, Israel-te tan ngeia Pathian a ni,’ tiin i hming chu kumkhuaa tihngheha chawimawiin awm sela; i chhiahhlawh Davida chhûngte chu i hmaa tihnghehin awm rawh se.
Aw nang ka Pathian, i chhiahhlawh hnênah chhûngkua i dinsak ang tih i lo puang tawh si a; chuvângin, i chhiahhlawh hi i hnênah ka la ṭawngṭai ngam ta a ni.
Aw Lalpa, nang chu Pathian i ni a, he thil ṭha hi i chhiahhlawh chu i lo tiam tawh a,
i chhiahhlawh chhûngte chu i hmaa kumkhuaa an awm reng theih nân mal i lo sâwm ta a; aw Lalpa, nangin mal i sâwm chu kumkhaw malsâwmna a ni,” a ti a.
Tin, chumi hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Davidan Philistia mite chu a bei a, a hneh a, Gath khua leh a khawperte chu Philistia mite a chhuhsak a.
Tin, Moab-ho a bei leh a, Moab mite chu Davida chhiah khua an lo ni ta a, chhiahte an pe ṭhîn a.
Tin, Davida chuan Euphrates luia a ram din nghet tûra a kal pahin, Zoba lal Hadadezera pawh Hamath bulah a bei leh a.

Tichuan, Davida chuan tawlailîr sângkhat leh sakawr chung chuang mi sângsarih leh sipai sînghnih a mansak a; tin, Davida chuan tawlailîr hnûk mi sakawr zawng zawng chu an tha a chhahsak a, tawlailîr za hnûk tûr erawh chu a zuah a.
Tin, Damaska-a Suria mite chu Zoba lal Hadadezera chhan tûrin an lo kal a; tin, Davidan Suria mi sînghnih leh sânghnih a that a.

Chutichuan, Davida chuan Damaska-a Suria mite zîngah chuan sipai a dah a; tichuan, Suria mite chu Davida chhiah khua an lo ni a, chhiahte an pe ṭhîn a. Tin, Lalpa chuan Davida chu a kalna apiangah a hnehtîr zêl a.
Tin, Davida chuan Hadadezera ho rangkachak phawte a lâksak a, Jerusalem-ah a hâwn a.
Tin, Hadadezera khua Tibhath leh Kun-a mi Davida chuan dâr tam tak a hâwn a, chûng chuan Solomonan dâr tuizêm, a hûnna leh a suahna dâr note a siam a.
Tin, Hamath lal Toua chuan Zoba lal Hadadezera sipai zawng zawng Davidan a hneh tih a lo hria a,

Hadadezera a rûna, a thah avânga chibai bûk tûr leh lawmpui tûrin a fapa Hadorama chu Davida hnênah a tîr a, Hadadezera leh Toua chu indo ṭhîn an ni si a; rangkachak leh tangkarua leh dâr bungbêl tinrêng a kensak a.

Chûngte pawh chu ram dang a ngam zawng zawnga mi tangkarua leh rangkachak a lâkte nên chuan Davidan Lalpa hnênah a hlân a: Edom-ho laka mi te, Moab-ho laka mi te, Amona thlahte laka mi te, Philistia-ho laka mi te, Amelek-ho laka mi te.
Chu lo pawh, Zeruii fapa Abisaian Edom-ho sîngkhat leh sângriat Chi Ruamah a that a.
Tin, Edom ramah chuan sipaite a dah a; tichuan, Edom mi zawng zawng chu Davida chhiah khua an lo ni ta a. Tin, Lalpan Davida chu a kalna apiangah a hnehtîr zêl a.
Chutichuan, Davida chuan Israel mi zawng zawng chungah ro a rêl a; a mi zawng zawng chungah chuan fel takin ro a rêl a.
Zeruii fapa Joaba chu sipai hotu ber a ni a; Ahiluda fapa Jehosaphata chu chanchin ziaktu a ni.
Ahituba fapa Zadoka leh Abiathara fapa Abimeleka chu puithiam an ni a, Savsa chu ziaktu a ni;
Jehoiada fapa Benaia chu Kereth mi leh Peleth mite hotu a ni a; Davida fapate chu lal thu zai satu ber an ni.
Tin, chûng hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Amona thlahte lal Nahasa chu a thi a, a fapa chu a aiawhin a lal a.

Tin, Davida chuan, “A pa chuan mi lo khawngaih ṭhin avângin kei pawhin Nahasa fapa Hanuna chu ka khawngaih ve ang,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Davida chuan a pa chungchâng thûa thlamuan tûrin mite a tîr a. Tin, Davida mite chuan Amona thlahte ramah Hanuna hnên chu amah thlamuan tûrin an va thleng a.

Nimahsela, Amona thlah puipahote chuan Hanuna hnênah, “Davida hian i pa a zah avângin thlamuantu tûr i hnênah a rawn tîr niin i ring em ni? A mite hi ram tichhe tûra thlîthlai leh enthla tûra i hnêna lo kal an ni lâwng maw?” an ti a.
Chutichuan, Hanuna chuan Davida mite chu a man a, an khabe hmul a meh kâwnsak a; tin, an silhfênte chu a lai takah an mawngtam khuh pha chauhvin a tansak a, a hawtîr ta a.

Tichuan, tuten emaw a mite a lo tih dân chu Davida an va hrilh a; tin, a hmuak tûrin mi a tîr a, anni lah chu an zak hle mai si a. Tin, lal chuan, “In khabe hmul a chawr sei hma chu Jeriko-ah awm rih ula, chumi hnuah chuan in lo haw a ni ang chu,” a ti a.

Tin, Amona thlahten Davida huat zâwng an ni ta tih an lo inhriat chuan, Hanuna leh Amona thlahte chuan Mesopotamia rama mite, Aram-maaka-a mite, Zoba-a mi te, tawlailîr leh sakawr chung chuang mite rawih nân tangkaraw talent sângkhat an thawn a.

Chutichuan, tawlailîr sîngthum leh sânghnih Maaka lal leh a mite nên an ruai a, Medeba bulah ṭanhmun an khuar a. Tin, Amona thlahte chu an khua aṭangte chuan an chhuak a, an pung khâwm a, indo tûrin an thawk ta a.
Tin, Davidan chu chu a hriatin, Joaba leh sipai huaisenho zawng zawngte chu a tîr chhuak a.
Tin, Amona thlahte chu an lo thawk a, khawpui kawngkhâr bulah an inzâr a; tin, lalho lo tel vete chu a hrangin phûlah an awm a.
Chutichuan, a hma lam leh hnung lamah an rawn bei dâwn tih Joaban a hriatin, Israel mite zînga mi a ṭha ṭha a thlang chhuak a, Suria mite bei tûrin an lo inzâr a.
Tin, mi dang zawng zawng chu a unaupa Abisaia kutah a dah vek a, Amona thlahte bei tûrin an inzâr bawk a.
Tin, ani chuan, “Suria mite hi ka chelh dâwn loh chuan, nangin mi pui ang a; tin, Amona thlahte i chelh dâwn loh chuan, ka rawn pui thung ang che.
Huai takin awm ula, kan mite leh kan Pathian khuate chhanin i intipachang ang u; tin, Lalpan ṭha a tih ang zêlin ti rawh se,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Joaba leh a hnêna mite chuan indona hmun lama Suria mite chu an va hnaih a; tin, a hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ta a.
Tin, Amona thlahten Suria mite an tlânchhia tih an han hmuh chuan, anni pawh chu a unaupa Abisaia hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ve ta a, khuaah an lût a. Tichuan, Joaba chu Jerusalem-ah a haw ta a.
Tin, Suria miten Israel-te hmaah an chan a chhe ta tih an lo hriat chuan, mi an tîr a, Lui piah lama Suria-hote chu an ko chhuak a; tin, Hadadezera sipai hotu Sophaka chu an hotu ber a ni.

Tin, chu chu Davida an hrilh a; tin, ani chuan Israel mi zawng zawng a ko khâwm a, Jordan lui an kai a, an va hmu a, bei tûrin an inzâr a. Chutichuan, Davida hote chu an han inzâr zawh chuan Suria-hote chu an bei ta a.
Tin, Suria mite chu Israel-te hmaah chuan an tlânchhe ta a; tin, Davida chuan Suria mi, tawlailîr sângsarih chunga chuang leh sipai sîngli a that a; tin, sipai hotu Sophaka pawh a that a.

Tichuan, Hadadezera mite chuan Israel-te hmaah an chan a chhe ta tih an lo hriat chuan, Davida nên inremna an siam a, chhiah khuaah an awm ta a; Suria mite pawh chuan Amona thlahte chu an pui leh duh ta lo.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum a lo veia, lalte indo tûra an chhuah ṭhin lai hun chuan, Joaban sipai rûnpui a hruai chhuak a, Amona thlahte ram chu a chhu chhia a, Raba khua an hual a. Davida erawh chu Jerusalem-ah a awm a. Tin, Joaba chuan Raba khua chu a bei a, a la ta a.

Tin, Davida chuan an lal lallukhum khum lai chu a lâksak a, a rih lam chu rangkachak talent khat a ni a, lunghlute pawh a tel a; tin, Davida an khumtîr a; tin, khawpuia mi râllâk sum tam tak chu a la bawk a.

Tin, chuta mipuite chu a kawi chhuak a, thing zaina te, lei lehna thîr zum te, hreipuitein hna a thawhtîr a. Chutiang chuan Amona thlah khawpui zawng zawng chu Davidan a ti a. Tin, Davida leh mi zawng zawng chu Jerusalem-ah an haw leh ta a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, chumi hnuah chuan Philistia mite nên Gezer-ah indona a awm a; tichuan, Husath mi Sibekaian mi lian thlahte zînga mi Sippaia a that a. Tin, an tlâwm ta a.
Tin, Philistia mite nêna indona a awm leh a; tin, Jaira fapa Elhananan Git mi Goliatha unaupa Lahmia a that a, a fei ngul chu lian tak a ni.

Tin, Gath khuaah indona a awm leh a, chutah chuan mi sâng tak mai, a kut lehlam lehlama zungṭang paruk, a ke lehlam lehlama zungṭang paruk, a vaia sawmhnih leh pali nei hi a awm a; ani pawh mi lian laka piang a ni.
Tin, ani chuan Israel mite a va cho va, Davida unau Simeia fapa Jonathana chuan a lo that a.
Chûngte chu Gath khuaa mi lian laka piang an ni a; chûng chu Davida leh a mite kutah an thi a.
Tin, Setanan Israel-te chu a bei a, Davida chu Israel-te chhiar duhna a neihtîr ta a.
Tin, Davida chuan Joaba leh a mi liante hnênah, “Kal ula, Beer-seba aṭanga Dan thlengin Israel mite chhiar ula, a zât ka hriat theih nân mi rawn hrilh leh ang che u,” a ti a.

Tin, Joaba chuan lal hnênah, “ Lalpan a mite hi a leh za pawhin tipung sela, lalpa ka pu, ka pu mite vek an ni lâwm ni? Ka puin chu chu engah nge maw hriat a châk le? Eng atân nge Israel-te thiam loh chan phahna a nih ang le?” a ti a.
Nimahsela, lal thu chuan Joaba chu a hneh ta a. Chutichuan, Joaba chu a chhuak a, Israel ram zawng zawngah chuan a kal a, Jerusalem-ah a haw leh a.

Tin, Joaba chuan mihring awm zât chu Davida a hrilh a. Israel rama khandaih keng mi zawng zawng chu maktaduai khat leh nuai khat an ni a; tin, Judai rama khandaih keng mi chu nuai li leh sîngsarih an ni.
Levi-ho leh Benjamin-ho erawh chu a chhiar tel ve lo; lal thu chu Joaba huat zâwng tak a ni si a.
Tin, chu thilah chuan Pathian a lâwm ta lo va; chutichuan, Israel-ho chu a hrem ta a.
Tin, Davidan Pathian hnênah, “He ka thil lo tihah hian nasa takin ka lo sual ta a ni; nimahsela, i chhiahhlawh khawlohna hi khawngaih takin ngaidam ang che, âtthlâk takin ka lo ti ta a ni e,” a ti a.
Tin, Lalpan Davida zâwlnei, Gada hnênah,
“Kal la, Davida hnênah, ‘ Lalpan heti hian a ti: Thil kawng thum ka ruatsak a che; i chunga ka tih tûrin a pakhat chu thlang rawh, a ti e,’ ti rawh,” tiin a sawi a.
Chutichuan, Gada chu Davida hnênah a kal a, a hnênah, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti: ‘A eng nge i duh thlang rawh,

kum thum ṭâm tlâk nge, i hmêlmate khandaiha ûm phâka awma, thla thum i hmêlmaten an tihtlâwm che nge, ni thum chhûng hri, Lalpa khandaiha Lalpa vântirhkohvin Israel ram zawng zawnga mi tihboral zêl?’ tiin. Chutichuan, mi tîrtu chu engtin nge ka chhân dâwn, inngaihtuah la, mi hrilh rawh khai,” a ti a.
Tin, Davida chuan Gada hnênah, “Ka mang a ang hle mai. Lalpa kutah tlu lût phawt mai ila, a zahngaihna hi a nasa hle si a; mihring kutah chuan min tlûk luhtîr lul suh ang che,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Lalpan Israel-te zîngah chuan hri a lêntîr ta a; Israel-hote chu sîngsarih an thi a.

Tin, Jerusalem khua tichhe tûrin Pathianin vântirhkoh a tîr a; tin, a han tihchhiat dâwn lai tak chuan, Lalpa chuan a han en a, thil ṭha lo tih a tum chu a lamlêt a, mite tiboraltu vântirhkoh hnênah chuan, “A tâwk tawh e; i kut lek tawh suh,” a ti a. Tin, Lalpa vântirhkoh chu Jebus mi Ornana hruih bulah chuan a ding a.
Tin, Davida chu a han dâk a, Lalpa vântirhkoh, khandaih phawi saa Jerusalem lam tina, lei leh vân inkâra ding a hmu a. Chutichuan, Davida leh upaho chu saiip puan sinin leiah an bawkkhup ta a.

Tin, Davidan Pathian hnênah, “Keimah hi a ni lâwm ni, mipuite chhiar tûr tih thu petu chu? Keimah hi a ni, thil lo tisuala, suahsualthlâk taka thil lo ti ta chu; hêng berâmte hian eng thil nge an tih ve? Aw Lalpa ka Pathian, keimah leh ka chhûngte chungah i kut thlâk zâwk la, i mite hian hri hi tuar tawh suh se,” a ti a.
Tichuan, Lalpa vântirhkohvin Gada hnênah Davida chu han chhova, Jebus mi Ornana hruiha Lalpa tâna maichâm han siam tûra Davida hrilh tûrin thu a pe a.
Tin, Gadan Lalpa hminga a sawi ang chuan Davida chu a chho ta a.
Tin, Ornana chu a han lehhawi a, vântirhkoh chu a hmu a; tin, a fapa pali a hnêna awm vete chu an biru a, Ornana erawh chuan buh a lo chîl mêk a.
Tin, Davidan Ornana hnên a va thlen chuan, Ornana chu a han hawi a, Davida chu a hmu ta a; tin, hruih ata chu a chhuak a, a hmaia lei siin Davida hmaah chuan a bawkkhup a.
Tichuan, Davidan Ornana hnênah, “He hruih hi Lalpa tâna maichâm ka siam nân mi pe rawh khai; a man kim chiah têlin mi pe rawh, mipuite laka hri a kian theihna tûr hian,” a ti a.

Tin, Ornanan Davida hnênah chuan, “Nei mai rawh, lalpa ka pu chuan âwm a tih ang angin ti rawh se. En teh, hâlrala hlan atân bâwngpa te, thing atân hrui hmanrua te, chhangphut thilhlan atân buhte ka pe ang che; ka tum vek ang che,” a ti a.
Tin, Lal Davidan Ornana hnênah chuan, “Ni lo ve a; a man kim chiahin ka lei zâwk ang e, man lovin i ta chu Lalpa tân ka la lo vang a, hâlral thilhlan pawh ka hlân lo vang,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Davidan chumi hmun lei nân chuan Ornana chu rangkachak sekel zaruk a pe a.
Tin, Davidan chutah chuan Lalpa tân maichâm a siam ta a, hâlral thilhlante leh remna thilhlante a hlân a, Lalpa a au va; tin, ani chu maichâm chunga meiin vân aṭangin a rawn chhâng ta a.
Tin, Lalpan vântirhkoh chu thu a pe a, a khandaih chu a paiah a khung leh ta a.
Tin, Davidan Jebus mi Ornana hruihah Lalpan a rawn chhâng tih a hriatin chutah chuan a inthawi ta a.
Chutih lai chuan Mosian thlalêra Lalpa biak bûk leh hâlral thilhlanna maichâm a siam kha Gibeon khuaa hmun sângah a awm a ni.
Nimahsela, Davida chu Lalpa vântirhkoh khandaih a hlauh avângin Pathian râwn tûrin chutah chuan a kal thei lo a ni.
Tichuan, Davidan, “Hei hi Lalpa Pathian in a lo ni a, hei hi Israel-te hâlral thilhlanna maichâm a lo nih hi le,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Davidan Israel rama hnam dang awmte chu koh khâwm thu a pe a; tin, Pathian in sakna tûrin lungchhertute chu lung a chhertîr a.
Tin, Davida chuan kawt hung kawngkhâr leh a vuah nân a kilhna tûr thîr tam tak a lo siam khâwl a, dâr tam tak bûk sên loh nên,
sidar thing chhiar sên loh nên; Zidon mi leh Tura miten Davida hnênah chuan sidar thing tam tak an rawn la a ni.

Tin, Davidan, “Ka fapa Solomona hi a la naupangin, eng mah a la hre rih lo va, Lalpa in sak tûr chu ropui tak, a hming leh a ropuina chu ram tina thang chhuak tûr a ni a; chuvângin, ka lo buatsaih lâwk dâwn e,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Davida chuan a thih hmain a lo buatsaih lâwk nasa hle a.
Tichuan, a fapa Solomona a ko va, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian in sa tûr chuan thu a pe a.
Tin, Davidan a fapa Solomona hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa ka Pathian tân hian in sak ka lo rilrûk ṭhîn a.
Nimahsela, ‘Nang zawngin thisen i chhuah nasa êm a, indote i uar êm êm a; lei chungah hian ka mit hmuha thisen i chhuah nasat avângin, ka tân in i sa lo vang.

Ngai teh, fapa i la nei ang a, ani chu remna duh mi a ni ang a, a vêl rama a hmêlmate zawng zawng lakah chuan râlmuanna ka pe ang; a hming chu Solomona a ni ang a, ama chhanah chuan Israel-hote chu râlmuang leh thlamuang takin ka awmtîr ang.
Ani chuan ka tân in a sa ang a, ani chu ka fapa a ni ang a, kei a pa ka ni ang; tin, Israel-te chunga a ram lalṭhutthlêng chu kumkhua atân ka tinghet ang,’ tiin Lalpa thu ka hnênah a lo thleng a ni.
Chutichuan, ka fapa, Lalpa chu i hnênah awm sela; hmuingîl zêl la, i chungchâng thu a lo sawi lâwk tawh ang khân, Lalpa i Pathian in chu sa ang che.
Lalpan finna leh hriatnate neihtîr phawt che sela, Israel-te chunga thuneihna pe che rawh se; tichuan, Lalpa i Pathian dân chu i zâwm thei dâwn nia.
