Tichuan, Israel-te chungchâng thûa thuruatte leh rorêlnate Lalpan Mosia a pêk kha i zawm chuan, i hmuingîl zêl ang. Chak takin awm la, huai takin awm rawh; hlau suh la, zâm hek suh.

Ngai teh, ka mangan laiin Lalpa in atân rangkachak talent nuai khat leh, tangkaraw talent maktaduai khat ka lo buatsaih tawh a; tin, dâr leh thîrte pawh bûk sên loh, tam tak a ni; thing leh lung pawh ka buatsaih lâwk tawh a; chûng chu i chhunzawm thei tawh ang chu.
Tin, hnathawktu, thing zaitute leh lung chhertute leh themthiam hna tinrêng thawk thei i ngah bawk a;
chhiar sên rual loh rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te, thîrte pawh. Bei nghâl mai rawh khai, Lalpa chu i hnênah awm rawh se,” a ti a.
Davida chuan Israel-ho puipate zawng zawng chu a fapa Solomona ṭanpui tûrin thu a pe a,
“ Lalpa in Pathian chu in hnênah a awm lâwm ni? Kil tin kil tangah râlmuanna a pe lo che u em ni? He rama mite hi ka kutah a rawn hlân ta a, ram chu Lalpa hmaah leh a mite hmaah lâk a ni ta a.

Tichuan, in thinlung leh in rilruin Lalpa in Pathian lam hawi ula; bei nghâl ula, Lalpa thuthlung bâwm leh Pathian bungbêl thianghlimte chu Lalpa tâna in in sak tûra in lâk luh theih nân Lalpa Pathian hmun thianghlim chu siam rawh u,” tiin.
Tin, Davida chu a dam reiin a lo upa ta hle a; tichuan, a fapa Solomona chu Israel-te lalah a siam a.
Tin, Israel-ho puipa zawng zawng chu puithiamte leh Levi-hote nên a ko khâwm a.
Tin, Levi-hote chu kum sawmthum achin chung lam chhiar an ni a; an tam lam chu patling sîngthum leh sângriat an ni.
Chûng zînga sînghnih leh sângli chu Lalpa in satuho hotu tûr an ni a, sângrukte chu hotute leh rorêltu tûrte an ni a,
sânglite chu kawngkhâr vêngtu tûrte an ni a; tin, sânglite chu, “Fakna tûra thil tum rîk chi ka siam,” Davidan a tihte hmanga Lalpa faktu tûrte an ni.
Tin, Levia fa Gersona te, Kohatha te, Meraria te zâtin Davidan pâwl a siam a.
Gerson mite chu Ladana leh Simeia an ni.
Ladana fate chu puipa ber Jehiela te, Zethama te, Joela te, pathum an ni.
Simeia fate chu Selomotha te, Haziela te, Harana te, pathum an ni. Hêngte hi Ladana thlah chhûngkaw puipate chu an ni.
Tin, Simeia fate chu Jahatha te, Zina te, Jeusa te, Beria te an ni. Hêng palite hi Simeia fate chu an ni.
Tin, Jahatha chu a upa ber a ni a, Ziza chu a chhang a ni. Jeusa leh Beria erawh chuan fa an ngah lo va; chuvângin, chhûngkaw pakhat anga chhiar an ni.
Kohatha fate chu Amrama te, Izara te, Hebrona te, Uziela te, pali an ni.

Amrama fate chu Arona leh Mosia an ni; Arona chu, amah leh a thlahte chu kumkhua atâna thil thianghlim takte tithianghlima, kumkhuaa Lalpa hmaa rimtui hâla, a rawng bâwla, a hminga malsâwmtu tûra tihhran an ni.
Pathian mi Mosia erawh chu, a fate chu Levi hnam zînga chhiar an ni.
Mosia fate chu Gersoma leh Eliezera an ni.
Gersoma fate zînga upa ber chu Sebuela a ni.
Eliezera fate zînga upa ber chu Rehabia a ni. Eliezera chuan fapa dang rêng rêng a nei lo; Rehabia erawh chuan fapa tam tak a nei.
Izhara fate zîng upa ber chu Selomitha a ni.
Hebrona fatea upa ber chu Jeria a ni a, a chhang chu Amaria, a chhang leh chu Jahaziela, a chhang leh chu Jekameama a ni.
Uziela fatea upa zâwk chu Mika a ni a, a chhang chu Isia a ni.
Meraria fate chu Mahlia leh Musia an ni. Mahlia fate chu Eleazara leh Kisa an ni.
Tin, Eleazara chu a thi a, fapate nei lovin fanute chauh a nei a; tin, Kisa fapa, an unauten nupuiah an nei a.
Musia fate chu Mahlia te, Edera te, Jeremotha te, pathum an ni.
Chûngte chu Levia thlah, an chhûngkua ang zêla hming ziaka an chhiar chhûngkaw puipa, Lalpa in saka thawk, kum sawmhnih achin chung lama chhiar zawngte chu an ni.
Davidan, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin a mite chu râlmuang takin a awmtîr ta a, Jerusalem-ah hian a awm ta reng a;
Levi-hote pawh hian biak bûk leh a rawngbâwl nân bungbêl zawng zawng hi an zâwn a ngai tawh lo ve,” a ti a ni.
Davida thupêk hnuhnûng avângin Levi-hote chu kum sawmhnih achin chung lam thlengin chhiar an ni si a.
An hnathawh chu Pathian ina rawngbâwla Arona fapate ṭanpuia, kawt hung chhûng leh pindan chhûnga thil thianghlim zawng zawng tihthianghlima, Lalpa ina rawngbâwl a ni si a;
chhang chhiah tûr te, chhangphut thilhlan atâna chhangphut dip tak, dawidim telh loh chhangpêr pan emaw, bêla ur emaw, kan emaw, a teh leh a lenzia ang zawng zawng tûr buatsaih vêl te nên;
tin, tûk tina Lalpa hnêna lâwmthu sawi leh amah fak te nên, tlaiah pawh chuti bawk;
tin, Chawlhniah te, thla tharah te, kût bi neiah te, a tih tûra ruat ang zêla Lalpa hnêna hâlral thilhlan zawng zawng Lalpa hmaa hlan reng te nên;
tin, inbiakna puan in enkawl te, hmun thianghlim enkawl te, Lalpa ina rawngbâwla an unau Arona fapaten tih tûr an ruat apiang tih te nên.
Tin, Arona fapate pâwl ṭhen dân chu hetiang hi a ni. Arona fapate chu Nadaba te, Abihua te, Eleazara te, Ithamara te an ni.
Nadaba leh Abihua erawh chu an pa aiin an thi hmasa a, fa an nei lo; chuvângin, Eleazara leh Ithamara chuan puithiam hna an thawk a ni.
Tin, Davidan Eleazara fapa Zadoka leh Ithamara fapa Ahimeleka te nên an rawngbâwl dân tûr a semsak a.

Tin, Ithamara thlahte ai chuan Eleazara thlah puipaa ṭang an tam zâwk a, hetiang hian an ṭhen a: Eleazara thlaha mi, chhûngkaw puipa chu sâwm leh paruk an ni a; tin, Ithamara thlaha mi, chhûngkaw puipa chu pariat an ni.
Chutiang chuan ṭhumvâwrin, ai khata luangin an ṭhen a; Eleazara thlaha mi leh Ithamara thlaha mite zîngah, hmun thianghlima mi liante leh Pathian mi liante an awm ve ve si a.

Tin, Levi mi, lehkhaziaktu, Nethanela fapa Semaian lal leh mi lianhote: puithiam Zadoka te, Abiathara fapa Ahimeleka te, puithiamho leh Levi-ho chhûngkaw puipate mit hmuhah chuan a ziak a; chhûngkaw puipa pakhat chan chu Eleazara chungah a tlu a, pakhat chu Ithamara chungah a tlu a.
Tichuan, ṭhumvâwr vawi khatna chu Jehoiariba chungah a tlu a, vawi hnihna chu Jedaia chungah,
vawi thumna chu Harima chungah, vawi lina chu Seorima chungah,
vawi ngana chu Malkija chungah, vawi rukna chu Mijamina chungah,
vawi sarihna chu Hakoza chungah, vawi riatna chu Abija chungah,
vawi kuana chu Jesua chungah, vawi sâwmna chu Sekania chungah,
vawi sâwm leh vawi khatna chu Eliasiba chungah, vawi sâwm leh vawi hnihna chu Jakima chungah,
vawi sâwm leh vawi thumna chu Hupa chungah, vawi sâwm leh vawi lina chu Jesebeaba chungah,
vawi sâwm leh vawi ngana chu Bilga chungah, vawi sâwm leh vawi rukna chu Imera chungah,
vawi sâwm leh vawi sarihna chu Hezira chungah, vawi sâwm leh vawi riatna chu Hapizeza chungah,
vawi sâwm leh vawi kuana chu Pethahia chungah, vawi sawmhnihna chu Jehezkela chungah,
vawi sawmhnih leh vawi khatna chu Jakina chungah, vawi sawmhnih leh vawi hnihna chu Gamula chungah,
vawi sawmhnih leh vawi thumna chu Delaia chungah, vawi sawmhnih leh vawi lina chu Maazia chungah.
Chu chu Lalpa, Israel Pathianin an pu Arona thu a lo pêk, Lalpa in chhûnga rawng an bâwl dân tûr a lo ruat dân chu a ni.
Tin, Levia thlah dangte zînga mi chu: Amrama fate zingah chuan Subaela a ni; Subaela fate zîngah Jehdeia.
Rehabia lamah chuan: Rehabia-hote zîngah puipa Isia.
Izhar-ho zîngah Selomotha; Selomotha fate zîngah Jahatha.
Hebrona fate chu, a upa ber Jeria a ni a, a chhang Amaria, a chhang leh Jahaziela, a chhang leh Jekameama a ni.
Uziela fate zînga mi Mika; Mika fate zînga mi Samira a ni.
Mika unaupa chu Isia a ni a; Isia fate zînga mi Zekaria.
Meraria fate chu Mahlia leh Musia an ni: Jaazia fate zînga mi Benoa a ni.
Meraria thlahte chu, Jaazia lakah Benoa te, Sohama te, Zakura te, Ibria te an ni.
Mahlia lakah Eleazara a ni a, ani chuan fapa a nei lo.
Kisa lakah chuan Kisa fapa Jerameela a ni.
Tin, Musia thlahte chu, Mahlia te, Edera te, Jerimotha te an ni. Chûngte chu Levi-ho thlahte zînga an chhûngkaw puipate chu an ni.

Anni pawh chuan Arona fa an unaute ang bawkin, Lal Davida te, Zadoka te, Ahimeleka te, puithiamho leh Levi-ho chhûngkaw puipate mit hmuhah ṭhum an vâwr ve bawk a; chhûngkaw puipa ber leh an unaute pawh ai khata luangin.

Tin, Asapha te, Hemana te, Jeduthuna teho fapa ṭhenkhat chu ṭingṭang te, perhkhuang te, dârbenthek te nêna fak dual duala rawngbâwltu atân Davida leh sipai hotuten an tihrang bawk a. Chutianga thawka rawngbâwltute tam lam chu:
Asapha fapate zînga mi chu: Zakura te, Josefa te, Nethania te, Asarela te an ni a; anni chu Asapha fate, lal thupêk anga fak dual dual ṭhîn, Asapha thû thûa awm an ni.

Jeduthuna lakah chuan, Jeduthuna fa: Gedalia te, Zeria te, Jesaia te, Simeia te, Hasabia te, Matithia te, paruk an ni, ṭingṭang nêna Lalpa hnêna lâwmthu sawia fak dual duala, an pa Jeduthuna thû thûa awm an ni.

Hemana lakah chuan, Hemana fa: Bukia te, Matania te, Uziela te, Sebuela te, Jerimotha te, Hanania te, Hanana te, Eliatha te, Gidaltia te leh Romamti-ezera te, Josbekasa te, Malothia te, Hothira te, Mahaziotha te an ni a.
Chûng zawng zawng chu lal tâna zâwlnei Hemana fa, englo ki tawtawrâwt hâmtu tûrte an ni. Pathianin Hemana chu fapa sâwm leh pali leh fanu pathum a pe a.

Chûng zawng zawng chu Lalpa inah dârbenthek nên, perhkhuang nên, ṭingṭang nên, Pathian ina rawngbâwl nâna hla nêna remtu, an pa thû thûa awm an ni. Asapha te, Jeduthuna te, Hemana te chu lal thupêka awm an ni ve thung a.
Tin, an tam lam chu, an unau, Lalpa tâna hla sak zir, thiam sa tawh zawng zawngte nên chuan zahnih leh sawmriat leh pariat an ni.
Tin, a lian a tê, zirtîrtu leh zirtuin an chan tûr ang khat vekin ṭhum an vâwr a.
Tichuan, ṭhumvâwr vawi khatna chu Asapha fapa Josefa chungah a tlu a; vawi hnihna chu Gedalia chungah, amah leh a unaute leh a fapate chu sâwm leh pahnih an ni;
vawi thumna chu Zakura chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi lina chu Izria chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi ngana chu Nethania chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi rukna chu Bukia chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sarihna chu Jesarela chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi riatna chu Jesaia chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi kuana chu Matania chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sâwmna chu Simeia chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sâwm leh vawi khatna chu Azarela chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sâwm leh vawi hnihna chu Hasabia chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sâwm leh vawi thumna chu Subaela chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sâwm leh vawi lina chu Matithia chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sâwm leh vawi ngana chu Jeremotha chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sâwm leh vawi rukna chu Hanania chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sâwm leh vawi sarihna chu Josbekasa chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sâwm leh vawi riatna chu Hanania chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sâwm leh vawi kuana chu Malothia chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sawmhnihna chu Eliatha chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sawmhnih leh vawi khatna chu Hothira chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sawmhnih leh vawi hnihna chu Gidaltia chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sawmhnih leh vawi thumna chu Mahaziotha chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih;
vawi sawmhnih leh vawi lina chu Romamti-ezera chungah, a fapate leh a unaute chu sâwm leh pahnih.
Kawngkhâr vêngtu pâwl ṭhen dân chu: Kora mi chu Asapha fapate zînga Korea fapa Meselemia chuan fapate a nei a.
A fa tîr chu Zekaria a ni a, a dawttu chu Jediaela, a dawt lehtu chu Zebadia, a dawt lehtu chu Jathniela,
a dawt lehtu chu Elama, a dawt lehtu chu Jehohanana, a dawt lehtu chu Eliehoenaia a ni.
Tin, Obed-edoma chuan fapate a nei a: a fa tîr chu Semaia a ni a, a dawttu chu Jehozabada, a dawt lehtu chu Joa, a dawt lehtu chu Sakara, a dawt lehtu chu Nethanela,
a dawt lehtu chu Amiela, a dawt lehtu chu Isakara, a dawt lehtu chu Peulethaia a ni a; ani chu Pathianin mal a sâwm a ni.
A fapa Semaia lakah chuan fapa, an chhûngkaw puipate an piang bawk a, mi chak huaisen an ni hlawm a ni.
Semaia fapate chu Othnia te, Rephaela te, Obeda te, Elzabada te an ni a, an unau Elihua leh Semakia chu mi chak tak an ni.
Chûng zawng zawng chu Obed-edoma thlahte an ni a, anmahni leh an fapate leh an unaute chu rawngbâwlna kawnga mi puitling an ni; Obed-edoma laka mite chu sawmruk leh pahnih an ni.
Meselemia chuan fapa leh unau, mi chak tak tak sâwm leh pariat a nei.
Tin, Meraria thlahte zînga Hosa chuan fapate a nei bawk a: Simria chu puipa ber a ni a (fa tîr a ni lo na a, a pain puipa berah a siam a ni),
a dawttu chu Hilkia a ni a, a dawt lehtu chu Tebalia, a dawt lehtu chu Zekaria a ni; Hosa fapate leh a unaute chu an zain sâwm leh pathum an ni.
Chûng puipaho zînga mi chu an unaute anga Lalpa ina rawngbâwl hnaa chanvo neia kawngkhâr vêngtu pâwla an ṭhente chu an ni.
A lian a têin, an chhûngkaw zir ang zêlin kawngka tina awm tûr ṭhum an vâwr a.
Tin, chhak lam atâna ṭhumvâwr chu Selemia chungah a tlu a. Tin, rorêltu fing tak, a fapa Zekaria tân ṭhum an vâwr a, hmâr lam chu a pualah a tlu a;
chhim lam chu Obed-edoma pualah; tin, thil dah khâwmna in chu a fapate pualah.
Thlang lam chu a chhohna kawnga Saleketh kawngkhâr vênna nên, Supima leh Hosa pualah.
Chhak lamah Levi-ho paruk an awm a, ni tin hmâr lamah pali, ni tin chhim lamah pali; tin, thil dah khâwmna inah pahnih ve ve.
Thlang lam in hual chhûng atân chuan a luhnaah pali, in hual chhûngah chuan pahnih.
Chûngte chu an ni, Kora fapate leh Meraria fapate, kawngkhâr vêngtu pâwla an ṭhente chu.
Tin, an unau Levi-ho, Pathian sum dah khâwmna in leh thil thianghlim dah khâwmna in vawngtute chu Ladana chhûngkaw puipa, Ladana laka Gerson mi thlah,
Jehielia leh a unau Zethama leh Joela-te an ni; chûngte chu Lalpa sum dah khâwmna in vawngtute an ni.
Amram-ho te, Izhar-ho te, Hebron-ho te, Uziel-ho te zînga mi,
Mosia fa Gersoma fapa Sebuela chu sum dah khâwmna in vawngtu a ni.
Tin, a unaute chu Eliezera fapa Rehabia te, Jesaia te, Jorama te, Zikria te, Selomitha te an ni.
Selomitha leh a unaute chu Lal Davida leh an chhûngkaw puipa, sipai sâng hotute leh za hotute leh sipai pâwl hotuten an tihthianghlim tawh, thil thianghlim dah khâwmna in zawng zawng vawngtu an ni.
Indonaa râllâk thilte chu Lalpa in siam ṭhat nân an dah a ni.
Zâwlnei Samuela te, Kisa fapa Saula te, Nera fapa Abnera te, Zeruii fapa Joaba-tena an tihthianghlim zawng zawng, tu pawhin thil an tihthianghlim tawh phawt chu Selomitha leh a unaute vawn vek a ni.
Izhar mi Kenania leh a fapate chu Israel ram pâwn lam chungchâng thûa hotute leh rorêltute an ni.
Hebron mi Hasabia leh a unau mi huaisen sângkhat leh zasarihte chu Jordan râl thlang lama Israel-ho awptu an ni; Lalpa hna zawng zawng leh lal rawngbâwlna lam hnaah.
Hebron thlahte hruaitu ber chu Jeria a ni a. Davida lal kum sawmli kum khân Hebron thlahte chhui chhuahna a awm a, Gilead rama Jazer-ah chuan an zîngah mi chak huaisen an lo awm ṭeuh mai a.

Davida chuan Jeria chhûngte zînga mi huaisente chu mi sânghnih leh zasarih a thlang chhuak a, chûng mite chu Jordan lui khawchhak lam Reuben-hote, Gad-hote leh chhak lam Manase-hote rama Israel-te sakhaw thu leh tualchhûng thu rêl tûrin a ruat a.
Israel-ho an tam chin chu chhûngkaw puipa te, sipai sâng hotu te, za hotu te leh lal rawngbâwltu zawng zawng, kum khat chhûnga thla tina inthlâk zêl ṭhîn, pâwl tina mi chu sînghnih leh sângli an ni.
Pâwl khatna thla khatnaa hotu chu Zabdiela fapa Jasobeama a ni a, a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Ani chu Pereza thlaha mi, thla khatnaa sipai hotu zawng zawng hotu ber a ni.
Thla hnihnaa pâwl hotu chu Aho mi Dodaia a ni a, Miklotha pawh a pâwl hotu a ni; a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Thla thumnaa sipaihote hotu ber chu puithiam Jehoiada fapa Benaia a ni a, a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
He Benaia hi a ni, sawmthumte zînga mi huaisen, sawmthumte chunga mi chu; a pâwlah chuan a fapa Amizabada a tel.
Thla linaa sipai hotu chu Joaba unaupa Asahela a ni a, a fapa Zebadian a zui a ni; tin, a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Thla nganaa sipai hotu chu Izra mi Samhutha a ni a; a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Thla ruknaa sipai hotu chu Teko mi, Ikesa fapa Ira a ni a; tin, a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Thla sarihnaa sipai hotu chu Ephraima thlah Pelon mi Heleza a ni a, a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Thla riatnaa sipai hotu chu Zera thlah, Husath mi Sibekaia a ni a; a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Thla kuanaa sipai hotu chu Benjamina thlah Anathoth mi Abiezera a ni a; a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Thla sâwmnaa sipai hotu chu Zera thlah Netophath mi Maharaia a ni a; a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Thla sâwm leh thla khatnaa sipai hotu chu Ephraima thlah Pirathon mi Benaia a ni a; a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Thla sâwm leh thla hnihnaa sipai hotu chu Othniela thlah Netophath mi Heldaia a ni a; a pâwlah chuan sînghnih leh sângli an awm.
Chûng lo pawh chu, Israel hnamho chunga Reuben-hote zîngah chuan Zikria fapa Eliezera chu rorêltu a ni a; Simeon-ho zîngah Maaka fapa Sephatia;
Levi-ho zîngah Kemuela fapa Hasabia; Arnon-ho zîngah Zadoka;
Juda-ho zîngah Davida unaute zînga mi Elihua; Isakar-ho zîngah Mikaela fapa Omria;
Zebulun-ho zîngah Obadia fapa Ismaia; Naphtali-ho zîngah Azriela fapa Jerimotha;
Ephraima thlahte zîngah Azazia fapa Hosea; Manase hnam zâtvete zîngah Pedaia fapa Joela;
Gilead rama Manase hnam zâtvete zîngah Zekaria fapa Idova; Benjamin-ho zîngah Abnera fapa Jaasiela;
Dan-ho zîngah Jerohama fapa Azarela. Chûngte chu Israel hnam hotute an ni.
Davida chuan kum sawmhnih achin hnuai lam chu a chhiar lo va, Israel-hote chu vâna arsi zât khian a la tipung ang tih Lalpan a lo sawi tawh avângin.
Zeruii fapa Joaba chuan a han chhiar ṭan a; nimahsela, a chhiar zo lo va, Israel-te chungah thinurna a lo thleng ta a; Lal Davida lal lai chanchin ziakna buah a zât ziak a ni bawk hek lo.
Lal sum enkawltu chu Adiela fapa Azmavetha a ni a; tin, lo lamah te, khawpuiah te, khawperah te, in sângtea sum enkawltu chu Uzia fapa Jonathana a ni a.
Lova leileh hna thawkho enkawltu chu Keluba fapa Ezria a ni a.
Grêp huan enkawltu chu Ramath mi Simeia a ni a; tin, grêp huana mi uain sâwr dah khâwmna enkawltu chu Siphmit mi Zabdia a ni a.
Phai ruama olive thing leh theipui kûngte enkawltu chu Geder mi Baal-hanana a ni a; tin, hriak dah khâwmna enkawltu chu Joasa a ni.
Tin, Saron-a tla ran rual enkawltu chu Saron mi Sitraia a ni a; ruama ran rual enkawltu chu Adlaia fapa Saphata a ni.
Sanghâwngsei enkawltu chu Ismael mi Obila a ni a; tin, sabengtung enkawltu chu Meronoth mi Jehdeia a ni a;
tin, berâm rual enkawltu chu Hagar mi Jaziza a ni. Chûng zawng zawng chu Lal Davida sum enkawltute an ni.
Tin, Davida pami, mi fing, lehkha thiam tak Jonathana chu remruattu a ni a; tin, Hakmonia fapa Jehiela chu lal fapate zirtîrtu a ni.
Ahithophela chu lal remruatpuitu a ni a; tin, Ark mi Husaia chu lal ṭhian a ni.
Ahithophela dawtah chuan Benaia fapa Jehoiada leh Abiathara an ni a; tin, lal sipaiho hotu chu Joaba a ni.

Tin, Davidan Israel hotu zawng zawng: hnam puipa te, lal rawngbâwla inthlâk ṭhîn pâwl hotu te, sipai sâng hotu te, za hotu te, lal leh a fapate sum leh thil neih zawng zawng chunga hotu te, mi lian leh mi chak, mi chak huaisen zawng zawngte nên Jerusalem-ah a ko khâwm a.

Tichuan, Lal Davida chu a ding a, “Ka unaute leh ka mite u, ka thu hi lo ngaithla teh u: kei chuan Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm dahna leh kan Pathian ke nghahchhan tûr in sa ila tih ka lo rilrûk ṭhîn a; tin, sakna tûr pawh ka ngah tawh diam a.
Nimahsela, Pathianin ka hnênah, ‘Nang zawng indo mi, thisen chhuah mi i nih avângin ka hming tân in i sa lo vang,’ a ti a.

Amaherawhchu, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathianin ka pa chhûngte zawng zawng zîng ata Israel-te lala kumkhuaa awm tûrin mi lo thlang ta a, Juda hnam chu puipa atân a lo thlang ta si a. Tin, Juda hnam zîngah pawh ka pa chhûngte leh ka pa fapate zîng ata Israel zawng zawng lalah mi lo thlang chhuak ta bîk a.
Tin, ka fapa zawng zawng zîngah chuan (Lalpan fapa tam tak mi pe a) Israel-te lal atân Lalpa ram lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûrin ka fapa Solomona hi a lo thlang ta a.
“Tichuan, ka hnênah, ‘I fapa Solomonan ka in leh ka kawtlaite chu a din ang; ka fapa atân ka thlang tawh a; tichuan, a pa ka ni ang.
Ka thupêkte leh ka rorêlte a pawm reng chuan tûna in tih reng ang hian a ram chu kumkhua atân ka tinghet ang,’ a ti a.

Chutichuan, Lalpa mipui, Israel-ho zawng zawng mit hmuhah leh kan Pathian hriatah hian, Lalpa in Pathian thupêk zawng zawng hi pawm tûr leh ngaihven tûrin ka fuih a che u; tichuan, he ram ṭha tak hi in luah ang a, in hnua in thlahte kumkhua atân in rochun chhâwntîr zêl ang.

“Tin, nang ka fapa Solomon, i pa Pathian hi hria la, thinlung ṭha famkim leh rilru phûr takin a rawng bâwl ang che; Lalpa chuan thinlung a en ṭhîn a, rilrua suangtuah zawng zawngte hi a hre vek a ni; amah i zawn chuan i hmu ang a, i hawisan erawh chuan kumkhuain a thlauthla ang che.
Fîmkhur rawh khai; hmun thianghlim tûr in sa tûrin Lalpan a lo ruat tâk che hi; chak takin awm la, bei rawh,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Davida chuan a fapa Solomona chu biak in hulhliap lem te, a in lem te, sum dah khâwmna in lem te, a pindan chungnung lem te, a chhûng pindan lem te, zahngaihna ṭhutphah lem te,
a rilrua a suangtuah ang zawng zawng, Lalpa in hung chhûng kawtlai lem te, a vêl pindan zawng zawng lem te, Pathian ina sum dah khâwmna in lem te, thil serh dah khâwmna in lem te chu a pe a;
puithiamte leh Levi-hote a pâwl pâwla an awmna tûr lem te, Lalpa ina rawngbâwlna lam tûr zawng zawng lem te, Lalpa ina rawngbâwlna tûr bungbêl zawng zawng lemte pawh;
rawngbâwlna lam atâna bungbêl chi tin, rangkachak bungbêl tûr, rangkachak hman zât tûr te, rawngbâwlna lam atâna tangkaraw bungbel tûr, rangkachak hman zât tûr te,

rangkachak khâwnvâr dahna leh a khâwnvâr tûr rangkachak hman zât tûr te, khâwnvâr dahna leh a khâwnvâr tûr zêl atâna hman zât tûr te, khâwnvâr dahnaa hman ṭûlna ṭheuh ang zêla tangkaraw khâwnvâr dahna tûr zêl atâna hman zât tûr te nên;
chhang chiahna dawhkân tûr, pakhat zêl atâna rangkachak hman zât tûr te, tangkaraw dawhkân atâna tangkaraw hman zât tûr te,
rangkachak hlîr hlak sa thurna thîr kawm te, maihûn te, note nên; rangkachak berhbu tûr, berhbu pakhat zêl atâna hman zât tûr te, tangkaraw berhbu tûr, berhbu pakhat zêl atâna hman zât tûr te;
rangkachak thianghlima siam, rimtui hâlna maichâm tûr te; cherub-te an thla zâra Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm tuam chuanna lem ang siamna tûr rangkachak te nên.
Davida chuan, “Hêngte hi tih dân tûr rem a ruat sa tichiang tûra Lalpan ama kut ngeia a ziak ang kha a ni,” a ti a.

Tin, Davidan a fapa Solomona hnênah chuan, “Chak tak leh huai takin awm la, bei rawh; hlau suh la, zâm hek suh; Lalpa Pathian, ka Pathian hi i hnênah a awm e. Lalpa in lam hna zawng zawng hi peih vek a nih hma loh chuan a kalsanin a thlahthlam lo vang che.

Tin, ngai teh, Pathian in hna tinrêng thawktu pâwl puithiamte leh Levi-hote an awm a, eng hna pawha kawng tinrênga hna thiam, châk tak ṭheuhva ṭanpuitu tûr che i hnênah an awm zêl ang a; hotute leh mipui zawng zawng pawhin i thupêk apiang chu an zâwm zêl bawk ang,” a ti a.

Tin, Lal Davidan mipui zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Pathian thlan chhuah ka fapa Solomona hi a la naupangin eng mah a la hre rih lo va; a thawh tûr lah chu a ropui si a; biak in chu mihring tân a ni lo va, Lalpa Pathian tân a ni zâwk si a.

Tichuan, ka Pathian in tân chuan rangkachak lam thil atân rangkachak te, tangkaraw lam thil atân tangkarua te, dâr lam thil atân dâr te, thîr lam thil atân thîr te, thing lam thil atân thingte chu theihtâwpin ka lo buatsaih tawh a; a zeh tûr onuk lung te, lungmawi te, a bel tûr lungmawi chi hrang hrang leh lunghlu chi tinrêng leh sailungvâr lung tam takte nên.
Chu chauh lo pawh chu, ka Pathian in hi ka duhsak êm êm mai a, keima sum rangkachak leh tangkaruate pawh, in thianghlim tâna ka lo buatsaih zawng zawng tiam lo hian, ka Pathian in tân ka pe a ni:
chu chu bangte luan nân Ophir rangkachak, rangkachak talent sângthum leh tangkaraw thianghlim talent sângsarih;
hmanna kawng hrang hranga mi thiamte hman tûrin rangkachak hmanna tûra rangkachak te, tangkaraw hmanna tûra tangkarua te a ni. Vawiin hian Lalpa tâna lâwm taka pe phal tu nge awm le?” a ti a.
Tichuan, chhûngkaw puipate, Israel hnam hotute, sâng hotute leh za hotute, lal hnathawk hotute nên lâwm takin an pe a.
Pathian in sak nân rangkachak talent sângnga leh darik sîngkhat, tangkarua talent sîngkhat leh dâr talent sîngkhat leh sângriat, thîr talent nuai khat an pe a ni.
Tin, lunghlu neite chuan Gerson mi Jehiela vawn Lalpa sumah an dah a.
Tichuan, mipuite chu an hlim êm êm mai a, rilru hmun khat pua lâwm taka Lalpa an pêk avângin; Lal Davida pawh hlim namên lovin a hlim a.
Chutichuan, Davidan mipui zawng zawng hmaah chuan Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu a sawi a: “Aw Lalpa, kan pu Israela Pathian, chatuana fakin awm rawh.

Aw Lalpa, ropuina te, thiltihtheihna te, chawimawina te, hnehna te, lalna te hi i ta a ni a; lei leh vâna awm zawng zawng hi i ta a ni si a; aw Lalpa, ram chu i ta a ni a, mi zawng zawnga chungnung ber i ni.
Hausakna leh chawimawinate hi i hnêna mi a ni a, engkim chungah thu i nei a; tin, thiltihtheihna leh chakna i kutah a awm a; i kutah hian mi zawng zawng tihropuina leh chakna pêk theihna a awm.
Chutichuan, kan Pathian, lâwmthu kan hrilh chia, i hming ropui hi kan fak e.

Nimahsela, tu nge maw ka niha, ka mite pawh hi tute nge maw an niha, hetiang te lâwm taka kan lo hlan theih ni le? Thil zawng zawng hi i hnên aṭanga chhuak a ni a, i ta chu kan rawn pe leh mai che a ni si a.
Kan pi leh pute ang khân keini zawng i hmaah hian mikhual, mi hnêna khawsa ve mai ang kan ni a; leilunga kan dam chhûng nite chu hlim ang chauh a ni a, beisei tûr rêng a awm lo.
Aw Lalpa kan Pathian, i hming thianghlim tâna in kan saksakna tûr chea hêng thil kan lo buatsaih zawng zawng hi nangma kutchhuak a ni a, i ta vek a ni e.

Ka Pathian, nangin thinlungte i fiah ṭhîn a, felna te i lâwm ṭhîn tih ka hre bawk. Kei zawngin rilru tak takin hêng thil zawng zawng hi lâwm takin ka rawn hlân a; tin, heta i mite pawh lâwm taka i hnêna rawn hlântu ka hmuh hian ka lâwm êm êm a ni.
Aw Lalpa, kan pu Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Israela te Pathian, i miten hetiang rilru an put reng theihna tûrin an rilrute hi i tân tinghet la;
tin, ka fapa Solomona hi i thupêk te, i thuhriattîr te, i dân te zâwma, chûng zawng zawng ti tûr leh ka lo buatsaih lâwk in sa tûr hian rilru famkim han puttîr ang che,” Davida chuan a ti a.

Tin, Davidan mipui zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Khai le, Lalpa in Pathian chu fak rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, mipui zawng zawng chuan Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian chu an fak a, an kûn a, Lalpa leh lal chu chibai an bûk a.

Tin, a tûkah chuan Lalpa hnênah inthawi nân leh Lalpa hnêna hâlral thilhlan atân, bâwngpa sângkhat leh berâmpa sângkhat leh berâmno sângkhat, an in tûr thilhlante nên Israel-ho zawng zawng tân inthawina tam tak an hlân a.
Tichuan, chumi ni chuan Lalpa hmaah hlim takin an ei a, an in hlawm a. Tin, Davida fapa Solomona chu lalah an siam nawn leh a, Lalpa mi lian atân hriak an thih a; tin, Zadoka chu puithiam atân.
Chutichuan, Solomona chu Lalpa lalṭhutthlêngah chuan a pa Davida aiah lalah a ṭhu ta a, hmuingîl takin a awm a; tin, Israel-ho zawng zawngin a thu an zâwm a.
Tin, hotu zawng zawng leh mi chak huaisente leh Lal Davida fapa dang zawng zawng chu Lal Solomona lakah an intulût a.
Tin, Lalpan Solomona chu Israel-ho zawng zawng mit hmuhah nasa takin a tiropui a, Israel rama a hmaa lalte zînga tu ma la chan ngai loh, lal nihna ropui tak a chantîr a.
Jesaia fapa Davida chu Israel-ho zawng zawng chungah a lal a.
Israel-ho chunga a lal chhûng chu kum sawmli a ni; Hebron khuaah kum sarih a lal a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum leh kum thum a lal a.
Tin, upa tak, tarkûna damin, hausa tak leh chawimawi hlawhin a thi a; tin, a fapa Solomona chu a aiawhin a lal ta a.
Ngai teh, Lal Davida chanchin chu a tîr aṭanga a tâwp thlengin, zâwlnei Samuela lehkhabuah te, zâwlnei Nathana lehkhabuah te, zâwlnei Gada lehkhabuah te a chuang a,
a lal thûte, a thiltihtheihzia zawng zawng te, amah leh Israel-ho leh ram zawng zawng chunga thil lo awm dânte nên.
Tin, Davida fapa Solomona chu a ram chhûngah chuan tihchakin a awm a, Lalpa a Pathian chu a hnênah a awm a, nasa takin a tiropui a.
Tin, Solomona chuan Israel-ho zawng zawng, sipai sâng hotu te, za hotu te, rorêltu te, Israel ram zawng zawnga mi lian, chhûngkaw puipa zawng zawng chu a bia a.
Chutichuan, Solomona leh inkhâwmho zawng zawng chu Gibeon khuaa hmun sângah chuan an kal a; chutah chuan Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosian thlalêra a siam Pathian biakna bûk kha a awm a ni.
Pathian bâwm erawh chu Davidan a lo buatsaih tawhna hmunah Kiriath-jearim aṭangin Davida chuan a lo la chho tawh a; Jerusalem-ah a dahna tûr puan in a lo zâr sa tawh rêng a.
Tin, Hura fa Uria fapa Bezalela siam dâr maichâm kha Lalpa biakna bûk bulah chuan a awm bawk a; tin, Solomona leh mipuihote chuan an va pan a.
Solomona chu inbiakna puan in bula dâr maichâm awmna Lalpa hmaah chuan a han chho va, hâlral thilhlan sângkhat a han hlân a.
Chumi zân chuan Solomona hnênah Pathian a inlâr a, a hnênah, “Eng nge ka pêk ang che, mi dîl rawh,” a ti a.
Tin, Solomona chuan Pathian hnênah, “Ka pa Davida hnênah khân khawngaihna nasa tak i lantîr a, a aiawhin lalah mi lo siam ta a.
Tichuan, aw Lalpa Pathian, ka pa Davida hnêna i thutiam kha tipuitling ang che; nangin vaivut zât zet mipuite lalah mi lo siam ta a.
Tichuan, hêng mipuiho hmaa lût leh chhuaka ka awm theih nân finna leh hriatna mi han pe ang che; i mi heti zozai hi tuin nge rorêlsak thei ang le?” a ti a.

Tin, Pathianin Solomona hnênah, “Hetiang rilru i puta, sum leh pai te, hausakna te, chawimawina te, nangmah hawtu che nunna te dîl lova, dam reina te pawh dîl lova, an chunga lala ka siamna che ka mite ro i rêlsak theihna tûra finna leh hriatnate mi dîl zâwk avângin,
finna leh hriatna chu pêk i ni tawh e; tin, i hmaa lalte pawhin an la neih ngai loh, i hnu pawha an neih hauh loh tûr sum leh pai te, hausakna te, chawimawinate ka pe bawk ang che,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Solomona chu hmun sâng bula biak bûk awmna Gibeon khuaa a zin chu Jerusalem-ah a haw a, Israel-te chungah ro a rêl ta a.

Tin, Solomona chuan tawlailîrte leh sakawr chung chuang mite a khâwm chiam a; tawlailîr sângkhat leh zali leh sakawr chung chuang mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih a nei a, chûng chu tawlailîr dahna khuaah te, Jerusalem khuaa lal awmnaah te chuan a dah a.
Tin, lal chuan Jerusalem khuaah chuan rangkachak leh tangkaruate chu lung ang maia ngaih khawpin a dah ṭeuh va, sidar thingte chu phaia theipui thing ang leka ngaih khawpin a dah bawk a.
Tin, Solomona neih sakawrte chu Aigupta ram ata rawn tawlh chhuah a ni a; lal sumdâwngtute chuan chûng chu a rual rualin an lo khâr ṭhîn a, a ruala lei zêl a ni.

Aigupta rama mi tawlailîrte chu tangkarua sekel zaruk zêlin an tithleng ṭhîn a; tin, sakawrte chu tangkarua sekel za leh sawmnga zêlin; chutiang bawk chuan Hit-ho lal zawng zawng leh Suria lalte pawh an tihthlensak ṭhîn a ni.
Tin, Solomona chuan Lalpa hming tân in sak a tum a, lal in tûr nên.
Solomona chuan thil phur mi sîngsarih leh, tlânga thing kittu sîngriat leh anmahni vêngtu sângthum leh zaruk a ruat a.
Tin, Solomona chuan Tura lal Hurama hnênah, “Ka pa Davida thil i lo tihsaka, a awmna tûr in sak nân sidar te i lo thawh ang khân mi tihsak ve ta che.

Lalpa ka Pathian tân in sak ka tum ta a. Chu in chu rimtui hâla Lalpa biakna hmun, Israel-te hnêna tih tûr thupêk ding reng - chhangdah hlan te, Chawlhni leh thla thar leh Lalpa kan Pathian hminga kût nitea zîngah leh tlaia hâlral thilhlan hlan rengna tûr a ni ang. Hêngte hi Israel-te tâna kumkhaw thuruat chu a ni e.
Tin, ka in sak tum hi ropui tak tûr a ni a, kan Pathian hi pathian zawng zawng aia ropui a ni si a.
Vân zau tak pawha leng lo Pathian chu tu mân in an saksak thei lo vang a. Kei tehlul hian rimtui hâla amah biak nân chauh lo chuan engtin nge in ka saksak theih ang le?

Chutichuan, Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a mi themthiamte ka pa Davidan a lo rawih ṭhin, tûna ka hnêna awmte zînga thawk ve tûr hian mi pakhat, rangkachak te, tangkarua te, dâr te, thîr lam te khawih thei, puan sen duk te, sen lâr te, dumpâwl te siam thiam, ziak eng ang pawh thiam mî, rawn tîr ang che.

Lebanon-a mi sidar thing te, fâr thing te, algum thing te pawh mi han thawn ang che; i miten Lebanon-a thing kih an thiam hle tih ka hre si a; tichuan, ngai teh, thing tam tak mi buatsaihsak tûrin ka mite chu i mite zîngah tel ve rawh se; ka in sak tum hi in ropui tak tûr a ni si a.
Tin, ngai teh, i mi, thing kittute chu chhangphut tehkhâwng sînghnih leh barli tehkhâwng sînghnih leh uain bath sînghnih leh hriak bath sînghnih ka pe ang e,” tiin mi a tîr a.
Tichuan, Tura lal Hurama chuan, “ Lalpan a mite a hmangaih avângin an lalah a siam che a nih hi,” tiin, Solomona chu lehkhain a chhâng a.
Hurama chuan, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, lei leh vân siamtu, Lalpa in leh lal in sa tûra finna leh hriatna nei fapa fing tak Lal Davida petu chu fakin awm rawh se.

Mi themthiam, finna leh hriatna nei, Dana thlaha mi hmeichhe pakhat fa, a hming Hurama ka rawn tîr e; a pa chu Tura khuaa mi, rangkachak lam te, tangkaraw lam te, dâr lam te, thîr lam te, lung lam te, thing lam te, puan sen duk te, dumpâwl te, puan zai sîn te, sen lâr te deh thiam, ziak eng ang pawh thiam, thiam tinrêng thiam a ni a; i mi themthiamho leh ka pu i pa Davida themthiamho zîngah chuan a rawn thawk ve ang.
Chutichuan, buh te, barli te, hriak te, uain thûte ka lalpan a sawi chu chhiahhlawhte chu rawn thawn ang hmiang;
tichuan, keinin Lebanon-a thing chu i duh zât zât kan lo kit ang a, tuifinriatah Jopa thlengin kan rawn tawlhsak ang chia; tin, nangin Jerusalem-ah i thiar chho dâwn nia,” a ti a.
Tin, Solomona chuan Israel rama a pa Davidan a lo chhiar tawh sa, hnam dang mi zawng zawng chu a chhiar a, nuai khat leh sîngnga leh sângthum leh zaruk an ni a.
Tin, thil phur mi sîngsarih leh tlânga thing kittu sîngriat leh, mipuite thawh dân rêlbâwlsaktu tûr sângthum leh zaruk a ruat a.
Chutichuan, Solomona chuan Jerusalem-ah, Moria tlâng, a pa Davida hnêna Lalpa inlârna, Jebus mi Ornana hruih zâwl, Davidan hmun a lo buatsaih saah chuan Lalpa in chu a sa ṭan ta a.
A lal kum li kum, thla hnihna, ni hnih niin a sa ṭan a.
Pathian in sak dân tûr Solomonan a han rêl dân chu hetiang hi a ni: a dung lam chu tawng teh dân hluiin tawng sawmruk a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni.
A hma lama hulhliap dung lam chu in vâng lam chen bawk, tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a sân lam chu za leh sawmhnih a ni a; a chhûng chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin a luan a.
Tin, pindan lian zâwk bangah chuan fâr thing a bel a, chu chu rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin a luan a, chutah chuan tûm thing leh khaidiat lem a chuantîr a.
Tin, a timawi tûrin in chu lunghlutein a chei a; rangkachak chu Parvaim rangkachak a ni.
In chu, a kalkhang te, a bang te, a chhuat te, a kawngkhâr te chu rangkachakin a luan a; bangahte chuan cherub lemte a chuantîr a.
Tin, hmun thianghlim ber a siam a; a dung lam chu in vâng lam chen bawk, tawng sawmhnih a ni a, a vâng lam chu tawng sawmhnih a ni a; rangkachak hlîr hlak tîin a luan a, talent zaruk a tling a.
Tin, a kilhna rih lam chu rangkachak sekel sawmnga a ni. Tin, pindan chungnungte chu rangkachakin a luan a.
Tin, hmun thianghlim berah chuan cherub lem pahnih a siam a; chûng chu rangkachakin a luan a.
Tin, cherub thlate chuan tawng sawmhnih a awh a; cherub pakhat thla chu tawng nga a ni a, bang a va thleng a; tin, a thla lehlam pawh chu tawng nga bawk a ni a, cherub pakhat thla chu a va thleng a.
Tin, cherub pakhat thla pawh chu tawng nga a ni a, bang chu a va thleng a; tin, a thla lehlam chu tawng nga bawk a ni a; cherub pakhat thla chu a va thleng a.
Chûng cherub-te chuan tawng sawmhnih awhin an thla an zâr a, an ding a, in chhûng lam hawiin an ding a.
Tin, puanzâr tûr a dumpâwl te, a sen duk te, a sen lâr te, la zai sîn taktein a siam a, chutah chuan cherub lemte a chuantîr a.
Tin, a hma lamah chuan tawng sawmthum leh tawng ngaa sâng ban pahnih a phun a, chumi chhîp chu tawng nga ve ve a ni.
Chumi hmunah chuan khaidiat a siam a, ban chhîpte chu a zem a; tin, pawmgranet za a siam a, khaidiatah chuan a khai a.
Tin, biak in hma lamah chuan bante chu a phun a, pakhat ding lamah, pakhat vei lamah; tin, ding lama mi chu Jakin a ti a, vei lama mi chu Boaz a ti a.
Tin, dâr maichâm, a dung lam tawng sawmhnih, a vâng lam tawng sawmhnih, a sân lam tawng sâwm a siam bawk a.
Dâr zêm bial lian pui, a tlâng leh a tlâng inkâra tawng sâwm tla, a sân lam tawng nga a chhûng bawk a; a tlâng chu tawng sawmthum bial vêl a ni.
A tlâng hnuai chu kuhmûm lemte hian a vêl chhuak a, tawng khatah sâwm zêl, dâr zêm vêl chuan a awm a. Kuhmûm lem chu tlar hnih a ni a, dâr zêma chhûn belhbawm a ni.

Chu chu bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih chungah a innghat a, pathumin hmâr lam an hawi a, pathumin thlang lam an hawi a, pathumin chhim lam an hawi a, pathumin chhak lam an hawi a; hnung lam an inchhawn ṭheuh va,
tuizêm chu kutphah bawka chhah a ni a, ṭin sângkhat leh zahnih dawng a ni, a tlâng chu no tlâng ang, lili pâr anga siam a ni.
Insilna tûr maihûn sâwm a siam bawk a, ding lampangah panga a hûng a, vei lampangah panga a hûng a; chûng chu hâlral thilhlan silna tûr a ni a; dâr zêm erawh chu puithiamte insilna tûr a ni.
Tin, a siam dân tûra ruat angin rangkachak khâwnvâr dahna sâwm chu a siam a, biak in chhûngah chuan ding lamah panga, vei lamah panga a dah a.
Dawhkân sâwm a siam bawk a, biak in chhûngah chuan ding lamah panga, vei lamah panga a dah a. Tin, rangkachak maihûn za a siam a.
Chûng lo pawh chu kawtzâwl, puithiamho ta leh a pâwn zâwkah kawtzâwl zau a siam a, kawngkhârpui a siam bawk a, dârin a luan a.
Tin, zêm chu in ding lampangah chhak lamah chhim chhawngin a hûng a.
Tin, Hurama chuan bêl te, vutlawh te, maihûnte a siam a. Chutichuan, Pathian in atâna Lal Solomona a siamsak chu Hurama chuan a peih ta a;
ban pahnih te, bêl anga bâwk te, ban chhîpa bêl anga bâwk pahnih te, ban chhîpa bêl anga bâwk pahnih tuamna ṭial chik chek pahnih te,
chumi tuamna ṭial chik chek pahnih atâna pawmgranet zali te, ban chhîpa bêl anga bâwk pahnih tuamna tûr ṭial chik chek ve ve atâna pawmgranet tlar hnih te.
Hûnchhan te, hûnchhan chunga bêlte pawh a siam a;
zêm pakhat leh a hnuaia sebâwngpa sâwm leh pahnihte nên.
Bêl te, vut lawhna te, sa thurna te leh a bungbêl zawng zawngte pawh chu Hurama chuan Lalpa in atân dâr nawh tlêta Lal Solomona a siamsak a ni.
Chûngte chu Jordan phaizâwlah Sukkoth leh Zereda bellei hmunah lal chuan a chhûng a.
Chutiang chuan Solomonan bungbêl tam tak a siam a; dâr chu bûk sên rual a ni lo.
Tin, Solomona chuan Pathian ina bungbêl awm zawng zawng chu a siam a, rangkachak maichâm te, chhang chhiahna dawhkân te,
ruat anga hmun thianghlim hmaa chhit tûr khâwnvâr dahna te, a khâwnvâr chawpin, rangkachak hlîr hlakin a siam a;
tin, pangpâr te, khâwnvâr te leh chaichehte chu rangkachak, rangkachak hlîr hlakin a siam a;

tin, khâwnvâr puan chehna te, maihûn te, fian te, mei lâknate chu rangkachak hlîr hlak bawkin; tin, in chhûng luhna, in chhûngril zâwk hmun thianghlim ber kawngkhârte leh a in, biak in kawngkhârte chu rangkachakin a siam a.

Tichuan, Solomona chuan Lalpa in atâna a sak chu a peih ta vek a; tin, Solomona chuan a pa Davidan thil a lo hlan tawh zawng zawng chu a la lût a; tangkarua te, rangkachak te, hmanrua zawng zawngte chu Pathian ina ro dahnaah a dah ta a.

Chutichuan, Solomona chuan Israel upaho te, an hnam puipa, Israela thlahho chhûngkaw puipa zawng zawng chu, Davida khawpui Zion ata Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm zâwn chho tûrin Jerusalem khuaah a khâwm chiam a.
Chutichuan, Israel mi zawng zawng chu thla sarihnaah kûtah chuan lal hnênah an kal khâwm chiam a.
Tin, Israel upaho zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, Levi-hote chuan bâwm chu an zâwn a.
Tin, Lalpa bâwm leh, inbiakna puan in leh puan ina bungbêl thianghlim zawng zawng chu an zâwn chho va; chûngte chu puithiam Levi-hote chuan an zâwn chho va.
Tin, Lal Solomona leh Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng a hnêna rawn inkhâwmte chu bâwm hmaah an awm ho va, berâm leh bâwngpa sawi sên rual loh leh chhiar sên rual lohvin an inthawi a.
Tichuan, puithiamte chuan Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm chu a awmna tûrah an la lût a, in chhûnga biakna hmun, hmun thianghlim berah, cherub-te thla hnuaiah chuan.
Cherub-te chuan bâwm awmna chung zâwnah chuan an thla an zâr reng a, cherub-te chuan bâwm leh a zâwnfungte chu an khuh vek a.

Tin, a zâwnfungte chu a sei khawp a, a zâwnfung hmâwrte chu biakna hmunhma, hmun thianghlim aṭang chuan a hmuh theih a; amaherawhchu, pâwn lamah zawng a lang lo; tûn thleng hian chutah chuan a la awm reng a ni.
Aigupta ram ata an chhuaha, Lalpan Israela thlahte hnêna thu a thlun laia Mosian Horeb tlânga lungphêk pahnih a dah chauh lo kha chu, chumi bâwm chhûngah chuan eng mah dang a awm lo.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, puithiamhote chu hmun thianghlim ata an lo chhuah veleh chuan (puithiam awmho zawng zawng chu an intithianghlim a, a pâwlin an insiam chuang lo va;

Levi-ho hla satu zawng zawngte pawh an zavaiin, Asapha te, Hemana te, Jeduthuna te, an fapate leh an unaute nên, puan zai sîna inthuamin dârbenthek te, perhkhuang te, ṭingṭangte nên, maichâm chhak lampangah an ding a, an zîngah chuan puithiam za leh sawmhnih tawtawrâwt hâmin an awm bawk a ni),

heti hi a ni a, tawtawrâwt hâmtute leh hla satuten Lalpa fakna leh lâwmthu sawi nâna an tum rîk chu ri khat ang maiin a hriat a; tawtawrâwt leh dârbenthek leh thil tum rîk nêna an aw an han chhuaha, “Ani chu a ṭha si a, a ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn a ni,” tia Lalpa an han fak chuanin, Lalpa in chu chhûmin a khat ta mup mup mai a;
tichuan, chhûm avâng chuan puithiamte chuan rawng pawh an bâwl thei ta lo hial a; Lalpa ropuinain Pathian in chu a khat ta vek si a.
Chutichuan, Solomonan thu a sawi a: “ Lalpan, ‘Thim chhah mupah chuan ka awm ang,’ a ti tak a;
nimahsela, i chênna tûr in, kumkhuaa i awmna tûr chu ka lo saksak ta che a nih hi,” tiin.
Tin, lal chu a lehhawi a, Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng chu mal a sâwm a; Israel-ho pung khâwm zawng zawng chu an ding ṭhup a.
Tin, ani chuan, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, ka pa Davida hnêna ama kâ ngeia,

‘Aigupta ram ata ka mi Israel-te ka hruai chhuah ni aṭangin Israel-ho hnam zînga khawii khua mah hi, ka hming awmna tûr in sak nân ka la thlang ngai lo va; ka mi Israel-te chunga hotu tûr mi tu mah ka la thlang ngai hek lo.
Amaherawhchu, ka hming awmna tûrin Jerusalem hi ka lo thlang ta a, ka mi Israel-te hotu atân Davida hi ka lo thlang ta a ni,’ tia lo sawitu, ama kut ngeia rawn puitlintu hi fakin awm rawh se.
Ka pa Davida khân Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hming tân in sak a rilrûk ṭhîn a.
Nimahsela, Lalpan ka pa Davida hnênah, ‘Ka hming tân in sak i rilrûk ṭhîn a, hetiang rilru i lo pu hi i tiṭha e;
nimahsela, nang zawngin in chu i sa lo vang a; i fapa, i ṭhâlbea la chhuak tûra chuan ka hming tân in chu a la sa zâwk ang,’ a lo ti tawh a.

Tin, Lalpan a thusawi chu a rawn hlen ta a; Lalpa lo tiam tawh ang ngeiin ka pa Davida hmun chu ka lo luah a, Israel lalṭhutthlêngah chuan ka lo ṭhu a, Israel-te Pathian, Lalpa hming tân in chu ka lo sa ta a ni.
Chutah chuan Israela thlahte hnêna a lo thlun, Lalpa thuthlunna bâwm chu ka dah ta a ni,” a ti a.
Tin, Lalpa maichâm bulah Israel pung khâwm zawng zawng hmuhah chuan a ding a, a bân a phar a

(Solomona chu dâr dawhkân a sei lam tawng nga, a zau lam tawng nga, a sân lam tawng thuma siam biak in kawtlai taka a hûnah chuan a chuang a, Israel pung khâwmho zawng zawng hmaah chuan a ṭhingṭhi a, vân lam hawiin a bân a phar a),
Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, lei leh vânah nangmah ang rêng Pathian an awm lo, an thinlung zawng zawnga i kawng zawhtu i chhiahhlawhte chungah chuan thuthlung hlenin i khawngaih ṭhîn a;
i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnêna i thutiam chu i hlen a; a ni, vawiinah hian i kâa i lo sawi tawh chu i kutin i hlawhtlintîr ta a.

Chutichuan, aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, i chhiahhlawh ka pa Davida hnêna, ‘I thlahte chu i awm anga awm ve tûra an awm dâna an fîmkhur phawt chuan, ka mit hmuha Israel-te lalṭhutthlênga ṭhu tûr chu i hmai lo vang,’ tia i lo tiam tâk kha hlen ang che.
Chutichuan, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, i chhiahhlawh Davida hnêna i thu lo sawi chu hlawhtlintîr ngei ang che.
Amaherawhchu, nang Pathian chu lei mihringte zîngah i chêng tak meuh dâwn em ni le? Ngai teh, vân zau takah pawh i leng lo a ni a, he ka in sakah hian i va leng lo nasa lehzual âwm êm!
Nimahsela, aw Lalpa ka Pathian, i chhiahhlawhin a auhna che leh a ṭawngṭaina hi ngaihthlâksakin, i chhiahhlawh ṭawngṭaina leh dîlna hi rawn ngaihsak ang che:
hemi hmun lam hawia i chhiahhlawh a ṭawngṭaina chu ngaithlaa, ‘Chutah chuan ka hming chu a awm ang,’ i tihna hmun ngei in lamah hian chhûn leh zâna i mit i lên reng ṭhin theihna tûrin.

Tin, i chhiahhlawh leh i mi Israel-te hian hemi hmun lam hawia an ṭawngṭai hunin, an dîlnate lo ngaihthlâksak ṭhîn ang che; a ni, i chênna hmun vânan lo ngaithla la; tin, lo ngaithlain ngaidam ang che.
Mi tu pawhin a vêngte chungah thil tisualin, chhechhamtîr hial lo ṭûl sela, hemi ina i maichâm hmaah hian rawn chham sela,
nangin vân aṭangin lo ngaithla la, che la, mi sual chu a sual mana thiam loh chantîrin, mi fel chu a fel mana thiam chantîrin i chhiahhlawhte rorêlsak ang che.
I mi Israel-te hian i chunga thil an tihsual avânga hmêlmate laka an lo tlâwma, i lam an lo hawi leha, i hming an ṭana, hemi ina ṭawngṭaia thil an rawn dîl che chuan,
nangin vân aṭangin lo ngaihthlâksak la, i mi Israel-te sualna chu ngaidam la, anmahni leh an pi leh pute i pêk ramah chuan hruai leh ang che.
I chunga thil an tihsual avânga vân a lo pina, ruah te a lo sûr lohva, hemi hmun lam hawia an ṭawngṭaia, i hming an ṭana, anmahni i tihhrehawm avânga an sualte an sim chuan,
nangin vânan lo ngaithla la, an kalna tûr kawng ṭha kawhhmuhin i chhiahhlawhte leh i mi Israel-te sualna hi ngaidamin, i mite an rochan atân i pêk i ramah hian ruah han sûrtîr ang che.

Kan ramah hian ṭâm te a lo tlâka, hri te a lo lêna, rona emaw, ṭawihna emaw, khaukhuap emaw, pangang emaw a lo awma, an hmêlmaten an khuate an rawn huala, hri eng pawh, natna eng pawh a lo thlen chuan,
an hri vei emaw, an lungngaihna emaw hria apiangin, he in lam hawia bân phara, i mi Israel-te zînga tu pawhin ṭawngṭaina leh dîlna an rawn thlen chu,
i awmna vânan lo ngaithla la, ngaidam la, mi tin an awm dân ang ṭheuh zêlin hlawhtlintîr ang che, an thinlung i hre ṭheuh si a (Nangmah chauh hi mihring fate thinlung hretu i ni si a);
kan pi leh pute i pêk rama an awm chhûng zawnga i kawng zawh theihna tûra an ṭihna tûr chein.
Tin, i mi Israel-te ni lo, hnam dang mi, i hming ropui tak leh i kut chak tak leh i bân phar avânga ram hla tak ata lo kala, hemi in lam hawia an rawn ṭawngṭai hunin,

nangin i awmna vânan lo ngaithla la, hnam dangte pawh an koh dân che ang zêlin an chungah ti ang che; tichuan, i mi Israel-te ang bawkin khawvêla hnam tinin i hming an hria ang a, an ṭih ang chia, he in ka sak hian i hming a pu tih an hre dâwn nia.
I miten an hmêlmate chu i tirhna lam apianga an beihin, i khawpui thlan leh i hming tâna in ka lo sak lam hawia i hnêna an ṭawngṭai chuan,
nangin an ṭawngṭaina leh an dîlna chu vânan lo ngaithla la, an thûah chuan pui zêl ang che.
I chunga an lo suala (tu mah sual lo an awm si lo), an chunga i thinura, hmêlma kuta i pêka, ram hla takah emaw, hnai deuhvah emaw sala an hruai emaw pawha,
sala an hruaina rama an inngaihtuah chhuaha, an inchhîra, ‘Kan lo sual ta a, dik lo tak leh suahsualthlâk takin thil kan lo ti ta a ni,’ tia,

an tânna rama dîlna an rawn thlena, sala hruaituten an hruaia an tânna rama an thinlung tak leh an rilru tak taka i lam an lo hawia, an pi leh pute ram lam leh i khawpui thlan leh i hming tâna ka in sak lam hawia i hnêna an ṭawngṭai chuan,
an ṭawngṭaina leh an dîlna chu nangin i awmna vânan lo ngaithla la, an thûah chuan pui zêl la, i chunga lo sual ta i mite chu ngaidam ang che.
Aw ka Pathian, khawngaih takin i mit lo meng la, he hmuna ṭawngṭainaah hian i beng lo chhi ang che.
Aw Lalpa Pathian, i awmna hmunah chuan chho rawh, nang leh i chakna bâwm nên; aw Lalpa Pathian, i puithiamte chu chhandamnain thuam la, i mi thianghlimte chu ṭhatnain tihlim rawh.
Aw Lalpa Pathian, i hriak thiha hmêl chu hawi kîrtîr suh la, i chhiahhlawh Davida thil ṭha tihte chu hre reng ang che,” a ti a.
Tin, Solomona a han ṭawngṭai zawh chuan vân aṭangin mei a lo chhuk a, hâlral thilhlan leh inthawinate chu a rawn kâng ral ta a; tin, Lalpa ropuinain in chu a lo khat ta a.
Lalpa ropuinain Lalpa in chu a tihkhah avângin Lalpa inah chuan puithiamte chu an lût thei ta lo va.

Tin, Israela thlahte zawng zawng chuan vân aṭanga mei lo chhuk leh in chunga Lalpa ropuina chu an en reng a, lungrem chungah chuan hmaia lei siin an bawkkhup a, “Ani chu a ṭha si a, a ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn a ni,” tiin chibai an bûk a, lâwmthu an sawi a.
Tichuan, lal leh mipuite chuan Lalpa hmaah inthawinate an hlân a.
Lal Solomona chuan inthawina bâwngpa sînghnih leh sânghnih leh, berâm nuai khat leh sînghnih a hlân a. Chutiang chuan lal leh mipuite chuan Pathian in chu an hlân a.

Tin, puithiamte chu an hmun ṭheuhvah an ding a; tin, Levi-hote pawh chu Lalpa hnêna lâwmthu sawi nâna phuah, “A ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn a ni,” tia Lalpa fak nâna Davidan a hman ṭhin, thil ri thei nêna Lalpa hla sain an ding bawk a; tin, puithiamte chuan tawtawrâwt an hâm a, Israel mi zawng zawng chu an ding ṭhup a.

Tin, Solomona chuan Lalpa in hma zâwna hung chhûng kawtlai tak chu a tithianghlim bawk a; chutah chuan hâlral thilhlan te, remna thilhlan thaute a hlân a; Solomona dâr maichâm siam chu hâlral thilhlan te, chhangphut thilhlan te, thau te hlan nân a têt luattuk avângin.
Chutichuan, chumi ṭum chuan Solomona leh Israel mi zawng zawng, mipui pung khâwm nasa tak chu Hamath khaw luhna aṭanga Aigupta ram lui thlenga mite nên ni sarih an kût a.
Tin, ni riat ni chuan inkhâwmna ropui tak an nei a; maichâm lawmna atân ni sarih an awh a; kût ni atân ni sarih an awh a ni.

Tin, thla sarihna, ni sawmhnih leh ni thum ni chuan mipuite chu a ṭîntîr a, Lalpan Davida leh Solomona leh a mi Israel-te chunga a ṭhatna a lantîr avâng chuan, hlim tak leh lâwm takin mite chu an in lamah an haw ta a.
Chutiang chuan Solomona chuan Lalpa in leh lal in chu a puitlin ta a; Solomona chuan a rilrua a tum ang takin Lalpa in leh ama in chu tluang takin a puitlin ta a.
Tin, zânah Solomona hnênah Lalpa a rawn inlâr a, a hnênah, “I ṭawngṭaina chu ka lo hria a, he hmun hi ka tâna inthawina inah ka ruat tawh e.
Vân te ka khara, ruah te a sûr loh emaw, khaukhuapte ka tirha, ram te a tihchhiat emaw, ka mite zînga hri ka lêntîr emaw pawhin,
ka hming pu ka mite chuan inngaitlâwma an ṭawngṭaia, mi zawna, an awm dân sualte an hawisan chuan, vân aṭangin ka lo ngaithla ang a, an sualte ka ngaidam ang a, an ram chu ka tidam leh ang.
He hmuna ṭawngṭainaah hian ka mit ka lên ang a, ka beng ka chhi ang.
Chutah chuan ka hming kumkhuaa a awm theih nân he in hi ka ruat a, ka tithianghlim tawh a ni; chutah chuan ka mit leh ka thinlung a awm kumkhua tawh ang.
Tin, nanga chungchâng thûah pawh, i pa Davida anga ka mit hmuha i awma, thu ka pêk ang zêl chea i awma, ka thuruatte leh ka rorêlte i pawm chuan,
‘Israel-te zîngah rorêltu i hmai lo vang,’ tia i pa Davida hnêna thu ka thlun ang khân, i ram lalṭhutthlêng ka tinghet ang.
Amaherawhchu, in hmaa ka zam, ka dânte leh ka thupêkte in hawisana, pathian dangte rawng in bâwla, in biak chuan,

anmahni ka pêk ram ata hi ka tiboral hlauh ang a; tin, he in, ka hming tâna ka tihthianghlim tawh sa hi ka mit hmuh phâk lohvah ka sawn bo daih ang a, hnam tin zînga tihelna leh a chhe lama tehkhinnaah ka siam ang.
“Tin, he in sâng tak hi a kianga kal apiangin mak an ti ang a, ‘Engati nge he ram leh he in hi Lalpan hetianga a tih?’ an ti ang.

Tin, ‘ Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu chu an hawisana, pathian dangte an vawna, an biaka, an rawng te an bâwl tâk avângin hêng chhiatna zawng zawng hi an chungah a thlentîr a nih hi,’ an la ti ang,” a ti a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Solomonan Lalpa in leh ama in a sak chhûng kum sawmhnih a lo vei chuan,
Huraman Solomona khua a pêkte chu Solomona chuan a din a, Israela thlahte a awmtîr a.
Tin, Solomona chuan Hamath-zoba a bei a, a hneh a.
Tin, thlalêrah Tadmor a din a, Hamath-a bungraw dahna khuate nên.
Tin, Beth-horon chhakta zâwk leh thlangta zâwk pawh, kulhte, kawngkhârte, a kalhnate neiin a din bawk a;

tin, Baalath khua te, a bungraw dahna khua zawng zawng te, a tawlailîr dahna khua te, a sakawr chung chuang mite awmna khua te, Jerusalem leh Lebanon leh a ram chhûng zawng zawngah Solomona chuan a duh ang angin a din a.

Tin, Israela thlahte ni ve lo, Hit-ho te, Amor-ho te, Periz-ho te, Hiv-ho te, Jebus-hote thlah, Israela thlahten an tihboral loh, chu rama la awmte chu Solomonan chhiahhlawh hnathawka rawih luih pâwlah a siam a, tûn thleng hian.
Israela thlahte erawh chu Solomonan a hnathawktu chhiahhlawh atân a siam ve lo va, indo mi te, a sipai hotu te, puipa te, a tawlailîr leh a sakawr chung chuang mi hotute an ni zâwk a.
Chûngte chu mipuite ho ṭhîntu, Solomona puipa berte an ni a, zahnih leh sawmnga an ni.

Tin, Solomona chuan Pharaoa fanu chu Davida khawpui ata a puala in a saksakah chuan a hruai chho va, “Ka nupui chu Israel lal Davida inah chuan a awm tûr a ni lo, Lalpa bâwm lo thlenna hmun thianghlim a ni,” a ti a ni.
Chutichuan, Solomona chuan hulhliap hma lama a siam Lalpa maichâmah chuan Mosia thupêk angin,
ni tin atâna bituk tâwk ang zêlin Chawlhniah te, thla thar nîah te, kût bi nei, kum khatah vawi thum Chhang dawidim telh loh kûtah te, Chawlhkâr kûtah te, Bâwkte kûtah te hâlral thilhlante a hlân a.

Tin, a pa Davida lo ruat ang khân, puithiam pâwl te leh Levi-hote chu an chanpual ṭheuhva ni tina thawh ṭûl ang zêla fak tûr te, puithiamte hmaa rawngbâwl tûr tein a ruat a; tin, kawngkhâr tinah a pâwl pâwla vêngtute a ruat bawk a; chutiang chuan Pathian mi Davida chuan a lo ruat a ni.
Lalin puithiamhote, Levi-hote thu a pêk chu eng kawngah mah, sum thûah te pawh an ngaihthah ngai hauh lo.
Tin, Lalpa in an din ṭan tirh aṭanga an peih thlengin Solomona lo buatsaih ang chiah a ni. Tichuan, Lalpa in chu puitlin a ni ta a.
Chutichuan, Solomona chu Edom rama tuifinriat kama Ezion-geber-ah leh Eloth-ah a kal a.

Tin, Hurama chuan a chhiahhlawh tuifinriata che ṭhang mite chu, lawngte nên a kaltîr a; Solomona chhiahhlawhte nên Ophir-ah an kal a, chuta mi chu rangkachak talent zali leh sawmnga an rawn hâwn a, Lal Solomona hnênah an rawn thlen a.

Tin, Solomona hmingthanzia Seba lalnuin a lo hriat chuan Solomona chu thu khirh tak taka fiah tumin hnung zuitu tam tak hruaiin, sanghâwngseitea englo rimtuite leh rangkachak tam tak leh lunghlute phurin, Jerusalem-ah a han kal a; tin, Solomona hnên a han thlen chuan, a rilrua awm zawng zawng chu phawrh fai vekin a bia a.
Tin, Solomona chuan a thu zawh zawng zawng chu a chhâng vek a; Solomona chuan a chhân theih loh rêng rêng a awm lo va.

Tin, Solomona finzia te, a in sak te, a dawhkâna ei tûr te, a puipateho ṭhut dân te, a rawngbâwltuteho rawngbâwl dân te, an inchei dân te, a no hlântute leh an inchei dân te, Lalpa ina a han chhohna te Seba lalnuin a han hmuh chuan rilru ahleih a nei ta lo va.
Lal hnênah chuan, “I thiltihte leh i finzia thuthang ka rama ka lo hriat chu a dik ngei a lo nih hi le;

nimahsela, keima mit ngeia ka rawn hmuh hma loh chuan an sawi mai chu ka âwih ṭhîn lo va, ngai teh, i finna ropuizia zâtve pawh mi lo hrilh hlei nêm le; i hmingthan ka lo hriat dân chu i khûm daih mai a.
I mite chu an va nihlawhin, hêng i chhiahhlawh i bula awm fova, i finna thu ngaithla fo ṭhînte hi an va nihlawh êm!

Lalpa i Pathian, i chunga lâwm, a lal atâna a lalṭhutthlênga ṭhuttîrtu che Lalpa i Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se; i Pathianin Israel-ho hi kumkhuaa tihngheh atân a hmangaih a; chuvângin, fel taka rorêl tûrin an lalah a siam che a nih hi,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, lal chu rangkachak talent za leh sawmhnih leh englo rimtui tam tak mai leh lunghlute a pe a, Seba lalnuin Lal Solomona englo rimtui a pêk ang rêng rêng hi a awm lo.
Tin, Solomona chhiahhlawhte leh Hurama chhiahhlawhte, Ophir aṭanga rangkachak va phurte pawh chuan algum thing leh lunghlute an rawn phur a.
Tin, lal chuan algum thing chu Lalpa in leh lal in hung nân leh hla satute tâna ṭingṭang leh perhkhuangah a siam a; chutiang chu Judai ramah tûn hma lam chuan an la hmu ngai lo.
Tin, Seba lalnu hnênah chuan a duh apiang, lal hnêna a rawn ken aia tam zâwk fe chu Lal Solomona chuan a pe bawk a. Chutichuan, a ram lamah a hote nên an haw leh ta a.

Mi inawmpawlhho leh sumdâwnghote rawn lâk luh tiam hauh lovin, Solomona hnêna kum khat chhûnga rangkachak lo lût rih lam chu rangkachak talent zaruk leh sawmruk leh paruk bûk a ni; tin, Arabia lal zawng zawng leh ram awptute chuan Solomona hnênah rangkachak te, tangkarua te an rawn la ṭhîn a.
Tin, Lal Solomona chuan rangkachak den phêkin phaw lian mi zahnih a siam a: phaw lian pakhatin rangkachak sekel zaruk a duh a.
Tin, rangkachak den phêkin phaw zathum a siam a; phaw pakhatin rangkachak sekel zathum a duh a; chûng chu Lebanon ngawpui inah chuan a dah a.
Tin, lal chuan saingho lalṭhutthlêng ropui tak a siam bawk a, rangkachak hlîr hlakin a luan a.

Lalṭhutthlêngah chuan a kai chhohna rahka paruk te, lalṭhutthlêng nêna zawm, rangkachak ke nghahchhan te, ṭhutthlêng sîr tuaka bân nghahna te, a bân nghahna bula ding sakeibaknei lem pahnih te a awm a.
Tin, rahka paruk sîr tuak chungah chuan sakeibaknei sâwm leh pahnih a ding a; chutiang chu khawii ramah mah an siam ngai lo.
Lal Solomona no zawng zawng chu rangkachak vek a ni a; tin, Lebanon ngawpui ina bungbêl zawng zawng pawh rangkachak hlîr hlak vek a ni a; Solomona dam lai chuan tangkarua chu engah mah an ngai lo.

Lal chuan lawng rual, Hurama chhiahhlawhte Tarsis-a kal ṭhîn kawppui a nei a, kum thum dan zêlah Tarsis lawng rual chuan rangkachak te, tangkarua te, saingho te, zâwng te, ârâwn te a rawn phur ṭhîn a.
Chutichuan, Lal Solomona chuan khawvêl lal zawng zawng chu hausakah leh finah a khûm vek a ni.
Tichuan, Pathianin a thinlunga a dah, a finna thu chu ngaithla tûrin khawvêl lal zawng zawng chuan Solomona chu an pan huai huai ṭhîn a.
Tin, kum tin pêk bi neiin tangkaraw bungbêl te, rangkachak bungbêl te, puan te, râlthuam te, englo rimtui te, sakawr te, sabengtungte an rawn pe ṭheuh ṭhîn a.

Tin, Solomona chuan sakawr leh tawlailîr dahna hmun sângli a nei a; tin, sakawr chung chuang mi sîngkhat leh sânghnih a nei a, chûngte chu tawlailîr dahna khuaah te, Jerusalem-a lal hnênahte a awmtîr a.
Tin, Lui aṭanga Philistia ram leh Aigupta ram thlenga lal zawng zawng chungah a lal a.
Tin, lal chuan Jerusalem khuaah chuan a tam êm avângin tangkaruate chu lung ang maia ngaih khawpin a awmtîr a, sidar thingte chu phaia theipui thing ang leka ngaih khawpin a awmtîr a.
Tin, Solomona tân sakawrte Aigupta aṭangte leh ram tin aṭangtein an rawn la ṭhîn a.

Solomona chanchin dangte chu a bul aṭanga a tâwp thlengin zâwlnei Nathana ziak chanchin buah te, Silo mi Ahija hrilh lâwkna buah te, Nebata fapa Jeroboama chungchâng thûa zâwlnei Idova inlârna buah te a chuang lo vem ni?
Tin, Solomona chu Jerusalem-ah Israel mi zawng zawng chungah kum sawmli a lal a.
Tin, Solomona chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, a pa Davida khuaah an phûm a, a aiah a fapa Rehoboama a lal ta a.
Tin, Rehoboama chu Sekem khuaah a kal a; Israel-ho zawng zawng chu Sekem khuaah lala siam tûrin an kal tawh si a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Nebata fapa Jeroboaman chumi thu chu a lo hriat chuan (Lal Solomona hnên ata tlân bova, Aigupta rama la awm a ni si a) Aigupta ram ata Jeroboama chu a lo haw leh a.
Mi an tîr a, an zu ko va; tichuan, Jeroboama leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chu an lo kal a, Rehoboama hnênah chuan,
“I pa khân kan nghâwngkawl a tirit êm ṭhîn a; chuvângin, i pain min chhawr rimna leh a nghâwngkawl rit tak kan chunga a nghah hi min tihzânsak la; tichuan, i rawng kan bâwl ang,” tiin an sawi a.
Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “Ni thum hnuah lo kal leh zâwk rawh u,” a ti a. Tichuan, mipuite chu an kal kiang ta rih a.
Tin, Lal Rehoboama chuan, “Heng mipuite chhânna tûr hian rem eng nge mi ruatpui dâwn le?” tiin, a pa Solomona dam laia a bula awm ṭhîn upahote chu a râwn a.
Tin, anni chuan a hnênah, “Hêng mipuite hi i khawngaiha, i tihlâwma, an hnêna thu ṭha tak takte i sawi chuan kumkhuain i mite an ni ang,” tiin an sawi a.
Nimahsela, upaho remruatpui chu a pawm lo va, ama rualpui tlangvâlho, a bula awm ṭhînte chu a râwn ta zâwk a.
An hnênah chuan, “Hêng mipuiho, ka hnêna, ‘I pan kan chunga nghâwngkawl a nghah hi min tihzânsak rawh,’ tia sawitute hi ka chhân dân tûr rem eng nge mi ruatpui le?” a ti a.

Tin, a rualpui tlangvâlhote chuan a hnênah, “Hêng mipuiho, ‘I pa khân kan nghâwngkawl a tirit êm ṭhîn a, nang chuan min tihzânsak rawh khai,’ i hnêna titute hnênah chuan hetiang hian ti la, hetiang hian an hnênah sawi ang che, ‘Ka pa kâwng ai chuan ka zungtê hi a lian zâwk a.

Ka pa khân nghâwngkawl rit tak a lo bahtîr che u a, kei chuan in nghâwngkawl chu ka belhchhah dâwn asin; ka pa’n vuaknain a hrîng ṭhîn che u a, kei erawh chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hrîng dâwn che u a ni,’ tiin,” an ti a.
Chutichuan, Jeroboama leh mipuiho zawng zawng chu lalin, “Ni thum chinah lo kal leh ang che u,” tia a hrilh ang khân a ni thum ni chuan Rehoboama hnênah chuan an va kal a.
Lal chuan chang takin a lo chhâng hlawm a, Lal Rehoboama chuan upahote remruatpui kha a pawm lo va,

tlangvâlhote remruatpui ang khân, “Ka pan in nghâwngkawl a lo tirit a, keiin chu chu ka belhchhah zâwk dâwn a ni; ka pan vuaknain a lo hrîng ṭhîn che u a, kei erawh chuan khawmualkaikuangin ka hrîng dâwn che u a ni,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, lal chuan mipuite thusawi kha a pawm ta lo va; chu chu Pathian vâng a ni, Lalpan Silo mi Ahija hmanga Nebata fapa Jeroboama hnêna a thu lo sawi tawh kha a tihngheh theih nân.

Tin, lalin an thu a pawm lo tih Israel-ho zawng zawngten an hriatin mipuite chuan, “Davida-ah chuan chanvo eng nge kan neih le? Jesaia fapaah chuan roluah tûr kan nei hek lo. Aw Israel mite u, in puan in lamah haw ṭheuh rawh u! Aw David, i chhûngkua ngaihtuah mai rawh,” tiin lal chu an chhâng a. Chutichuan, Israel-ho zawng zawng chu an puan in lamah an haw ta a.
Israela thlah, Judai ram khuaa awmte erawh chu an chungah Rehoboama a lal a.

Tichuan, Lal Rehoboama chuan hnathawka rawih luihte hotu Hadorama a tîr a; ani chu Israel-ho zawng zawng chuan lungin an lo dêng a, a thi ta a. Tin, Lal Rehoboama chu Jerusalem khuaa tlân tumin a tawlailîrah a chuang ta thuai a.
Chutichuan, Israel-hote chu Davida chhûngte chungah an lo hel ta a ni, tûn thleng hian.
Tin, Rehoboama chuan Jerusalem a han thlen chuan, Israel-hote dova, Rehoboama ram la leh tûrin Juda leh Benjamina chhûngte, mi huaisen ṭhiau thlan chhuah, nuai khat leh sîngriat zet a khâwm a.
Nimahsela, Pathian mi Semaia hnênah Lalpa thu a lo thleng a,
“Judai ram lal Solomona fapa Rehoboama hnênah leh Judai ram leh Benjamin rama Israel mi zawng zawng hnênah,

Lalpan heti hian a ti, ‘In han kal tûr a ni lo va, in unaute chu han do hek suh u! Mahni in lamah haw leh vek rawh u; hei hi keima tih a ni e,’ tiin sawi rawh,” tiin. Chutichuan, Lalpa thu chu an awih a, Jeroboama do tûra an kal tûr chu an kîr leh ta a.
Tin, Rehoboama chu Jerusalem khuaah a awm a, Judai ramah invên nân khuate a siam a:
Bethlehem khua te, Etam te, Tekoa te,
Beth-zur te, Soko te, Adulam te,
Gath te, Maresa te, Ziph te,
Adoraim te, Lakis te, Azeka te,
Zora te, Aijalon te, Hebron khua te; chûng chu Judai leh Benjamin rama kulh nei khuate a ni.
Tin, chûng kulhte chu a tinghet a, hotute a dah a, ei tûr te, hriak te, uain te a chhêk khâwm a.
Tin, khaw tinah chuan phaw te, fei te a dah a, khaw nghet takah a siam hlawm a. Tin, Judai leh Benjamin ram chu a ta a ni.
Tin, Israel ram zawng zawnga puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu an ram aṭang ṭheuhvin a hnênah an kal a.
Levi-hote chuan an ram leh an awmnate an chhuahsan a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem-ah an kal a; Jeroboama leh a fapaten Lalpa tâna puithiam hna thawk lo tûrin an bântîr si a,
a hmun sâng atân leh kêlpa leh bâwngno lem a siam atâna puithiamte a ruat tâk zâwk avângin.
Tin, Israel hnam, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian lama rilru thle zawng zawngte chuan an zui a, Lalpa an pi leh pute Pathian hnêna inthawi tûrin Jerusalem-ah an kal a.
Chutichuan, Judai ram chu an tinghet a; kum thum chhûng chu Solomona fapa Rehoboama chu an tinghet a; kum thum chhûng chu Davida leh Solomona kawng chu an zawh a ni.
Tin, Rehoboama chuan Davida fapa Jerimotha fanu Mahalathi nupuiah a nei a, chu chu Jesaia fapa Eliaba fanu Abihaili fanu a ni.
Fapate a hrinsak a: Jeusa te, Semaria te, Zahama te.
Ani hnuah chuan Absaloma fanu Maaki a nei a; ani chuan Abija te, Ataia te, Ziza te, Selomitha te a hrinsak a.

Tin, Rehoboama chuan Absaloma fanu Maaki chu a nupuite leh a hmeite zawng zawngah chuan a hmangaih bîk a (nupui sâwm leh pariat leh hmei sawmruk a nei a, fapa sawmhnih leh pariat leh fanu sawmruk a nei a ni).
Tin, Rehoboama chuan Maaki fapa Abija chu a unaute zînga chungnung berah a dah a; lala siam a rilrûk nghe nghe a ni a.
Fing takin rem a ruat a, a fapate zawng zawng chu Judai ram leh Benjamin ram zawng zawnga kulh nei khuaahte a awm darhtîr vek a; ei tûr tam tak a pe a, nupui tam tak a zawnsak hlawm a.
Tin, Rehoboama chu a lo lal ngheh tâk chinah chuan, a lama ṭang Israel-ho zawng zawng nên Lalpa dân chu an hawisan ta a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lal Rehoboama kum nga a lal kum chuan Lalpa chunga an sual avângin Aigupta lal Sisaka chuan tawlailîr sângkhat leh zahnih leh sakawr chung chuang mi sîngruk nên Jerusalem a han bei a. Aigupta rama mi a hnêna kalte chu chhiar sên rual an ni lo: Lub-ho te, Sukki-ho te, Ethiopia-ho te an ni a.
Judai rama kulh nei khuate a la a, Jerusalem a va thleng a.

Tin, zâwlnei Semaia chu Rehoboama leh Juda-ho puipa, Sisaka avânga Jerusalem-a pung khâwmho hnênah chuan a han kal a, an hnênah, “ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti, ‘Mi hawisan ta a; chuvângin, kei pawhin Sisaka kutah ka dah ta che u a ni,’ tiin,” a han ti a.
Chutichuan, Israel-ho puipate leh lal chu an intihnuai a, “ Lalpa chu a fel a ni,” an ti a.

Tin, Lalpan an intihhnuai chu a lo hriat chuan Lalpa thu Semaia hnênah a lo thleng a, “An intihnuai ta a; ka tiboral vek lo vang a, ṭhenkhat ka chhan him ang a, Sisaka hmangin Jerusalem chungah ka thinurna ka leih lo vang.
Amaherawhchu, a chhiahhlawhte an ni ang, ka rawngbâwl leh ram dang mi rawngbâwl dân an hriat nân,” tiin.
Chutichuan, Aigupta lal Sisaka chu Jerusalem beiin a han chho va, Lalpa ina rote leh lal ina rote a la a; a la zo vek a ni. Solomona siam rangkachak phawte pawh a la a.
Tin, Lal Rehoboama chuan chûng aiah chuan dâr phawte a siam a, lal in kawngkhâr vêngtu sipai hotute a kawltîr a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, lal chu Lalpa ina a luh apiangin vêngtute chuan an keng a; tin, vêngtute pindanah chuan an dah leh zêl ṭhîn a.
Tin, a han intihhnuai tâk avâng chuan a tihboral hlauh loh nân a chunga Lalpa thinurna chu a kiang ta a; tin, Judai ram chu a la ṭha reng bawk a.

Chutichuan, Lal Rehoboama chu Jerusalem-ah chuan a intinghet a, ro a rêl a: Rehoboama chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmli leh kum khat a ni a, Lalpan a hming awmtîrna tûra Israel hnam zawng zawng zînga a thlan khua Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum sarih a lal a; a nu hming chu Naami, Amon mi a ni.
Lalpa zawn nân a rilru a hman loh avângin thil ṭha lo a ti a.

Tichuan, Rehoboama chanchin chu a bul aṭanga a tâwp thlengin zâwlnei Semaia ziak chanchin buah leh zâwlnei Idova ziak chanchin bua thlahte chanchin zîngah ziak a ni lâwm ni? Rehoboama leh Jeroboama chu an indo reng mai a ni.
Tin, Rehoboama chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, Davida khuaah an phûm a. Tichuan, a aiah a fapa Abija a lal ta a.
Jeroboama kum sâwm leh kum riat a lal kumin Juda-ho chungah Abija a lal ṭan a.
Jerusalem-ah kum thum a lal a; a nu hming chu Maaki, Gibea mi Uriela fanu a ni. Tin, Abija leh Jeroboama chu an indo va.
Tin, Abija chuan sipai indo mi, mi huaisen nuai li thlan ṭhiau nên an va bei a; tin, Jeroboama chuan mi chak huaisen thlan ṭhiau nuai riat inzârin a lo do va.
Tin, Abija chu Ephraim tlâng rama Zemaraim tlângah a ding a, “Aw Jeroboam, Israel-ho zawng zawng nên lo ngaithla rawh u;
Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan Israel ram chu Davida leh a fate hnênah chi thuthlungin kumkhua atân a pe tih hre âwm tak in ni lâwm ni?
Nimahsela, Nebata fapa Jeroboama, Davida fapa Solomona chhiahhlawh chu a pu chungah a lo hel ta mai a.
Tin, Rehoboama a la naupana, a rilru a la nêma, a lo dodâl theih loh lai khân Solomona fapa Rehoboama kalhin mi bengtla loho, Beliala fate an pung khâwm a.
Tin, Davida fapate lakah hian Lalpa ram chu do theih in inring a; tam pawh in tam hle a, Jeroboaman pathian atâna a siamsak che u rangkachak bâwngno lemte pawh in hnênah a awm bawk a.

Lalpa puithiam, Arona fapate leh Levi-hote chu hnawt chhuakin, ram dang mite tih dân angin puithiam in insiam a ni lâwm ni? Tichuan, bâwngtuai leh berâm pasariha rawn inhlân apiangte chu pathian ni lawi lo puithiam an ni thei zêl mai a.
Nimahsela, keini zawng, Lalpa chu kan Pathian a ni a, amah chu kan hawisan lo va; Lalpa tâna rawngbâwltu mahni hna ṭheuh thawk Arona fapa puithiamte leh Levi-hote kan nei a.

Tin, ni tin leh zan tin Lalpa tân hâlral thilhlan te, rimtui te an hâl ṭhîn a; chhang chhiah pawh dawhkân thianghlimah an dah fel diam ṭhîn a, tlai lam apianga hâl tûrin rangkachak khâwnvâr dahna a khâwnvârte nên; keini zawngin Lalpa kan Pathian thupêk chu kan zâwm reng a, nangni erawh chuan amah chu in hawisan a ni.

Tin, ngai teh u, Pathian chu kan hma hruaiin kan hnênah a awm a; tin, a puithiamte an tawtawrâwta nangmahni hnawt tûra hâm tûrin an awm bawk a. Aw, Israela thlahte u, Lalpa, in pi leh pute Pathian chu do lul suh u, in hmuingîl tawp hlei lo vang e,” a ti a.
Nimahsela, Jeroboama chuan an hnung lamah a chân rûktîr a; tichuan, Juda-te hma lamah an awm a, châng rutute chu an hnung lamah an awm a.
Tin, Juda-te chu an han lehhawi chuan râl chu an hnung lam leh an hma lamah an lo awm a, Lalpa chu an au ta a, puithiamte chuan tawtawrâwt an hâm a.
Chutichuan, Juda-te chu an au ta dur dur a; chutia Juda-te an au dur dur chuan heti hi a ni a, Abija leh Juda-ho hmaah chuan Lalpan Jeroboama leh Israel-ho zawng zawng chu a titlâwm ta a.
Tichuan, Israela thlahte chu Juda-ho hmaah chuan an tlânchhia a, Pathianin an kutah a pe ta a.
Chutichuan, Abija leh a hote chuan an that ta chiam mai a; tichuan, Israel mi thlan ṭhiau nuai nga an that a.
Chumi ṭuma Israela thlahte tlâwm dân chu chutiang chu a ni, Juda thlahte chuan Lalpa an pi leh pute Pathian an rin avângin an ngam ta a.
Tin, Abija chuan Jeroboama chu a ûm a, hêng khuate hi a lâksak a: Bethel leh a khawperte, Jesana a khawperte nên, Ephron a khawperte nên.
Abija lal chhûng chuan Jeroboaman din chhuah lehna a nei ta lo; Lalpan a hrem a, a thi ta a.
Abija erawh chu a lo chak ta deuh deuh va, nupui sâwm leh pali a nei a, fapa sawmhnih leh pahnih leh fanu sâwm leh paruk a hring a.
Abija chanchin dangte leh a awm dân te, a thusawite chu zâwlnei Idova hrilhfiahna buah a chuang a ni.
Chutichuan, Abija chu a pute hnênah a muhîl a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a, a aiah a fapa Asa a lal ta a; a lal chhûng chuan an ram chu kum sâwm zet râlmuangin a awm a.
Asa chuan Lalpa a Pathian mit hmuhah thil ṭha leh thil dik a ti ṭhîn a;
ram dang pathian maichâmte leh hmun sângte a thehthang bo va, lungphunte a tichim a, Aseri-te a kit a.
Juda-hote chu Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian zawng tûr leh a dân leh a thupêk zâwm tûrin thu a pe a.
Tin, Juda-te khua zawng zawnga hmun sângte leh rimtui hâlna maichâmte chu a thehthang bo vek bawk a; a hnuaiah ram chu râlmuangin a awm a.
Tin, Judai ramah chuan kulh nei khuate a siam a; ram chu râlmuangin a awm a, Lalpan râlmuanna a pêk avângin chûng kum chuan tu mah do a nei lo.

Juda-te hnênah chuan, “Hêng khuate hi i din ṭha ang u khai, kulhtein hung ila, in sâng te, kulh kawngkhâr te, a kalhna te i siam ang u; Lalpa kan Pathian hi kan zawn tâk avângin ram chu kan hnuaiah a lo awm ta a; amah chu kan zawng a, ani chuan kil tin kil tangah râlmuangin min awmtîr ta a ni,” a ti a. Chutichuan, an din ṭha a, an hmuingîl ta zêl a.
Tin, Asa chuan Juda mi, phaw leh fei keng mi sipai nuai thum a nei a; tin, Benjamin mi, phaw leh thal hmang mi nuai hnih leh sîngriat; chûng zawng zawng chu mi chak huaisen vek an ni.
Tin, Ethiopia mi Zera, sipai maktaduai leh tawlailîr zathum nên anmahni bei tûrin a lo thawk a; Maresa a lo thleng a.
Tichuan, Asa chu a bei tûrin a va thawk a, Maresa-ah Zephatha ruamah an va inzâr a.

Tin, Asa chuan Lalpa a Pathian a au va, “ Lalpa chauh lo chu mi chak tak laka chak lo ṭanpuitu an awm lo va; aw Lalpa kan Pathian, min ṭanpui rawh khai; nangmah ringin i hmingin hêng mipuiho hi kan rawn bei a ni a. Aw Lalpa, kan Pathian i ni a, mihringin nang chu ngam suh se,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Lalpan Asa leh Juda-te hmaah chuan Ethiopia mite chu a bei a; tichuan, Ethiopia mite chu an tlânchhe ta a.

Tin, Asa leh a hote chuan Gerar thlengin an ûm a. Ethiopia mite chuan thi an tam êm avângin ṭan an khawh thei ta lo va, Lalpa leh a sipaite hmaah chuan tihtlâwm an ni ta a; râllâk sum tam tak an la a.
Gerar vêla khua zawng zawng chu an bei a, Lalpa chu an hlau ta a, khua zawng zawng chu an rawk a, râllâk sum a tam hle mai a ni.
Ranpuho puan inte pawh an bei a, berâm leh sanghâwngsei tam tak an kawi a, Jerusalem-ah an haw leh ta a.
Tin, Odeda fapa Azaria chungah Pathian thlarau a lo thleng a;

Asa hmu tûrin a kal chhuak a, a hnênah, “Asa leh Juda mi zawng zawng leh Benjamin mite u, ka thu ngaithla teh u. A lama in ṭan chhûng zawng Lalpa chu in lamah a ṭang a, amah in zawn chuan in hmu ang a, amah in hawisan chuan ani pawhin a hawisan ang che u.
Israel mite chu rei tak Pathian tak nei lo leh zirtîrtu leh puithiam nei lo leh dân nei lovin an lo awm a;
amaherawhchu, an mangana, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian lam an hawia, an zawn veleh an hmu a nih kha.
Tin, chûng lai chuan a chhuak lam leh a lût lamte tân râlmuanga awmna a awm lo va, ram chhûnga awm zawng zawngte tân manganna nasa tak hlîr a ni zâwk a.
Hnam leh hnam, khua leh khua an intichhe rem rum a; Pathianin hrehawm tinrêngin a timangang a nih kha.
Nimahsela, nangni zawng chak takin awm ula, inthlahdah suh u, in thiltih man chu in hmu dâwn a ni,” a ti a.

Tin, Asan chûng thûte leh zâwlnei Odeda thusawite chu a hriatin a intihuai a, Judai ram leh Benjamin ram zawng zawng ata leh Ephraim tlâng rama a khaw lâk ata thil tenawmte chu a thehthang bo vek a; Lalpa hulhliap bula Lalpa maichâm chu a din ṭha a.

Tin, Judai ram leh Benjamin rama mi zawng zawng, a hnêna khawsa ve Ephraim leh Manase leh Simeon rama mite nên a ko khâwm vek a; Lalpa a Pathian a hnênah a awm tih an hriatin Israel ram aṭangin an rawn bêl ta huai huai mai si a.
Chutichuan, Asa kum sâwm leh kum nga a lal kum, a thla thumnaah Jerusalem-ah an pung khâwm chiam a.
Tin, chumi ni chuan an râllâk bâwngpa zasarih leh berâm sângsarihin Lalpa hnênah an inthawi a.
Tin, an rilru leh an thinlung zawng zawngin Lalpa an pi leh pute Pathian zawng tûr leh,
tu pawh Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian zawng lo chu a lian a tê, a hmei a pain tihhlum tûr thu an thlung a.
Tin, Lalpa hnênah aw ring takin, au râwlin, tawtawrâwt ri nên, tawtawrâwt bi nei ri nên chhia an chham a.
Juda mi zawng zawng chu lungsi taka chhechham an nih avângin an lâwm tlâng hle a, Lalpa chu tihtak zetin an zawng a, hmuh pawh an hmu ta rêng a, hmun tinah râlmuangin an awm ta a.
Tin, Lal Asa nu Maaki pawh chu milem tenawm tak Aseri a siamsak avângin a lal nu nihna a bân a; tin, Asa chuan a milem chu a sât thlu a, a tisawm dep a, Kidron luiah a hâl a.
Amaherawhchu, Israel ram ata hmun sângte chu thehthang bo a ni lo va; nimahsela, Asa rilru chu a lal chhûng chuan a fel hle reng a.
Tin, a pan thil a lo hlan leh ama lo hlan tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbêlte chu Pathian inah a la lût a.
Tin, Asa lal lai kum sawmthum leh kum nga chhûng chuan indo rêng rêng a awm lo va.
Asa kum sawmthum leh kum ruk a lal kumin Israel lal Baasa chuan Juda-te a han bei a, Juda lal Asa hnêna lût tûr leh chhuak tûr dan nân Rama khua a siam a.
Chutichuan, Asan Lalpa in leh lal ina ro tangkarua leh rangkachakte chu a la chhuak a, Damaska-a Suria lal Ben-hadada hnênah,

“Ka pa leh i pa kârah thuthlung a awm a, ngai teh, tangkarua leh rangkachakte ka thawn a che; ti teh, Israel lal Baasa hian mi ṭînsanna tûrin a hnêna i thuthlun kha ṭhiat leh teh mai,” tiin a thawn a.

Tin, Ben-hadada chuan Lal Asa thu chu a lo pawm a; tichuan, Israel khuate chu bei tûrin sipai hotute a tîr a; Ijon khua te, Dan khua te, Abel-maim khua te, Naphtali rama bungraw dahna khua zawng zawngte an bei a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Baasan chumi thu chu a lo hriat veleh Rama khua a siam lai chu a chawlhsan a, a thiltih tum chu a ṭhulh ta a.
Chutichuan, Lal Asa chuan Juda mi zawng zawng chu a hruai a, Baasan Rama khaw siam nâna lung leh thing a hmante chu an la vek a, chu chuan Geba leh Mizpa khua a siam a.
Tin, chumi lai chuan zâwlnei Hanania chu Juda lal Asa hnênah a lo kal a, a hnênah, “ Lalpa i Pathian ring lovin Suria lal i ring a; chuvângin, Suria lal sipai rualte chu i chhuah ta a ni.
Ethiopia-ho leh Lub-hote chu sipai rual lian tak, tawlailîr leh sakawr chung chuang mite tam tak an ni lâwm ni kha? Nimahsela, Lalpa i rin avâng khân i kutah a pe a nih kha.

A lama rilru dik tak putute chunga a chakzia tilang tûrin khawvêl zawng zawngah Lalpa mit chu a lêng ruai ruai ṭhîn a ni. Atthlâk takin thil i ti a nih hi; tûn achinah chuan do i nei reng tawh ang,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Asa chu zâwlnei chungah chuan a thinrim a, tân inah a khung ta a; a thusawi avângin a thinrim ta hle mai a ni. Tin, Asa chuan mi ṭhenkhat pawh a tiduhdah leh ta nghâl zêl a.
Tin, ngai teh u, Asa chanchin chu a bul aṭanga a tâwp thlengin Juda leh Israel lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a ni.
Tin, kum sawmthum leh kum kua a lal kumin Asa chu a ke a lo na ta a, a nâ chu nasa tak a ni; nimahsela, a natnaah chuan Lalpa râwn lovin damdawi thiamte a râwn zâwk a.
Tin, Asa chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, kum sawmli leh kum khat a lal kumin a thi a.
Tin, Davida khawpuia ama puala a ker, ama thlânah an phûm a, rimtui tui tak, rimtui siamtuten rimtui chi hrang hrang an siama khat khumah an zalh a, a pualah meipui nasa tak an chhep a.
Tin, a fapa Jehosaphata a aiah a lal a, Israel mite do tûrin a indin nghet a.
Tin, Judai rama kulh nei khua zawng zawngah sipaite a dah a, Judai ram leh a pa Asan a lo lâk Ephraim rama khuaahte chuan râlvêngtute a dah a.
Tin, Jehosaphata hnênah chuan Lalpa a awm a; Baala te zawng lovin a pu Davidan a zawh hmasak tawh kawng chu a zawh a,
an pi leh pute Pathian chu zawnga, Israel mite tih ang ti lova a thupêkte a zawm zâwk avângin.
Chuvângin, Lalpan a ram chu a kutah a tinghet a; tichuan, Judai rama mi zawng zawngin Jehosaphata chu lâwmman te an rawn pe a, a lo hausain a lo ropui ta hle mai a.
Tin, a rilru chu Lalpa lamah a thle a; tin, Judai ram ata hmun sângte leh Aseri-te a thehthang bo vek bawk a.
Tin, kum thum a lal kumin a mi lian Ben-haila te, Obadia te, Zekaria te Nethanela te, Mikaia te chu Judai ram khuatea mite zirtîr tûrin a tîr chhuak bawk a.
Tin, Levi mi, Semaia te, Nethania te, Zebadia te, Asahela te, Semiramotha te, Jehonathana te, Adonija te, Tobija te, Tob-adonija te an tel ve a; tin, puithiam Elisama leh Jehorama an tel bawk a.
Tin, Lalpa dân bu an keng a, Judai ramah chuan an zirtîr a, Judai ram khua zawng zawng an fang a, mite an zirtîr a.
Tin, Judai ram vêl ram zawng zawnga mite chuan Lalpa chu an hlau va, tu mân Jehosaphata chu an do ngam lo va.

Tin, Philistia mi ṭhenkhatin Jehosaphata chu lâwmman an rawn pe a, chhiah atân tangkarua te an pe bawk a; tin, Arabia mite pawhin ran rual, berâmpa sângsarih leh zasarih leh kêlpa sângsarih leh zasarih an rawn pe bawk a.
Tichuan, Jehosaphata chu a lo ropui ta hle mai a, Judai ramah kulhte leh thil dah khâwmna khuate a siam a,
Judai ram khuaahte chuan hna tam tak a nei a; tin, Jerusalem-ah sipai mi chak huaisente a ngah bawk a.
Tin, an chhûngkua kua zêla an awm dân chu hetiang hi a ni - Juda chhûngkuaa sâng hotute chu, hotu Adna chuan mi chak huaisen nuai thum a ho va;
a dawttu Jehohananan nuai hnih leh sîngriat a ho va;
tin, a dawt lehtu Zikria fapa Amasia chu inphal taka Lalpa tâna inpein, mi chak huaisen nuai hnih a ho va;
