tin, Benjamin chhûngkuate - mi chak huaisen Eliadan thal leh phaw hmang mi nuai hnih a ho va;
a dawttu Jehozabada chuan râl kâp tûra inpeih diam nuai khat leh sîngriat a ho va.
Hêng zawng zawng hi Judai rama kulh nei khuaa lalin a dahte tiam lova lal hnêna awm rengte an ni.
Tichuan, Jehosaphata chu a lo hausain a lo ropui ta hle mai a; tin, Ahaba nêna inkûngkaihna a siam a.
Tin, kum eng emaw zât hnu chuan Samari-ah Ahaba hnênah a zuk kal a; tin, Ahaba chuan amah leh a hote chu berâm leh bâwngpa tam tak a lo talh a, Ramoth-gilead khuaa han chhohpuiah a sâwm a.

Tin, Israel lal Ahaba chuan Juda lal Jehosaphata hnênah chuan, “Ramoth-gilead khuaah kan han chho dûn dâwn lâwm ni?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan a chhâng a, “Kei leh nang, ka mite leh i mite chu pumkhat kan ni alâwm, râl chu kan bei za ang chu,” a ti a.
Tin, Jehosaphata chuan Israel lal hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa thu ngaichâng rih phawt la maw le,” a ti a.

Chutichuan, Israel lal chuan zâwlneiho mi zali a ko khâwm a, an hnênah, “Ramoth-gilead khua bei tûrin kan han thawk ang nge thawk lo vang?” a ti a. Tin, anni chuan, “Han thawk rawh khai, Pathianin lal kutah a pe dâwn a ni,” an ti a.
Nimahsela, Jehosaphata chuan, “ Lalpa zâwlnei tu emaw kan han râwn tûr an awm lâwm ni aw?” a ti a.

Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosaphata hnênah, “ Lalpa min râwnsak tûr mi pakhat chu a la awm kha maw! Nimahsela, ani zawng ka huat zâwng tak a ni; ka chungchâng thu hi a chhe lam ngawt lo chu a ṭha lam rêng rêng a sawi ngai si lo va; chu mi chu Imla fapa Mikaia a ni,” a ti a. Tin, Jehosaphata chuan, “Lal chuan chutiang chuan ti teh suh se â,” a ti a.
Tichuan, Israel lal chuan hotu pakhat a han ko va, “Imla fapa Mikaia han hruai thuai teh,” a ti a.

Tin, Israel lal leh Juda lal Jehosaphata chu Samari kulh kawngka luhna bul hmun thâwl laiah an lal puana inthuamin an lalṭhutthlêng ve veah an ṭhu a; tin, zâwlnei zawng zawng chuan an hmaah thu an sawi a.
Tin, Kenaana fapa Zedekian thîr kîte a siam a, “ Lalpan heti hian a ti, ‘Hêngte hian Suria-hote chu boral dêr khawpin i si ang,’ tiin,” a ti a.
Tin, chutiang bawkin zâwlnei dangte pawh chuan, “Ramoth-gilead-ah chuan han chho la, han hmuingîl rawh khai; Lalpan lal kutah hian a pe dâwn a ni,” tiin an sawi a.

Tin, Mikaia ko tûra an tirha chuan, “Ngai teh khai, zâwlneite chuan thukhat vuain a ṭha lamin lal hnênah thu an sawi ṭheuh va; chuvângin, nang pawhin an sawi tâk angin a ṭha lamin han sawi ve teh khai,” tiin a sawi a.
Tin, Mikaia chuan, “ Lalpa nunna chhâlin ka sawi e, ka Pathianin a sawi ang chiahin a ni ka sawi dâwn ni,” a lo ti a.

Tin, lal hnên a han thlen chuan lalin a hnênah, “Mikai, Ramoth-gilead khua bei tûrin kan han thawk ang nge thawk lo vang?” a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, “Han thawk ula, han hmuingîl rawh u, i kutah pêk a ni dâwn a ni,” a ti a.
Tin, lal chuan a hnênah, “Thutak ngawt lo chu ka hnênah Lalpa hminga sawi lo tûrin vawi eng zât nge maw chhia ka chhamtîr dâwn che le?” a ti a.

Tin, ani chuan, “Berâm, vêngtu nei lo angin Israel-ho zawng zawngte chu tlângahte darh vekin ka hmu a; tin, Lalpan, ‘Hêngho hian hotu an nei ta lo va, mahni in lamah thlamuang takin haw dial mai rawh se,’ a ti a ni,” a ti a.
Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosaphata hnênah, “Ka chungchâng thu hi a chhe lam ngawt lo chu a ṭha lam rêng rêng zawng a sawi hlei lo vang e, tih ka hrilh che a ni lâwm ni kha?” a ti a.
Tin, Mikaia chuan, “Khai le, Lalpa thu ngaithla teh u, Lalpa chu a lalṭhutthlênga ṭhua vân mipuiho zawng zawng a ding lam leh a vei lama dingin ka hmu a.
Tin, Lalpa chuan, ‘Israel lal Ahaba hi Ramoth-gilead-a han chhova, han thi tûrin tuin nge thlêm dâwn?’ a tih hun chuan pakhatin, ‘Chutin khatin,’ a ti a, mi dangin, ‘Chutiang khatiang chuan,’ a ti a.
Tin, thlarau pakhat a lo chhuak a, Lalpa hmaah a ding a, ‘Keiman ka thlêm ang e,’ a ti a. Tin, Lalpan a hnênah, ‘Engin maw?’ a ti a.

Tin, ani chuan, ‘Ka va kal ang a, a zâwlneite zawng zawng kâah chuan thlarau dawtheiah ka va chang ang,’ a ti a. Tin, ani chuan, ‘I va thlêm ngei ang a, hlawh pawh i hlawhtling bawk ang. Va kal ta la, chutiang chuan va ti rawh le,’ a ti a.
Chutichuan, ngai teh, Lalpa chuan hêng i zâwlneite kâah hian thlarau dawthei a dah a; i chungchâng thu Lalpan a ṭha lo lamin a sawi ta a ni,” a ti a.
Chu veleh Kenaana fapa Zedekia chuan a va hnaih a, Mikaia chu a biangah a va bêng a, “I hnêna thusawi tûrin Lalpa thlarau chuan khawii lamah nge mi chhuahsan?” a ti a.
Tin, Mikaia chuan, “Ngai teh, pindan chhûngrila biru tûra i luh nîah i la hria ang,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Israel lal chuan, “Mikaia hi hruai ula, khaw awptu Amona leh lal fapa Joasa hnênah kalpui leh rawh u;
tin, lalin heti hian a ti, ‘He mi hi lung inah khung ula, thlamuang taka ka lo haw leh hma loh chuan hrehawm chaw leh hrehawm tui lo pe rawh u, a ti,’ ti ang che u,” a ti a.
Tin, Mikaia chuan, “Thlamuang taka i lo haw leh chuan kei mi hmangin Lalpan thu a sawi lo a ni ang le,” a ti a. Tin, amah vêkin, “Nangni mipui zawng zawng pawhin lo hre rawh u,” a ti a.
Tin, Israel lal leh Juda lal Jehosaphata chu Ramoth-gilead khuaah chuan an han chho va.

Tin, Israel lal chuan Jehosaphata hnênah chuan, “Ka inbâwl danglam ang a, inbeihnaah chuan ka kal ve ang a; nang erawh chu i lal puan inbel rawh,” a ti a. Chutichuan, Israel lal chu a inbâwl danglam a, inbeihnaah chuan an han kal a.
Tin, Suria lal chuan a tawlailîrte chunga hotute hnênah chuan, “Israel lal ngawt lo chu mi tê pawh mi lian pawh bei suh ang che u,” tiin thu a pe a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, tawlailîr chunga hotute chuan Jehosaphata an han hmuh chuan, “Israel lal a nih saw maw,” an ti a. Tichuan, beih tumin an hual ta a; nimahsela, Jehosaphata chu a au va, Lalpan a pui ta a; tichuan, Pathianin a tihkîrsak ta a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, tawlailîr chunga hotuten Israel lal a ni lo tih an hriat chuan ûm lovin an kîrsan leh ta a.

Tin, mi pakhat hian tum bîk nei lêm lovin a thal ngul a han kuai a, Israel lal chu a âwmphaw inkârah a kâp a; tichuan, a tawlailîr khalhtu hnênah chuan, “Khalh lêt la, mipui zîng ata hi mi chhuahpui rawh khai, hliam na tak ka tuar a ni,” a ti a.
Tin, chumi ni chuan inbeihna chu a nasa hle mai a; tin, Israel lal chu Suria-hote lam hawiin a tawlailîrah tlai lam thlengin a ding a; tin, ni tlâk dâwn vêlah a thi ta a.
Tin, Juda lal Jehosaphata chu thlamuang takin Jerusalem-a a inah a haw leh ta a.

Tin, zâwlnei Hanania fapa Jehua chuan a lo hmuak a, Lal Jehosaphata hnênah, “Mi suaksual chu i ṭanpuiin Lalpa hawtute chu i hmangaih dâwn a ni maw? Hemi avâng hian Lalpa thinurna i chungah a lo awm ta a ni.
Amaherawhchu, he ram ata Aseri i thehthang bova, Lalpa i zawn avâng hian ṭhatna kawng eng emaw zawng i la nei cheu a ni,” a ti a.
Tin, Jehosaphata chu Jerusalem-ah a awm a; tin, Beer-seba aṭanga Ephraim tlâng ram thlengin a mite zîngah a kal leh a, Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian lamah a hruai kîr leh hlawm a.
Tin, khaw tinah Judai ram kulh nei khua zawng zawngahte chuan rorêltute a dah a,
rorêltute hnênah chuan, “In thiltih chu ngun taka ngaihtuahin ti rawh u; mihring tâna rorêl in ni lo va, Lalpa tân a ni zâwk si a; rorêlnaah chuan in hnênah a tel zêl a ni.
Chuvângin, Lalpa hlau ula, fîmkhur takin ti rawh u; Lalpa kan Pathianah chuan khawlohna leh thlei bîk neihna leh tham einate a awm lo a ni,” a ti a.
Tin, Jehosaphata chuan Jerusalem-ah Lalpa rorêl tûr leh thubuaite remtu atân Levi-hote, puithiamte, Israel chhûngkaw puipate a dah bawk a.
Tin, “ Lalpa ṭih chungin rinawm takin, rilru dik tak puin in ti tûr a ni.

Khawii khuaa mi pawhin thubuai an rawn sawia, tualthah te, dân leh thupêk thûah te, thuruat leh rorêl thûah te an rawn inkhin chuan, Lalpa chungah thil an tihsual loh nân fimkhur tûrin hrilh ang che u, nangmahni leh in unaute chungah thinurna a lo thleng dah rual ang e; chutiang chuan ti ula, thiam loh in chang dâwn lo nia.

Tin, ngai teh u, Lalpa lam thu zawng zawngah chuan puithiam lalber Amaria chu in hotu a ni a; tin, lal lam thu zawng zawngah chuan Juda-te chhûngkaw chunga rorêltu chu Ismaela fapa Zebadia a ni; Levi-hote pawh in hotute an ni ve ang. Huai takin ti ula, mi ṭhate hnênah chuan Lalpa chu awm rawh se,” a ti a.
Tin, chumi hnuah chuan heti hi a ni a, Moaba thlahte leh Amona thlahte chu Meun-ho ṭhenkhatte nên Jehosaphata bei tûrin an lo thawk a.

Chutichuan, tuten emaw Jehosaphata hnênah, “Nangmah bei tûrin mipui tam tak mai, tuifinriat râl Suria aṭangin an lo thawk chiam mai; ngai teh, Hazazon-tamar-ah an awm tawh,” tiin an hrilh a (chu chu En-gedi an ti bawk ṭhîn).
Tin, Jehosaphata chuan a hlau va, Lalpa zawng tûrin a inpe a; Judai ram zawng zawngah chaw nghei tûr thu a than vêl a.
Tichuan, Juda-te chu Lalpa ṭanpuina zawngin an pung khâwm a; Juda khaw tin aṭangin Lalpa zawng tûrin an lo chhuak a.
Tin, Jehosaphata chu Lalpa inah, kawt hung chhûng thar bulah Juda-ho leh Jerusalem-ho pung khâwm zîngah chuan a ding a;
“Aw Lalpa, kan pi leh pute Pathian, vâna Pathian i ni lâwm ni? Hnam tin chunga rorêltu i ni lâwm ni? I kutah chuan thiltihtheihna leh chakna a awm a, tu ma chelh rual i ni lo va.
Aw kan Pathian, he rama chêngte hi i mi Israel-te i hnawh chhuahsak a, i ṭhian Abrahama thlahte chatuan atân i pe a ni lâwm ni?

Tin, he ramah hian an lo awm ta a, ‘Kan chungah thil ṭha lo, khandaiha rorêlna te emaw, hri te emaw, ṭâm te emaw a lo thlen chuan he in bulah leh i hmaah kan lo ding ang a (he inah hian i hming a awm si a), kan mangannaah chuan kan au vang chia, nangin min ngaihthlâksakin min chhandam ang chu,’ tiin i hming tân hmun thianghlim an dinsak chia.
Tichuan, ngai teh, Amona thlahte leh Moab-ho leh Seir tlânga mi, Israel-ho Aigupta ram ata an lo chhuah laia beih i phal lohva, an kîrsana an tihboral tâk lohhoten,
kan luah atâna i ram min pêk ata hnawh chhuaha mi rawn thungrulh an tum dân hi lo hre teh.

Aw kan Pathian, an chungah ro i rêl dâwn lâwm ni? Mi chu zozai, mi rawn bei tûra lo thawkte chu han bei thei ziazâng kan ni si lo va; a tih ngaihna rêng rêng kan hre bawk hek lo, i lam kan lo hawi mai zâwk a ni e,” a ti a.
Tin, Juda-te zawng zawng chu an fanau tê tê, an nupuite leh an fate nên Lalpa hmaah an ding a.

Chutichuan, mipui zînga Jahaziela chungah chuan Lalpa thlarau a lo thleng a, chu mi chu Zekaria fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Benaia fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Jeiela fapa a ni a, chu mi chu Asapha thlah Levi mi Matania fapa a ni a.

Tin, ani chuan, “Nangni Judai rama mi zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a awm zawng zawngte leh nang, Lal Jehosaphat, lo ngaithla rawh u! Lalpan in hnênah heti hian a ti: ‘Hlau suh ula, chûng mipui tam tak avâng chuan zâm hek suh u; indona chu nangni indona a ni lo va, Pathian indona a ni zâwk si a.
Naktûkah zuk bei rawh u; ngai teh u, Ziz pan chhohnaah an lo chho va, Jeruel thlalêr bul ruam tâwp lamah chuan in zu hmu ang a.

He indona hi in beih a ngai lo vang. Inzâr ula, ding ngawt mai ula, in lama ṭang Lalpa chhandamna chu en reng mai rawh u, aw Juda mite leh Jerusalem mite u!’ tiin. Hlau suh ula, zâm hek suh u. Naktûkah bei tûrin thawk rawh u, Lalpa chu in lamah a ṭang si a,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Jehosaphata chu a hmaia lei siin a kûn a; tin, Juda mite zawng zawng leh Jerusalem mi zawng zawng chu Lalpa chibai bûkin Lalpa hmaah an kûn a.
Tin, Kohatha thlah leh Kora thlah Levi-hote chu aw ring taka Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian fak tûrin an lo ding a.

Tin, a tûkah chuan zîng takah an tho va, Tekoa thlalêrah an lût a; tin, an kal lai chuan Jehosaphata chu a ding a, “Aw, Juda mite leh Jerusalem mite u, ka thu hi ngaithla rawh u; Lalpa in Pathian chu ring ula, nghet takin in awm dâwn nia; a zâwlneite chu ring ula, hmuingîl takin in awm dâwn nia,” a ti a.

Tin, mipuite a fuih zawh chuan sipaite hmaa kal chunga Lalpa chawimawina leh a thianghlim mawizia fak tûra hla satu tûrte a ruat a, “ Lalpa hnênah lâwmthu sawi rawh u, a ngilneihna chu kumkhuain a awm dâwn si a, ti rawh u,” a ti a.
Tin, hla an saka an han fak veleh chuan Amona thlah te, Moaba thlah te, Seir tlânga mite, Juda-ho bei tûra lo thawkte châng rutu tûr Lalpan a dah a; tichuan, an tlâwm ta a.

Amona thlahte leh Moaba thlahte chuan Seir tlânga awmte chu thah chimih vek leh tihboral dêr tumin an bei ta mai a; tin, Seir tlânga mite an tihboral zawh chuan anmahni leh anmahni chu intihboral tumin an inbei ta chiam mai a.
Tin, Juda-te chuan thlalêr thlîrna hmun sâng an han thlen chuan mipui lam chu an han en a; tin, ngai teh, mitthi ruang chu leiah chuan a lum rum mai a, pakhat tê mah tlân chhuak an awm lo va.

Tichuan, Jehosaphata leh a hote chu râllâk sum la tûrin an va kal a, an zîngah chuan sum leh pai te, silhfên te, lunghlu te an va hmu ta ṭeuh mai a, an phurh zawh loh khawpin an la a; a tam khawp a, ni thum zet râllâk sum chu an chhêk a.
Tin, a ni li ni chuan Beraka ruamah an inkhâwm a, chutah chuan Lalpa chu an chawimawi a; chumi avâng chuan tûn thleng hian chumi hmun hmingah chuan Beraka ruam an ti ta a ni.

Chutichuan, Juda mi leh Jerusalem mi zawng zawng chu an haw leh ta a; tin, Jehosaphata chuan Jerusalem-a hlim taka haw tûrin an hma a hruai a; Lalpan an hmêlmate chung thûah hlim taka a awmtîr tâk avângin.
Tichuan, perhkhuang te, ṭingṭang te, tawtawrâwtte nên Jerusalem-a Lalpa in chu an han thleng ta a.
Tin, Lalpan Israel-te hmêlma a bei tih an han hriat chuan ram tina mite chuan Pathian chu an hlau ta a.
Tichuan, Jehosaphata ram chu râlmuangin a awm ta a; a Pathianin an vêla mite laka râlmuanna a pêk avângin.
Chutichuan, Jehosaphata chu Juda-te chungah a lal ta a; kum sawmthum leh kum nga mi a nihin a lal ṭan a; tin, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh kum nga a lal a; a nu hming chu Azubi, Silhia fanu a ni.
Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha tiin a pa Asa kawng chu pênsan hauh lovin a zawh a.
Amaherawhchu, hmun sângte chu thehthang bo a ni lo va, mipuite pawhin an pi leh pute Pathian chungah an thinlung an la nghat bawk hek lo.
Tin, ngai teh u, Jehosaphata thiltih zawng zawng chu a bul aṭanga a tawp thlengin, Hanania fapa Jehua chanchin ziaknaah a chuang a, chu chu Israel lalte chanchin buah a chuang a ni.
Chumi hnuah chuan Juda lal Jehosaphata chuan Israel lal Ahazia a thurualpui a; chu mi chuan ṭha lo takin thil a ti ṭhîn a.
Tin, Tarsis lama kal tûr lawng an siam tlâng a, Ezion-geber-ah lawngte chu an siam a.

Chutichuan, Maresa mi Dodavahua fapa Eliezeran Jehosaphata hnênah, “Ahazia i thurualpui avângin Lalpan i thiltih tum hi a tihkhawlohsak ta che a ni,” a ti a. Tichuan, lawngte chu a chhe ta vek a, Tarsis-ah chuan an kal thei ta lo va.
Tin, Jehosaphata chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, a pute zîngah a pu Davida khawpuiah an phûm a. Tichuan, a fapa Jehorama chu a aiah a lal ta a.
Tin, ani chuan unau, Jehosaphata fapate a nei hlawm a, Azaria te, Jehiela te, Zekaria te, Azariahua te, Mikaela te, Sephatia te an ni. Hêng zawng zawng hi Israel lal Jehosaphata fapate vek an ni.
Tin, an pa chuan thil ropui tak a pe a, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, thil hlu tak tak te, Judai rama kulh nei khuate nên; nimahsela, ram chu Jehorama hnênah fa u ber a nih avângin a pe a.
Chutichuan, Jehoraman a pa ram a han luah chuan a lo intichak ta a, a unaute zawng zawng chu Israel-te zînga puipa tam takte nên khandaihin a tihlum vek a.
Jehorama chu kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a nihin a lal ṭan a; Jerusalem-ah kum riat a lal a.
Ahaba chhûngte tih angin Israel lalte kawng chu a zawh ve a, Ahaba fanu nupuiah a nei a ni; tichuan, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo tak a ti ṭhîn a.
Nimahsela, Lalpan Davida chhûngkua chu a tiboral duh lo va, Davida hnêna thuthlung avâng leh amah leh a thlahte chena khâwnvâr neihtîr reng a lo tiam tawh avângin.
Ama chhanah chuan Edom-ho chu Juda-te lakah an hel a, lal an insiam chawp a.
Tichuan, Jehorama chu a sipai hotute leh a tawlailîr zawng zawngte nên a va thawk chhuak a, zânah a va thawk a, anmahni leh tawlailîr chunga hotute hualtu Edom-hote chu a va bei a.
Chutichuan, Edom-hote chu tûn thlengin Juda-te lakah an la hel ta reng a ni; tin, Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian chu a hawisan avângin, chumi lai bawk chuan Libna khua pawh a lakah an hel ve a.
Tin, Judai ram tlângahte hmun sâng a siam a, Jerusalem mite chu a uiretîr a, Juda-te chu a hruai bo va.

Tin, zâwlnei Elija aṭangin a hnênah lehkha a lo thleng a, “ Lalpa, i pu Davida Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: ‘I pa Jehosaphata kawngte i zawh lo va, Juda-te lal Asa kawngte pawh i zawh bawk hek lo va,
Israel lalte kawng i zawh zâwka, Juda-te leh Jerusalem-a awmte Ahaba chhûngte anga i uiretîra, i unau, i pa chhûngte, i aia ṭha zâwk i thah bawk avângin,
ngai teh, Lalpan i mite - i fate, i nupuite leh i rante hripuiin a hrem ang a;
tin, nangin rîl natna nasa tak i nei ang a, ni tin chu natna avânga i rîl chu a tlâk a tlâka, a tlâk zawh vek thlengin,’” tiin.
Chutichuan, Ethiopia mite kiang vêla mi Philistia-ho leh Arabia-ho rilru chu Jehorama bei tûrin Lalpan a chawk tho va.

Tichuan, Juda-te chu an han bei a, an ramah an lût a, lal ina thil zawng zawng chu an la vek a, a fapate, a nupuite pawh; chutichuan, a fapa naupang ber Jehoahaza chauh lo chu a fa pawh an hnutchhiahsak lo.
Tin, chumi hnuah chuan Lalpan tihdam theih loh rîl natnain a hrem a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, a kum hnihna a lo vei hnuin a natna avâng chuan a rîl chu a tla ta a, natna râpthlâk takin a lo thi ta a. A mite chuan a pute meipui an chhehsak ang khân an chhehsak ve lo.
A lal tirhin kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum riat a lal a; tu ma ui hlawh lovin a thi a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a, lalho thlânah erawh chuan a ni lo.

Chutichuan, Jerusalem mite chuan a fapa naupang ber Ahazia chu a aiah lalah an siam a; a fa ûte zawng zawng chu sipai rual, Arabia mite nêna an ṭanhmuna lo kalho chuan an that ta vek si a. Chutichuan, Juda lal Jehorama fapa Ahazia chu a lal ta a.
Ahazia chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmli leh kum hnih a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum khat a lal a; a nu hming chu Athali, Omria fanu a ni.
Ani pawh chuan Ahaba chhûngte kawng zawh chu a zawh ve a; a nu chu thil sual taka ti tûra kaihruaitu a ni.
Ahaba chhûngkuate tih ang bawkin Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti a; a pa thih hnuin a chhiatna tûra kaihruaitu an ni.
An kaihhruai ang chuan a awm bawk a, Ramoth-gilead-ah Suria lal Hazaela do tûrin Israel lal Ahaba fapa Jehorama hnênah a kal a; tichuan, Suria-ho chuan Jehorama chu an lo hliam a.

Suria lal Hazaela a va beihnaa Rama-a an lo hliam tidam tûrin Jezreel-ah a kal a. Tichuan, Juda lal Jehorama fapa Azaria chu Ahaba fapa Jehorama a damloh avâng chuan a kan tûrin Jezreel-ah chuan a kal a.
Ahazia Jehorama hnêna a kala, a boralna chu Pathian tih a ni a; Nimsia fapa Jehua bei tûrin Jehorama hnênah a kal avângin. Chu mi chu Ahaba chhûngte timang tûra Lalpa ruat a ni si a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Ahaba chhûngte tichhe tûra a beih laiin Juda puipate leh Ahazia unau fapatehovin Ahazia rawng an bâwl lai a hmu a, a that ta hlawm a.

Ahazia chu an zawng a, an man a (Samari-ah a biru a ni), Jehua hnênah an rawn hruai a, an that a; tin, “A thinlung zawng zawnga Lalpa zawng ṭhîn Jehosaphata fapa a ni si,” an ti a, a phûmin an phûm a. Tichuan, Ahazia chhûngte chuan an ramah thuneihna an nei ta lo va.
Tin, Ahazia nu Athali chuan a fapa a thi tih a lo hriat chuan a tho va, Juda lal zawng zawng chu a that ta vek mai a.

Ahazia fapa Joasa erawh chu lal fanu Jehosabeathi chuan lal fapa an thahte zîng ata chu a hruai bo va, a enkawltu nên khum pindanah a thukru hlauh mai a. Chutichuan, lal Jehorama fanu Jehosabeathi, puithiam Jehoiada nupuiin (Ahazia farnu a ni a) Athali hmuh theih loh tûrin a thukru a; tichuan, an that ta lo va.
Tin, an hnêna chêngin Pathian inah kum ruk a rûkin a awm a; tichuan, Athali chu an ramah chuan a lal ta a.

A kum sarih kumah chuan Jehoiada chu a intichak a, sipai za hotu, Jehorama fapa Azaria te, Jehohanana fapa Ismaela te, Obeda fapa Azaria te, Adaia fapa Maaseia te, Zikria fapa Elisaphata te hnênah thu a thlung a.
Tin, Judai ram an fang a; Judai ram khaw tina Levi-hote leh Israel-te chhûngkaw puipate an khâwm a, Jerusalem an han thleng a.
Tin, pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan Pathian inah lal hnênah chuan thu an thlung a. Tin, an hnênah, “Ngai teh u, Lalpan Davida fapate chungchâng thu a lo sawi angin lal fapa chu a lal tûr a ni.
In tih tûr chu hetiang hi a ni: puithiamte leh Levi-ho Chawlhnia lo kal ṭhînte chu hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat kawngkhâr vêngtute in ni ang a.
Tin, hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu lal inah in awm ang a; tin, hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat chu kulh kawngkaah; tin, mipui zawng zawng chu Lalpa in kawt hung chhûngah an awm ang.
Nimahsela, puithiamte leh rawngbâwltu Levi-hote chauh lo chu tu mah Lalpa inah lût suh se; anni chu an thianghlim avângin an lût ang a, mipui zawng zawng erawh chu Lalpa ngaichângin an awm tûr a ni.
Tin, Levi-hovin an hriamhrei kengin lal chu an din hual ang a; tin, tu pawh ina lo lût chu thah tûr a ni. Tin, lal chu a chhuah leh a luhin a hnênah awm zêl rawh u,” a ti a.

Chutichuan, Levi-ho leh Juda zawng zawngte chuan puithiam Jehoiada thupêk ang zawng zawng chuan an ti a; tin, mahni hote ṭheuh Chawlhnia lo kal tûrte leh Chawlhnia ṭîn tûrte chu an hruai a; puithiam Jehoiada chuan a ṭîn tûr pâwl chu a la ṭîntîr si lo va.
Tin, puithiam Jehoiada chuan sipai za hotute chu Lalpa ina awm Lal Davida fei leh phaw tê leh phaw liante chu a pe a.
Tin, mite chu hriamhrei keng ṭheuhvin in ding lampang aṭangin vei lampang thlengin maichâm leh in hualin lal chu a din hualtîr a.

Chutichuan, lal fapa chu an rawn hruai chhuak a, lallukhum an khumtîr a, thuhriattîrna chu an pe a, lalah an siam a, Jehoiada leh a fapate chuan hriak an thih a, “Pathianin lal chu humhim rawh se,” an ti a.
Tin, Athalin mipui lal chawimawia an zi mur mur thâwm chu a hriatin Lalpa inah mipui zîngah chuan a va kal a;

tin, a han en a, ngai teh, kawngkaa ban bulah lal chu a ding a, a kiangah sipai hotute leh tawtawrâwt hâmtute nên; tin, chumi rama mi zawng zawng chu an hlim êm êm a, tawtawrâwtte an hâm dur dur a; tin, hla satute chuan an thil ri theite tumin fakna hla an sa ho va. Tichuan, Athali chuan a puante a pawt thlêr a, “Phiarrûkna! Phiarrûkna a ni ta le!” a ti a.

Tin, puithiam Jehoiada chuan sipaite chunga hotua ruat sipai za hotute chu a hruai chhuak a, an hnênah, “Sipaihote kârah chhuahtîr ula; tin, tu pawh a zui apiang chu khandaiha sah hlum ni rawh se,” a ti a; puithiam chuan, “ Lalpa inah zawng thah tûr a ni lo ve,” a lo ti tawh si a.
Chutichuan, kawng an kian a; tin, sakawr luhna kawngkaah lal inah a kal a, chutah chuan an that a ni.
Tin, Jehoiada chuan amah leh mipui zawng zawng leh lal kârah chuan Lalpa mite ni tûrin thu a thlung ta a.
Tin, mipui zawng zawng chu Baala inah an kal a, an tichhia a, a maichâm te, a lemte an tisawm dep a, Baala puithiam Matana chu maichâm bulah an that a.

Tin, Jehoiada chuan, Mosia dân bua a ziak anga hlim tak leh hla sa chunga Davidan Lalpa ina Lalpa hnêna hâlral thilhlan tûra a lo ruat, puithiam Levi-ho hnuaia thawk tûrin Davida thupêk angin Lalpa biak in vêngtu tûrte chu a ruat a.
Thianghlim lo tawh phawt chu an luh loh nân Lalpa in kawngkhâr vêngtute a ruat a.

Tin, za chunga hotu te, mi ṭha te, mipui awptute chumi rama mi zawng zawngte chu a hruai a, Lalpa ina lal chu an han hruai thla a; kawngkhâr chhakta zâwkah lal in lamah an kal a, lal chu an ram lalṭhutthlêngah chuan a ṭhuttîr ta a.
Chutichuan, chu rama mi zawng zawng chu hlim takin an awm a, khua chu râlmuangin a awm ta a; Athali chu khandaihin an that a.
Joasa chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sarih mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmli a lal a; a nu hming chu Zibi, Beer-seba-a mi a ni.
Tin, Joasa chuan puithiam Jehoiada dam chhûng chuan Lalpa mit hmuhin thil ṭha a ti a.
Tin, Jehoiada chuan nupui pahnih a neihsak a, fanu leh fapate a hring a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, chumi zawhah chuan Joasa chuan Lalpa in siam ṭhat a rilrûk a.

Puithiamte leh Levi-ho a ko khâwm a, “Juda-ho khuaahte kal ula, kum tina in Pathian in siam ṭhat nân Israel mi zawng zawng hnênah tangka va khawn khâwm rawh u khai, muangchâng suh ang che u,” a ti a. Nimahsela, Levi-hote chu an hmanhmawh chuang lo va.

Tin, lal chuan puithiam lalber Jehoiada chu a ko va, a hnênah, “Engati nge Levi-hote chu Lalpa chhiahhlawh Mosia leh Israel mipuite ruat hriattîrna puan in atâna thawh bi ruat chu, Juda mi leh Jerusalem-a mite thawh tûrin i phût loh?
Mi sualnu Athali fapate chuan Pathian in chu an tichhe zo ta si a; tin, Lalpa ina thilhlan zawng zawng chu Baala te an pe zo ta bawk si a,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, lalin thu a pe a, bâwm an siam a, Lalpa in kawngka pâwn lamah chuan an dah a.
Tin, thlalêra Pathian chhiahhlawh Mosian Israel mite tih tûra thawh bi a ruat chu Lalpa tâna rawn thawh tûrin, Judai ram zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-ah thu a than vêl ta a.
Tichuan, mi liante leh mipuite chu an lâwm a, an tangka te an rawn la a, an khawn zawh hma chuan bâwmah chuan an rawn dah ta ruih ruih mai a.

Tin, Levi-hoten lal puipate hnênah bâwm chu an rawn lâka, tangka tam tak a awm tih an hriat chuan, lal lehkhaziaktu leh puithiam lal ruat puipa chuan bâwm ata an bun chhuak a, an la a, a hmunah chuan an dah leh a. Chutiang chuan ni tin an ti a, tangka chu tam tak an khâwl khâwm ta a.
Tin, lal leh Jehoiada chuan Lalpa in hna thawktute kutah an pe a, Lalpa in siam ṭha tûrin lung chhertute leh themthiamte an ruai a; tin, Lalpa in siam ṭha tûrin thîr leh dâra themthiamte pawh.
Tichuan, thawktute chuan an bei a, an thawk ṭha hle mai a, Pathian in chu a ngai chiahin an siam ṭha a, an din nghet leh ta a.

Tin, an zawh chuan tangka la awm zawng zawng chu lal leh Jehoiada hnênah an rawn la a, chu chuan Lalpa ina rawngbâwl nâna bungbêl te, hlanna bungbêl te, thîrfian te, rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbêlte lamin an siam a. Tichuan, Jehoiada dam chhûng chuan Lalpa inah hâlral thilhlan chu an hlân reng a.
Nimahsela, Jehoiada chu upa tak, tarkûna damin a thi ta a. A thih chuan kum za leh sawmthum mi a ni.
Tin, Israel-te zîngah Pathian chungah leh a in chungchânga thil a tihṭhat avângin Davida khawpuiah lalte zîngah an phûm a.
Tin, Jehoiada thih hnu chuan Juda mi liante chu an lo thawk a, lal hnênah dawvân an rawn kai a. Lal chuan an thu chu a lo pawm a.
Tichuan, an pi leh pute Pathian, Lalpa in chu an hawisan a, Aseri-te leh milemte rawng an bâwl ta a; tin, an sualna avângin Juda-te leh Jerusalem chungah thinurna a lo thleng ta a.
Nimahsela, Lalpa hnênah hruai leh tûrin an hnênah zâwlneite a tîr a, an thiam lohzia te an hriattîr a; nimahsela, an beng an chhi duh chuang lo.

Tin, puithiam Jehoiada fapa Zekaria chungah Pathian thlarau a lo thleng a, ani chu mipui chung lamah a ding a, an hnênah, “Pathianin heti hian a ti: ‘Engati nge hmuingîl theih loh phaha Lalpa thupêk chu in bawhchhiat? Lalpa chu in hawisan avângin ani pawhin a hawisan che u a ni,’” a ti a.
Tin, ani chu an phiar ta a, lal thupêkin Lalpa biak in hung chhungah chuan lungin an dêng hlum ta a.

Chutiang chuan Lal Joasa chuan Zekaria pa Jehoiada khawngaihna chu hre reng lovin a fapa chu a that ta a ni. Tin, a thih dâwn chuan, “ Lalpan a rawn ngaihtuah ang a, phuba a la rawn lâksak ang,” a ti a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, kum a lo vei chuan Suria sipaiten an rawn bei a; Judai ram leh Jerusalem-ah an lût a, an mi lian zawng zawngte chu an that a, Damaska lal hnênah an râllâk sum zawng zawngte chu an thawn ta vek mai a.

Suria sipaite chu tlêm tê chauh an lo thawk a ni a; an pi leh pute Pathian, Lalpa chu an hawisan avângin Lalpan sipai tam tak maite chu an kutah a pe a ni. Chutiang chuan Joasa chungah hremna an thlentîr a ni.

Tin, an hawsan hnu chuan (natna nasa tak tuarin an hawsan a ni) ama mite ngeiin puithiam Jehoiada fapate thisen avâng khân an phiar a, a khuma a mu lai chu an that a, a thi ta a. Davida khawpuiah chuan an phûm a; nimahsela, lalte thlânah an phûm ve lo.
Hêngte hi amah phiartute chu an ni: Amon mi Simeathi fapa Zabada leh Moab mi Simrithi fapa Jehozabada.

Tichuan, a fapate chungchâng thûte, a chunga phurrit tak lo innghah chungchâng thûte, Pathian in a din ṭhat chungchâng thûte chu, ngai teh, lal chanchin hrilhfiahna buah chuan ziak a ni. Tichuan, a aiah a fapa Amazia chu a lal ta a.
Amazia chu a lal ṭan tirh chuan kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh kum kua a lal a; a nu hming chu Jehoadani, Jerusalem mi a ni.
Lalpa mit hmuhin thil ṭha a ti a; amaherawhchu, a rilru a pe famkim lo.
Tin, heti hi a lo ni a, a ram chu a lo din ngheh chuan a pa thattu, a chhiahhlawhte a that a.

Amaherawhchu, an fate chu a that lo va, Mosia lehkhabu, dâna chuang, “Fate avângin pate an thi tûr a ni lo va, pate avângin fate an thi tûr a ni hek lo, mi tin mahni sual avângin an thi tûr a ni,” tia Lalpan thu a pêk angin a ti a.

Tin, Amazia chuan Juda-te chu a khâwm chiam a, Juda leh Benjamin mi zawng zawng an chhûngkaw zir zêlin sâng hotute hnuaiah te, za hotute hnuaiah te a awmtîr a; tin, kum sawmhnih achin chung lam zawng a chhiar a, fei leh phaw lek thei, râlkai chin thlan ṭhiau mi nuai thum an awm a.
Tin, Israel rama mi, mi chak huaisen nuai khat, tangkaraw talent zain a ruai bawk a.
Nimahsela, a hnênah Pathian mi, mi pakhat a lo kal a, “Aw lalpa, Israel sipaite chu i hnênah kal ve suh se, Lalpa chu Israel mite (Ephraima thlahte zawng zawng huamin) hnênah chuan a awm si lo va.
Kal pawh ni la, huai takin indonaah chuan che rawh! Chuti lo chuan, Pathianin hmêlma hmaah chuan a titlâwm mai ang che; Pathian chuan ṭanpui theihna leh tihtlâwm theihna a nei si a,” a rawn ti a.

Tin, Amazian Pathian mi hnênah chuan, “A nih leh, Israel sipaite ka pêk tâk talent za chu engtin nge kan tih tâk ang?” a ti a. Tin, Pathian mi chuan, “ Lalpa chuan chu aia tam tak chu a pe thei che a ni,” a ti a.
Tichuan, Amazia chuan Ephraim ram aṭanga sipai lo kalte chu haw leh tûrin a tihrang a; chuvâng chuan Juda-te chungah chuan an thin a rim hle mai a, thinrim engphiarin an haw leh ta a.
Tin, Amazia chuan zâm lovin a mite chu a hruai chhuak a, Chi Ruamah an kal a, Seira thlahte sîngkhat an that a.
Tin, sîngkhat dang chu Juda-ten a nungin an man a, lungpui chhîpah an hruai a, lungpui chhîp aṭang chuan an nam thla chiam mai a, an keh sawm ta rem rum mai a.
Amaherawhchu, Amazian a hnêna râl kâp tûra kal ve lo tûra a hâwntîr sipaite chuan Judai ram khua te, Samari aṭanga Beth-horon thlengin an lo bei a, mi sângthum an that a, râllâk sum tam tak an la a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Amazia chu Edom-ho thata a lo haw chuan Seira thlahteho pathiante a rawn hâwn a, a pathian atân a din a, chibai a bûk a, rimtuite a hâlsak hlawm a.

Chuvâng chuan Amazia chungah chuan Lalpa thin a alh ta a, a hnênah zâwlnei a tîr a, chu mi chuan a hnênah, “I kut ata a mite pawh chhan chhuak thei hlei lo pathiante chu engah tehlul nge i zawn ni?” a ti a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, a hnêna thu a sawi lai mêk chuan lal chuan, “Lal rorêltuah kan siam che em ni? Ngawi mai rawh; engah nge i nun i chân dâwn?” a ti a. Tichuan, zâwlnei chuan, “Pathianin hetianga i tih avâng leh ka remruat i ngaihsân loh avângin tihboral che a rilrûk tih ka hria a ni,” a ti a, a ngawi ta a.
Chutichuan, Juda lal Amazia chuan a remruat chu a pawm a, Israel lal Jehua fapa Jehoahaza fa Joasa hnênah, “Hawh teh, hmai chhanah i lo inen teh ang,” tiin mi a tîr a.

Tin, Israel lal Joasa chuan Juda lal Amazia hnênah, “Lebanon tlâng hlîngin Lebanon tlânga sidar thing hnênah, ‘I fanu kha ka fapa nupuiah neihtîr teh khai,’ tiin a chah a; tin, Lebanon tlânga ramsa a lo kal a, hlîng chu a rawn chîl thlu ta dêr mai a.

Nang hian, ‘Ngai teh, Edom chu ka hneh,’ tiin i chapo a nih hi, i inah tawm hle hle mai rawh; nang leh Juda ram chawp chawpa chhiatna, i tâna pawi tûr thil engah nge i chawh chhuah dâwn ni?” tiin mi a tîr ve a.
Nimahsela, Amazia chuan a lo ngaithla duh lo va; Edom-ho pathiante a zawn avânga Judai ram chu an hmêlmate kuta a pêk theihna tûra Pathian tih a ni a.
Chutichuan, Israel lal Joasa chu a han chho va; Juda lal Amazia nên chuan Judai ram Beth-semes khuaah hmai chhanah an inen ta ngei a.
Tin, Juda-te chan chu Israel-te ai chuan a lo chhe ta zâwk a; mi tin mahni in lamah an tlân haw ta ṭheuh va.

Tin, Israel lal Joasa chuan Juda lal, Ahazia fapa Jehoasa fa Amazia chu Beth-semes-ah chuan a man a, Jerusalem-ah a hruai a, Jerusalem kulh chu Ephraim kulh kawngka aṭanga kulh kil kawngka thlengin tawng zali zet a tichim a.
Tin, Obed-edoma enkawl Lalpa ina mi bâkah lal ina ro dah khâwmnaa mi, rangkachak leh tangkarua leh bungbêl awm zawng zawng a la a, hrênga tâng tûrte a hruai bawk a; tin, Samari khuaah a haw leh ta a.
Tin, Juda lal Joasa fapa Amazia chu Israel-te lal Jehoahaza fapa Joasa thih hnuin kum sâwm leh kum nga a la dam a.
Tichuan, Amazia thiltih dangte chu a bul aṭanga a tâwp thlengin, ngai teh, Juda lal leh Israel lalte lal lai thu ziakna buah a chuang a ni lâwm ni?
Chutichuan, Amazian Lalpa zui a bânsan veleh Jerusalem-ah chuan an phiar a, Lakis khuaah a tlân a; nimahsela, Lakis khuaah chuan mi an ûmtîr a, chutah chuan an that ta a.
Tin, a ruang chu sakawrin an phur a, a pi leh pute hnênah Juda khawpuiah an phûm ta a.
Tin, Juda mi zawng zawng chuan kum sâwm leh kum ruk mi Uzia chu an hruai a, a pa Amazia aiah lalah an siam ta a.
Ani chuan lal chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muthilh hnuah Eloth khua chu a siam ṭha a, Judai ramah a telh leh a.
Uzia chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sâwm leh kum ruk mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh kum hnih a lal a, a nu hming chu Jekoli, Jerusalem mi a ni a.
Tin, a pa Amazia thiltih ang apiang ti vein Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha tak a ti ṭhîn a.
Pathian inlârna hre thiam Zekaria dam chhûng chuan Pathian zawng tûrin a insiam tlat a; Pathian a zawn chhûng zawng chuan Pathianin a tihmuingîl zêl a.
Philistia-ho rûn tûrin a thawk chhuak a, Gath kulh te, Jabne kulh te, Asdod kulh te a tichim a; tin, Asdod ramah leh Philistia-ho zîngahte khua a siam a.
Tin, Pathianin Philistia-hote lakah leh Gur-baal-a awm Arabia-ho leh Meun-ho lakahte a ṭanpui a.
Tin, Amon-hote chuan Uzia lakah chhiah an chawi ṭhîn a; tichuan, a lo chak tâk êm avângin Aigupta ram thlengin a hming a thang ta a.
Tin, Uzia chuan Jerusalem-ah Kil Kawngkaah te, Ruam Kawngkaah te, kulh kawina lai kawngkaah te in sâng a sa bawk a, kulhin a hung a.

Tin, thlalêrah pawh in sâng a sa a, ran tam tak a neih avângin tui te a lai chhuak thluah mai a, phai lam leh phaizâwlahte pawh; tin, lo nei mite leh uain sâwr mite tlâng lamah leh ram ṭhaahte chuan a nei a, thlawhhma lam ngaina mi tak a ni.
Tin, Uzia chuan sipai indo mi, lal sipai hotu Hanania hnuaia mi, lehkhaziaktu Jeiela leh hotu Maaseia-ten an ruat ang zêla a pâwl pâwla râl kâp mi a nei bawk a.
Mi chak huaisen ṭhiau, an chhûngkaw puipa zawng zawng chu sînghnih leh sângruk an ni a.
Tin, an hnuaiah chuan sipai zir thiam sa ṭhiau nuai thum leh sângsarih leh zanga hmêlma laka lal ṭanpuitu râl bei mi tak tak an awm a.
Tin, Uzia chuan sipai zawng zawng tân phaw te, thal ngul te, virvawm atân lungte a buatsaih a.

Tin, Jerusalem-ah in sâng leh kulh kil tina daha thal lo kahna leh lung lian fe fea lo denna tûr, mi fingte hriat chhuah khâwlte a siam a. A hming chu ram tin ram tangah a thang ta a; a lo chak hle thlengin a mak a maka ṭanpuiin a awm a.
Nimahsela, a lo chak tâk hnu chuan a rilru a lo sâng ta a, ṭha lo takin thil a ti a, Lalpa a Pathian chungah thil a tisual ta a; maichâma rimtui hâl tûrin Lalpa biak inah a lût ta mai a.
Tin, puithiam Azaria chuan a zui a, mi huai tak tak Lalpa puithiam sawmriat an tel ve a.

Tin, Lal Uzia chu an khap a, a hnênah, “Uzi, Lalpa tâna rimtui hâl hi i tih tûr a ni lo va, rimtui hâl tûra tihhran Arona fapa puithiamte tih tûr a ni zâwk e. Hmun thianghlim ata hi chhuak rawh, thil i tisual a nih hi! Lalpa Pathian laka i ropuina tûr pawh a ni hek lo,” an ti a.

Chutichuan, Uzia chu a thinur ta a; rimtui hâlna tûr mei lâkna a keng a. Tin, chutia puithiamte chunga a thinur lai tak chuan Lalpa inah, rimtui hâlna bulah puithiamte hmaah chuan a chalah a lo phâr chhuak ta a.

Tin, puithiam hotu Azaria leh puithiam zawng zawng chuan an han en a, ngai teh, a chalah chuan a lo phâr a; chuta ṭang chuan an nam chhuak ta thuai a. A ni, Lalpan a hrem avângin amah pawh hmanhmawh tak bawkin a chhuak ta a.

Tichuan, Lal Uzia chu a thih ni thlengin a lo phâr ta a. A phâr avângin in hrangah a awm ta a; Lalpa in ata chu tihchhuah a ni a. Tichuan, a fapa Jothama chu an rama mite rorêlin lal ina awptuah a awm ta a.
Tichuan, Uzia thiltih dang zawng zawngte chu a bul aṭanga a tâwp thlengin Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaian a ziak a.
Chutichuan, Uzia chu a pi leh a pute hnênah chuan a muhîl a, lal inphûmna hmuna a pi leh a pute zîngah an phûm a, “Ani zawng phâr a ni si a,” an ti a. Tichuan, a fapa Jothama chu a aiah a lal ta a.
Jothama chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum ruk a lal a; a nu hming chu Jerusi, Zadoka fanu a ni.
Tin, a pa Uzia thiltih ang apiang ti vein Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn a. Lalpa biak inah erawh chuan a lût ve lo. Nimahsela, mite chuan ṭha lo takin thil an la ti fo mai a.
Lalpa ina kawngkhâr chhakta zâwk a siam a; tin, Ophel kulh chungah chuan in tam tak a sa bawk a.
Tin, Judai tlâng ramah khuate a siam a, ramhnuaiah in ropui tak tak te, in sâng te a sa bawk a.

Tin, Amona thlahte lal a do va; a hneh a. Tin, Amona thlahte chuan chumi kum chuan tangkarua talent za leh buh phur sîng leh barli phur sîngkhat an pe a. Chutiang bawk chuan Amona thlahte chuan a kum hnihna leh a kum thumnaah pawh an pe a.
Chutichuan, Jothama chuan Lalpa a Pathian hmaa a kawng a rêl fel avângin a lo chak ta a.
Tichuan, Jothama thiltih dang zawng zawng, a râl do zawng zawngte, a awm dân zawng zawngte chu, ngai teh, Israel leh Juda lalte chanchin ziakna buah a chuang a.
A lal ṭan tirhin kum sawm hnih leh kum nga mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum ruk a lal a.
Tin, Jothama chu a pi leh a pute hnênah a muhîl a, Davida khawpuiah an phûm a. Tichuan, a fapa Ahaza chu a aiah a lal ta a.
Ahaza chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum ruk a lal a; a pu Davida angin Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha a ti ve lo va.
Israel lalte kawng a zawh zâwk a, Baala-te tân milem chhûn chawpte a siam bawk a.
Hinoma fapa ruamah rimtui te a hâl a Lalpan Israela thlahte hmaa a hnawh chhuah tâk hnamten thil tenawm tak an tih ṭhin angin a fate meiah a luhtîr a.
Tin, hmun sângah te, tlângah te, thing hring tin hnuaiah te a inthawi a, rimtuite a hâl ṭhîn a.
Chuvângin, Lalpa a Pathianin Suria lal kutah a pe a; an bei a, a mite tam tak salah an hruai a, Damaska-ah an kalpui a. Tin, Israel lal kutah pêk a ni bawk a, ani chuan tam tak a that a.
Remalia fapa Peka chuan Judai ramah nuai khat leh sînghnih ni khatah a that a, an za chuan mi huaisen ṭheuh an ni; an pi leh pute Lalpa Pathian chu an hawisan vâng a ni.
Tin, Ephraim mi chak Zikrian lal fapa Maaseia leh in chhûng puipa Azrikama leh Elkana, lal dawttu chu a that a.
Tin, Israela thlahten an unaute nuai hnih, hmeichhia te, an fapa te, an fanute salah an hruai a; râllâk tam tak an lâksak bawk a, râllâk chu Samari-ah an thlen a.

Nimahsela, chutah chuan Lalpa zâwlnei a lo awm a, a hming chu Odeda a ni; Samari-a lo kal tûr sipaite chu a va hmuak a, an hnênah, “Ngai teh u, Lalpa, in pi leh pute Pathian chu Juda-te chungah a thinur a, in kutah a pe che u a ni a, thinrima in thahna chuan vân a han tawng ta a.
Tin, Juda leh Jerusalem mite chu bâwihnu leh bâwihpaa siam in tum a; nimahsela, nangni ngei pawh hian Lalpa in Pathian chungah in tisual ve a ni lâwm ni?
Chuvângin, ka thu hi pawm ula, in unau sala in mante hi hâwntîr leh rawh u, Lalpa thinurna nasa tak mai chu in chungah a awm a ni,” a ti a.
Tichuan, Ephraim-ho hotu ṭhenkhat, Johanana fapa Azaria te, Mesilemotha fapa Berekia te, Saluma fapa Jehizkia te, Hadlaia fapa Amasa te chuan indona aṭanga lo hawte chu an lo kalh ve bawk a,

an hnênah, “Salte chu in rawn hruai lût tûr a ni lo, kan sual leh kan bawhchhiatna belhchhahin Lalpa chungah bawhchhiatna min thlensak dâwn a ni; kan sualna chu a nasa hle si a, Israel mite chungah thinurna nasa tak a awm a ni,” an lo ti a.
Chutichuan, sipaite chuan mi liante leh mipui hmaah chuan salte leh râllâk sumte chu an hnutchhiah ta a.

Tin, an hming lam tâkhote chu an lo tho va, salte chu an hruai a, râllâk thil chuanin saruaka awm zawngte chu silhfên an bân a, an tuam a, pheikhawkte an buntîr a, ei tûr leh in tûr an pe a, hriak te an thih a, a chhiaṭhate zawng zawng chu sabengtungah an chuantîr a, tûm khua Jeriko-a an unaute hnênah an kaltîr ta a; tin, anni chu Samari-ah an haw leh ta a.
Chumi lai chuan Lal Ahaza chuan Suria lalte ṭanpuia sâwm tûrin mi a tîr a;
Edom-ho chuan Juda-ho chu an han beiha, salah te an rawn man leh avângin.

Tin, Philistia-hote pawhin phai lam khuate leh Juda Chhim te an rawn la a, Beth-semes te, Aijalon te, Gederoth te, Soko te a khawperte nên; tin, Timna leh a khawper te, Gimzo pawh a khawperte nên an la a, chûngah chuan an awm a.
Juda lal Ahaza khan Juda-te dik lo takin a timualpho fo va, Lalpa chungah thil sual nasa tak a tih avâng khân Lalpan Juda-te chu a titlâwm a ni.
Tin, Assuria lal Tilgath-pilnesera a hnênah a kal a, tihchak ahnêkin a timangang zâwk a.
Ahaza chuan Lalpa in leh lal in leh mi lian ina mi thilte a la a, Assuria lal a pe a; nimahsela, a sâwt chuang si lo.
A mangan lai tak te pawh chuan he Lal Ahaza hian Lalpa chungah thil a la tisual deuh deuh ta mai a.

Amah beitu Damaska-ho pathian hnênah te a inthawi a; “Suria lalte pathian chuan anmahni a puih avângin mi puih ve theih nân an hnênah ka inthawi dâwn a ni,” te a ti a. Nimahsela, amah leh Israel mi zawng zawng chhiatna a ni si a.
Tin, Ahaza chuan Pathian ina bungbêlte chu a khâwm vek a, Pathian ina bungbêlte chu a tisawm vek a, Lalpa in kawngkhârte chu a khâr tlat a; tin, Jerusalem kil tinah maichâm a siam a.
Tin, Juda khaw tam takah chuan pathian dangte tân rimtui hâl nân hmun sângte a siam a, Lalpa, a pi leh pute Pathian a tithinur a.
A thiltih dang zawng zawng leh a awm dân zawng zawng, a bul aṭanga a tâwp thlengin, ngai teh, Juda leh Israel lalte chanchin buah a chuang a.
Tin, Ahaza chu a pi leh a pute hnênah a muhîl a, Jerusalem khawpuiah chuan an phûm a; Israel lalte thlânah chuan an dah lo a ni. Tichuan, a fapa Hezekia chu a aiah a lal ta a.
Hezekia chu kum sawmhnih leh kum nga mi a nihin a lal ṭan a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmhnih leh kum kua a lal a; a nu hming chu Abiji, Zekaria fanu a ni a.
Tin, a pu Davida thiltih apiang ti vein Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn a.
Ani chuan a lal ṭan kum thla khatnaah Lalpa in kawngkhârte chu a hawng a, a chei ṭha a.
Puithiamte leh Levi-hote a hruai lût a, chhak lampang hmun zau laiah a hruai khâwm a,

an hnênah, “Nangni Levi-hote u, ka thu hi ngaithla rawh u! Nangmahni intithianghlim phawt ula; tin, Lalpa, in pi leh pute Pathian in hi tithianghlim ula, hmun thianghlim ata bawlhhlawhte hi paih chhuak rawh u.
Kan pi leh pute chuan thil an lo tisual ta a, Lalpa kan Pathian mit hmuha thil ṭha lo chu an lo ti a, an lo hawisan a, Lalpa awmna chu an hawisan a, an lo hnuchhawn ta a.
Hulhliap kawngkhârte chu an khâr a, khâwnvârte chu an timit a, Israel-te Pathian hmun thianghlimah chuan rimtuite an hâl lo va, hâlral thilhlante an hlân lo bawk a.
Chuvâng chuan Lalpa thinurna chu Juda-te leh Jerusalem chungah a awm a, in mita in hmuh ang hian, ram tin ram tanga tei tei tûr leh mak tih atân leh nuihzatbûr atân a lo siam ta a ni.
Ngai teh u, kan pi leh pute chu khandaiha tihtlâwmin an lo awm a, kan fanu leh kan fapate, kan nupuite chu chûng avâng chuan salah an lo awm a.
Ngai teh u, a thinurna nasa tak chu a kian theih nân Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian hnênah thuthlun ka tum a ni.
Ka naute u, ngûrchuai suh u, Lalpa chuan, a rawngbâwltu in ni a, a hmaa a rawngbâwla awm tûr leh rimtui hâltuah a thlang tawh che u a ni,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Levi mi Amasaia fapa Mahatha te, Kohath mi Azaria fapa Joela te, Meraria fapate zînga Abdia fapa Kisa te, Jehalelela fapa Azaria te, Gerson mi Zima fapa Joa te, Joa fapa Edena te,
Elizaphana fapate zînga mi Simria leh Jeiela te, Asapha fapate zînga mi Zekaria leh Matania te,
Hemana fapate zînga mi Jehuela leh Simeia te, Jeduthuna fapate zînga mi Semaia leh Uziela te chu an thawk chhuak a.
An unaute an ko khâwm a, an intithianghlim a, Lalpa thûa lal thupêk anga Lalpa in tifai tûrin an lût a.

Tin, puithiamte chu a tifai tûrin Lalpa in chhûngril lamah an lût a, Lalpa biak ina thil bawlhhlawh an hmuh zawng zawng chu Lalpa in kawtah an la chhuak a. Tin, Levi-hovin an la a, Kidron luiah an kalpui a.
Thla khatna ni khat nîah an bei ṭan a, chumi thla ni riat nîah Lalpa hulhliap an bei thleng a; tichuan, ni riatah Lalpa in chu an tithianghlim a; thla khatna, ni sâwm leh ni ruk nîah an zo vek a.

Chutichuan, Lal Hezekia hnênah lal inah an lût a, “ Lalpa in chu kan tifai zo ta vek e, hâlral thilhlan hlanna maichâm te, chumia bungbêl zawng zawng te, chhang chhiahna dawhkân te, chumia hmanrua zawng zawngte pawh.
Tin, Lal Ahazan a lal laia thil a tihsuala, a thehthang bo bungbêl zawng zawngte pawh kan din leh vek a, kan tithianghlim bawk a; tin, ngai teh, Lalpa maichâm hma lamah a awm e,” an ti a.
Chutichuan, Lal Hezekia chu zîng takah a tho va, khuaa mi lianhote chu a ko khâwm a, Lalpa inah chuan an chho va.

Tin, ram leh hmun thianghlim leh Juda-hote tâna sual thawina tûr, bâwngpa pasarih leh berâmpa pasarih leh berâmno pasarih leh kêlpa pasarih an kai chho va. Tin, Arona fapa puithiamte chu Lalpa maichâma hlân tûrin thu a pe a.

Chutichuan, bâwngpate chu an talh a, puithiamte chuan thisen chu an la a, maichâm chu an theh a; tin, berâmpate pawh chu an talh a, a thisen chuan maichâm chu an theh a; tin, berâmnote pawh chu an talh a, a thisen chuan maichâm chu an theh a.
Tin, kêlpate chu sual thawi nân lal leh mipuiho kiangah chuan an rawn kai hnai a, an chungah chuan an kut an nghat a.

Tin, puithiamte chuan an talh a, an thisen chuan Israel mi zawng zawng tâna remna siam nân maichâmah sual thawina an hlan a; Israel mi zawng zawng tân hâlral thilhlan leh sual thawina siam tûrin lal chuan thu a pe a.

Tin, Davida leh lal zâwlnei Gada leh zâwlnei Nathana thupêk angin, Lalpa inah chuan Levi-ho chu dârbenthek te, perhkhuang te, ṭingṭangte tum tûrin a dah a; thupêk chu a zâwlneite hmanga Lalpa pêk a ni si a.
Tin, Levi-ho chu Davida siam thil tum rîk mi nên an ding a, puithiamte chu tawtawrâwt nên.

Tin, Hezekia chuan maichâma hâlral thilhlan hlân tûr chuan thu a pe a. Tin, hâlral thilhlan an han hlan ṭan chuan Lalpa hla chu tawtawrâwt leh Israel lal Davida siam thil tum rîk nên an sa ṭan bawk a.
Tin, mipuite chuan Pathian chibai an bûk a, hla satute chuan hla an sa a, tawtawrâwt hâmtute chuan an hâm a, hâlral thilhlan hlan zawh hma loh chuan chutiang chuan an ti reng a.
Tin, thilhlan an hlan zawh chuan lal leh a hnêna awm ve zawng zawngte chuan kûnin Pathian chibai an bûk a.
Tin, Lal Hezekia leh mi liante chuan Levi-hote chu Davida leh zâwlnei Asapha phuah fakna hla sa tûrin thu an pe a. Tin, hlim takin fakna hla an sa a, an kûn a, Pathian chibai an bûk a.

Chutichuan, Hezekia chuan, “ Lalpa tân in intithianghlim ta a, lo hnai ula, Lalpa inah inthawina leh lâwmthu sawina thilhlan rawn hlân rawh u khai,” a ti a. Tîn, mipuite chuan inthawina te, lâwmthu sawina thilhlante an rawn hlân a, a duh apiangin hâlral thilhlan an rawn hlân a.
Tin, mipuiin hâlral thilhlan an rawn hlan zât chu bâwngpa sawmsarih leh berâmpa za leh berâmno zahnih a ni; hêng zawng zawng hi Lalpa tâna hâlral thilhlan vek a ni.
Thilhlan zawng zawng chu bâwngpa zaruk, berâmpa sângthum a ni.

Amaherawhchu, puithiam an tlêm lutuk a, hâlral thilhlan chu an lip sêng lo va; chuvângin, an unau Levi-hote chuan, an peih hma chuan puithiamte chu an intihthianghlim thlengin an puibâwm a (Levi-hote chu puithiamhote ai mahin intihthianghlim thûah an khermei zâwk si a).
Tin, hâlral thilhlante chu a tam êm a, hâlral thilhlan tin atâna remna thilhlan thau te, in tûr thilhlan atân te pawh a tam êm êm bawk a. Chutichuan, Lalpa in rawngbâwl dân an tifel a.
Mipuite tâna Pathianin a buatsaih thil avâng chuan Hezekia leh mi zawng zawng chu an lâwm êm êm a; rin loh taka thil lo awm thut a ni lehnghâl si a.

Tin, Hezekia chuan Israel ram leh Judai ram zawng zawngah mi a tîr a, Ephraim ram leh Manase ramahte pawh, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian tâna Kalhlên Kût nei tûra Jerusalem-a Lalpa ina lo kal tûrin lehkha a thawn bawk a.
Lal leh a mi liante leh Jerusalem-a mipui zawng zawng chuan thla hnihnaah Kalhlên Kût neih an rawt a.
Chumi lai chuan puithiam intithianghlimte an la tam tâwk lo va, Jerusalem-a mipui an la pun khâwm loh avângin an la kût thei lo va.
An thil ruat chu lal leh mipuiho ngaihin a dik a.

Chutichuan, Israel ram zawng zawng, Beer-seba aṭanga Dan thlengin Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian tâna Kalhlên Kût nei tûra Jerusalem-a lo kal tûra puan tûrin thu an tinghet ta a; a dân ang tak chuan chutianga tam chuan an la ti ngai lo va.

Chutichuan, lehkha tlânpuitute chu lal leh a mi lianhote lehkha kengin, Israel leh Judai ram zawng zawnga kal tûrin lal thupêk angin an chhuak a, “Nangni Israela thlahte u, Suria lalte kut ata chhuaka la dam chhunte lam chu a lo hawi leh theih nân Lalpa - Abrahama te, Isaaka te, Israela te Pathian lam chu rawn hawi leh rawh u.
Nangni zawng in pi leh pute leh in unaute, Lalpa an pi leh pute Pathian chunga thil tisuala an awma, ṭiau tûra a thlahthlam tâk in hmuhte ang chuan awm ve suh u.

In pi leh pute ang khân tihmawh ve tawh suh ula, Lalpa hnênah intulût zâwk ula, kumkhua atâna a tihthianghlim, a hmun thianghlimah chuan lo lût ula, Lalpa in Pathian rawng chu bâwl rawh u; tichuan, a thinurna nasa tak chu in lak ata a kiantîr dâwn nia.

Lalpa lam in lo hawi leh zawngin in unaute leh in fate chu sala mantute chuan an khawngaih ang a, he ramah hian an lo kal leh dâwn nia: Lalpa in Pathian chu ngilnei tak leh zahngai thei tak a ni si a, a lam in hawi phawt chuan a hawisan lo vang che u,” tiin.
Chutichuan, lehkha tlânpuitute chu khaw tinah Ephraim leh Manase ram zawng zawngah Zebulun thlengin an kal a: nimahsela, anni chuan an lo nuihzatbûr a, an lo hmusit a.
Amaherawhchu, Aser-ho leh Manase-ho leh Zebulun-ho ṭhenkhatin an bengkhawn a, Jerusalem-ah chuan an lo kal a.
Judai ram te phei chu Lalpa thûa lal leh mi lianhote thupêk chu zâwm tûrin Pathianin rilru hmun khat a puttîr a.
Tichuan, thla hnihnaah chuan chhang dawidim telh loh kût nei tûrin mi tam tak Jerusalem-ah chuan an lo pung khâwm chiam a, an tam ngei mai.
Tin, an tho va, Jerusalem-a maichâmte chu an la a; tin, rimtui hâlna maichâmte pawh an la a, Kidron luiah an paih a.
Tichuan, thla hnihna ni sâwm leh ni li ni chuan Kalhlên Kûtna chu an talh a; tin, puithiamte leh Levi-ho chu an inzahpui a, an intithianghlim a, hâlral thilhlan chu Lalpa inah an la lût a.
Tin, Pathian mi Mosia dân ang takin an hmun ṭheuhvah an ding a; tin, puithiamte chuan Levi-ho aṭanga an dawn thisen chu an theh a.
Mipui zîngah chuan intithianghlim lo an tam si a; chuvângin, Lalpa tâna tithianghlim tûrin a thianghlim lo apiangte pualah Levi-hote chuan Kalhlên Kûtna an talh a.

Ephraim mi te, Manase mi te, Isakar mi te, Zebulun mi tam takte chu an intithianghlim lo na a, dân lo angin Kalhlên Kûtna chu an ei ve a. Hezekian, “Tu pawh an thinlunga Pathian Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian zawngtu apiangte chu hmun thianghlim dân ang takin intithianghlim lo mah sela, Lalpa ngilnei taka chuan ngaidam ṭheuh rawh se,” tiin a ṭawngṭaisak a.
Tin, Lalpan Hezekia ṭawngṭaina chu a ngaithla a, mipuite chu a tidam ta a.

Tin, Israel mi Jerusalem-a awmte chuan chhang dawidim telh loh kût chu hlim takin ni sarih an hmang a; tin, Levi-ho leh puithiamho chuan ṭingṭang ring tak nêna Lalpa chawimawia hla sain ni tin Lalpa an fak a.

Tin, Hezekia chuan thiam tak maia Lalpa mawi taka faktu Levi-hote chu a lo thlamuan a. Chutichuan, Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian hnêna thupha chawiin, remna thilhlante hlânin ni sarih chhûng chu kût ruai an ṭheh ṭumtla a.
Tin, mipui chuan ni sarih dang kût leh an rawt a; tichuan, ni sarih dang hlim takin an kût leh a.

Tin, Juda lal Hezekia chuan mipuite chu bâwngpa sângkhat leh berâm sângsarih talh atân a pe a; mi lianhote pawhin mipuite chu bâwngpa sângkhat leh berâm sîngkhat an pe bawk a; puithiam tam tak an intithianghlim a.
Tichuan, Juda mipui zawng zawng chu puithiamte nên, Levi-hote nên, Israel ram aṭanga mipui lo kal zawng zawngte leh hnam dang Israel ram aṭanga lo kal Judai rama awmte chu an hlim êm êm mai a.
Chutichuan, hlimna ropui tak Jerusalem-ah chuan a awm a; Israel lal Davida fapa Solomona chinah chutiang rêng rêng chu Jerusalem-ah a la awm ngai lo.
Chutichuan, puithiam Levi-hote chu an tho va, mipuite chu mal an sâwm a, an aw chu ngaihthlâkin a awm a, an ṭawngṭaina chuan a awmna thianghlim vân chu a thleng ta a.

Tin, chûng zawng zawng chu an tih zawh chuan chuta Israel mi awm zawng zawng chuan, Judai ram zawng zawng leh Benjamin ram leh Ephraim leh Manase rama mi lungphunte an tisawm a, Aseri-te an kit a, hmun sângte leh maichâmte an tihchim vek hma loh chuan Judai ram khuaahte an kal zêl a. Tin, Israela thlahte zawng zawng chu an ramah mahni khaw lam ṭheuhvah an haw leh ta a.

Tin, Hezekia chuan puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu an pâwl dân ang zêlin mi tin puithiamte leh Levi-hoten an thawh ṭheuh tûrin, hâlral thilhlan leh remna thilhlan hlântu atân te, rawngbâwltu atân te, lâwmthu sawitu leh Lalpa awmna kawngkaa vêngtu tûrte pâwl a siamsak hlawm a.
Tin, Lalpa dâna chuang angin zîng lam leh tlai lam hâlral thilhlan atân te, Chawlhni leh thla thar leh hunbi nei kût atânte lal chanvo atân ran a ruat bawk a.
Tin, Jerusalem-a mipuite chu Lalpa dâna an intihchak nân puithiamte leh Levi-hote chanpual pe tûrin thu a pe bawk a.

Tin, thupêk chu a han darh veleh chuan Israela thlahte chuan an buh te, uain te, hriak te, khawizu te, an lova thil haw hmasa berte an rawn pe chiam a; tin, an engkim sâwma pakhat an rawn pe chiam bawk a.
Tin, Israela thlahte leh Juda thlahte, Juda khuatea awmho chuan an bâwng leh berâm sâwma pakhat te, Lalpa an Pathian puala an voh sâwma pakhat te an rawn pe a, an dah khâwm ṭeuh mai a.
Thla thumnaah an dah khâwm ṭan a, thla sarihnaah an dah khâwm zo va.
Tin, Hezekia leh an mi lianten an han hmuh chuan Lalpa leh a mi Israel-te chu an fak a.
Chutichuan, Hezekian an thil dah khâwm chungchâng thu chu puithiamho leh Levi-hote chu a zâwt a.

Tin, Zadok mi, puithiam hotu Azarian a chhâng a, “Miten Lalpa ina thilpêk an rawn lâk tirh aṭangin kan ei zêl a, kan khawpkham hle a, a la awm rui mai a; Lalpan a mite mal a sâwm zêl a, hemi la awm rui hi kan ei bâng a nih hi,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Hezekian Lalpa inah chuan pindante siam tûrin thu a pe a; tichuan, an siam ta a.
Tin, thilpêk te, sâwma pakhat te, Pathian pualte chu rinawm takin an thiar lût a; an hotu chu Levi mi Konania a ni a, a unau Simeia chu a dawttu a ni.

Tin, Konania leh a unau Simeia hnuaiah chuan Lal Hezekia leh Pathian ina hotu Azaria ruatin endiktu Jehiela te, Azazia te, Nahatha te, Asahela te, Jerimotha te, Jozabada te, Eliela te, Ismakia te, Mahatha te, Benaia te an awm a.
Tin, Levi mi Imna fapa Korea, chhak lam kawngkhâr vêngtu chu Pathian hnêna mahni duh thûa thilpêk enkawltu leh Lalpa tân thilpêk leh thil thianghlim semtu a ni a.

Tin, ama hnuaiah, puithiam awmna khuaahte chuan Edena te, Miniamina te, Jesua te, Semaia te, Amaria te, Sekania te an awm leh a, chûng chuan an unaute chu a pâwl pâwlin a lian leh a tête hnênah an chanvo tûr an sem bawk a;
thlahtua ngaih mipa kum thum achin chung lam, ni tina Lalpa ina thawh tûr mamawh nei an pâwl dân ang zêla kal ṭhînte tiam lovin.
Puithiamte hna inchhâwk dân tûr chu a chi chiin an ruat a, Levia chite erawh chu kum sawmhnih achin chung lam a pâwl pâwlin an ruat a.
Puithiamte chu an nupui te, an fapa te, an fanu te leh an chhûngkuaa mi dangte nên rinawm taka an intihthianghlim reng avângin chhinchhiah vek an ni a.
Tin, Arona thlah, khaw tin daifêma awm puithiamte leh Levi-ho thlahte ziaknaa chuang apiangte chanvo pe tûrin mi ruat bîk an awm.
Tin, chutiang chuan Judai ram zawng zawngah Hezekian a ti a. Lalpa a Pathian mit hmuha ṭha leh dik leh rinawm thil a ti ṭhîn a.
Pathian ina rawngbâwl lam thûah te, dân lam thûah te, thupêk lam thûah te, a Pathian zawn thûah te, a tih apiangah a rilru zawng zawngin a ti a, a hmuingîl ta zêl a.
Chutianga rinawm taka thil an tih hnu chuan Assuria lal Senakeriba a lo thawk a, Judai ramah chuan a lo lût a, kulh nei khuate chu a rawn hual a, lâk a rawn tum a.
Tin, Senakeriba a lo thawk a, Jerusalem rawn beih a tum tih Hezekian a hriat chuan,
khaw pâwn lama tuite chu tihchah tûrin a mi liante leh a mi chakte chu a râwn a; tichuan, an ṭanpui a.
Chutichuan, mi tam tak an pung khâwm a, tui zawng zawng leh ram chhûnga luang tlang luite chu an dang chat a, “Assuria lalte chu an lo luha, tui tam tak engah nge an rawn neih tehlul ang?” an ti a.
Tichuan, a intihuai a, kulh chim lai zawng zawng chu a siam a, in sângte a din ṭha a, pâwn lam kulhte pawh. Tin, Davida khuaa Milo chu a tinghet a, hriamhreite leh phawte tam tak a siam a.
Tin, indonaa mipui hotute a siam a, khawpui kawngkhâr hmun zau laiah a ko khâwm a,
“Chak tak leh huai takin awm rawh u; Assuria lal leh a hote mipui chu hlau suh ula, zâm hek suh u; kan lama ṭang chu a lama ṭang aiin a chak zâwk si a.

A lama ṭang chu tisa sipai an ni a; min pui tûr leh mi dosak tûra kan lama ṭang erawh chu Lalpa kan Pathian a ni si a,” tiin thlamuanna thu a sawi a. Tin, mipui chuan Juda lal Hezekia thusawite chu an ring a.
Chumi hnuah chuan Assuria lal Senakeriba chuan (amah leh a sipaite chu Lakis-ah an awm a) Juda lal Hezekia leh Jerusalem-a Juda mi zawng zawngte hnênah chuan,
“Assuria lal Senakeriba chuan heti hian a ti, ‘Jerusalem lâk chu eng nge ni in han rin lohna?
Hezekia chuan, “ Lalpa kan Pathianin Assuria lal kut ata min chhan chhuak ang,” tiin rilṭâm leh tuihâla in thihna mai tûrin a thlêm che u a ni lâwm ni?
Hezekia bawk hi a ni lâwm ni, a hmun sângte leh a maichâmte tichima Juda mi leh Jerusalem-a mite hnêna, “Maichâm pakhatah Pathian in bia ang a, rimtui in hâl ang,” tia thu petu kha?
Kei leh ka puten ram tin hnam tin chunga kan thiltihte kha in hre lo vem ni? Eng hnam pathian mahin ka kut ata an ram chu an humsak thei lo a ni lâwm ni?
Tu hnam pathian nge ka puten an tihboral ka kut ata an mite chhan chhuak thei awma, nangni Pathian pawhin ka kut ata a han chhan chhuah theih bîkna tûr che u?

Chuvângin, Hezekia chuan bum che u suh sela, chutiang chuan thlêm che u suh sela, amah chu ring suh u; eng hnam pathian leh eng ram pathian mah an mite ka kut ata leh ka pute kut ata chhan chhuak thei an awm lo va; engtin nge in Pathian chuan ka kut ata a chhan chhuah theih bîk tehlul ang che u?’ ” tiin Jerusalem-ah a mite a tîr a.
Tin, a mite chuan chu aia nasa chuan Lalpa Pathian leh a chhiahhlawh Hezekia chungchâng thu a ṭha lo lamin an sawi a.

Tin, Israel-te Lalpa, Pathian chawk thinur zâwng leh a sawi chhe zâwngin lehkha a ziak bawk a, “Ram tin, hnam tin pathianten ka kut ata an mite an chhan chhuak thei lo ang bawkin, Hezekia Pathian pawhin ka kut ata a mite a chhan chhuak tawp lo vang,” tiin.
Tin, khua chu an lâk theih nân a râp tûr leh timangang tûrin Jerusalem-a kulha awmte chu Juda ṭawngin ring takin an au khum a.
Jerusalem Pathian chu mihring kuta siam, khawvêl pathian ang lekfangin an sawi a.
Chutichuan, Lal Hezekia leh Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaia chu chumi avâng chuan an ṭawngṭai a, vâna mi an au va.

Tin, Lalpan vântirhkoh a tîr a, chu chuan Assuria lal riahhmuna mi chak huaisen zawng zawng te, hma hruaitu hotute chu a tihlum a. Tichuan, zak tak hmêl puin a ram lamah a haw leh ta a. Tin, a pathian ina a va kal chu ama rîla rahte ngeiin khandaihin an lo tihlum ta a.
Chutiang chuan Lalpan Hezekia leh Jerusalem-a mite chu, Assuria lal Senakeriba kut ata leh mi dang zawng zawng kut ata chu a chhan him a, an vêla mite lakah a vêng a.
Tin, mi tam takin Jerusalem-ah Lalpa tân thilpêk an rawn la a, thil hlu tak takte Juda lal Hezekia chu an rawn pe a; chuta ṭang chuan hnam tin mit hmuhah chawimawiin a awm ta a.
Chûng lai chuan Hezekia chu thih ngamin a na a, Lalpa hnênah a ṭawngṭai a; tin, a lo chhâng a, chhinchhiahna a pe a.
Nimahsela, Hezekia chuan a tâna ṭha tûra tih ang chuan a ti lo va, a rilru a lo chapo tâk avângin; chuvângin, a chungah leh Juda-te leh Jerusalem chungah thinurna a lo thleng ta a.
Amaherawhchu, Hezekia chuan a rilru chapona chu inchhîrin a inngaitlâwm leh a, amah leh Jerusalem-a mite nên; tichuan, Hezekia dam chhûng chuan Lalpa thinurna chu an chungah a thleng ta lo va.
Tin, Hezekia chuan sum leh pai a lo ngah a, a lo ropui ta hle mai a; tangkarua te, rangkachak te, lunghlu te, rimtui te, phaw te leh bungbêl ṭha tak tak dah khâwmna in a sa a;
buh te, uain te, hriak te dah khâwmna in pawh a sa bawk a; tin, ran tinrêng dahna leh berâm huangte a siam a.
Tin, khuate pawh a siam bawk a, berâm rual leh bâwng rual a ngah êm êm mai a; Pathianin neinung takin a siam a.
Hezekia bawk hian Gihon lui tui chhakta zâwk a tiping a, Davida khaw thlang lampangah a luan thlâktîr bawk a. Tichuan, Hezekia chu a thiltih zawng zawngah chuan a hmuingil zêl a.
Babulon mi lianten palaia an tirha a rama thilmak an zawh thûah chuan, a rilrua awm zawng zawng a hriat theih nân Pathianin thlahthlamin a fiah a.
Hezekia thiltih dang zawng zawng te, a thil tihṭhat te chu, ngai teh, Amoza fapa zâwlnei Isaia inlârna bu, Juda lal leh Israel lalte chanchin buah a chuang a.

Tin, Hezekia chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, Davida fapate thlân hmun chhohnaah an phûm a; Juda-te zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a mite chuan a thih ni chuan ropui takin an chawimawi a. Tin, a fapa Manasea chu a aiah a lal ta a.
Manasea chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sâwm leh kum hnih a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmnga leh kum nga a lal a.
Tin, Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo, Israela thlahte hmaa Lalpan a hnawh chhuah Pathian hre lo hnamten thil tenawm tak an tih ang chu a ti ve ṭhîn a.
A pa Hezekian a tihchim hnu hmun sângte a din ṭha a, Baala-te tân maichâmte a din a, Aseri lemte a siam a, vâna awm zawng zawng khi a bia a, an rawng te a bâwl a.
“Jerusalem-ah kumkhuain ka hming a awm ang,” Lalpan a tihna Lalpa inah chuan maichâmte a siam a.
Lalpa in hung chhûng kawtlai pahnihah chuan vâna awm zawng zawng tân maichâmte a siam a.
Hinoma fapa ruamah meiah a fate chu a luhtîr a; aien te a chîng a, dawi te a hmang a, ramhuai aienthiam zâwlte leh dawithiamte a ruai ṭhîn a; Lalpa tithinur tûrin a mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti ṭhîn a.

Tin, Pathianin Davida leh a fapa Solomona hnêna, “He in leh Jerusalem khua, Israel chi zawng zawng zînga ka thlanah hian ka hming chu kumkhuain ka awmtîr ang a; thu ka pêk zawng zawng leh dân zawng zawng te, thuruat te, thiltih tûr Mosia hmanga ka pêkte kha an zawm phawt chuan, an pi leh pute ka pêk tawh ram ata chu Israel-hote ke chu ka pên chhuahtîr tawh lo vang,” a lo tih tawhna Pathian inah chuan ama siam, milem siam chawp a dah a.
Tin, Manasea chuan Juda-te leh Jerusalem-a mite chu thil a tihsualtîr a; tichuan, Lalpan Israel-te hmaa a tihboral tâk hnamte ai mahin thil an tisual zâwk a.
Tin, Lalpan Manasea leh a mite hnênah thu a sawi ṭhîn a; nimahsela, an ngaihsak lo va.
Chuvâng chuan Lalpan Assuria sipai hotute a tîr a, Manasea chu khaidiatin an hlîng a, kawl an buntîr a, Babulon-ah an kalpui ta a.
Tin, mangang taka a awm lai chuan Lalpa a Pathian chu a zawng a, a pi leh pute Pathian hmaah chuan nasa takin a intihnuai a,
a hnênah a ṭawngṭai a, khawngaih a hlawh a, a dîlna chu a ngaihthlâksak a, Jerusalem-ah a ramah chuan a hruai leh ta a. Tichuan, Manasea chuan Lalpa chu Pathian a nih a hre ta a.

Chumi hnuah chuan Davida khaw pâwn lama Gihon thlang lampang ruamah Sangha Kawngkhâr luhna thlengin kulh a siam a, Ophel hual vêlin sâng takin a din a; tin, Juda khua kulh nei zawng zawngah chuan hotu huaisen tak takte a dah a.
Ram dang pathiante leh milemte chu Lalpa in ata a thehthang bo va, Lalpa in tlâng leh Jerusalem-a maichâm a siam zawng zawng chu khua ata an paih vek a.
Lalpa maichâm a siam a, remna thilhlan inthawina te, lâwm thu sawina te a hlân a, Juda-te chu Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian rawngbâwl tûrin thu a pe a.
Mipuite chu hmun sângahte chuan an la inthawi reng a; amaherawhchu, Lalpa an Pathian hnênah chauh a ni ta zâwk a.
Manasea chanchin dang zawng zawng te, a Pathian hnêna a ṭawngṭai thûte, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian hminga zâwlneiin a hnêna thu an sawi thute chu, ngai teh, Israel lalte chanchin zîngah a chuang a.

A ṭawngṭaina te leh Pathianin a khawngaihna leh a intihhnuai hmaa a sualna zawng zawng leh hmun sâng a siama, Aseri leh milem siam chawp a dinna hmun zawng zawng pawh, ngai teh, Hozaia chanchin ziakna buah a chuang vek a ni.
Chutichuan, Manasea chu a pi leh pute hnênah a muhîl a, ama inah an phûm a. Tichuan, a fapa Amona chu a aiah a lal ta a.
Amona chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum hnih a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawm hnih a lal a.
A pa Manasea tih ang bawkin Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti a; a pa Manasean a siam milem siam chawp zawng zawng hnênah Amona chu a inthawi a, an rawng a bâwl a.
A pa Manasea a intihnuai ang khân Lalpa hmaah a intihnuai ve lo va. Amona hi chu a sual zual sauh sauh mai a ni.
Tin, a chhiahhlawhten an phiar a, ama inah an tihlum a.
Nimahsela, Amona phiartu zawng zawng chu mipuiin an that ve vek a. Tichuan, mipuite chuan a fapa Josia chu a aiah lalah an siam ta a.
Josia chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum riat mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthum leh kum khat a lal a.
Tin, Lalpa mit hmuhah thil ṭha a ti ṭhîn a, a pu Davida kawngte a zawh a, ding lamah emaw, vei lamah emaw a pênsan lo va.

Kum riat a lal kum, naupang tak a la nih lai aṭang rêngin a pu Davida Pathian a zawng ṭan a; tin, kum sâwm leh kum hnih a lal kumin Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a hmun sâng te, Aseri te, milem siam chawp te, milem chhûn chawpte a thian fai a.

Baala maichâmte chu a mit hmuhah an tichim a; tin, chûng aia sânga ni lemte chu a kit a; Aseri te, milem siam chawp te, milem chhûn chawpte chu a tisawm dep a, an hnêna inthawi ṭhînte thlân chungah a theh darh vek a.
Puithiamte ruh chu an maichâmahte a hâl a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem chu a thian fai a.
Tin, chutiang bawk chuan Manase te, Ephraim te, Simeon te, Naphtali khuate lamin a ti vek a.
Tin, maichâmte a tichim a, Aseri te, milem siam chawpte chu a tisawm dep a, Israel ram zawng zawnga ni lemte chu a kit vek a, Jerusalem-ah a haw leh a.

Tin, a lal kum sâwm leh kum riat kum, a ram leh inte a then fai kum chuan Azalia fapa Saphana te, khaw awptu Maaseia te, Joahaza fapa lehkhaziaktu Joa te chu Lalpa a Pathian in siam ṭha tûrin a tîr a.

Tin, puithiam Hilkia hnênah an kal a, kawngkhâr vêngtu Levi-hoten Manase mi te, Ephraim mi te, Israel-ho la awm chhun te, Juda mi leh Benjamin mi te, Jerusalem-a mite hnên ata an lo lâk khâwm, Pathian ina an rawn dah tangka chu an pe a.
Tin, Lalpa in satu hnathawktute an pe a; tin, Lalpa in hnathawktute chuan in siam ṭhatute leh cheitute an pe a;
Juda lalten an lo tihchhiat tâk in siam ṭhat nân lung chher te, a zawmna te leh a khanchhukte atâna thing lei nân themthiamte leh in satute chu an pe a.

Tin, mite chuan hna chu rinawm takin an thawk a; an hotu, hnathawh rêlbâwltute chu, Meraria fapate zînga Levi mi Jahatha leh Obadia te, Kohath mi fapate zînga mi Zekaria leh Mesulama-te an ni a; tin, Levi mi mi dang, thil tum thiam zawng zawngte nên.
A phurha phur mite hotu pawh an ni a, hna tinrêng thawktute thawh tûr rêlbâwltu an ni. Lehkhaziaktu te, hotu te, kawngkhâr vêngtute chu Levi mite zînga mi an ni.
Tin, Lalpa ina an rawn dah sumte an han phawrh chuan, puithiam Hilkia chuan Mosia hmanga pêk Lalpa dân bu chu a hmu chhuak a.
Tin, Hilkia chuan lehkhaziaktu Saphana hnênah chuan, “ Lalpa inah dân bu kan hmu chhuak ta,” a ti a. Tin, Hilkia chuan lehkhabu chu Saphana a pe a.
Tin, Saphana chuan lehkhabu chu lal hnênah a kalpui a, “I chhiahhlawhten tih tûra ruat zawng zawng chu an ti a.
Lalpa ina tangka awm chu an bun chhuak a, hotute leh hnathawktute chu an pe a,” tiin thu a thlen a.
Tin, lehkhaziaktu Saphana chuan, “Puithiam Hilkia chuan lehkhabu mi pe,” tiin lal chu a hrilh bawk a. Tin, Saphana chuan lal hmaah a chhiar a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, lalin dân thute chu a han hriat chuan a puan a pawt thlêr a.

Tin, lal chuan, “Kal ula, dân thu in hmuh chhuah chungchâng thûah hian, keimah leh Israel leh Judai rama mite tân Lalpa min va râwnsak teh u; kan pi leh puten he dân bua chuang ang hian Lalpa thu chu an lo zawm loh avâng hian, kan chungah Lalpa thinurna chu a lo awm nasa ta a ni si a,” tiin Hilkia te, Saphana fapa Ahikama te, Mika fapa Abdona te, lehkhaziaktu Saphana te, lal chhiahhlawh Asaia te chu thu a pe a.

Tichuan, lalin thu a pêkate leh Hilkia chu, silhfên enkawltu Hasra fa Tokhatha fapa Saluma nupui zâwlnei Huldi hnênah chuan an va kal a, chumi thûah chuan an va bia a (Ani chu Jerusalem Misne-a awm a ni).
Tin, ani chuan an hnênah, “ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Ka hnêna rawn tîrtu che u chu hrilh ula,
‘ Lalpa chuan heti hian a ti: Ngai teh u, he hmun leh a chhûnga awmte chungah hian thil ṭha lo ka thlentîr ang a, Juda lal hmaa an chhiar chhuah tâk lehkhabua chuang ânchhia zawng zawngte pawh;
an kut thiltiha min tihthinur nâna min hawisana, pathian dangte tâna rimtui an hâl avângin he hmun chungah hian ka thinurna leih a ni a, tihdaih a ni lo vang,’ tiin.

Amaherawhchu, Lalpa râwn tûra rawn tîrtu che u Juda lal hnênah chuan hetiang hian sawi ang che u, ‘ Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian chuan heti hian a ti: Chûng thu i hriatte chuan i thinlung a tihnêm avânga Pathian hmaa i intihhniama, he hmun chungchâng thu leh a chhûnga awmte chungchâng thu i hriata, ka hmaa i intihhnuaia, i puan i pawh thlêra, ka hmaa i ṭah avângin kei pawhin i thu chu ka lo ngaithla a.

Ngai teh, i pi leh i pute hnênah ka kaltîr ang chia, i thlânah thlamuang takin i kal ang a, he hmun leh a chhûnga awmte chunga ka rawn thlentîr tûr thil ṭha lo zawng zawngte chu i mitin a hmu lo vang,’ tiin, ti rawh u,” a ti a. Tin, lal hnênah thu chu an thlen ta a.
Tichuan, lal chuan mi a tîr a, Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a upa zawng zawng chu a ko khâwm a.

Tin, lal leh Juda mi zawng zawng, Jerusalem-a mi zawng zawng te, puithiam leh Levi-ho te, mipuiho zawng zawng a lian a têin Lalpa inah an chho va; Lalpa ina an hmuh chhuah thuthlung bua thu zawng zawng chu an beng hriatah a chhiar a.

Tin, lal chu a hmunah a ding a, chumi lehkhabua chuang thuthlung thu chu tinghet tûrin, a thinlung zawng zawng leh thlarau zawng zawnga Lalpa zui tûr leh a thupêk te, a thuhriattîr te, a thuruatte pawm tûrin Lalpa hmaah chuan thu an thlung a.
Tin, Jerusalem leh Benjamin mi zawng zawng chu chutianga awm tûrin a ti a. Tin, Jerusalem-a mite chuan Pathian, an pi leh pute Pathian thuthlung ang chuan an ti a.

Tin, Josia chuan, Israel ramin a huam zawng zawng ata thil tenawm zawng zawng chu a thehthang bo va, Israel rama awm zawng zawng chu Lalpa an Pathian rawng a bâwltîr a. Tin, a dam chhûng chuan Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian an zui chu an pênsan lo.
Tin, Josia chuan Jerusalem-ah Lalpa tân Kalhlên Kût a nei a; Kalhlên Kûtna tûr chu thla khatna, ni sâwm leh ni li nîah an talh a.
Tin, puithiamte chu an hnathawh a ruatsak a, Lalpa ina rawngbâwl hna thawk tûrin a fuih a.

Tin, Israel mite zirtîrtu, Pathian tâna tihhran Levi-hote hnênah chuan, “Israel lal Davida fapa Solomona in sakah chuan bâwm thianghlim chu dah rawh u; in kokia zâwn a ngai tawh lo vang; Lalpa in Pathian leh a mi Israel-te rawng bâwl tawh rawh u khai.
Tin, Israel lal Davida ziak ang leh a fapa Solomona ziak angin, in chhûngkaw puipa zir zêlin a pâwl pâwlin inbuatsaih rawh u.
Tin, in unauteho chhûngkaw puipa zir zêlin Levi-hote puala chanvo neiin hmun thianghlimah chuan awm rawh u.
Kalhlên kûtna tûr talh ula, intithianghlim ula, Mosia hmanga Lalpa sawi anga ti tûrin in unaute tân buatsaih rawh u,” a ti a.
Tin, Josian chuta mi awm zawng zawng chu Kalhlên Kûta hlan tûrin ran rual zînga mi berâmno leh kêlno sîngthum leh bâwngpa sângthum a pe a; chûngte chu lal sum zînga mi a ni.

Tin, a mi liante chuan mipui te, puithiam te, Levi-hote chu mahni duh thûa hlan atân an pe a. Pathian in hotu Hilkia te, Zekaria te, Jehiela te chuan Kalhlên Kûta hlan tûrin ran no sânghnih leh zaruk leh bâwngpa zathum puithiamte an pe a.
Tin, Konania te, a unau Semaia leh Nethanela te, Levi-hote hotu Hasabia te, Zeiela te, Jozabada te pawhin Kalhlên Kûta hlan atân Levi-hote chu ran no sângnga leh bâwngpa zanga an pe a.
Tichuan, rawngbâwlna chu an buatsaih a, lal thupêk angin puithiamte chu an hmunah an ding a, Levi-hote chu an pâwl dân ang zêlin.
Tin, Kalhlên Kûtna tûr chu an talh a, puithiamte chuan thisen chu an theh a, Levi-hote chuan an lip a.
Tin, Mosia lehkhabua chuang anga an chhûngkaw ṭhen dân zir zêla Lalpa hnêna hlan atâna pêk tûrin, hâlral thilhlante chu an la sawn a. Bâwngpate pawh chu chutiang bawk chuan an ti a.
Tin, Kalhlên Kûtna tûr chu dân angin an hem hmin a; tin, thilhlan thianghlim sa chu bêl te, bêl khaina nei te, bêl rawng zautein an chhûm kawi a, mi zawng zawng hnênah an kalpui a.

Tin, chumi zawhah chuan anmahni leh puithiamte tân an buatsaih a; Arona fa puithiamte chu hâlral thilhlan leh sa thau hlânin zân thlengin an buai si a; chuvângin, Levi-hote chuan anmahni leh Arona fa puithiamte tân an buatsaih a ni.

Tin, Davida leh Asapha leh Hemana leh lal zâwlnei Jeduthuna-te thupêk angin, hla satu Asapha fapate chu an hmunah an ding a; tin, kawngkhâr vêngtute chu kawngkhâr tinah an awm a; an unau Levi-hoten an buatsaihsak avângin an hna kalsan a ngai lo va.
Chutichuan, Lal Josia thupêk anga Kalhlên Kût nei tûr leh Lalpa maichâma hâlral thilhlan hlân tûrin, chumi ni vêk chuan Lalpa rawngbâwlna thil zawng zawng chu an buatsaih a.
Tin, Israela thlah chuta awmte chuan chumi ni chuan kalhlên kût an nei a, chhang dawidim telh loh kût pawh ni sarih an nei bawk a.

Zâwlnei Samuela dam lai ata Israel ramah Kalhlên Kût chutiang rêng rêng chu an nei ngai lo va; Israel lal tu mahin Josia leh puithiamte leh, Levi-hote leh Juda zawng zawng leh, Israel-te leh Jerusalem-a miten an neih anga nei an awm hek lo.
Kum sâwm leh kum riat Josia a lal kumin chu Kalhlên Kût chu an nei a ni.
Chûng zawng zawng hnua Josian biak in a buatsaih zawh chuan, Aigupta lal Nekoa chu Karkhemis bei tûrin Euphrates luiah a han chho va; tin, Josia chuan a han bei a.

Nimahsela, ani chuan, “Nang Juda lal, kei leh nang eng nge kan intihna tûr awm? Nang bei tûrin ka lo kal lo va, ka do laite bei tûr zâwkin asin ni ka lo kal; Pathianin hmanhmawh tûrin thu min pe a, ka lama ṭang Pathian chu dodâl suh khai, a tiboral dah ang che,” tiin palai a tîr a.
Nimahsela, Josia chuan a kîrsan duh lo va, a do theih nân a inbâwl danglam a, Pathian kâ aṭanga Nekoa thusawi chu a pawm lo va, Megido ruamah lo bei tûrin a kal a.
Tin, thal kâp mite chuan Josia chu an han kâp a; tin, lal chuan a chhiahhlawhte hnênah, “Min kal bopui rawh u, hliam nasa tak ka tâwk ta,” a ti a.

Chutichuan, a chhiahhlawhte chuan tawlailîr ata chu an la chhuak a, a tawlailîr dangah chuan an dah a, Jerusalem-ah an kalpui a, a thi a, a pi leh pute thlânah an phûm ta a. Juda mi zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a miten Josia chu an sûn a.
Jeremia chuan Josia chu a ṭah a. Tin, hla satu hmeichhia leh mipate chuan tûn thlengin Josia an ṭah hla chu an la chham a. Israel ramah chuan dânah an neih a, ngai teh, ṭah hlaah chuan a chuang ta a.
Josia thiltih dang zawng zawng, Lalpa dâna chuang anga a thiltih ṭha te,
a hmasa ber leh a hnuhnûng berte pawh, ngai teh, Israel lal leh Juda lalte chanchin buah a chuang a.
Tichuan, chumi rama mite chuan Josia fapa Joahaza chu an hruai a, Jerusalem-ah a pa aiah lalah an siam ta a.
Joahaza chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum thum a ni a, Jerusalem-ah thla thum a lal a.
Aigupta lalin Jerusalem-a a lalna a bân a, an ram chu tangkaraw talent za leh rangkachak talent khat a chawitîr a.
Tin, Aigupta lal chuan a unaupa Eliakima chu Juda leh Jerusalem-a lalah a siam a, a hming chu Jehoiakima tiin a thlâksak a. Tin, Nekoa chuan a unaupa Joahaza chu Aigupta ramah a hruai a.
Jehoiakima chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum nga a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum khat a lal a; Lalpa a Pathian mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti ṭhîn a.
Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara chu amah bei tûrin a lo thawk a, Babulon-a hruai tûrin kawl a buntîr a.
Nebukadnezzara chuan Lalpa in bungbêlte pawh Babulon-ah a la a, Babulon-a a pathian biak inah a dah a.
Jehoiakima chanchin dang te, a thil tenawm tih te leh a awm dânte chu, ngai teh, Israel lal leh Juda lalte chanchin buah a chuang a. Tichuan, a fapa Jehoiakina chu a aiah a lal ta a.
Jehoiakina chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum riat mi a ni a, Jerusalem-ah thla thum leh ni sâwm a lal a; Lalpa mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti ṭhîn a.
Kum a lo vei chuan Lal Nebukadnezzara chuan mi a tîr a, Lalpa ina bungbêl ṭha tak takte nên Babulon-ah a hruaitîr a, a unaupa Zedekia chu Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a lalah a siam a.
Zedekia chu a lal ṭan tirhin kum sawmhnih leh kum khat a ni a, Jerusalem-ah kum sâwm leh kum khat a lal a.
Lalpa a Pathian mit hmuha thil ṭha lo a ti ṭhîn a; Lalpa kâ aṭanga thu sawitu zâwlnei Jeremia lakah chuan a intihnuai duh lo va.
Pathian hminga chhechhamtîrtu Lal Nebukadnezzara chungah a hel bawk a; luhlul a chhuah a, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian lam hawi lo tûrin a rilru a tikhauh va.
Puithiam hotu zawng zawng leh mipuite pawhin Pathian hre lo mite tih ang bawk thil tenawm tak takte an ti a; Jerusalem-a a tihthianghlim Lalpa inte pawh chu an tibawlhhlawh a.
Tin, Lalpa, an pi leh pute Pathian chuan an hnênah theihpatâwpa ṭhahnemngaiin mi a tîr a, a mite leh a awmna hmun chu a lainat avângin.
Nimahsela, Pathian mi tirhte chu an hmusit a, a thute chu an ngainêp a, a mite chunga Lalpa thinurna chu a lo thawk a, tihlungawi lehna rêng awm lo khawp hialin a zâwlneite chu an tinawmnah a.

Chuvângin, Kaldai lal an chungah a thawhtîr a, ani chuan an tlangvâlte chu an hmun thianghlimah khandaihin a that a, nula leh tlangvâl pawh, tar pawh, tarchhia pawh lainatna rêng rêng a nei lo va; a kutah a pe vek a.
Tin, Pathian ina bungbêl zawng zawng, a lian pawh, a tê pawh, Lalpa ina sum dah khâwm zawng zawng te, lal sum dah khâwm leh a mi liante sum dah khâwmte lamin Babulon-ah a la vek a.
Tin, Pathian in te an hâl a, Jerusalem kulh te an tichim a, chuta in ropui zawng zawng chu an hâl a, chuta bungbêl ṭha mi zawng zawng chu an tichhe vek a.
Khandaiha thah bâng zawng zawng chu Babulon-ah a hruai a, amah leh a fapate chhiahhlawhah Persia-ho lo len thlengin an awm ta a.
Lalpan zâwlnei Jeremia hmanga thu a lo sawi Chawlhni serh thei lova an awm chhûng kum sawmsarih, Chawlhni an serh leh theih thlengin, ram chu tihchhiatin a awm ang, a tih kha a lo thleng ta a ni.

Chutichuan, Persia lal Kura lal tirh kumin Jeremia kâa Lalpa thu chu a thlen kim theih nân, a ram zawng zawnga than chhuak vek tûr leh, a ziaka ziak tûr pawhin Lalpan Persia lal Kura thinlung chu a chawk tho va,

“Persia lal Kura chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Khawvêl ram zawng zawng chu Lalpa, vân Pathian chuan min pe ta a; tin, Judai rama Jerusalem-ah chuan a in saksak tûrin thu mi pe a ni. In zînga ama mite tawh phawt hnênah chuan Lalpa a Pathian chu awm sela, han chho rawh se,’” tiin.

Persia lal Kura lal tirh kumin zâwlnei Jeremia hmanga a lo sawi tawh chu Lalpan a thlen kimtîr ta a. He thupêk pe tûr leh a ram zawng zawnga chhiar vek tûra thawn chhuak tûrin Lalpa chuan Kura thinlung chu a chawk tho va.
“Persia lal Kura chuan heti hian a ti: ‘Khawvêl ram zawng zawng chu Lalpa, vân Pathian chuan mi pe ta a; tin, Judai rama Jerusalem-ah chuan a in saksak tûrin thu mi pe a ni.

In zînga ama mite tawh phawt hnênah chuan a Pathian chu awm rawh se; tichuan, Judai rama Jerusalem-ah chuan han chho sela, Lalpa, Israel-hote Pathian in, Jerusalem-a awm chu han sa rawh se; amah chu Pathian a ni.

Tin, tu pawh, khawii hmunah pawh an awmnaa la châmbang apiangte chu, an awmna hmuna mite chuan Jerusalem-a awm Pathian in tân anmahni duh thûa an thawh tiam lovin, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungrua te, ran tein lo ṭanpui rawh se,’ ” tiin.
Chutichuan, Juda leh Benjamin chia chhûngkaw puipa deuh deuhte, puithiamte, Levi-hote, Jerusalem-a Lalpa in han sa tûra Pathianin an thinlung a chawh thawh zawng zawngte chu an thawk ta a.
Tin, anmahni duh thûa thawh tiam lovin, an vêla mi zawng zawngte chuan tangkaruaa siam bungbêl te, rangkachak te, bungrua te, ran te, thil hlu tak takte an pein, an ṭanpui a.
Lal Kura pawhin Nebukadnezzaran Lalpa ina bungbêl Jerusalem aṭanga a lâk chhuaha, a pathiante ina a dahte chu a la chhuak leh a;
chûng ngei chu Persia lal Kura chuan a vawngtu Mithredatha a lâk chhuahtîr a, a chhiar a, Juda puipa Sesbazzara a hlân a.
Tin, hêng hi a zât chin chu a ni: rangkachak maihûn sawmthum, tangkaraw maihûn sâng, chemtê sawmhnih leh pakua;
rangkachak no sawmthum, tangkaraw no chi dang zali leh sâwm, bungbêl dang sângte nên.
