Rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbêl zawng zawng chu sângnga leh zali a ni. Salte chu Babulon ata Jerusalem-a an hruai chhoh lai khân Sesbazzaran hêng zawng zawng hi a keng chho va.
Judai rama mi sala hruai, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran Babulon-a a hruai, Jerusalem leh Judai rama kîr leh, mi tin mahni khaw lam ṭheuhva hawte chu hêng hi an ni.
Hêngho hi: Zerubabela te, Jesua te, Nehemia te, Seraia te, Reelaia te, Mordekaia te, Bilsana te, Mispara te, Bigvaia te, Rehuma te, Baana-te ruala kîr an ni. Israel mite patling tam lam chu:
Parosa thlahte chu 2,172;
Sephatia thlahte chu 372;
Ara thlahte chu 775;
Pahath-moaba thlah zînga Jesua leh Joaba thlahte chu 2,812;
Elama thlahte chu 1,254;
Zatua thlahte chu 945;
Zakaia thlahte chu 760;
Bania thlahte chu 642;
Bebaia thlahte chu 623;
Azgada thlahte chu 1,222;
Adonikama thlahte chu 666;
Bigvaia thlahte chu 2,056;
Adina thlahte chu 454;
Atera, Hezekia an tih bawk thlahte chu 98;
Bezaia thlahte chu 323;
Jora thlahte chu 112;
Hasuma thlahte chu 223;
Gibara thlahte chu 95;
an thlahtute aṭanga hêng khuaa lo chêng tawh ṭhînte pawh hetiang hian an kîr leh a: Bethlehem mite chu 123;
Netopha mite 56;
Anathoth mite 128;
Azmavetha mite chu 42;
Kiriath-arima te, Kephira te, Beerotha mite chu 743;
Rama leh Geba mite chu 621;
Mikma mite 122;
Bethel leh Ai mite 223;
Neboa mite chu 52;
Magbisa mite chu 156;
Elam danga mite chu 1,254;
Harima mite chu 320;
Loda te, Hadida te, Onoa mite chu 725;
Jeriko-a mite chu 345;
Senaa mite chu 3,630 an ni a.
Puithiamte: Jesua chhûngte zînga Jedaia thlahte chu 973;
Imera thlahte chu 1,052;
Pasura thlahte chu 1,247;
Harima thlahte chu 1,017 an ni.
Levi chite: Hodavia thlah Jesua leh Kadmiela thlahte chu 74 an ni.
Hla satute: Asapha thlahte chu 128 an ni.
Kawngkhâr vêngtu thlahte: Saluma thlahte, Atera thlahte, Talmona thlahte, Akuba thlahte, Hatita thlahte, Sobaia thlahte chu, an vaia fin khâwmin 139 an ni.
Nethin-ho: Ziha thlah te, Hasupha thlah te, Tabaotha thlahte,
Kerosa thlahte, Siaha thlahte, Padona thlahte,
Lebana thlahte, Hagabaha thlahte, Akuba thlahte,
Hagaba thlahte, Salmaia thlahte, Hanana thlahte,
Gidela thlahte, Gahara thlahte, Reaia thlahte,
Rezina thlahte, Nekoda thlahte, Gazama thlahte,
Uza thlahte, Pasea thlahte, Besaia thlahte,
Asnaa thlahte, Meunima thlahte, Nephisima thlahte,
Bakbuka thlahte, Hakupha thlahte, Harhura thlahte,
Bazlutha thlahte, Mehida thlahte, Harsa thlahte,
Barkosa thlahte, Sisera thlahte, Tema thlahte,
Nezia thlahte, Hatipha thlahte.
Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlahte: Sotaia thlahte, Hasopheretha thlahte, Peruda thlahte,
Jaala thlahte, Darkona thlahte, Gidela thlahte,
Sephatia thlahte, Hatila thlahte, Pokereth-hazebaima thlahte, Amia thlahte.
Nethin mi zawng zawng leh Solomona chhiahhlawhho thlahte chu 392 an ni.
Tin, mi 652 Delaia thlahte, Tobia thlahte, Nekoda thlahte, Tel-mela aṭang te, Tel-harsa aṭang te, Kerub aṭang te, Adan aṭang te, Imer aṭangtea lo chhuak chho an awm a;
nimahsela, Israel mi an nih leh nih loh an chhui thei lo va.
Tin, puithiam chite zînga Habaia thlahte, Hakoza thlah te, Gilead mi Barzilaia fanu zînga mi nupuia neia an hming pu nghâl Barzilaia thlahte chuan,
thlahtu chhuina hming ziaknaah an hming an hmu zo lo va; chuvângin, puithiama pawm an ni ta lo va.
Ram awptu chuan urim leh thumim hmangtu tûr puithiam a awm hma loh chuan chaw thianghlim an ei a khap a.
Mipui pung khâwm zawng zawng chu 42,360 an ni a,
an chhiahhlawh mipa leh hmeichhia 7,337 tiam lovin; tin, hla satu mipa leh hmeichhia 200 an nei bawk a.
An sakawr chu 736 a ni a, an sabengtung chu 245 a ni a,
an sanghâwngsei chu 435 a ni a, an sabengtung tê chi chu 6,720 a ni.
Jerusalem-a Lalpa in an thlen chuan chhûngkaw puipa ṭhenkhatte chuan, Pathian in chu a hmun ngaia din lehna tûrin thilhlan an pe a:
an pêk theih tâwkin in sakna thawhlâwmah chuan rangkachak darik 61,000, tangkarua maneh 5,000 leh puithiam silhfên 100 an pe a.
Chutichuan, puithiamte, Levi chite, mi ṭhenkhatte, hla satute, kawngkhâr vêngtute leh Nethin-hote chu an khuaahte an awm ta a, Israel mi zawng zawng chu anmahni khuaah.
Tin, thla sarihna a lo thlena, Israel mite chu khuaahte an awm lai chuan, mite chu thukhat vuain Jerusalem khuaah an inkhâwm a.

Chutichuan, Jozadaka fapa Jesua leh a unau puithiamte leh Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh a unaute chu an tho va, Pathian mi Mosia dâna chuang angin hâlral thilhlan nân Israel-te Pathian maichâm an siam a.

Tin, maichâm chu a hmun ngaiah chuan an din a; chûng rama awmte chu an hlau hle nâ a, maichâmah chuan Lalpa tân hâlral thilhlante an hlân a, zîng lam leh tlai lamah hâlral thilhlan chu an hlân ṭhîn a ni.
An ziak ang khân bâwkte kût chuan an kût a, ni tina tih tûr chin ruat, a bi tâwk thliah ang zêlin ni tina hâlral thilhlan chu an hlân a;

chumi hnuah chuan an ni tin hâlral thilhlan te, thla thar thilhlan te, Lalpa tâna kût ni an ruata an serh apianga thilhlan te; tin, mahni duh thûa thilhlan, Lalpa hnêna lâwm taka hlan ṭhinte chu an hlân a.
Thla sarihna, ni khat aṭangin hâlral thilhlante Lalpa hnênah an hlân ṭan a; nimahsela, Lalpa biak in lungphûm chu an la phûm lo va.

Lung chhertu leh themthiamte pawh tangka an pe a; tin, Persia lal Kuran a phal dân ang zêlin, sidar thing Lebanon aṭanga tuifinriat, Jopa thlenga rawn la tûrin Zidon mite leh Tura mite chu ei tûrte leh in tûrte leh hriak te an pe a.

Tin, Jerusalem-a Pathian in an thlenna kum hnihna, thla hnihnaah chuan Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela te, Jozadaka fapa Jesua te, an unau puithiam leh Levi chi dangte leh sala chhuak Jerusalem-a chho zawng zawng nên chuan an bei ṭan a; Levi chite chu kum sawmhnih mi aṭanga a chung lam mite chu Lalpa in saka hotu atân an ruat a.
Chutichuan, Jesua chu a fapate leh a unaute nên, Kadmiela, a fapate nên, Juda fapate nên chuan Pathian in satute chu an ho tlâng ta a: Henadada fapate, an fapate leh an unau Levi chite nên.
Tin, a satuten Lalpa in lungphûm an han rem chuan puithiamte chu an thuam inbela tawtawrâwt kengin, Levia chi Asapha fapate chu Israel lal Davida tih dân ruat anga Lalpa fak tûrin an dintîr a.

“Ani chu a ṭha si a, a ngilneihna chu Israel mite chungah a awm kumkhua dâwn a ni,” tiin, Lalpa fak leh a hnêna lâwmthu sawiin hlain an inchhâwn a. Lalpa in lungphûm an phûm tâk avânga Lalpa an faknaah chuan mipui zawng zawng chu an au dur dur mai a.

Puithiam leh Levi chi leh chhûngkaw puipa tam tak, a in hmasa hmutu putarhote erawh chu an mit hmuhah, hemi in lungphûm an phûm chuan an ṭap vak vak mai a. Tin, mi tam tak chu lâwm avângin an au vak vak bawk a;
chutichuan, mite chuan lâwm avânga au thâwm leh mipui ṭap thâwm chu an thlei thei chuang lo va; mipui chu ring takin an au vak vak mai a, an thâwm chu hla tak aṭangin an hria a ni.
Juda mi leh Benjamina mite hmêlmate chuan sal chhuakhovin Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian biak in an saksak tih an lo hriat chuan,

Zerubabela leh an chhûngkaw puipate hnên lamah an va kal a, an hnênah, “Kan sakpui ve ang che u; keini pawhin in zawn ang hian in Pathian chu kan zawng ve a; heta min hruai chhotu Assuria lal Esar-haddona a lal lai aṭang khân a hnênah kan inthawi ṭhîn asin,” an ti a.

Nimahsela, Zerubabela leh Jesua leh Israel-te chhûngkaw puipa dangte chuan an hnênah, “Kan Pathian in saksaknaah hian in tel vena kawng rêng rêng a awm lo ve; Persia lal Kura thu min pêk angin keimahniho ngawtin Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian kan saksak dâwn a ni,” an ti a.
Chutichuan, chumi rama mite chuan Juda mite kut chu an tihchauhsak a, an in sa chu an tibuai a.
Persia lal Kura lal chhûng zawng, Persia lal Daria lal thleng hialin an thiltih tumte eng mah lova siam tûrin sawipuitute an ruai a.
Chutichuan, Ahasuera lal lai, a lal ṭan tirh laiin Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a awmte hêkna lehkha an phuah a.

Tin, Artazerzia lal lai chuan Bislama te, Mithredatha te, Tabeela te leh an ṭhian dangte nên chuan Persia lal Artazerzia chu lehkha an thawn a; an lehkha ziak chu Aramaik ṭawngin Aramaik hawrawpa ziak a ni.
Hotu Rehuma leh lehkhaziaktu Simsaia chuan Jerusalem-a mite hêkin Persia lal Artazerzia hetiang lehkha hi an thawn a:
Lehkha thawntute chu: Hotu Rehuma leh lehkhaziaktu Simsaia leh a ṭhiante - rorêltute leh ram awptute, Persia mi te, Elam rama awm ṭhîn Erek mi te, Babulon mi te leh Susan mi te;
mi ropui Asurbanipalan sala a hruai Samaria khuaah leh Euphrates lui thlang lama a awmtîr tâkte an ni.
Lal Artazerzia chu hetiangin lehkha an thawn a: “Lalber Artazerzia chu i chhiahhlawh Euphrates lui khawthlang lam ram miten chibai kan bûk e.

I hnên aṭanga Juda mi lo chhote chu kan hnênah Jerusalem-ah an lo kal a; khaw hel hmang leh sual chu an din ṭha a, a kulh chu an peih tawh a, a lungphûm chu an siam ṭha tawh tih lal chuan lo hre rawh se.
Hemi khua hi an dina, a kulhte an siam zawh chuan, chhiah te, thil neih man te leh lei mante an chawi duh lo vang a, a tâwpah chuan lalte tân chhiatna a lo ni mai ang tih lalin lo hre rawh se.
Lal ina chi liak kan nih avângin lal mawi lohna hmuh hi kan tân a fel lo hle si a;

chuvângin, i pi leh pute thil chhinchhiah ziakna buah i zawna, chumi ziakna buah chuan i hmuha, hemi khua hi hel hmang khua a nih leh lalte leh an ramte tâna thil hlauhawm tak a niha, an hel kumkhuaa, chumi avâng chuan he khua hi a lo chhia a ni tih i hriat nân lehkha kan thawn a, lal kan hriattîr a ni.
Hemi khua hi an dina, a kulhte an peih vek chuan lui râl lamah rêng rêng chuan chan i neih loh phah ang tih lal kan hriattîr a ni,” an ti a.
Chutichuan, lalber chuan chhânna a thawn a, “Hotu Rehuma te, lehkhaziaktu Simsaia te leh an ṭhian dang Samaria ram leh Euphrates lui thlang lama awmte chibai ka bûk a che u.
Kan hnêna in lehkha rawn thawn kha ka hmaah fiah takin an chhiar a.
Tin, thu ka pe a, an zawng a, he khua hi hmân aṭangin lal chungah an hel ṭhîn a, chutah chuan helna leh buaina a awm ṭhîn tih chu kan hmu chhuak a ni.
Jerusalem-ah khân lal thiltithei tak tak, lui râl lehlam ram thlenga rorêlte pawh an lo awm tawh a; chhiah te, thil neih man te, lei mante an la ṭhîn a.
Khâng mite kha chawlhtîr ula, thu ka pêk hma loh chuan khua chu din suh se.
Muang hauh suh u; engah tehlul nge lalte tâna chhiatna thil pawi tak a lo zualkai ang?” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Lal Artazerzia lehkha chu Rehuma leh lehkhaziaktu Simsaia leh an ṭhiante hmaa an chhiar zawh chuan, hmanhmawh takin Jerusalem-a Juda-te hnênah an kal a, thuneihnain an bân luihtîr a.
Chutichuan, Jerusalem-a Pathian in an beih chu an chawlhsan ta a; Persia lal Daria lal kum hnihna thlengin chawlhsan a ni ta a.
Chutih lai chuan zâwlnei pahnih, Hagaia leh Idova fapa Zekaria-te chuan, Judai ram leh, Jerusalem-a Juda awmte hnênah Israel-te Pathian hmingin thu an sawi a.
Chutichuan, Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jozadaka fapa Jesua chuan Jerusalem-a Pathian in chu an han bei ṭan leh ta a; tin, an hnênah chuan anmahni ṭanpuiin Pathian zâwlneite chu an awm a.

Chu veleh chuan lui râl ram awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh an ṭhiante chu an hnênah chuan an kal a, an hnênah chuan heti hian an sawi a, “He in sa tûr leh he kulh tizo tûr hian tuin nge thu pe che u?” an ti a.
Tin, hetiang hian an hnênah, “Hemi in satute hming hi tute nge ni?” kan ti a.
Nimahsela, an Pathian mit chu Juda upate chungah chuan a fu a, Daria hnênah an thu chu thlena, chhânna a lo thlen hma loh chuan ram awptute chuan an bântîr chuang lo.
Lui râl lehlam awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh a ṭhian, lui râla awm Apharsak-hoten Lal Daria hnênah lehkha an thawn a,
hetiang hian an ziak a: “Lal Daria hnênah thlamuanna kim awm rawh se.
Hei hi lalin lo hre rawh se. Judai ramah Pathian ropui tak in, lung lian tak taka sak leh bang thinga rem, taima tak leh tluang taka an lo beih tawhnaah chuan kan kal a.
Chutichuan, ‘He in sa tûr leh he kulh tizo tûr hian tuin nge thu pe che u?’ tiin an upate kan zâwt a.
An hotu hmingte chu kan ziak a, kan hriat fiahtîr theih nân che an hmingte pawh chu kan zâwt a.
Tin, anni chuan heti hian mi chhâng a, ‘Lei leh vân Pathian chhiahhlawhte kan ni a, kum kha leh chena sak, Israel lal ropui tak pakhat lo sak zawh tawh in chu kan sa ṭha leh a ni.

Amaherawhchu, kan pi leh puten vân Pathian chu thinrim khawpa an tihlungawi loh avângin, Kaldai mi Babulon lal Nebukadnezzara kutah a pe a, ani chuan he in hi a tichhia a, mite chu Babulon lamah a hruai a.
Nimahsela, Babulon kal Kura lal tirh kumin, Lal Kura chuan he Pathian in hi sak ṭhat leh thu a pe a.

Tin, Pathian ina rangkachak leh tangkaruaa siam bungbêl, Jerusalem-a Pathian ina mi Nebukadnezzaran a lâk chhuah, Babulon-a biak ina a lâk luhte chu Lal Kura chuan Babulon biak in ata a la chhuak a, mi pakhat a hming Sesbazzara, ram awptu atâna a siama chu a pe a.
Tin, a hnênah, “Hêng bungbêl hi la la, kal la, Jerusalem-a biak inah dah la; tin, biak in chu a hmun ngaiah sak ni rawh se,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Sesbazzara ngei chu a kal a, Jerusalem-a biak in lungphûm chu a phûm a; chuta chin chu tûn thleng hian sak a ni ta reng a; nimahsela, la peih loh a la ni reng a,’ tiin.

Chutichuan, lal ṭha tih zâwng a nih chuan, chutiang chu a ni ngei emaw, Babulon-a lal sum ina mi chu han zawng sela; tin, lal Kura chuan Jerusalem-a biak in sak chungchâng thûah hian a duh dân min han hrilh rawh se,” tiin.
Chutichuan, Lal Daria chuan thu a pe a, Babulon-a an ro dah khâwmna, lehkhabu dahna in chu an zawng ta a.
Tichuan, Media rama Akametha khuaa lal inah lehkhabu zial an hmu a, chutah chuan vawn ṭhat atân hetianga ziak hi a awm a:
“Jerusalem-a Pathian in chungchângah Lal Kura chuan a lal ṭan tirh kumin hetiang hian thu a pe a: ‘An inthawina thilhlanna in chu sak ṭhat leh ni se; a lungphûm pawh nghet taka rem ni rawh se.
A sân lam tawng sawmruk, a zau lam tawng sawmruk, lung lian pui pui tlar thuma rem hnuah thingphêk tlar khat siam tûr a ni a, a sakna hi lal sum aṭanga pêk tûr a ni.

Tin, Pathian ina rangkachak leh tangkaraw bungbêl Nebukadnezzaran Jerusalem biak in ata a lâk chhuaha Babulon-a a lâkte pawh pêk kîr ni sela, Jerusalem-a biak ina a hmun ngai tê vêka la kîrin, Pathian inah dah tûr a ni,’ tiin.
Chuvângin, lui râl ram awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh lui râla awm an ṭhian Apharsak-hote u, intifihlîm rawh u khai.
He Pathian biak in an sa leh hi eng mah tih suh u; Juda-te awptu leh Juda upate chuan he Pathian in hi a hmun ngaiah sa rawh se.

Chu bâkah, hêng Juda upaten he Pathian in an sakna tûrah hian ṭanpui tûrin thu ka pe a che u. Hna a bahlah loh nân a sakna tûr pawh Euphrates lui khawthlang bial chhiah, lal sum tûr aṭanga pêk thuai tûr a ni.
Tin, vân Pathian tân hâlral thilhlan tûr an mamawh apiang, bâwngpatuai te, berâmpa te, berâmno te, buh chi te, uain te, hriak te, Jerusalem-a puithiamte thu ang zêlin ni tinin pêk ngei ngei tûr a ni;
chutichuan, vân Pathian chu rimtuia inthawinate an hlân thei ang a, lal leh a fapate chu an dam rei nân an ṭawngṭaisak thei bawk ang.
Tu pawh he thu tidanglam apiang, chumi avâng chuan a khanchhuk phawisaka, amah chu chutah chuan khai kâna, a in chu êk dûra siam tûr a ni ang tih thu ka pe bawk a ni.

Tin, chuta a hming awmtîrtu Pathian chuan Jerusalem-a Pathian in tihchhiat tuma he thu tidanglam tûra kut lek apiang, lal zawng zawng leh hnam zawng zawngte chu tiboral vek rawh se. Kei Daria hian thu ka pe a ni; zawm nghâl chiah tûr a ni.”
Chutichuan, lui râl ram awptu Tatenaia leh Sethar-bozenaia leh a ṭhiante chuan Lal Daria lehkhathawn avângin chutiang chuan an ti ta nghâl a.

Tin, zâwlnei Hagaia leh Idova fapa Zekaria thusawi avângin Juda upate chuan tluang takin an sa a. Israel-te Pathian thupêk ang leh Persia lal Kura leh Daria leh Artazerzia-te thupêk ang chuan an sa a, an zo ta a.
Tin, in chu Lal Daria kum ruk a lal kum, Adar thla ni thum nîah an zo va.
Tin, Israela thlah, puithiam te, Levi chite leh sal chhuakho dangte chuan chumi Pathian in hlanna chu lâwm takin an hmang a.
Tin, chumi Pathian in hlannaah chuan bâwngpa za, berâmpa zahnih, berâmno zali an hlân a; tin, Israel zawng zawng tân sual thawi nân Israel hnam zâtin kêlpa sâwm leh pahnih.
Mosia lehkhabua chuang angin Jerusalem-a Pathian rawngbâwl tûr chuan puithiamte leh Levi chite chu an pâwl ṭheuhvah an awmtîr a.
Tin, sal chhuakhote chuan thla khatna, ni sâwm leh ni li ni chu Kalhlên Kût ni atân an hmang a.
Puithiamte leh Levi chite chu an inthian ho va, an za chuan an lo thianghlim ta a; chutichuan, Kalhlên Kûtna tûr chu sal chhuakho zawng zawng tân leh an unau puithiamte leh anmahni tân an talh a.
Tin, Israela thlah, sal ata lo chhuak lehte leh Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian zawng tûra chu rama Pathian thu âwih lo bawlhhlawhna ata inthiarfihlîma, anniho zâwm zawng zawng tate chuan an ei a,

chhang dawidim telh loh kût chu lâwm takin ni sarih an hmang a: Lalpa chuan anni chu a tihlim a, Pathian, Israel-te Pathian in saknaa an kutte tihchaksak tûrin Assuria lal rilru chu an lamah a thlêktîr a ni.
Tin, chûng thil hnuah chuan Persia lal Artazerzia lal laiin Ezra chu Babulon aṭangin a chho va; chu mi chu Seraia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Azaria fa a ni a, chu mi chu Hilkia fa a ni a,
chu mi chu Saluma fa a ni a, chu mi chu Zadoka fa a ni a, chu mi chu Ahituba fa a ni a,
chu mi chu Amaria fa a ni a, chu mi chu Azaria fa a ni a, chu mi chu Meraiotha fa a ni a,
chu mi chu Zerahia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Uzia fa a ni a, chu mi chu Bukia fa a ni a,
chu mi chu Abisua fa a ni a, chu mi chu Phinehasa fa a ni a, chu mi chu Eleazara fa a ni a, chu mi chu puithiam lal Arona fa a ni.
Ezra chu lehkhaziaktu, Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian pêk Mosia dân thiam tak a ni a. Lalpa a Pathianin a duhsakna avângin lal chuan a dîl zawng zawng chu a pe zêl a.
Tin, Lal Artazerzia kum sarih a lal kum chuan Israela thlah ṭhenkhatte, puithiam ṭhenkhatte, Levi chi ṭhenkhatte, hla satute, kawngkhâr vêngtute, temple enkawltute chu Jerusalem-ah an chho va.
Tin, lal chu kum sarih a lal kum, thla nganaah ani chu Jerusalem-ah a kal a.
Thla khatna, ni khat nîah Babulon aṭangin a chhuak a, a Pathianin amah chu vêng zêlin thla ngana, ni khat nîah Jerusalem a thleng a ni.
Ezra chuan Lalpa dân chu hriaa zâwm tûr leh Israel-hote chu thuruatte leh rorêlte zirtîr tûrin a thinlung a siam tlat a.
Tin, hei hi Lal Artazerzian puithiam Ezra, lehkhaziaktu, Lalpa thupêk thu leh Israel mite tâna a thuruatte zirtu hnêna a lehkhathawn thu chu a ni:
Lalte lal Artazerzian puithiam Ezra, vân Pathian dân ziaktu chibai ka bûk e.
Ka ram chhûnga Israel mi zawng zawng leh an puithiamte leh Levi chite, Jerusalem-a mahni duh thûa kal châkna nei apiangte chu, i hnêna kal tûrin thu ka pe e.
I kawl Pathian dân ang zêla Judai ram leh Jerusalem chanchin ngai chiang tûr leh,
Jerusalem-a awm Israel-te Pathian, mahni duh thûa lal leh a rorêltuten an pêk, tangkarua leh rangkachak keng tûra lal leh a rorêltu pasarihin an tirh che i ni a,
Babulon ram zawng zawnga i hmuh zât apiang tangkarua leh rangkachak, mahni duh thûa mipuite leh puithiamten an pêk, Jerusalem-a an Pathian in atâna lâwm taka an pêkte nên;
chutichuan, hêng tangka hian bâwngpa te, berâmpa te, berâmno te, ei tûr leh in tûr thilhlan tûr nên i lei nghâl ang a; tin, Jerusalem-a in Pathian ina maichâmah chuan i hlân dâwn nia.
Tin, tangkarua leh rangkachak hman bângte chu in Pathian remtih zâwng âwmin nang leh i unauten ṭha in tih ang angin ti ang che u.
Tin, i Pathian in rawngbâwl nâna bungbêl an pêk che chu Jerusalem-a Pathian hnênah chuan hlân ang che.
Tin, i Pathian in tâna mamawh danga hman ṭûlna a awm phawt chuan lal sum ina mi hmang ang che.
Kei, lal Artazerzia ngeiin lui râla sum enkawltu zawng zawngte chu - Puithiam Ezra, vân Pathian dân ziaktuin a dîl apiang che u chu,
tangkarua chu talent za, buh chu bûk za, uain chu bath za, hriak chu bath za, chi chu eng zât tih pawh awm chuang lovin pe nghâl ang che u, tiin thu ka pe e.
Vân Pathianin thu a pêk apiang chu, chutiang chiahin vân Pathian in atân tih ni rawh se; thinurna chu lal leh a fate ram chungah hian engah tehlul nge a awm ang ni?
Tin, puithiamte, Levi chite, hla satute, kawngkhâr vêngtute, Nethin-hote, he Pathian ina rawngbâwltute hi chhiah te, thil neih man te, lei man te chu chawitîr loh tûr a nih kan hriattîr bawk a che.
Tin, nang Ezra, i kawl Pathianin finna a pêk che angin lui râla awmho zawng zawngte ro an rêlsak theih nân hotute leh rorêltute, i Pathian dân hre mite ruat la, hre lote chu zirtîr ang che u.

Tin, tu pawh i Pathian dân leh lal dân zâwm lo apiang chu thi khawpin emaw, ram ata hnawh chhuahin emaw, an bungrua lâksakin emaw, tân ina tântîrin emaw an chungah rorêlna a awm nghâl tûr a ni, a ti a.

Jerusalem-a Lalpa in timawi tûra lal chu hetiang rilru puttîrtu leh, lal leh a rorêltu hma leh lal mi lian lâr tak takho hmaa ka chunga khawngaihna zâmtîrtu Lalpa, kan pi leh pute Pathian chu fakin awm rawh se. Tin, Lalpa ka Pathianin mi khawngaih a, mi tichak a; tichuan, ka hnêna han kal ve tûrin Israel zînga mi hotu deuh deuhte ka thlang khâwm ta a.
Hêngte hi Lal Artazerzia lal laia Babulon ram ata ka hnêna kal chhoho, chhûngkaw puipa leh an thlahte hming chu a ni:
Phinehasa thlahte zîngah Gersoma; Ithamara thlahte zîngah Daniela; Davida thlahte zîngah Hatusa;
Sekania thlahte, Parosa thlahte zîngah Zekaria, mipa za leh sawmnga nên;
Pahath-moaba thlahte zîngah Zerahia fa Eliehoenaia, mipa zahnih nên;
Sekania thlahte zîngah Jahaziela fa, mipa zathum nên;
Adina thlahte zîngah Jonathana fa Ebeda, mipa sawmnga nên;
Elama thlahte zîngah Athalia fa Jesaia, mipa sawmsarih nên;
Sephatia thlahte zîngah Mikaela fa Zebadia, mipa sawmriat nên;
Joaba thlahte zîngah Jehiela fa Obadia, mipa zahnih leh sâwm leh pariat nên;
Selomitha thlahte zîngah Josiphia fa, mipa za leh sawmruk nên;
tin, Bebaia thlahte zîngah Bebaia fa Zekaria, mipa sawmhnih leh pariat nên;
tin, Azgada thlahte zîngah Hakatana fa Johanana, mipa za leh sâwm nên;
Adonikama thlahte zîngah (a hnuhnûng ber an ni a) an hming chu hêng hi a ni - Elipheleta te, Jeuela te, Semaia te, mipa sawmruk nên;
Bigvaia thlahte zînga Uthaia leh Zabuda, mipa sawmsarih nên.
Ahava lama luang lui kamah chuan ka awm khâwmtîr a; chutah chuan ni thum kan awm a. Tin, mipuite leh puithiamte chu ka han en vêl a, Levia thlahte rêng rêng ka hmu ve ta lo va.
Chutichuan, puipa deuh deuh, Eliezera te, Ariela te, Semaia te, Elnathana te, Jariba te, Elnathana te, Nathana te, Zekaria te, Mesulama te ka chah a; zirtîrtu Joiariba leh Elnathana-te pawh.
Tin, Kasiphia hmuna hotu Idova hnênah ka tîr a, kan Pathian ina rawngbâwltu tûr rawn hruai tûrin Kasiphia hmuna Idova leh a unaute Nethin-ho hnêna an han sawi tûr ka hrilh a.
Tin, Pathian min khawngaihna avângin Issekela, Mahlia thlahte zîngah; Israela fapa, chu mi fapa Levia; Serebia, a fate leh a unau sâwm leh pariatte nên;
Hasabia, Meraria thlahte zîngah Jesaia, a unaute leh an fate sawmhnih nên;
Nethin-ho, Davida leh an mi lianten Levi chite rawngbâwl tûra an pêkte zînga mi Nethin-ho zahnih leh sawmhnihte nên min hruaisak a. An zaa hming ziak ṭheuh a ni.
Chutichuan, kan Pathian hmaa kan intihtlâwma, a hnêna keini leh kan fate leh kan bungrua zawng zawngte nêna tluang taka kal theihna dîl tûrin, Ahava luiah chuan chaw nghei thu ka puang a.

“Kan Pathian duhsakna chu amah zawngtute zawng zawng chungah an ṭhatna tûrin a awm zêl a; a thiltihtheihna leh a thinurna erawh chu amah hawisante chungah a awm zêl ṭhîn,” tia lal hnêna kan lo sawi tawh avângin, kalkawnga kan hmêlmate laka min ṭanpui tûra sipai leh sakawr chung chuang mite lal dîl chu zahthlâk ka ti si a.
Chutichuan, chaw kan nghei a, chumi chu kan Pathian kan dîl chiam a; kan dîlna chu min ngaihthlâksak a.
Chutichuan, puithiam tûpa deuh deuhte zînga mi sâwm leh pahnih, Serebia leh Hasabia leh an unaute zînga mi sâwm ka tihrang a;
tin, lal leh a rorêltute leh a mi liante leh chuta awm Israel-te zawng zawngin kan Pathian in atân an thilhlan, tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbêlte chu ka bûk a, ka hlân a;
ka bûka an kuta ka hlan chu tangkaraw talent zaruk leh sawmnga; tangkaraw bungbêl talent za; rangkachak talent za;
rangkachak berhbu sawmhnih, darik sângkhat ṭheuh; dâr tle mi mawi tak, rangkachak ang maia hlû bungbêl pahnih a ni a.
Tin, an hnênah, “ Lalpa tâna tihthianghlim in ni a, bungbêlte pawh tihthianghlim a ni; tangkarua leh rangkachakte hi Lalpa, in pi leh pute Pathian tâna mahni duh thûa hlan vek a ni.
Puithiam tûpa deuh deuhte leh Levi chite leh Israel mite chhûngkaw puipa hmaa Jerusalem-a Lalpa ina pindana in bûk hma loh chuan vêng ula, kawl rawh u,” ka ti a.
Chutichuan, puithiamte leh Levi chite chuan Jerusalem-a kan Pathian ina ken tûrin, tangkarua leh rangkachak leh bungbêl bûkte chu an la ta a.

Chutichuan, Jerusalem-a kal tûrin thla khatna, ni sâwm leh ni hnih nîah Ahava lui aṭang chuan kan chhuak ta a; tin, kan Pathianin min khawngaih a, hmêlma lak ata leh kawng laka châng rutute lak ata chu min humhim zêl a.
Tin, Jerusalem chu kan han thleng a, chutah chuan ni thum kan hahchâwl a.

Tin, a ni li ni chuan tangkarua te, rangkachak te, bungbêlte chu kan Pathian inah bûkin puithiam Uria fapa Meremotha kutah kan hlân a; tin, a hnênah chuan Phinehasa fapa Eleazara a awm a; tin, an hnênah chuan Levi chi Jesua fapa, Jozabada leh Binuia fapa Noadia te an awm a;
chhiar vek leh bûk vek a ni a. A bûk zât chu chumi lai la la chuan an ziak vek a.

Sal chhuakhote chuan Israel-te Pathian hnênah hâlral thilhlan an hlân a, Israel zawng zawng pualah bâwngpa sâwm leh pahnih, berâmpa sawmkua leh paruk, berâmno sawmsarih leh pasarih; sual thawi nân kêlpa sâwm leh pahnih. Hêng zawng zawng hi Lalpa hnêna hâlral thilhlan vek a ni.
Tin, lal thuruatte chu lal upate leh lui râl ram awptute chu an hrilh a; tin, anni chuan mipuite chu ṭanpuiin Pathian in sak chu an chhunzawmpui ta a.

Tin, chûng thiltih zawh chuan mi liante chuan, “Israel mite leh puithiamte leh Levi chite chu he ram mite lakah hian inthiarfihlîm chuang lovin, Kanaan-ho te, Hit-ho te, Periz-ho te, Jebus-ho te, Amon-ho te, Moab-ho te, Aigupta-ho te, Amor-hote thiltih tenawm tak an tih ang zêl an ti ve a.

An fanute chu anmahni leh an fapaten an nei ta mai a; chutichuan, chi thianghlim chu he ram mite nên hian an chawhpawlh a. A ni, mi liante leh rorêltute chu he bawhchhiatna thûah hian a tûpa berte an ni,” tiin mi rawn hrilh a.
Tin, chu thil chu ka hriat chuan ka kawr leh ka puan ka pawt thlêr a, ka sam leh ka khabe hmul ka pawt thla a, a ngaihna hre lovin ka ṭhu ta ngawih ngawih mai a.
Chutichuan, sal chhuakho bawhchhiatna avânga Israel-te Pathian thûa khûr apiangte chu ka hnênah an lo kal khâwm a; tlai lam inthawi hun thlengin a ngaihna hre lovin ka ṭhu ta ngawih ngawih a.
Tin, tlai lam inthawi hun chuan ka lungngaihna ata ka kawr leh ka puan thlêr chung chuan ka tho va; tin, ka ṭhingṭhi a, Lalpa ka Pathian lamah ka bân ka phar a.
Tin, “Aw ka Pathian, i lam lo hawi hi ka zak a, ka hmai te a sen ṭâwn ṭâwn a ni, ka Pathian; kan bawhchhiatnate chu min chîm pil khawpin a pung a, kan thiam lohna chuan vân a tawng a.

Kan pi leh pute chenin tûn thleng hian kan thiam lo let dêr a ni; kan bawhchhiatna avângin kan lalte, kan puithiamte nên ram dang lal man te, khandaiha thah te, sala tân te, rawk te, mualphonate kan tâwk a, vawiina kan awm ang hian.

Tin, tûnah hian kan Pathian chuan kan mitte a tihvâra, sala kan awm min tihharha, a hmun thianghlimah chuan min awm ngheh tlattîrna tûrin a la awm chhunte chu min chhuahtîrin, Lalpa kan Pathian khawngaihna kan dawng rih mai a ni a.

Chhiah khua zawng kan ni ngei mai a; nimahsela, kan Pathian chuan chhiah khua kan nih chhûng pawhin min thlahthlam chuang lo va, min tiharh tûr leh kan Pathian in din tûr leh a chhe hnu chei tûr leh Judai ram leh Jerusalem-a kulh nei tûrin, Persia lalte mit hmuhah chuan kan chungah khawngaihna a zâm zautîr ta zâwk a.
Aw kan Pathian, tûnah hian eng nge kan sawi tâk ang? I thupêkte chu kan hawisan ta si a.
I chhiahhlawh zâwlneite hmanga, ‘In va kalna tûr, in ram luah tûr chu a rama mi awmte bawlhhlawhna avângin a bawlhhlawh a, kil tin kil tang an tenawmnain a titenawm vek a ni.

Chuvângin, in fanute chu an fapate neihtîr suh ula, an fanute chu in fapate neihtîr hek suh ula, an thawvenna leh an hmuingîlna rêng rêng zawnsak hek suh ula, in lo chaka, chumi rama thil ṭha chu in eia, kumkhuaa in fate in inrochun theih nân,’ tia thu i pêkte chu.

Tin, kan thil tihsual avâng leh kan thiam lohna nasa tak avânga kan chunga hetiang thil a lo awma, nang kan Pathianin kan bawhchhiatnain a phu aia nêpa min hrem hnua la awm cheute min la nei tih hre reng chung siin,

i thupêkte chu kan bawhchhe lehin, hêng thil tenawm titute nên hian kan la inneih pawlh cheu dâwn em ni? A bâk rêng awm lo leh pumpelh rêng pawh awm lova min tiboral khawpin kan chungah i thinur hial dâwn lâwm ni?

Aw Lalpa, Israel-te Pathian, nang chu i fel a, vawiinah hian tlêm zawng min la zuah hi. Ngai teh, thiam lovin i hmaah kan awm a, hemi avâng hian tu mah i hmaa ding thei rêng rêng kan awm lo a ni,” ka ti a.

Tin, Pathian in lam hawia bawkkhupa ṭap chunga Ezra a ṭawngṭaia, thupha a chawi lai chuan a hnênah Israel mi, mi tam tak, a hmei a pain naupangte nên an lo kal khâwm chiam a; mipuite chu nasa takin an ṭap a.

Tin, Elama thlah zînga mi Jehiela fapa Sekania chuan Ezra hnênah, “Kan Pathian chungah chuan thil chu kan tisual ta ngei mai a, hemi rama hnam dang hmeichhiate chu nupuiah kan nei a; nimahsela, Israel mite tân hemi chungchâng thûah hian beiseina a la awm cheu a ni.

Chutichuan, hawh u, ka pu leh kan Pathian thupêka khûr apiangte remruat ang zêlin, chûng mipuite zawng zawng leh an laka piang apiangte chu ṭhen tûrin kan Pathian hnênah thu i thlung teh ang u; tin, chu chu dân ang zêla tih ni rawh se.
Tho rawh khai, hemi hi i puala lum a ni a; keini pawh i lama ṭang kan ni a; huai takin awm la, ti mai rawh,” tiin a tihpui a.
Chutichuan, Ezra chu a tho va, puithiam tûpa deuh deuhte leh Levi chite leh Israel mi zawng zawngte chu, chu thu anga ti tûr chuan chhia a chhamtîr a. Chutichuan, chhia chu an chham ta a.
Chutichuan, Ezra chu Pathian in lam a hawi chu a tho va, Eliasiba fapa Jehohanana pindanah a lût a; tin, chutah chuan zankhuain sal chhuakte thil tihsual avânga lungngaiin eng mah a eiin a in lo va.

Tin, Judai ram zawng zawng leh Jerusalem-a sal chhuakho zawng zawng hnênah chuan Jerusalem-a inkhâwm veka, tu pawh an mi liante leh an upate thupêk anga ni thum chhûnga lo kal lo apiangte chu an bungrua zawng zawng hrênsak veka, anmahni pawh chu sal chhuakho zîng ata hnawh chhuah tûr a ni ang, tih thu an puang a.

Chutichuan, Juda mi leh Benjamin mite chu chumi ni thum chhûng chuan Jerusalem-ah an inkhâwm vek a. Chu chu thla kuana, ni sawmhnih ni a ni a; Pathian in kawt zau laiah chuan mipui zawng zawng chu an ṭhu a, chûng thu avâng leh ruahpui nasa tak a sûr avâng chuan an khûr an khûr mai a.
Tin, puithiam Ezra chu a ding a, an hnênah, “Thil in lo tisual ta a, Israel mite thiam lohna belhchhahin hnam dang hmeichhiate nupuiah in nei a.
Chuvângin, Lalpa, in pi leh pute Pathian hnênah chuan thupha chawi ula, a lâwm zâwng ti tawh rawh u khai; tin, he rama hnam dang leh an hmeichhiate lak ata hi inthiarfihlîm rawh u,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, mipui zawng zawngte chuan an chhâng a, ring takin, “Kan chungchâng thu chu i sawi ang tak chuan kan ti ngei tûr a ni.

Amaherawhchu, mi kan tam si a; ruah sûr hun lai a lo ni bawk si a, pâwnah hian kan ding reng thei lo ve. Tin, ni hnih khat thila han tih mai mi a ni bawk hek lo, hemi thûah hian kan lo bawhchhe nasa hle si a.

Mipui zawng zawng aiah kan mi liante ruat ni sela, kan chunga Pathian thinurna nasa tak hi a kiana, hemi thu hi kan tihfel hma loh chuan, kan khuaa hnam dang hmeichhe neitute zawng zawng chu khaw tina an upate leh rorêltute nên an lo kal hun bi ruatah lo kal zêl rawh se,” an ti a.
Asahela fapa Jonathana leh Tikva fapa Jahzeia-te chauhvin hemi thu hi an kalh a; tin, Levi chi Mesulama leh Sabethaian an ṭanpui a.

Tin, sal chhuakho chuan chutiang chuan an ti ta a. Tin, puithiam Ezra chuan chhûngkaw puipate zînga mi an hminghmerh vekin a ruat a; tin, thla sâwmna, ni khat nîah chumi thu chu ngaihtuahin an inkhâwm a.
Tin, thla khatna, ni khat nîah hnam dang hmeichhe neitute chu an tifel ta a.
Tin, puithiam fate zînga hnam dang hmeichhia nupuia lo nei an hriatte chu: Jesua leh a unaute zîngah Jozadaka fapa leh a unau - Maaseia te, Eliezera te, Jariba te, Gedalia te.
Anni chuan an nupuite ṭhen tûrin thu an thlung a; tin, an thiam loh avângin an thiam lohna chu berâm rual zînga mi berâmpa pakhatin an thawi a.
Tin, Imera thlahte zîngah Hanania leh Zebadia;
Harima thlahte zîngah Maaseia te, Elija te, Semaia te, Jehiela te, Uzia te.
Pasura thlahte zîngah Elioenaia te, Maaseia te, Ismaela te, Nethanela te, Jozabada te, Elasa te an ni a.
Tin, Levi chite zîngah Jozabada te, Simeia te, Kelaia te (Kelita an ti bawk ṭhîn), Pethahia te, Juda te, Eliezera te an ni a.
Tin, hla satute zîngah Eliasiba a ni a; kawngkhâr vêngtute zîngah Saluma te, Telema te, Uria te an ni a.
Tin, Israel-hote zîngah Parosa thlaha mi Ramia te, Izia te, Malkija te, Mijamina te, Eleazera te, Malkija te, Benaia te;
Elama thlaha mi Matania te, Zekaria te, Jehiela te, Abdia te, Jeremotha te, Elija te;
Zatua thlaha mi Elioenaia te, Eliasiba te, Matania te, Jeremotha te, Zabada te, Aziza te;
Bebaia thlaha mi Jehohanana te, Hanania te, Zabaia te, Athlaia te;
Bania thlaha mi Mesulama te, Maluka te, Adaia te, Jasuba te, Seala te, Jeremotha te;
Pahath-moaba thlaha mi Adna te, Kelala te, Benaia te, Maaseia te, Matania te, Bezalela te, Binuia te, Manasea te;
Harima thlaha mi Eliezera te, Isija te, Malkija te, Semaia te, Simeona te,
Benjamina te, Maluka te, Semaria te;
Hasuma thlaha mi Matenaia te, Matata te, Zabada te, Elipheleta te, Jeremaia te, Manasea te, Simeia te;
Bania thlaha mi Ma-adaia te, Amrama te, Uela te,
Benaia te, Bedeia te, Keluhia te,
Vania te, Meremotha te, Eliasiba te,
Matania te, Matenaia te, Jaasua te,
Bania te, Binuia te, Simeia te,
Selemia te, Nathana te, Adaia te,
Maknadebaia te, Sasaia te, Saraia te,
Azarela te, Selemia te, Semaria te,
Saluma te, Amaria te, Josefa te;
Neboa thlaha mi Jeiela te, Matithia te, Zabada te, Zebina te, Idova te, Joela te, Benaia te an ni.
Hêng zawng zawng hian hnam dang nupuiah an nei a; tin, ṭhenkhat chuan chûng an nupuite lakah chuan fate an nei a.
Hakalia fapa Nehemia thute chu. Heti hi a ni a, kum sawmhnihna, Kisleu thlaa lal khawpui Susan-a ka awm laiin,
ka unau pakhat Hanania leh Judai ram ata mi ṭhenkhat an lo kal a; tin, Juda-ho sala tâng chhuak la damte chanchin leh Jerusalem chanchin ka zâwt a.
Tin, ka hnênah, “Sala tâng chhuak, chumi rama dama la awmte chu chan chhe tak leh sawichhiatin an awm a. Jerusalem kulh chu a chim rem rum tawh a, a kawngkhârte pawh a kâng asin,” an ti a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, chûng thu chu ka hriat chuan ka ṭhu chawt a, ka ṭap a, ni eng emaw zât chu lungngaiin ka awm a; tin, chaw ka nghei a, vân Pathian hmaah ka ṭawngṭai a,
“Aw Lalpa, vân Pathian, Pathian ropui leh hlauhawm, nangmah hmangaiha i thupêk pawmtute chunga thuthlung hlena khawngaihna tilangtu,

Israela thlahte sualna, i chunga kan sualna thupha ka chawi chhûng hian i beng lo chhiin i mit lo meng la, i chhiahhlawh ṭawngṭaina, i hnêna a chhûn a zâna i chhiahhlawh Israela thlahte ka ngensakna hi lo ngaithla teh ang che; kei leh ka pa chhûngte chu kan lo sual ta si a.
I chungah ṭha lo takin thil kan lo ti ta a, i chhiahhlawh Mosia hnêna i pêk, thupêkte, dânte, rorêlte chu kan lo zâwm ta lo va.
I chhiahhlawh Mosia hnêna, ‘In bawhchhiat chuan hnam tin zîngah ka tiṭaiṭâm ang che u a;

amaherawhchu, ka lam in lo hawi leha, ka thupêkte in pawma in zawm chuan, in zînga mi vân tâwp thleng pawha hnawh chhuah awm mah sela, chûng ata pawh chu ka kai khâwm leh ang a, ka hming ka awmtîrna tûra ka ruat hmunah chuan ka hruai leh ang,’ tia thu i pêk kha khawngaih takin hre reng ang che.
Tin, hêngho hi i chhiahhlawhte leh i mite, i thiltihtheihna nasa tak leh i kut chak taka i tlan chhuahte an ni a.

Aw Lalpa, khawngaih takin i chhiahhlawh ṭawngṭaina leh i hming ṭih lâwm zâwnga neih, i chhiahhlawhte ṭawngṭainaah hian i beng lo chhi ang che; tin, vawiinah hian i chhiahhlawh hi min hlawhtlintîr la, he mi mit hmuhah hian khawngaih takin zahngaihna dawntîr ang che,” ka ti a. Kei chu lal no hlântu ka ni si a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, Lal Artazerzia kum sawmhnih a lal kum, Nisan thlaah uain an rawn hlui hnuin uain chu ka la a, lal chu ka pe a. Tûn hma lam chuan a hmaah lungngai hmêl ka pu ngai lo va.

Tin, lal chuan ka hnênah, “I damlo pawh a ni si lo va, engtizia nge lungngai hmêl i put chu le? Thil dang a ni lo vang, i rilru lam a lungngai a nih hi maw,” mi ti a. Chutichuan, ka hlau ta êm êm mai a.
Tin, kei chuan lal hnênah, “Lal chu kumkhuain dam reng rawh se! Mi thlahtute thlân awmna khua chu a ramin a kawngkhârte chu a kâng vek si a, lungngai hmêl pu lo thei em ka nih ang?” ka ti a.
Chutichuan, lal chuan ka hnênah, “Eng nge ni i dîl?” a ti a. Chutichuan, vân Pathian hnênah ka ṭawngṭai ta a.
Tin, lal hnênah chuan, “Lal remtih zâwng a niha, i chhiahhlawh hian i mit ka lo tlun ṭhin chuan, Judai ramah mi thlahtute thlân awmna khuaah mi kaltîr la, khua chu ka va din leh ang e,” ka ti a.

Tin, lal chuan ka hnênah (lalnu pawh a kiangah chuan a ṭhu a), “Eng chen nge i thang ang a, eng tikah nge i lo haw leh ang?” a ti a. Chutichuan, lal chuan lâwm takin mi kaltîr ta a; tin, keiin hunbi ka tiam a.
Chu chauh chu ni lovin lal hnênah chuan, “Lal remtih zâwng a nih chuan, lui râla rorêltute hmuh atân Judai ram ka thlen thlenga mi kaltîr zêl phalna tûrin lehkhate mi pe la;

tin, lal ngaw hâk vêngtu Asapha hmuh tûrin in vênna kulhbîng kawngkhâr rel atân te, khawpui kulh atân te, ka va luah tûr in atân te thing mi pêk theihna tûrin lehkha mi pe bawk rawh,” ka ti a. Tin, ka Pathianin mi duhsak avângin lal hnêna ka dîl ang zêlin mi pe a.
Chutichuan, lui râla rorêltute hnên chu ka han thleng a, lal lehkhate chu ka han pe a. Tin, lal chuan ka hnênah sipai hotute leh sipai sakawr chung chuang mite a kaltîr ve a ni.
Tin, Horon mi Sanbalata leh Amon mi, chhiahhlawh Tobia-ten an lo hriat chuan, Israela thlahte thawvenna ngaihtuah tûrin mi an lo kal zu nia, tiin an lo lungni lo hle mai a.
Chutichuan, Jerusalem ka han thleng a, ni thum ka han awm phawt a.
Tin, zânah chuan ka tho va, kei leh mi dang tlêm tête nên; Jerusalem tâna ka tih tûr ka Pathianin ka rilrua a dah chu tu mah ka hrilh lo va, ka chuanna sa ngawt lo chu sa dang kan keng lo va.
Tin, zânah chuan Ruam Kawngkaah ka chhuak a, Dragon Tuichhunchhuah lam leh Bawlhhlawh Kawngka lamah ka kal a, Jerusalem kulh chim leh a kawngkhâr kângte chu ka en vêl a.
Tin, Tuichhunchhuah Kawngka leh Lal Dîl thlengin ka kal zêl a; nimahsela, ka chuanna sa kal tlang theihna rêng rêng a awm lo va.
Chutichuan, zânah lui ka zawh chho va, kulh chu ka en a; tin, ka lêt leh a, Ruam Kawngkaah chuan ka lût a, chutiang chuan ka haw leh ta a.
Rorêltute chuan khawiah nge ka kala, eng nge ka tih pawh an hre lo; tin, Juda-te, puithiamte, mi ṭhate, rorêltute leh mi dang hnathawktu tûr rêng rêng pawh ka la hrilh rih lo bawk a.

Chutichuan, an hnênah, “Kan chan a chhiatzia hi in hmu a, Jerusalem a ram tih te, a kawngkhârte a kâng tih te pawh in hria a; hawh u, sawi chhiat kan nih tawh loh nân Jerusalem kulh chu i din leh ang u,” ka ti a.

Tin, ka Pathian mi duhsak thûte ka hrilh a, ka hnêna lal thusawite pawh. Tin, anni chuan, “I tho vang u khai; i din teh tak ang u,” an ti a. Chutichuan, chu hna ṭha thawk tûr chuan an kut an tichak a.

Amaherawhchu, Horon mi Sanbalata leh Amon mi, chhiahhlawh Tobia leh Arab mi Geseman an hriat chuan, min nuihzatbûr a, min hmusit a, “In thiltih hi eng tizia nge ni? Lal chungah in hel elo ni?” te min ti a.

Chutichuan, anni chu ka chhâng a, an hnênah, “Vân Pathian chuan mi tihmuingîl ang a; chutichuan, keini a chhiahhlawhte chu kan tho vang a, kan din ang a; nangni erawh chuan Jerusalem-ah hian chanvo emaw, thuneihna emaw, hnuhma emaw in nei lo rêng rêng,” ka ti a.

Chutichuan, puithiam lal Eliasiba chu a unau puithiamte nên chuan an tho va, Berâm Kawngka chu an siam a; an tithianghlim a, a kawngkhârte an siam a; Hamea in sâng thlengin an tithianghlim a, Hananela in sâng thleng chuan.
Tin, a dawt chu Jeriko miten an siam a. Tin, anmahni dawt chu Imria fapa Zakuran a siam a.
Tin, Sangha Kawngka chu Hasena fapaten an siam a; a relte an dah a, a kawngkhârte an rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate an rem a.
Tin, anni dawt chu Hakoza fa Uria fapa Meremothan a siam ṭha a. Tin, anni dawt chu Mesezabela fa Berekia fapa Mesulaman a siam ṭha a. Tin, anni dawt chu Baana fapa Zadokan a siam ṭha a.
Tin, anni dawt Teko-hovin an siam ṭha a; nimahsela, an mi liante chuan an hotu hnaah chuan an ring an rawlh ve duh lo.
Tin, Kawngka Hlui chu Pasea fapa Joiada leh Besodeia fapa Mesulaman an siam ṭha a, a relte an dah a, a kawngkhârte an rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate an rem a.
Tin, anni dawt chu Gibeon mi Melatia leh Meronoth mi Jadonan lui râl ram awptu thu hnuaia awm Gibeon mi leh Mizpa mite nên an siam ṭha a.
A dawt chu rangkachak chhertu zînga mi Harhaia fapa Uzielan a siam ṭha a. Tin, a dawt lehah chuan rimtui siamtu zînga mi Hananian a siam ṭha a, Kulh Chhah thlengin Jerusalem chu an siam ṭha a.
Tin, anni dawt chu Jerusalem bial chanve hotu Hura fapa Rephaian a siam ṭha a.
Tin, anni dawt chu Harumapha fapa Jedaian a in zâwn a siam ṭha a. Tin, a dawt chu Hasabneia fapa Hatusan a siam ṭha a.
Harima fapa Malkija leh Pahath-moaba fapa Hasuba-te chuan hmun dang leh Meipui Chhehna In sâng an siam ṭha a.
Tin, a dawt chu Jerusalem bial chanve hotu Hallohesa fapa Saluman a fanute nên an siam ṭha a.
Ruam Kawngka chu Hanuna leh Zanoa-hoten an siam ṭha a; an siam a, a kawngkhârte an rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate an rem a; tin, Bawlhhlawh Kawngka thlengin kulh tawng sângkhat an siam bawk a.
Bawlhhlawh Kawngka erawh chu Beth-hakkerem bial hotu Rekaba fapa Malkijan a siam ṭha a; a siam a, kawngkhârte a rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate a rem a.

Tin, Mizpa bial hotu Kol-hozea fapa Sallunan Tuikhur Kawngka chu a siam ṭha a; a siam a, a khuh a, a kawngkhârte a rel a, a kalhnate leh a bahnate a rem a; tin, Lal Huan kianga Sela Dîl hungna chu Davida khua aṭanga chhuk thla kailâwn thlengin a siam ṭha bawk a.
Tin, a dawt chu Azbuka, Beth-zur bial chanve hotu fapa Nehemia chuan Davida thlân zâwn leh dîl khuah leh mi huaisente in thlengin a siam ṭha a.
A dawt chu Levi-hovin an siam ṭha a, Bania fapa, Rehuma te hovin. A dawt chu Keila bial chanve hotu Hasabia chuan ama bial hmingin a siam ṭha a.
A dawt chu an unauten an siam ṭha a, Keila bial chanve hotu Henadada fapa Bavaia-tehovin.
Tin, a dawt chu Mizpa hotu Jesua fapa Ezera chuan hmun dang, kulh kawi ṭannaa râlthuam dahna pan chhohna zâwn a siam ṭha a.
A dawt chu Zabaia fapa Baruka chuan ṭhahnemngai takin hmun dang, kulh kawi ṭanna aṭanga puithiam lal Eliasiba in kawngkhâr thlengin a siam ṭha a.
A dawt chu Hakoza fa, Uria fapa Meremothan hmun dang, Eliasiba in kawngkhâr aṭanga Eliasiba in tâwp thlengin a siam ṭha a.
Tin, a dawt chu a chheh vêla puithiamhovin an siam ṭha a.
Anni dawt chu Benjamina leh Hasuban an in zâwn chu an siam ṭha a. An dawt chu Anania fa Maaseia fapa Azarian a in kiang a siam ṭha a.
A dawt chu Henadada fapa Binuian hmun dang, Azaria in aṭanga kulh kawi ṭanna, a kil thlengin a siam ṭha a.
Uzaia fapa Palala chuan kulh kawi ṭanna zâwn leh tân in kianga lal in chungnung zâwk aṭanga lawr in sâng zâwn a siam ṭha a. A dawt chu Parosa fapa Pedaian a siam ṭha a.
(Nethin-ho chu chhak lampanga Tui Kawngkhâr zâwn thleng leh in sâng lawr thlengin Ophel-ah an awm a.)
A dawt chu Teko-hovin hmun dang, in sâng lian pui lawr zâwn leh Ophel kulh thlengin an siam ṭha a.
Sakawr Kawngka chung lam chu puithiamhoten mahni in zâwn ṭheuh an siam ṭha a.
Anni dawt chu Imera fapa Zadokan a in zâwn a siam ṭha a. Tin, a dawt chu chhak lam kawngkhâr vêngtu Sekania fapa Semaian a siam ṭha a.
A dawt chu Selemia fapa Hanania leh Zalapha fapa parukna Hanuna-te chuan hmun dang an siam ṭha a. A dawt chu Berekia fapa Mesulaman a awmna zâwn a siam ṭha a.
A dawt chu rangkachak chhertu zînga mi Malkija chuan Hamipkad Kawngkhâr zâwn Nethin-ho in leh sumdâwngho in thleng leh a kil pan chhohna thlengin a siam ṭha a.
Tin, a kil pan chhohna leh a Berâm Kawngka inkâr chu rangkachak chhertu leh sumdâwnghoten an siam ṭha a.
Nimahsela, heti hi a ni a, Sanbalatan kulh kan siam tih a han hriat chuan a thinur a, nasa takin a thin a tirim a, Juda-te a chêksawlh ta a.

Tichuan, a unaute leh Samari sipaite hmaah chuan thu a sawi a, “Hêng Juda mi chhiaṭhahote hian eng nge maw an tih le? Khawpui sak ṭhat an tum em ni vei le? An inthawi tehlul ang maw? Ni khat thil thûah an puitlin tehlul ang maw? Bawlhhlawh awm khâwm mai mai ata lung kâng chhe tawh si an din thar leh ang maw?” a ti a.
Tin, a kianga Amon mi Tobia chuan, “Han din teh rêng se; sihal pawh han lâwn sela an lung kulh chu a tichim mai ang chu,” a ti a.
Aw kan Pathian, ngai teh, hmuhsitin kan awm hi; an mi sawichhiatna chu anmahni lû chungah lêttîr la, anni pawh khawii ramah emaw mualpho takin tântîr reng ang che!
An bawhchhiatna chu khuh suh la, an sualnate chu i hma ata thai bovin awmtîr suh ang che; kulh siamtute hmaah an tihthinur che hi.
Chutichuan, kulh chu kan siam a; a sân lam chanvein kulh zawng zawng chu kan zawm chhuak vek a; mipuite chuan thawh châkna rilru an pu hle mai a ni.

Amaherawhchu, heti hi a ni a, Sanbalata te, Tobia te, Arab mite, Amon mite leh Asdod miten Jerusalem kulh chu siam ṭhat a ni zêl tih leh, a chhe laite kan thawm ṭan tih an hriat chuan an thinur ta hle mai a;
tichuan, Jerusalem chu rawn beiha buaina rawn siam an phiar tlâng ta a.
Nimahsela, anmahni avângin kan Pathian hnênah kan ṭawngṭai a, chhûn leh zânah an laka vêngtu kan dah reng a.
Tin, Juda chuan, “Thawktute tha a chau zo tawh a, bawlhhlawh lah a nasa si a; kulh chu kan siam thei dâwn ta lo a nih hi,” a ti a.
Tin, kan hmêlmate lah chuan, “An zînga kan han kala, kan han thaha, hna chu kan han tihtâwpsak hma chuan an hre lo vang a, min hmu hek lo vang,” an lo ti bawk si a.
Nimahsela, Juda mi an kianga chêngte chuan kan hnêna lo kalin kan hmêlmate min phiarna chu min hrilh fo bawk a.
Chuvâng chuan kulh phên, a hniam lai ber, hmun thawthâwl takahte mipuite chu a chhûng chhûngin an khandaih te, an fei te, an thal ngulte kengin ṭanhmun ka khuartîr a.

Tin, ka han en vêl a, ka tho va, mi ṭhate leh rorêltute leh mipui dangte hnênah chuan, “Anmahniho chu hlau hauh suh ula, Lalpa ropui tak leh hlauhawm tak mai chu hre rengin in unaute, in fapate, in fanute, in nupuite, in inte hum tûrin bei rawh u,” ka ti a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, kan hmêlmaten kan lo hria tih leh, an thiltih tum chu Pathianin eng mah lovah a siam tih an hriatin, kulh lamah mahni hnathawhna ṭheuhvah kan kal leh ta vek a.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, chuta chin chu kan tlangvâlho zâtvete chuan hna an thawk a; tin, a zâtvete chuan feite, phawte, thal ngulte, âwmphawte chu an kawl a; tin, rorêltu chuan Juda chhûngte, kulh siamtu zawng zawngte chu an ṭan tlat a.
Kulh siamna tûr hmanraw phurtute pawhin an kut khing khatin hna an thawk a, khing khatin hriamhrei an keng a;
a siamtute chuan an khandaih an pai ṭheuh va, chutiang chung chuan an siam a ni. Tin, tawtawrâwt hâmtu chu ka kiangah a awm a.
Tin, mi ṭhate leh rorêltute leh mipuite hmaah chuan, “Hna chu a nasain a zau êm mai a, kulhah hian kan darhsarhin kan inhlat hle mai si a;
tawtawrâwt ri in hriatna lam apiangah chuan, chutah chuan kan hnênah lo tlân khâwm ula; kan Pathianin min dosak ang,” ka ti a.
Chutiang chuan hna chu kan thawk a; tin, a zâtve chuan khawfîng chah aṭangin arsi lan thlengin feite chu an kawl reng a.
Chutiang bawkin chumi lai vêk chuan mipuite hnênah, “Zâna min vênga chhûnlâwna hnathawk atân tu pawh an chhiahhlawhte nên Jerusalem chhûngah riak vek rawh se,” ka ti a ni.
Chutichuan, kei pawh, ka unaute pawh, ka tlangvâlte pawh, vêngtu mi zui ṭhînte pawh, tu mah rêng rêngin kan silhfên kan hlîp lo va, hriamhrei inbel chung ṭheuhvin tui lamah chuan kan kal ta ṭhîn a.
Chutichuan, mipuite leh an nupuite chu an unau Juda-te chunga phunnawiin an au ta mur mur mai a.
“Keiniho hi kan fapate leh kan fanute nên kan ṭhahnem hle a, ei tûr lamah hian kan hautak hle si a,” an ti a.
ṭhenkhatin, “Kan tam si a, ei tûr kan nei lo. Kan lote kan dahkham si a,” an ti a.
“Lal hnêna chhiah chawi atân sum kan pûk a, chumi atân chuan kan lote leh kan grêp huante kan dahkham a.

Kan tisa chu kan unaute tisa ang bawk a ni a, kan fate pawh an fate ang bawk an ni si a; nimahsela, hei, kan fanute leh kan fapate hi chhiahhlawh atâna bâwihah kan luhtîr takngial dâwn hi; kan fanu ṭhenkhat phei chu bâwihah an lût tawh nghe nghe a. Chhan ngaihna hre hek lo i, miin kan lote leh kan grêp huante lah chu an nei ta si a,” tite an awm nual bawk a.
Chûng thûte leh an au thâwm chu ka hriatin ka thinur hle mai a.

Chutichuan, ka rilruin ka ngaihtuah a, mi ṭhate leh rorêltute chu ka khak a, an hnênah, “Mi tinin in unaute a pung ûmin sum in pûktîr rêng mai a,” ka ti a. Tin, an chungchâng ngaihtuah tûrin mi ka khâwm chiam a.

Tin, an hnênah, “Hnam dangte hnêna hralh kan unau Juda-hote chu kan theih ang angin kan tlan a. Nangnin in unaute chu zawrh in tum a ni maw? Keini hnênah kher hian hralh an ni dâwn em ni?” ka ti a. Chutichuan, an ngawi reng mai a, chhân ngaihna rêng an hre lo va.
“In thiltih hi a ṭha tawp lo mai. Kan hmêlma, hnam dangte mi sawichhiatna avângte hian kan Pathian ṭiha in awm a ṭûl a ni lâwm ni?
Kei leh ka unaute leh ka tlangvâlte pawhin chutianga a pung ûm chuan kan sum leh buh kan pûktîr ve bawk asin. A pung ûma pûktîr hi i bân teh daih ang u khai.
Vawiinah ngei hian an lote, an grêp huante, an olive huante, an inte leh an sum leh an buh leh an uain leh hriak hmun zaa hmun khat in lâk ṭhin pawh chu pe leh vek rawh u khai,” ka ti bawk a.

Chutichuan, anni chuan, “Kan pe leh vek ang, an lakah eng mah kan phût lo vang; i tih ang tak chuan kan ti ang,” an ti a. Chutichuan, puithiamte ka ko va, an hmaah chumi thutiam ang taka ti ngei tûr chuan chhia ka chhamtîr a.

Ka puan ven chu ka thing a, “Hemi thutiam anga ti lo apiang hi Pathianin a in aṭang leh a hnathawh aṭangin hetiang hian thing thla rawh se; hetianga thin thlâk hian awm sela, tihruahin awm rawh se,” ka ti a. Tin, pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan, “Amen,” an ti a, Lalpa an fak a. Tin, mipuite chuan chumi thutiam ang chuan an ti ta a.

Chu lo pawh chu Judai rama anmahni awptu atâna ruat ka nih achin, Lal Artazerzia kum sawmhnih a lal kum aṭanga kum sawmthum leh kum hnih a lal kum thleng, kum sâwm leh pahnih chhûng chuan kei leh ka unaute hian ram awptu buh chhiah kan la lo va.

Nimahsela, tûn hmaa ram awptute kha mite lakah an lo hautak hle mai a, tangkarua sakel sawmli tiam lovin an chhangte leh uainte an lâksak ṭhîn a. Chumi ahnuhmanah an chhiahhlawhte chu mite chungah an intilal hle mai a; nimahsela, kei zawngin Pathian ṭihna avângin chutiang chuan ka ti ve lo.
A ni, hemi kulh hna thawk hian ka awm reng a, ram rêng rêng lei pawh ka lei lo. Ka tlangvâlho zawng zawng pawh hna chu thawkin chutah chuan an awm khâwm reng bawk a ni.
Chu chang pawh ni lovin, kan vêla hnam dangte zîng aṭanga lo kal tiam lovin, Juda-te leh rorêltute zînga ka dawhkân kîl mi za leh sawmnga an awm reng a ni.

Tin, ni khat atâna an buatsaih chu sebâwngpa pakhat leh berâm paruk a ṭha ṭhiau a ni a; tin, ârte pawh ka tân an buatsaih a, ni sâwm dan zêlah uain chi hrang hrang tam zet nên. Chutiang chuan buatsaih mah sela, he mite tuar hi a rip êm avângin ram awptu pual chhang chu ka phût lo rêng rêng a ni.
Aw ka Pathian, he mite tâna ka thiltih zawng zawng hi ka ṭhatna tûrin hre reng ang che.

Tin, heti hi a ni a, Sanbalata leh Tobia leh Arab mi Gesema leh kan hmêlma dang rêng rêngten kulh te ka siam a, a pawp lai rêng rêng a awm ta lo tih an han hriat chuan (amaherawhchu, chumi lai chuan kawngkaah chuan kawngkhârte ka la rel lo va),
Sanbalata leh Gesema chuan, “Lo kal la, Ono phaia khaw pakhatah i intâwk khâwm teh ang u,” tiin thu min rawn thawn a. Nimahsela, ka chunga thil ṭha lo tih an tum a lo ni reng a.
Tin, keiin an hnênah, “Hna ropui tak ka thawk a, ka lo chhuk thei lo. Engah nge in hnêna ka rawn chhuksan hlânin hna chu a chawlh ang?” tiin mi ka tîr a.
Tin, chutiang hlîr chuan vawi li thu mi rawn thawn a, chutiang hlîr chuan ka chhâng bawk a.
Chutichuan, Sanbalata chuan chutiang bawkin a vawi nganaah chuan a chhiahhlawh lehkha châr loh kengin ka hnênah a rawn tîr a.

Chumiah chuan, “Nang leh Juda-ho chuan hel in rilrûk a, chuvâng chuan kulh chu i siam a ni tih thu hnam dangte zîngah a thang a, Gasmua’n a sawi bawk a; tin, an sawi dân hmangah chuan nang hi an lal nih i tum a.

Tin, ‘Judai ramah chuan lal a awm,’ tia i chanchin Jerusalem-a puang vêl tûrin zâwlnei pawh i ruat tawh hial bawk a. Hêng thu hi lal hnênah an sawi thuai ngei ang a. Chuvângin, lo kal la, i lo inrâwn ang hmiang,” tih a chuang a.
Chutichuan, a hnênah, “I sawi ang rêng rêng hian eng mah tih a awm lo, i phuah chawp mai a ni,” tiin a hnênah mi ka tîr a.
“An hnathawh chu an puitlin theih loh nân an kutte chu tihchak lohvin a awm ang,” tia mi sawiṭhaih duh vek an ni a. Chutichuan, aw Pathian, ka kutte hi min tihchaksak teh ang che.

Chumi zawhah chuan Mehetabela fa Delaia fapa Semaia, chhuakvâk thei lova inah chuan ka kal a; tin, ani chuan, “Pathian inah, biak in chhûng ngeiah inhmu ang khai, biak in kawngte i khâr tlat ang, nangmah that tûrin an lo kal dâwn a ni; zânah rawn thah che an tum a ni,” a lo ti a.
Tin, kei chuan, “Keini ang hi han tlânchhe tûr em kan nih? Mahni nun humhim tûr pawhin biak inah tu nge lût duh ang? Ka lût tawp lo vang,” ka ti a.
Tin, ka han hre chhuak a, Pathian tirh a lo ni hauh lo mai a, keimah mi dodâlin chûng thu chu a sawi a lo ni zâwk a, Tobia leh Sanbalatan an rawih a lo ni reng a.
Ka hlauhva, chutianga ka tiha, thil ka tihsuala, mi tihhmingchhiatna tûr an neih theiha min sawi chhiat nân an rawih a ni a.
Aw ka Pathian, Tobia leh Sanbalata hi an thiltih ang zêl hian hre reng ang che, zâwlneinu Noadii leh zâwlnei dang, mi tihhlauh tum zawng zawng nên hian.
Chutichuan, kulh chu ni sawmnga leh ni hnihah, Elul thla, ni sawmhnih leh ni nga nîah peih a ni ta a.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, kan hmêlma zawng zawngten chu chu an lo hriat chuan kan vêla hnam dangte chuan an hlau ta a, chan chhe ta hlein an inhria a, hna chu kan Pathian thawh a ni tih an hre ta si a.
Chu lo rêngah pawh, chûng lai chuan Juda mi ṭhate chuan Tobia chu lehkha tam tak an thawn ṭhîn a; tin, Tobia lehkha pawh an hmu bawk ṭhîn a.
Ani chu Ara fapa Sekania mâkpa a nih avângin Judai rama mi tam tak chhechhama amah thurualpui an awm a; tin, a fapa Jehohanana chuan Berekia fapa Mesulama fanu chu nupuiah a nei a ni a.
Ka hriatah a thiltih ṭhatte an sawi ṭhîn a, ka thusawite a hnênah an thlen bawk ṭhîn. Tichuan, Tobia chuan min tihṭhaih tûrin lehkhate a rawn thawn ṭhîn a ni.
Tin, heti hi a ni a, kulhte kan siama, kawngkhârte kan rela, kawngkhâr vêngtute, hla satute, Levi-hote ruat an nih zawh chuan,
ka unau Hanania leh kulhbîng hotu Hanania chu Jerusalem ka awptîr a; mi rinawm tak, mi ahluana Pathian ṭih mi a ni si a.

Jerusalem kulh kawngkhârte hi ni a tlângsân fe hma chu hawng suh u, tlaiah, vêngtute an ṭîn hmain khâr sela, kalh vek rawh se. Tin, Jerusalem-a awmte zînga mi, vêngtute ruat ula, an awmna tûr ruatah awm sela, a ṭhen erawh chuan mahni in bul vêl an vêng ṭheuh tûr a ni.
Khua chu a zauvin a lian hle a; nimahsela, a mi awmte an tlêm hle mai a, inte pawh la sak loh a ni si a.

Tin, ka Pathianin ka rilruah, mi ṭhate, rorêltute, mipuite ko khâwm veka, an thlahtute ang zêla chhiar tûrin mi hriattîr a. Tin, a tîr taka kal chhote thlahtute hming ziakna bu chu ka hmu chhuak a, chutah chuan hetianga ziak ka hmu a:
sala hruai, Babulon lal Nebukadnezzaran a hruaite zînga sala tâng chhuak, Jerusalem leh Judai rama mahni khua ṭheuhva haw leha, chumi rama awm tate chu hêngte hi an ni:

Zerubabela te, Jesua te, Nehemia te, Azaria te, Raamia te, Nahamania te, Mordekaia te, Bilsana te, Misperetha te, Bigvaia te, Nehuma te, Baana te rual hian an kal a ni. Israel-ho zînga mi vântlâng tam lam chu:
Parosa thlahte sânghnih leh za leh sawmsarih leh pahnih;
Sephatia thlahte zathum leh sawmsarih leh pahnih;
Ara thlahte zaruk leh sawmnga leh pahnih;
Jesua leh Joaba thlahte zînga Pahath-moaba thlahte sânghnih leh zariat leh sawm leh pariat;
Elama thlahte sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmnga leh pali;
Zatua thlahte zariat leh sawmli leh panga;
Zakaia thlahte zasarih leh sawmruk;
Binuia thlahte zaruk leh sawmli leh pariat;
Bebaia thlahte zaruk leh sawmhnih leh pariat;
Azgada thlahte sânghnih leh zathum leh sawmhnih leh pahnih;
Adonikama thlahte zaruk leh sawmruk leh pasarih;
Bigvaia thlahte sânghnih leh sawmruk leh pasarih;
Adina thlahte zaruk leh sawmnga leh panga;
Hezekia thlaha mi Atera thlahte sawmkua leh pariat;
Hasuma thlahte zathum leh sawmhnih leh pariat;
Bezaia thlahte zathum leh sawmhnih leh pali;
Haripha thlahte za leh sâwm leh pahnih;
Gibeona thlahte sawmkua leh panga;
Bethlehem leh Netopha khuaa mi za leh sawmriat leh pariat;
Anathoth khuaa mi za leh sawmhnih leh pariat;
Beth-azmavet khuaa mi sawmli leh pahnih;
Kiriath-jearim te, Kephira te leh Beerot khuaa mite zasarih leh sawmli leh pathum;
Rama leh Geba khuaa mi zaruk leh sawmhnih leh pakhat;
Mikma khuaa mi za leh sawmhnih leh pahnih;
Bethel leh Ai khuaa mi za leh sawmhnih leh pathum;
Nebo danga mi sawmnga leh pahnih;
Elam dang khaw chhuak thlahte sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmnga leh pali;
Harim khaw chhuak thlahte zathum leh sawmhnih;
Jeriko khaw chhuak thlahte zathum leh sawmli leh panga;
Lod leh Hadid te leh Ono khaw chhuak thlahte zasarih leh sawmhnih leh pakhat;
Sena khaw chhuak thlahte sângthum leh zakua leh sawmthum.
Puithiamte - Jesua chhûngte zînga mi Jedaia thlahte zakua leh sawmsarih leh pathum;
Imera thlahte sângkhat leh sawmnga leh pahnih;
Pasura thlahte sângkhat leh zahnih leh sawmli leh pasarih;
Harima thlahte sângkhat leh sawm leh pasarih.
Levi-hote - Hodeva thlaha mi Jesua leh Kadmiela thlahte sawmsarih leh pali.
Hla satute - Asapha thlahte za leh sawmli leh pariat.
Kawngkhâr vêngtute - Saluma thlahte, Atera thlahte, Talmona thlahte, Akuba thlahte, Hatita thlahte, Sobaia thlahte za leh sawmthum leh pariat.
Nethin-ho - Ziha thlahte, Hasupha thlahte, Tabaotha thlahte,
Kerosa thlahte, Sia thlahte, Padona thlahte,
Lebana thlahte, Hagaba thlahte, Salmaia thlahte,
Hanana thlahte, Gidela thlahte, Gahara thlahte,
Reaia thlahte, Rezina thlahte, Nekoda thlahte,
Gazama thlahte, Uza thlahte, Pasea thlahte,
Besaia thlahte, Meunima thlahte, Nephisesima thlahte,
Bakbuka thlahte, Hakupha thlahte, Harhura thlahte,
Bazlitha thlahte, Mehida thlahte, Harsa thlahte,
Barkosa thlahte, Sisera thlahte, Tema thlahte,
Nezia thlahte, Hatipha thlahte.
Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlah: Sotaia thlahte, Sopheretha thlahte, Perida thlahte;
Jaala thlahte, Darkona thlahte, Gidela thlahte,
Sephatia thlahte, Hatila thlahte, Pokereth-hazebaima thlahte, Amona thlahte.
Nethin mi zawng zawng leh Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlah chu zathum leh sawmkua leh pahnih an ni.

Tin, Tel-mela te, Tel-harsa te, Kerub te, Adon te, Imer aṭangtea lo chhote chu hêngho hi an ni a; nimahsela, an pi leh pute chhûngte leh an thlah zêlte Israel mi an nih leh nih loh an chhui thei lo va:
Delaia thlahte, Tobia thlahte, Nekoda thlahte zaruk leh sawmli leh pahnih.
Tin, puithiamte zînga mi: Hobaia thlahte, Hakoza thlahte, Gilead mi Barzilaia fanu zînga mi nupuia neia, an hming pu ta nghâl Barzilaia thlahte chu:
chûngho chuan an thlahtute ang zêla chhiarte zîngah chuan an hming ziakna an zawng a; nimahsela, an hmu lo va; chuvângin, bawlhhlawha ngaihin an awm a, an puithiam nihna chu an bân a.
Tin, ram awptu chuan anni chu Urim leh Thumim inbela puithiam a din hma loh chuan thil serhte chu an ei tûr a ni lo tih a hrilh a.
Mipui pung khâwm zawng zawng chu sîngli leh sânghnih leh zathum leh sawmruk an ni a,
an chhiahhlawh hmeichhia leh mipa sângsarih leh zathum sawmthum leh pasarih tiam lovin; tin, hla satu hmeichhia leh mipa zahnih leh sawmli leh panga an ni a.
An sakawr chu zasarih leh sawmthum leh paruk a ni a, sabengtung lian chi chu zahnih leh sawmli leh panga a ni a,
an sanghâwngsei chu zali leh sawmthum leh panga a ni a, an sabengtung chu sângruk leh zasarih leh sawmhnih a ni.
Tin, chhûngkaw puipa ṭhenkhatten chumi hna atân chuan thil an thawh a. Ram awptu chuan thawhlâwmah rangkachak darik sângkhat, maihûn sawmnga, puithiam silhfên zanga leh sawmthum a thawh a.
Tin, chhûngkaw puipa ṭhenkhatten in sakna thawhlâwmah rangkachak darik sînghnih leh tangkarua bûk sânghnih leh zahnih an thawh a.
Tin, mi dang zawng zawng pêk chu rangkachak darik sînghnih leh tangkarua bûk sânghnih leh puithiam silhfên sawmruk leh pasarih a ni.

Tichuan, puithiamte, Levi-hote, kawngkhâr vêngtute, hla satute leh mi ṭhenkhatte leh, Nethin-ho leh Israel mi zawngte chu mahni khua khuaah an awm ta a. Chutichuan, thla sarihna a lo thlen chuan Israela thlahte chu an khuaahte chuan an awm a.

Tin, mi zawng zawng chu thu khat vuain Tui Kawngkhâr hmazâwn hmun zau laiah chuan an kal khâwm a; tin, lehkhaziaktu Ezra chu Lalpan Israel-hote zawm tûra thu a pêk, Mosia dân bu chu rawn keng tûrin an hrilh a.
Chutichuan, thla sarihna ni khat nîah puithiam Ezra chuan pung khâwmho, nutling patling leh a hre thiam thei chin zawng zawng hmaah chuan dân chu a rawn keng a.

Tin, chuta mi chu Tui Kawngkhâr hmazâwn hmun zau laiah chuan, nutling patling leh a hre thiam thei chinte hmaah chuan zîng tak aṭangin chhûn thlengin a chhiar a; tin, mi zawng zawng chuan dân bu thûah chuan an beng an chhi ṭhup mai a.

Tin, chutiang atâna an siam rêng thing dawhkân sângah chuan lehkhaziaktu Ezra chu a ding a; tin, a sîr ding lamah chuan Matithia te, Sema te, Anaia te, Uria te, Hilkia te, Maaseia te an ding a; tin, a vei lamah chuan Pedaia te, Misaela te, Malkija te, Hasuma te, Hasbadana te, Zekaria te, Mesulama te.
Tin, Ezra chuan mi zawng zawng mit hmuhah chuan lehkhabu zial chu a han phelh a (mi zawng zawng aia sânga ding a ni a); tin, a han phelh chuan mi zawng zawng chu an ding ta vek a;
tichuan, Ezra chuan Lalpa, Pathian ropui tak chu a fak a. Tin, mipui zawng zawng chuan an bân pharin, “Amen, Amen!” tiin an lo chhâwn a. Tin, an kûn a, an hmaia lei siin Lalpa chu chibai an bûk a.

Tin, Jesua te, Bania te, Serebia te, Jamina te, Akuba te, Sabethaia te, Hodija te, Maaseia te, Kelita te, Azaria te, Jozabada te, Hanana te, Pelaia te, Levi-hote chuan mipuite chu dân an hrilhfiah a; mipuite chu an dinhmunah chuan an awm reng a.
Tin, lehkhabu, Pathian dân bua mi chu fiah takin an chhiar a; a awmzia an hrilhfiah a; tichuan, an chhiar chu an hriat chiantîr zêl a.

Tin, ram awptu Nehemia leh, puithiam leh lehkhaziaktu ni fâwm Ezra leh mipuite zirtîrtu Levi-hote chuan mipui zawng zawng hnênah chuan, “Vawiin hi Lalpa in Pathian tâna ni thianghlim a ni a; lungchhe suh ula, ṭap hek suh u,” an ti a. Dân thu chu an hriatin mipui zawng zawng chu an ṭap an ṭap mai si a.

Chutichuan, ani chuan an hnênah, “Kal ula, thil thau eiin thil thlum in ula, eng mah buatsaih nei lote tân chanpual thawn ang che u; vawiin hi kan Lalpa tâna ni thianghlim a nih hi. Lungngaiin awm suh u; Lalpa chunga lâwmna chu in chakna a ni si a,” a ti a.
Chutichuan, Levi-hote chuan, “Ngawi hle hle rawh u, vawiin hi ni thianghlim a ni si a; lungngaih pawh lungngai duh suh u,” tiin mipui zawng zawng chu an tingawi ta ṭhuap mai a.
Tichuan, thu a hrilhfiah chu an hriat thiam avângin mipui zawng zawng chu ei tûr te, in tûr te, mi dang chanpual thawn tûr te, hlim taka awm tûr tein an ṭîn ta vek a.
Tin, a ni hnih ni chuan mipui zawng zawng zînga chhûngkaw puipa te, puithiam te, Levi-hote chu dân thu zir tûr bawk chuan lehkhaziaktu Ezra hnênah an kal khâwm a.
Tin, Lalpan Mosia hmanga zawm tûra thu a pêk dânah chuan, thla sarihna kût laia Israela thlahte chhâwl bûka an awm tûr thu ziak an hmu a,

“Tlângah kal ula, olive zâr te, olive suak zâr te, lênhmui zâr te, tûm kau te, thing lian tak tak zârte chhâwl bûk sak nân va la rawh u,” tiin, an khua zawng zawngah leh Jerusalem khuaa an tlângthantîr tûr leh puan vêl tûr a nih thute an chhiar a.

Chutichuan, mipuite chu an va kal a, an va la a, mi zawng zawngin an in chungah te, an kawtah te, Pathian in kawtah te, Tui Kawngkhâr hmun zau laiah te, Ephraim kawngkhâr hmun zau laiah te chhâwl bûk an insiam ṭheuh va.

Tin, sal chhuak pung khâwmho zawng zawng chuan chhâwl bûk an siam a, chhâwl bûkahte chuan an awm a. Nuna fapa Josua hun aṭanga chumi ni thleng chuan Israela thlahte chuan chutiang tak chuan an ti ngai lo va. Tichuan, lâwmna nasa tak a lo awm ta a.
Ni tin, a ṭan tirh ni aṭanga a tâwp thlengin Pathian dân bua mi a chhiar bawk a. Tin, ni riat ni chu kût ṭiak ni a ni a, thupêk angin inkhâwmna urhsûn takin an titâwp ṭhîn.
Chutichuan, chumi thla ni sawmhnih leh ni li ni chuan Israela thlahte chu chaw ngheia saiip puan sinin, lei kai luamin an kal khâwm a.
Tin, Israel hnam chu hnam dangte lakah an intihrang a, an ding a, an sualnate leh an pi leh pu bawhchhiatnate thupha an chawi a.

Tin, mahni hmun hmunah an ding a, chumi ni hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat chhûng chuan Lalpa an Pathian dân bu an chhiar a; tin, hmun lia ṭhena hmun khat dang chhûng chuan thupha an chawi a, Lalpa an Pathian an bia a.
Chutichuan, Levi-ho dawhkân sângah chuan Jesua te, Bania te, Kadmiela te, Sebania te, Bunia te, Serebia te, Bania te, Kenania te chu an ding a, ring takin Lalpa an Pathian an au va.

Chutichuan, Levi mi, Jesua leh Kadmiela te, Bania te, Hasabneia te, Serebia te, Hodia te, Sebania te leh Pethahia te chuan, “Ding ula, Lalpa in Pathian chu chatuan ata chatuan thlengin fak rawh u,” an ti a. “Chawimawina leh fakna zawng zawngina a phâk loh, i hming ropui chu fakin awm rawh se.

Lalpa, nangmah chauh hi Lalpa i ni a, vânte vân leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte nên, leilung leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte nên, tuifinriat leh a chhûnga awm zawng zawngte nên i siam a, a zain i vawng ṭha ṭhîn a; tin, vâna awmhote chuan chibai an bûk ṭhîn che a.
Abrama chu thlanga, Kaldai ram Ur khua ata hruai chhuaka, a hminga Abrahama saksaktu Lalpa Pathian i ni a;

tin, a thinlung chu i hmaah rinawmin i hria a, Kanaan-hote, Hit-hote, Amor-hote, Periz-hote, Jebus-hote, Girgas-hote ram chu pe tûrin, a thlahte lam pe tûrin thu i thlung a; tin, i thu i hlen bawk a; fel tak i ni si a.
“Aigupta rama kan pi leh pute hrehawmzia chu i hmu reng a, Tuifinriat Sen kama an au thâwmte chu i hria a;

Pharaoa leh a chhiahhlawh zawng zawngte leh a rama mi zawng zawngte chungah chhinchhiahnate leh thilmakte i lantîr a; chapo takin an chungah thil an ti tih i hre si a; tichuan, tûn thleng hian hming i insiam ta a.
Tin, an hmaah tuifinriat chu i tiṭhen a; tichuan, lei chârah tuifinriat chu an kal tlang a; tin, anmahni ûmtute chu tui thûk takah, tui thûk taka lung paih luh ang maiin i paih lût a.
Tin, chhûnah chhûm dingin i hruai ṭhîn a, zânah pawh an kalna tûr kawnga anmahni ên tûrin mei alh dingin i hruai ṭhîn a.
“Sinai tlângah chuan i lo chhuk bawk a, vân aṭangin an hnênah thu i sawi a, rorêlna dik tak te, dân dik tak te, thuruat leh thupêk ṭha takte i pe a;
tin, i Chawlhni thianghlim chu anmahni i hriattîr a, i chhiahhlawh Mosia hmangin thupêk te, thuruat te, dân te i pe a;
tin, an rilṭâm tihreh nân vân aṭangin chhang i pe a, an tuihâl tihreh nân lungpui ata tui i tihchhuahsak a, pêk i tum ram chu luah tûrin i pe a.
Nimahsela, anni leh kan pi leh pute chuan chapo takin thil an ti a, an intiluhlul a, i thupêkte chu an pawm lo va,

an âwih duh lo va, an zînga i thilmak tihte pawh chu an hre duh tawh hek lo; an intiluhlul a, an helin an bâwih nihna lama lêt leh tûrin hotu an ruat ta zâwk a. Nimahsela, nang chu ngaidam tûra inpeih reng Pathian, mi khawngaih thei, lainatnaa khat, thinnel, ngilneihna ngah i ni a, anmahni i thlahthlam chuang lo va.
A ni, bâwngno lem an insiam a, ‘Hei hi a ni, Aigupta ram ata hruai chhuaktu che u in pathian chu,’ an tiha, thinurthlâk tak thil an tih laite pawh khân,

i ngilneihna nasa tak chuan thlalêrah khân i thlahthlam chuang lo va. Kawnga anmahni hruai tûra an chunga chhûm ding chuan chhûnah a kalsan lo va, anmahni ên tûr leh an kalna tûr kawng kawhhmuh tûra mei alh ding pawh chuan zânah a kalsan hek lo.
Anmahni zirtîr tûrin i thlarau ṭha tak chu i pe bawk a, i manna chuan i châwm a, an tuihâl tihreh nân tui i pe a.
A ni, thlalêrah khân kum sawmli i châwm a, eng mah an tlachham lo va; an silhfênte a hlui lo va, an kete chu a vûng lo va.
Tin, ram leh hnamte i pe a, chûng chu an chanpual i sem ṭheuh va. Chutichuan, Sihona ram, Hesbon lalram leh Basan lal Oga ram chu an luah a.
An thlahte chu vâna arsi zâtin i tipung bawk a, an luah tûra an pi leh pute hnêna i lo sawi tawh ramah chuan i hruai lût ta a.
Chutichuan, an thlahte chuan ram chu an luah ta a; tin, nangin chumi rama awm Kanaan mite chu an hmaah i titlâwm a, an duh duha tih atân an lalte leh chumi rama mite nên an kutah i pe a.

Kulh nei khawpuite, ram ṭha tak takte an la a, thil ṭha tinrênga khat inte an luah a, tuikhur hiah sa te, grêp huan te, olive huan te, thei kûng tam takte an nei a. Tichuan, an ei a, an puar a, an lo thau va, i ṭhatna nasa takah chuan nuam an chên a.
Nimahsela, an tihmawh a, i chungah an hel a, i dân chu an hnuchhawn daih a, i lam hawi lehtîr tuma zilhtu i zâwlneite chu an that a, thinurthlâk tak tak thil an ti a.

Chuvâng chuan anmahni tihrehawmtu an hmêlmate kutah chuan i pe a; an mangan laia an auh che khân vân aṭangin i lo ngaithla a; tin, i ngilneihna nasa tak chuan an hmêlmate laka chhan chhuaktu tûr chhandamtute i pe a.

“Nimahsela, râlmuanga an han awm hnu chuan, i mit hmuhah thil ṭha lo an ti leh mai a. Chuvângin, an hmêlmate kutah i pe a; tichuan, an chungah thu an nei a; mahse, an inlamlêta an auh che khân vân aṭangin i lo ngaithla a; vawi tam tak i ngilneihna chuan i chhan chhuak a.

I dâna i hruai luh leh theih nân i zilh ṭhîn a; nimahsela, chapo takin thil an ti a, i thupêkte an pawm lo va, i rorêlna kalhin thil an tisual a (miin an zawma an nunpui tûr chu); tin, tukkhum chhah an chhawn a, an intiluhlul a, an ngaithla duh lo va.
Nimahsela, kum tam tak anmahni i dawh a, i thlarauva i zâwlneite hmangin i zilh ṭhin a; nimahsela, an beng an chhu ngawng a; chuvângin, chûng rama mite kutah chuan i pe ta a.
“Nimahsela, i ngilneihna nasa tak chuan an tâwp hlenna hlauh chu i thlensak lo va, i thlahthlam hek lo; Pathian, mi khawngaih thei tak, lainatnaa khat i ni si a.

Chuvângin, kan Pathian, Pathian ropui, engkim ti thei leh hlauhawm, thuthlung hlena khawngaihna tilangtu chuan kan chung leh kan lalte, kan mi liante, kan puithiamte, kan zâwlneite, kan pi leh pute leh i mite zawng zawng chunga Assuria lalte lal lai aṭanga tûn thlenga hrehawmna lo thleng zozaite hi, thil tê thamah ngai suh ang che.
“Eng pawh ni sela, kan chunga thil lo thleng zawng zawngah hian nang chu i fel a; nang chuan dik takin thil i ti a, keini erawh chuan ṭha lo takin kan ti a ni.
Kan lalte, kan mi liante, kan puithiamte, kan pi leh pute pawhin i dân chu an zâwm lo va, i thupêk leh i thu hriattîr, anmahni i zilhnate chu an pawm hek lo.
An chunga i ṭhat ṭhin tehlul nên, an ramah, ram zau tak leh ram ṭha tak i pêkah chuan i rawng an bâwl lo va, an thil tihsual an bân chuang hek lo.
“Ngai teh, tûnah hi chuan bâwih kan ni ta a, a chhûnga thil rah leh thil ṭha kan pi leh pute ei atân i pêk ramah hian bâwih kan ni.
Kan sual avânga kan chunga lal atâna i ruatte lah chuan an neihnun phah a; kan taksa chungah leh kan ran chungahte lam pawh an duh duhin thu an nei a; kan mangang êm êm mai a ni.
“Chûng zawng zawng avâng chuan thu nghet tak kan thlung a, kan ziak a; kan mi liante, kan Levi-hote leh kan puithiamten min nemnghehpui a,” tiin.
Tichuan, min nemnghehpuitute chu hêng hi an ni: Hakalia fapa, ram awptu Nehemia leh Zedekia te,
Seraia te, Azaria te, Jeremia te,
Pasura te, Amaria te, Malkija te,
Hatusa te, Sebania te, Maluka te,
Harima te, Meremotha te, Obadia te,
Daniela te, Ginethona te, Baruka te,
Mesulama te, Abija te, Mijamina te,
Maazia te, Bilgaia te, Semaia te: hêngho hi puithiam an ni.
Tin, Levi-hote: Azania fapa Jesua te, Henadada fate zînga mi Binuia te, Kadmiela te;
tin, an unau Sebania te, Hodija te, Kelita te, Pelaia te, Hanana te,
Mika te, Rehoba te, Hasabia te,
Zakura te, Serebia te, Sebania te,
Hodia te, Bania te, Beninua te.
Mipui hotute: Parosa te, Pahath-moaba te, Elama te, Zatua te, Bania te;
Bunia te, Azgada te, Bebaia te;
Adonija te, Bigvaia te, Adina te,
Atera te, Hezekia te, Azura te,
Hodia te, Hasuma te, Bezaia te,
Haripha te, Anathotha te, Nebaia te,
Magpiasa te, Mesulama te, Hezira te,
Mesezabela te, Zadoka te, Jadua te,
Pelatia te, Hanana te, Anaia te,
Hosea te, Hanania te, Hasuba te,
Hallohesa te, Pilha te, Sobeka te,
Rehuma te, Hasabna te, Maaseia te,
Ahia te, Hanana te, Anana te,
Maluka te, Harima te, Baana te.

Tin, mi dang - puithiamte, Levi-hote, kawngkhâr vêngtute, hla satute, Nethin-hote leh Pathian dân zawm tuma chûng rama mite laka inthiarfihlîm zawng zawngte, an nupuite, an fapate, an fanute, chinchâng hre thei tawh chinte chuan,
an unaute, an mi liante chu an vuan tlat a, Pathian chhiahhlawh Mosia pêk Pathian dân zâwm tûra Lalpa, kan Lalpa thupêk zawng zawngte leh a rorêlnate leh a thuruatte chu zâwm leh vawnga,
chu rama mite chu kan fanute neihtîr lova, kan fapate tân an fanute nei hek lova,

chu rama miten Chawlhnia thil zawrh tûr bungrua emaw, ei tûr rêng rêng zawrh tûr emaw an rawn lâka Chawlhni emaw, awmni kham ni emawa leisak lova, kum sarihnaa ram dah tuia leiba zawng zawng ṭhîng lo tûrin ânchhe dawn huamin chhia an chham a.
Tin, kan Pathian in lama rawngbâwlna atân sekel hmun thuma ṭhena hmun khat kum tina pêk tûrin dân kan insiam bawk a.

Chhangdah atân te, chhangphut thilhlan fo tûr atân te, hâlral thilhlan fo tûr atân te, Chawlhni atân te, thla thar atân te, hunbi nei kût atân te, thil thianghlim atân te, Israel mite tâna inremna siamna tûra sual thawina atân leh kan Pathian in lama tih tûr zawng zawng tih nân te.

Kan pi leh pute chhûngkua ang zêla kum tina hunbi ruata dân bua ziak anga, Lalpa kan Pathian maichâma hâl tûr thing hlan kan Pathian ina chhêktu tûr hriat nân puithiamho nên, Levi-ho nên, mipuite nên ṭhum kan vâwr a.
Tin, kum tina kan lova thlai thar hmasa ber leh thing chi tinrêng rah hmasa ber Lalpa ina dah lût tûr te,
dâna ziak anga kan fapa leh kan ran piang hmasa berte, kan bâwng rual leh berâm rual zinga piang hmasa berte pawh, kan Pathian ina rawngbâwltu puithiamte hnêna kan Pathian ina hruai tûr te,

kan Pathian in pindana puithiamte hnêna kan chhang hmeh hmasa ber te, kan thên thilhlan te, thing chi tinrêng rah te, uain leh hriak keng tûr te, kan lova mi sâwma pakhat Levi-hote pêk tûr tein dân kan insiam bawk a, anni Levi-hote chuan kan khaw zînga thlawhhma nei khua apiangah sâwma pakhat an la ṭhîn a ni a.

Tin, Levi-hoten sâwma pakhat an lâk laiin Arona thlah puithiam chu Levi-hote hnênah an awm tûr a ni a; Levi-hote chuan sâwma pakhat an lâk ata sâwma pakhat chu kan Pathian inah, ro dah khâwmna pindanah chuan an rawn dah tûr a ni.

Israela thlahte leh Levia thlahte chuan, buh leh uain leh hriak thên thilhlan chu hmun thianghlim bungbêl leh rawngbâwltu puithiamte, kawngkhâr vêngtute, hla satute awmna pindanah chuan an dah tûr a ni a; chutiang chuan a ni, kan Pathian in chu thlahthlam lo tûra dân kan insiam ni.
Mipui hotute chu Jerusalem-ah an awm a; sâwm zînga pakhat zêl khawpui thianghlim Jerusalem-a awmtîr tûr leh, sâwm zînga pakua, khaw danga awm tûrte hriat nân a bâk mipuite pawh chuan ṭhum an vâwr a.
Lungni taka Jerusalem-a awm tûra inpe zawng zawngte chuan mipuite fak an hlawh a.

Hêngte hi chumi ram hotu Jerusalem-a awmte chu an ni. Amaherawhchu, Judai ram khuaahte chuan, an khuaa mahni chan tûr ṭheuhvah an awm a; chûngte chu Israel-hote, puithiamhote, Levi-hote, Nethin-ho leh Solomona chhiahhlawhte thlah an ni.

Jerusalem-ah chuan Juda thlaha mi leh Benjamina thlaha mite an awm. Juda thlahte zînga mi: Pereza thlahte zînga mi, Mahalalela fapa Sephatia, chu mi fapa Amaria, chu mi fapa Zekaria, chu mi fapa Athaia, chu mi fapa Uzia leh,
Silo mi fapa Zekaria, chu mi fapa Joiariba, chu mi fapa Adaia, chu mi fapa Hazaia, chu mi fapa Kol-hozea, chu mi fapa Baruka, chu mi fapa Maaseia.
Pereza thlah, Jerusalem-a awm zawng zawngte chu mi huaisen zali leh sawmruk leh pariat an ni.
Tin, Benjamina thlahte zînga mi chu hêngte hi an ni: Jesaia fapa Ithiela, chu mi fapa Maaseia, chu mi fapa Kolaia, chu mi fapa Pedaia, chu mi fapa Joeda, chu mi fapa Mesulama, chu mi fapa Salua.
A dawt lehah chuan Gabaia te, Salaia te, an zain Benjamina thlah Jerusalem-a awmte chu mi zakua leh sawmhnih leh pariat an ni.
Tin, Zikria fapa Joela chu an hotu a ni; Hasenua fapa Juda chu khaw hotu ber dawttu a ni.
Puithiamte zînga mi: Joiariba fapa Jedaia te, Jakina te,
Pathian in hotu Ahituba fapa Meraiotha, chu mi fapa Zadoka, chu mi fapa Mesulama, chu mi fapa Hilkia, chu mi fapa Seraia te;

an unau, ina rawngbâwltute zawng zawng nên zariat leh sawmhnih leh pahnih an ni a; tin, Malkija fapa Pasura, chu mi fapa Zekaria, chu mi fapa Amzia, chu mi fapa Pelalia, chu mi fapa Jerohama, chu mi fapa Adaia leh
a unaute, an chhûngkaw puipate nên zahnih leh sawmli pahnih an ni a; tin, Imera fapa Mesilemotha, chu mi fapa Ahzaia, chu mi fapa Azarela, chu mi fapa Amasaia leh
an unau mi chak huaisente nên za leh sawmhnih leh pariat an ni: an hotu chu Hagedolima fapa Zabdiela a ni a.
Tin, Levi-hote zinga mi: Bunia fapa Hasabia, chu mi fapa Azrikama, chu mi fapa Hasuba, chu mi fapa Semaia te;
Levi-ho puipate zînga mi Pathian in pâwn lam hna enkawltu Sabethaia leh Jozabada-te;
Asapha fapa Zabdia, chu mi fapa Mika, chu mi fapa, ṭawngṭaia lâwm thu sawi ṭantu ber Matania te; a unaute zînga a dawttu Bakbukia te; Jeduthuna fapa Galala, chu mi fapa Samua, chu mi fapa Abda te.
Khawpui thianghlima Levi-ho awm zawng zawng chu zahnih leh sawmriat leh pali an ni.
Chûng lote pawh chu kawngkhâr vêngtu Akuba te, Talmona te leh an unau kulh kawngka vêngtute, za leh sawmsarih leh pahnih an ni a.
A bâk Israel-te leh puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu Judai ram khaw tinah mahni ram ṭheuhvah an awm a.
Nethin-ho erawh chu Ophel-ah an awm a. Ziha leh Gispa chu Nethin-ho hotu an ni a.
Jerusalem khuaa Levi-hote hotu chu Asapha fa, hla satute zînga mi Mika, chu mi fapa Matania, chu mi fapa Hasabia, chu mi fapa Bania, chu mi fapa Uzia a ni a, Pathian in lam hna ngaihtuahtu a ni.
An chungchâng thûah lal thupêk a awm a, hla satute chu ni tina an tla tâwk ruat tûr thu a awm bawk si a.
Juda fapa Zera thlaha mi Mesezabela fapa Pethahia chu mipuite chungchâng thûah engkima lal aiawh a ni a.
Tin, an khua leh an ram thûah chuan, Juda thlah ṭhenkhatte chu Kiriath-arba leh a khawperah te, Dibon leh a khawperah te, Jekabzeel leh a khawperah te;
Jesua-ah leh Molada-ah leh Beth-pelet-ah te;
tin, Hazar-sual-ah te, Beer-seba leh an khawperah te;
Ziglag-ah te, Mekona leh a khawperah te;
En-rimon-ah te, Zora-ah te, Jarmuth-ah te,
Zanoa-ah te, Adulam-ah leh an khawperah te; Lakis leh a ramah te; Azeka leh a khawperah te an awm a. Chutichuan, Beer-seba aṭangin Hinom ruam thlengin awm hmun an khuar a.
Tin, Benjamina thlahte chu Geba piah lama Mikmas-ah te, Aija-ah leh Bethel leh a khawperah te;
Anathoth-ah te, Nob-ah te, Anania-ah te;
Hazor-ah te, Rama-ah te, Gitaim-ah te;
Hadid-ah te, Zeboim-ah te, Neballat-ah te;
Lod-ah leh themthiamte ruam Ono-ah te an awm a.
Tin, Judai rama awm ṭhîn Levi-ho pâwl ṭhenkhat chu Benjamin ramah an tel ta a.
Sealtiela fapa Zerubabela leh Jesua hnêna kal chho puithiamte leh Levi-hote chu hêngte hi an ni: Seraia te, Jeremia te, Ezra te,
Amaria te, Maluka te, Hatusa te,
Sekania te, Rehuma te, Meremotha te,
Idova te, Ginethoia te, Abija te,
Mijamina te, Ma-adia te, Bilga te,
Semaia te, Joiariba te, Jedaia te,
Salua te, Amoka te, Hilkia te, Jedaia te. Hêngho hi Jesua dam laia puithiam zîng leh an unaute zînga a hotute an ni.
Chûng lo pawh Levi-hote: Jesua te, Binuia te, Kadmiela te, Serebia te, Juda te, lâwmthu sawinaa hotu Matania te, amah leh a unaute chu.
Bakbukia leh Unia leh an unaute pawh chu a pâwl pâwlin an inchhâwn ṭhîn a.
Tin, Jesua chuan Joiakima a hring a, Joiakima chuan Eliasiba a hring a, Eliasiba chuan Joiada a hring a,
Joiada chuan Jonathana a hring a, Jonathana chuan Jadua a hring a.
Tin, hêngho hi Joiakima dam lai chuan puithiam, an chhûngkaw puipate an ni: Seraia thlaha mi Meraia te; Jeremia thlaha mi Hanania te;
Ezra thlaha mi Mesulama te; Amaria thlaha mi Jehohanana te;
Malukia thlaha mi Jonathana te; Sebania thlaha mi Josefa te;
Harima thlaha mi Adna te; Meraiotha thlaha mi Helkaia te;
Idova thlaha mi Zekaria te; Ginethona thlaha mi Mesulama te;
Abija thlaha mi Zikria te; Miniamina thlaha mi te, Moadia thlaha mi Piltaia te;
Bilga thlaha mi Samua te; Semaia thlaha mi Jehonathana te;
